name: Kathryn Harvey
subject: William Timmons is wasting tax payer dollars.
body:
Tariffs imposed April 2.

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c07d2c2bba82/kathryn-harvey-for-congresscampaign-kickoff-6418545?e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| Welcome to Keeping Up with Kathryn Harvey. A weekly digest covering South Carolina politics and opportunities for engagement and action in the Upstate.
---
|
# What a waste...
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=8d6aeee8a3&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| [](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=1d3128000e&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | [Click HERE to watch Timmons waste your tax dollars](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=849a759904&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | [Click HERE to watch Timmons waste time in the House](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=dd646f6084&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| Representative William Timmons wasted taxpayer funds a lot this week! While the House is on fire, he was busy on a tirade against PBS and Sesame Street — two organizations that I worked with for nearly a decade. Back at home, he was busy using taxpayer funds to send out a mailer across the Upstate about a bill that will affect merely **ten** athletes across the United States.
Meanwhile, a 25% tariff is being imposed tomorrow on the leading industry in his district. Yet, William Timmons has backed Trump’s protectionist strategy entirely, focusing on national politics above the people in his own state. "President Trump is working hard to ensure U.S. businesses are on a level playing field in the global economy," he is using every tool in his toolbox to achieve that simple and incredibly appropriate objective.”
This is not the time to waste time interrogating racist trees and Elmo instead of fighting for South Carolinians. We can not afford such an unserious Congressman.
Tomorrow, Planned Parenthood of South Carolina [is in front of the Supreme Court to fight for medicaid access for their patients.](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=9e001a4447&e=edbde6c9b1) Planned Parenthood has provided reproductive healthcare for more than 60 years and they receive just 0.2% or $88,464 of the $34 million the state spent on Medicaid-covered family planning services.
We are also fighting [attacks on DEI both nationally and locally](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=43437a2f4b&e=edbde6c9b1). This is NOT the South Carolina we deserve.
If you're fed up with the people who are governing you, then change it. Run for something, speak up, now is the time. I'm hosting an info session on April 9th in Spartanburg, [join me](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=9cc6056e18&e=edbde6c9b1) and let's do it together.
---
| | | | | | | | | | | [Click here to read more about the tariffs](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=e2b25c2dd3&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=86ae60c4e5&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | **Diversity, Equity, & Inclusion debated on the House Floor TOMORROW**To nobody’s surprise, House Republicans in South Carolina refused to debate their anti-DEI bill today and pushed it to tomorrow, April 2nd. Call or write to your Republican legislators and demand that they vote against this bill.You can use [**this form**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=7a99300cc2&e=edbde6c9b1) to contact your state representative and learn more about advocating from the Statehouse. [**Click here**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=d8dfcba5bf&e=edbde6c9b1) to find contact information for every representative in the Upstate.
---
| [Watch my video on the DEI Bill HERE](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=bd79159187&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | **The freedom to read is under attack.** Greenville library patrons, with help from the ACLU of South Carolina, are suing officials for systematically purging literature by and about LGBTQ people.House Bill 4059, introduced in February 2025, would help protect school librarians from these book bans.
---
| [Click here to contact your representatives](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=4e01ab1f95&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| [](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=e47630d6e3&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=ab31dfe914&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | **So you want to run for office?** Join Emerge South Carolina for an information session on running for office at SPCDP HQ (505 East Main Street) on April 9th at 5:30pm.
---
| [Click here to RSVP](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=74704f0a6c&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | **Stop the SAVE ACT** The SAVE Act would require all Americans to present proof of citizenship in order to vote, when it is already illegal to vote as a non-citizen. It an unnecessary attack on voting rights and a gross misuse of taxpayer funds.
---
| [Click here to take action & learn more](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=9129d0302c&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| [](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=f11cea3040&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | **Family-Planning up for Debate THIS WEEK**
* These bills will shape the future of paid parental leave and reproductive rights in South Carolina. Click the links below to urge your legislators to: | • [**Support Senate Bill 11**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=bc519a0631&e=edbde6c9b1)**** to expand paid parental leave for state employees. •[ **Support House Bill 3108**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=c2c5c3d9b6&e=edbde6c9b1)**,** which would permit doulas to be covered and reimbursed through health insurance.•****[**Oppose Senate Bill 32**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=4cbc55b437&e=edbde6c9b1)**,** which would funnel taxpayer dollars into misleading crisis pregnancy centers.
---

**Urge Lawmakers in the State to Fight for Medicaid**
* **Federal budget proposals threaten major cuts to Medicaid** , which would severely affect SC's **ability to serve children, the disabled and the elderly,** unless the General Assembly used state funds to offset federal cuts. Learn more about medicaid expansion in SC and what we can do to educate our state legislators on these issues****[**here.**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=728d21554a&e=edbde6c9b1)****

| | | | | | | | | | [](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=63b3663f8e&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| **Corey Booker Breaks Filibuster Record**
* **Over 24 hours and counting!** That’s how long US Senator Cory Booker has been speaking on the Senate floor, sounding the alarm about the “grave and urgent” danger that Trump poses to democracy and the American people. He has now broken the record set by South Carolina’s own Strom Thurmond, who spoke for over 24 hours to try and block the Civil Rights Act of 1957. Now, instead of standing in the way of progress, Senator Booker is standing up for it. Watch the live feed [HERE.](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=4a6031894a&e=edbde6c9b1)

---
|

| | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| This past Sunday was a real treat! I had the opportunity to attend the Council for Black Democrats Annual Sunday Dinner in Columbia with SPCDP 2nd Vice Chair, Angelia Edwards. We heard an incredible keynote from DNC Vice Chair Malcom Kenyatta and left inspired for what is to come!
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| It’s not all about politics y’all! Last week I had the incredible opportunity to celebrate Spartanburg’s Little Theatre and the reveal of their next season. The Spartanburg Little Theatre has been providing a place for the arts here in the Upstate since 1945 and they are so integral to our community.
I also got to celebrate Taylor Culliver, our amazing democratic candidate from Greenville who ran for Senate District 8, at his baby shower. Congratulations to the Culliver family!
---
|

body:
My response:
|
---

Peter,

**The Radical Left is after me AGAIN!**

While Democrats in Minnesota are ROLLING in cash donated by Hollywood Elites and Deep State Billionaires, the Industrial Media Complex is trying to attack ME for the thousands of grassroots supporters who choose to donate to my campaign.

They can't stand that a Black Republican is going against their Leftist Identity Politics status quo. Now, they have to resort to "gotcha" tactics, sifting through my campaign with a fine tooth comb.

[ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=ab8860b62e6e4e95afa175ce4b6cd702&_e=HVD7E1qLOYuVrRQEu9QoTr-komSJQ6qFMOsvDbUGp6hyZnEFslS4YbgZqpcVTXv8hmtZ3d_v4aj6VNLyBtvusMPqVfOFfrGYFo1_EZDNHJIlR6_w4yKT3FB7qIB2tyfCcfiLnFHic4ea1xaIQAfXVg-6MdN4B5NIntZfeZpXg3PaE54JEzTGDB43vtkEyA27Cblxawf6dgOjAPvDoALP9xCtYhVbVjtdm_3EcQ6Y8U5TAjD5UtJVOUAHrHg4FKic5L85A5CYrsKIWZGO1BmayI6aFgf36beZnfKSMu58PBAz1P9J4KwjQQNVopiNK5FR6JJqj5NkLWew50cFwIaOEQ%3D%3D)
**Here 's what they FAIL to mention: nearly 30,000 Americans have all joined my People-First team because they are SICK AND TIRED of the Radical Left shoving their woke agenda down our throats. **

They got lucky in Minnesota last November. It won't happen again. They know this. That's exactly why they're already attacking me for over a year until the 2026 midterms. ANOTHER SHAM WITCH HUNT!

**[I want to prove a point to them, and I need your help. No matter what they do, no matter what they attack me about, my movement is not going ANYWHERE!](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=ab8860b62e6e4e95afa175ce4b6cd702&_e=HVD7E1qLOYuVrRQEu9QoTr-komSJQ6qFMOsvDbUGp6hyZnEFslS4YbgZqpcVTXv8hmtZ3d_v4aj6VNLyBtvusMPqVfOFfrGYFo1_EZDNHJIlR6_w4yKT3FB7qIB2tyfCcfiLnFHic4ea1xaIQAfXVg-6MdN4B5NIntZfeZpXg3PaE54JEzTGDB43vtkEyA27qAz_o6b5TiTCDOOHUTipO4U4xhB6qqbfU6uyKeUEyzJ3LIixuWKQPQnMvfopIISu1mMr5zICT4z4Slfpbg_6n452U3uj2TFd7owfs-h0LFVdZFNC3gnHSJzTuUuYLLYwy63vnZymldKzX5r0ufzo9g%3D%3D)**

**_Last month, the average donation to my campaign was $15.71. This comes from THOUSANDS of loyal supporters who want me to BEAT my Radical Leftist opponent for Senate in 2026, whether it 's Ilhan Omar, Tim Walz, Keith Ellison, Peggy Flannagan, Angie Craig, or WHOEVER._**

**[Now, I'm humbly asking you to donate $20 before midnight to bring my average donation up in April. This is our best way to show the Industrial Media Complex and Radical Left that I'M NOT GOING AWAY!](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=ab8860b62e6e4e95afa175ce4b6cd702&_e=HVD7E1qLOYuVrRQEu9QoTr-komSJQ6qFMOsvDbUGp6hyZnEFslS4YbgZqpcVTXv8hmtZ3d_v4aj6VNLyBtvusMPqVfOFfrGYFo1_EZDNHJIlR6_w4yKT3FB7qIB2tyfCcfiLnFHic4ea1xaIQAfXVg-6MdN4B5NIntZfeZpXg3PaE54JEzTGDB43vtkEyA27Bu9Gq92IyHE_xpS3cb7YxiyHAaAyUEw28s0r25PfDs60UiCsvV4fS0oIgx9m2GHV2QSnXxqjnYnSjndcfT7pKkFPrQ-Gk96WP6iR_W8m0qYg_XDSCHIHVDvtR3kdidEbBs2GmZ9Cht7ijNxYzsPgnA%3D%3D)**

| [ **DONATE $20** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=ab8860b62e6e4e95afa175ce4b6cd702&_e=HVD7E1qLOYuVrRQEu9QoTr-komSJQ6qFMOsvDbUGp6hyZnEFslS4YbgZqpcVTXv8hmtZ3d_v4aj6VNLyBtvusMPqVfOFfrGYFo1_EZDNHJIlR6_w4yKT3FB7qIB2tyfCcfiLnFHic4ea1xaIQAfXVg-6MdN4B5NIntZfeZpXg3PaE54JEzTGDB43vtkEyA27CsS62n3xYTwTqqVJil6cHtGdjEL_EJOJtZvaan1FK-yDGiOX0NvDrSZbyFAMIEaWSkJXPifAmA83v1pAromn2ofhOt23T60jWYCYdqpfmSEKQxVm-bpf3KEq574aMoGBOO-sWLRzgRPqOaUajztkSg%3D%3D)

Royce White

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=ab8860b62e6e4e95afa175ce4b6cd702&_e=HVD7E1qLOYuVrRQEu9QoTr-komSJQ6qFMOsvDbUGp6hyZnEFslS4YbgZqpcVTXv8hmtZ3d_v4aj6VNLyBtvusMPqVfOFfrGYFo1_EZDNHJIlR6_w4yKT3FB7qIB2tyfCcfiLnFHic4ea1xaIQAfXVg-6MdN4B5NIntZfeZpXg3PaE54JEzTGDB43vtkEyA27n1zsaq3wO1yeswFGuvqDAk9pb47Uv25GG_AxDA6jqI17kOocV9-cLH0VyuFTV7bD61PTmi_tKv3lIbh-7pHXJHMkE2SPEC14Cu28eFnuMq7tOlsPZcuxcKvdcr_5AcW1lH3to-rPptDjWH3cXEzxcg%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation - not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read "Free The Uyghurs." After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=ab8860b62e6e4e95afa175ce4b6cd702&_e=HVD7E1qLOYuVrRQEu9QoTr-komSJQ6qFMOsvDbUGp6hyZnEFslS4YbgZqpcVTXv8hmtZ3d_v4aj6VNLyBtvusMPqVfOFfrGYFo1_EZDNHJIlR6_w4yKT3FB7qIB2tyfCcfiLnFHic4ea1xaIQAfXVg-6MdN4B5NIntZfeZpXg3PaE54JEzTGDB43vtkEyA27f8TZ-mYnc2SmHNkj5q5DFcU_GrFFuz1iUNO91oip6sZSMB3miJ8jYqhK1xn0NTdODm9gbp02g8xCqV9kSiTe4MLkK9_g7IajPvCP8U3tykwfip02MjOPRkh4j-j0tpvRc6Ga8trLse4mXdMOkjQXXQ%3D%3D)

---

PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343

---
Copyright (C) 2025 Royce White For Senate, All rights reserved.
You are receiving this email because you are interested in updates from Royce White, Senate Candidate in Minnesota.

This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Don't want to receive our emails anymore? [Unsubscribe](https://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_s=ab8860b62e6e4e95afa175ce4b6cd702&_t=IA2YH-1XeKhCaHACSXY7q9V5-ajSqN_9HSFcjc2gmXTU85I1IyWz3DnWz7XunpHtJ1N2Gc95tDAUqDfThgSQVjPxOFzaq1k-cDlZBvBmrqMdMlbtHEuYZ8Gi01v4javW)

[ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=ab8860b62e6e4e95afa175ce4b6cd702&_e=HVD7E1qLOYuVrRQEu9QoTl40zFU5C-wf2MHJlCkARKq5f8i1Ya_3MXLRWY7iAJ0akdo_Jiz1cB2HDCt4oPz9BWwTyTccxXdqn1rAtItO_TM8xvOCL_CDuDxAxQSgxPJXmL1QWX3s0wrIX63C7A7TROYML8jb1bHMAe_68Z0yGCTV2XMaAG_WZnV3PcPGRtUMV91bI0FtEomIQni3ro5w77oXROV8Y_pYcl-tGMAmxUGPoIhvAaXJjwQ4YmUjH3Zu)

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105002537/537090218/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE405_20250402_WISCRR_PL_v1s1&sourceid=1055905&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzdmYTczNy02YjBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hLk-5NTlht4cil9mJ8I5MWulnX136n3I-SBbWpE8kAQ=) Hi Peter, I'm thrilled to share this news:

**Judge Susan Crawford just WON her Wisconsin Supreme Court race!**

This is a powerful victory for abortion rights, voting rights, and election integrity — and it couldn’t have happened without your support.

**We have the momentum — and we'll carry it into elections this year, into 2026, and beyond!**

We have the momentum — and we'll carry it into elections this year, into 2026, and beyond! = | = Judge Crawford's campaign was one rooted in integrity and a deep commitment to justice. name: Cory Booker
subject: We must speak up
body:
---
Derek, I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I’ve said again and again, this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. **We must speak up.** I am filled with hope. My team just told me that tens of thousands of you have voiced your support for my remarks on the Senate floor. It will be a while before I can fully get through all your messages and powerful stories, but what’s clear to me tonight is this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. With love and gratitude, Cory Cory Booker
U.S. Senator, New Jersey | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025-booker?amount=10&refcode=em_20250401_3112_fr&refcode2=3112_22930333_63qmJm&akid=3112%2E22930333%2E63qmJm)
---

**Democrats like Cory Booker are standing up and speaking out.**
**We can — and will — elect more Democrats who will check Trump’s power. But it’s only possible with your help.**
[**If you were inspired by what you saw today, split a contribution between Cory Booker and the DNC:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025-booker?amount=10&refcode=em_20250401_3112_fr&refcode2=3112_22930333_63qmJm&akid=3112%2E22930333%2E63qmJm)
**[CONTRIBUTE $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025-booker?refcode=em_20250401_3112_fr&amount=10&refcode2=3112_22930333_63qmJm&akid=3112%2E22930333%2E63qmJm)**

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

Thank you all for your gracious support, patience, and outpouring of love as my family and I have navigated an extremely difficult last several weeks. I am blessed to have a loving community to keep me balanced, whole, and safe. My father's passing is a stark reminder of the importance of community in difficult times, a reminder of how fleeting our time is here on Earth, and a reminder of the fierce urgency to act now.
His death has left a void that I know will not be filled any time soon, or ever, and I will continue to mourn in the coming days and months, as any son would. But just as my father laid his father to rest in 1977 and continued his mission to serve humanity--by literally flying across the world just days later--I intend to follow in my father's footsteps in 2025, and continue my advocacy for human rights and absolute justice.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..pdwAMLQI6p_9mJQ3WYLoLYAvi09pCHwHzneayDdS3RA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=160393447)
This week I am picking up where I left off, researching and writing daily posts on the critical human rights issues that impact us all--particularly the ones corporate media continues to ignore. Expect forthcoming pieces on how to prevent billionaires from exploiting marginalized communities, how to combat the autocrats working overtime to limit free speech and accessible Internet, and how to rebuke corporate media's capitulation to the highest bidder, and more.
Today we won an important battle in Wisconsin, where despite a billionaire sinking $20M into the judicial race, the candidate powered by the people, won. Tomorrow we return to the fight to win the next battle to save our democracy.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..pdwAMLQI6p_9mJQ3WYLoLYAvi09pCHwHzneayDdS3RA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=160393447)
## No Paywalls for Let's Address This
As always, my content will _not_ be behind a paywall, and no person will be asked to pay for access. I ask those readers of mine who have the means[ to become paying subscribers](https://substack.com/redirect/b9f6ab54-3ac7-417b-9d1b-ec1ed7b61cdb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), to do so only if two things are true for you:
* You have the financial means to invest $6/mo or $50/yr to support my advocacy.
* You believe in my research and scholarship, and want to help build a platform to combat the misinformation and disinformation dominating corporate media.

**By the way, your support has elevated Let 's Address This to rank #71 nationwide on U.S. Politics.** (More on this later). But I'd love to crack the Top 50--and can with your support. We have work to do, and it is not work I can do alone. We need community, we need unity, we need strength in numbers. Thank you for your ongoing trust and partnership. Know that it is deeply valued, as my work would not be possible without your support.
Subscribe, share, comment, and take action for justice.
Let's build our more perfect union--together.
**I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism and injustice in America and around the world --and I cannot do it alone. Subscribe and join our movement of more than 123,000 activists.**

I'm grieving but I'm in a place of balance, and we have work to do | | | Apr 2 | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you all for your gracious support, patience, and outpouring of love as my family and I have navigated an extremely difficult last several weeks. I am blessed to have a loving community to keep me balanced, whole, and safe. My father's passing is a stark reminder of the importance of community in difficult times, a reminder of how fleeting our time is here on Earth, and a reminder of the fierce urgency to act now. His death has left a void that I know will not be filled any time soon, or ever, and I will continue to mourn in the coming days and months, as any son would. But just as my father laid his father to rest in 1977 and continued his mission to serve humanity--by literally flying across the world just days later--I intend to follow in my father's footsteps in 2025, and continue my advocacy for human rights and absolute justice. This week I am picking up where I left off, researching and writing daily posts on the critical human rights issues that impact us all--particularly the ones corporate media continues to ignore. Expect forthcoming pieces on how to prevent billionaires from exploiting marginalized communities, how to combat the autocrats working overtime to limit free speech and accessible Internet, and how to rebuke corporate media's capitulation to the highest bidder, and more. Today we won an important battle in Wisconsin, where despite a billionaire sinking $20M into the judicial race, the candidate powered by the people, won. Tomorrow we return to the fight to win the next battle to save our democracy. subject: Elon Musk sheds a tear & sends a warning
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOD, FAMILY, COUNTRY PAC
body:
Democrats want to take DOGE to the woodchipper

| | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlcut21dsa8h9flhd15ckr35k8c66q4trnaigdqo_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clge1o32cth2bs)
---
**ELON MUSK’S MESSAGE TO EVERY AMERICAN ABOUT THE FUTURE OF DOGE THAT EVERY TRUMP VOTER HAS TO READ BEFORE THE DAY IS OVER:**
**_"All we're trying to do is restore the will of the people through the president. There's a vast unelected Federal bureaucracy that is opposed to the President and the cabinet. _**
**_DC voting is 92% Kamala, that's a lot. That's basically almost everyone. If the will of the President is not implemented, and the President is representative of the people, that means the will of the people isn't being implemented. _**
**_That means we don't live in a democracy we live in a bureaucracy. I think what we're seeing here is a thrashing of the bureaucracy while we try to reestablish democracy and the will of the people."_**
—---
Thank you for taking the time to read Elon’s message.
The heartbreaking fact is, even with the control of the White House & Congress, the entrenched federal bureaucracy is doing everything possible to take out Elon Musk for good.
A corrupt network of Obama-appointed activist judges has already ruled against President Trump’s most ambitious executive orders.
**_And now, Democrat members of Congress are calling for street violence against Elon Musk and EVERY Trump supporter._**
President Trump & Elon are doing everything they can, but the fact is, they can only do so much.
The real power lies with grassroots Patriots like you.
Your response - _right here, right now_ \- will send a message loud & clear that **WE THE PEOPLE** stand with President Trump & Elon at this critical moment in history.
But it has to be immediate, and it has to be massive.
Because anything short of an overwhelming response will be a failure.
**[So before Democrats levy their next round of attacks against DOGE, can we count on you to go on the record and say I STAND WITH DOGE](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjuepuejuckq1ofjrvhf2jfsqksjoa9l6qqh5s68_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clge1o32cth2bs)**

[STAND WITH DOGE](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zshs620jn552ivjfjt11b0ddqvv7gic5q8v7r770_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clge1o32cth2bs)
Please. This is the single most important thing you can do today.
Please don’t be silent at this most critical moment.[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zg4456tsrcsbossgkjbg74bmvep7buck64hcshig_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clge1o32cth2bs)

name: Sheriff Chad Bianco
subject: We can win in California again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bianco for Governor 2026
body:
Kamala Harris is gearing up for the California Governor’s race.

| |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,You may recognize me as Riverside County Sheriff. As Sheriff I am responsible for the County's five jail facilities, six court buildings, a civil bureau, the Coroner's Bureau, Public Administrator's Office, twelve patrol stations, seventeen contract cities, 4,200 dedicated employees and an operating budget of just over one billion dollars.It’s a lot of responsibility, but having the honor of keeping my home safe is the best job in the world.
---
| | Throughout my career in law enforcement, I have fought back against the pro-criminal policies coming out of Sacramento. We have held the line and kept Riverside County safe. Now, the threat that the Democrat leadership poses to our communities is graver than ever before.
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z38phtvnnsapm57akvjgd2hc614bt0d0v50c1c0g_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clge1o35chh2bs)
---
| | That’s because Kamala Harris is positioning herself to run for Governor of California. **[Today, I’m asking you to help me defeat radical Kamala Harris in the race for California Governor.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z91nq933k1mo5e4r78ub21n5prsrdp5vvoh4cm4g_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clge1o35chh2bs)** Californians are waking up to how disastrous these years of Democrat rule have been. There is no better way to highlight that failure than putting myself, a Sheriff who has spent decades defending law and order, up against Kamala Harris, who as Attorney General oversaw the severe decline in public safety that we are living with today.Kamala Harris, Karen Bass, Katie Porter, and Adam Schiff want us to forget the harm that Democrat rule has caused to California.But you know how these years have been:
---
* Democrats’ lack of preparation and water management allowed wildfires to ravage the state, while Karen Bass and Gavin Newsom were nowhere to be found.
* Despite Democrats spending hundreds of millions to “fix” it—crime, homelessness, and drug addiction skyrocketed.
* Democrats wasted billions of dollars on “high-speed rail” with nothing to show for it.

---
As they say: fool me once, shame on you... Fool me twice, shame on me.Well Californians ought to be ashamed.There’s rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is unbearable...Californians are being taxed to death just to watch their hard-earned dollars go towards fighting against Trump’s common-sense policies like wildfire prevention, immigration reform, and water storage improvement.These California Democrats don’t care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I’d go even further to say they _welcome_ the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent.And I wouldn’t blame you if you said, “Chad, I’m afraid California’s best days are behind us.”But listen, here’s something you need to remember...**_Republicans turned things around_ by electing Ronald Reagan as Governor of California.****_And we can do that again_**. **But there’s no way I can pull it off without you.****[That’s why I’m asking you to rush your $35 donation to my campaign today.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zle7e28hitcffgcm8c2o2dt98mjvi1fbjl80f050_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clge1o35chh2bs)** More and more everyday Americans are waking up to the harm that years of Democrat rule has caused them, and they are turning their backs on the party that betrayed them. A recent statewide poll showed Gov. Gavin Newsom's approval rating among likely voters at 44%. The number for the state legislature is even lower, with a 40% approval rating. Fewer than 20% of L.A. residents give Mayor Karen Bass high marks for fire response. Six in 10 voters said they felt the state was going in the wrong direction. The polling for Republicans has never been stronger in 20 years because of the dissatisfaction with the Democrats controlling their government.The time is right...But California is massive. We need to ignite a massive grassroots movement to compete across all 163,696 square miles and in all 58 counties. **[**When you rush your Bianco for California contribution of $35 or more...**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zv27oh0527fjp0v777oa4k7l6bkfof8sdp5gj1jg_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clge1o35chh2bs)**...you’re helping us fund ads, appearances, events, fliers, door knockers, EVERYTHING that blankets California with the message: _You don’t have to accept failed Democrat policies that make all of us less safe, less prosperous, and less free.__**We rely on everyday Americans like you**_ — _Not liberal Hollywood elites_ —to fund this campaign. **[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in to my campaign and give us the resources we need to go up against the Kamala Harris fundraising goliath.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1g7dfqok7vbha8g9prknn75f2pe56q90s48u0s0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clge1o35chh2bs)** The Democrat machine that raised a billion dollars for Kamala Harris is going to come out in full force in her home state of California. But people are fed up with her, with her incompetence, and with the years of Democrat rule.Even if she outraises me 10-to-1, I’ll have a good fighting chance.This race is the toughest in the nation. But I have been doing something just as tough—tackling crime in California.Here is what Democrats don’t understand about the crime problem: when someone breaks the law or is a violent repeat offender, you put them in jail. It’s not a systemic or societal problem. Or a racism problem. It is an accountability problem.I’ve been wrangling criminals without help from these Democrats for years.And despite Liberal politicians and the local media trying to get rid of me, I’ve won two terms as Sheriff.That’s how you can know I’m the man for the job.Now I’m ready to do the hardest thing in American politics –- win statewide in California as a Republican.When we win here... defeating Kamala Harris for the second time......we become the line of defense against these failed liberal policies spreading to the rest of the country.And we stop Kamala Harris, or whoever the Democrats put up for Governor, from using California as a liberal launchpad for their extremist agenda.It all depends on you!
---
| | [ **DONATE **](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zd9gccepf84pb92d1p7l1vb4b34tenhrrvn4ggq8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clge1o35chh2bs)
---
Thank you and God Bless,Sheriff Chad Bianco

clean_body: Kamala Harris is gearing up for the California Governor’s race. | | | | | | Dear Friend,You may recognize me as Riverside County Sheriff. As Sheriff I am responsible for the County's five jail facilities, six court buildings, a civil bureau, the Coroner's Bureau, Public Administrator's Office, twelve patrol stations, seventeen contract cities, 4,200 dedicated employees and an operating budget of just over one billion dollars.It’s a lot of responsibility, but having the honor of keeping my home safe is the best job in the world. | | Throughout my career in law enforcement, I have fought back against the pro-criminal policies coming out of Sacramento. We have held the line and kept Riverside County safe. Now, the threat that the Democrat leadership poses to our communities is graver than ever before. | | | That’s because Kamala Harris is positioning herself to run for Governor of California. Californians are waking up to how disastrous these years of Democrat rule have been. There is no better way to highlight that failure than putting myself, a Sheriff who has spent decades defending law and order, up against Kamala Harris, who as Attorney General oversaw the severe decline in public safety that we are living with today.Kamala Harris, Karen Bass, Katie Porter, and Adam Schiff want us to forget the harm that Democrat rule has caused to California.But you know how these years have been: Democrats’ lack of preparation and water management allowed wildfires to ravage the state, while Karen Bass and Gavin Newsom were nowhere to be found. Despite Democrats spending hundreds of millions to “fix” it—crime, homelessness, and drug addiction skyrocketed. Democrats wasted billions of dollars on “high-speed rail” with nothing to show for it. As they say: fool me once, shame on you... Fool me twice, shame on me.Well Californians ought to be ashamed.There’s rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is unbearable...Californians are being taxed to death just to watch their hard-earned dollars go towards fighting against Trump’s common-sense policies like wildfire prevention, immigration reform, and water storage improvement.These California Democrats don’t care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I’d go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent.And I wouldn’t blame you if you said, “Chad, I’m afraid California’s best days are behind us.”But listen, here’s something you need to remember...Republicans turned things around by electing Ronald Reagan as Governor of California.**And we can do that again. But there’s no way I can pull it off without you. More and more everyday Americans are waking up to the harm that years of Democrat rule has caused them, and they are turning their backs on the party that betrayed them. A recent statewide poll showed Gov. Gavin Newsom's approval rating among likely voters at 44%. The number for the state legislature is even lower, with a 40% approval rating. Fewer than 20% of L.A. residents give Mayor Karen Bass high marks for fire response. Six in 10 voters said they felt the state was going in the wrong direction. The polling for Republicans has never been stronger in 20 years because of the dissatisfaction with the Democrats controlling their government.The time is right...But California is massive. We need to ignite a massive grassroots movement to compete across all 163,696 square miles and in all 58 counties. ’re helping us fund ads, appearances, events, fliers, door knockers, EVERYTHING that blankets California with the message: You don’t have to accept failed Democrat policies that make all of us less safe, less prosperous, and less free.We rely on everyday Americans like you — Not liberal Hollywood elites —to fund this campaign. The Democrat machine that raised a billion dollars for Kamala Harris is going to come out in full force in her home state of California. But people are fed up with her, with her incompetence, and with the years of Democrat rule.Even if she outraises me 10-to-1, I’ll have a good fighting chance.This race is the toughest in the nation. But I have been doing something just as tough—tackling crime in California.Here is what Democrats don’t understand about the crime problem: when someone breaks the law or is a violent repeat offender, you put them in jail. It’s not a systemic or societal problem. Or a racism problem. It is an accountability problem.I’ve been wrangling criminals without help from these Democrats for years.And despite Liberal politicians and the local media trying to get rid of me, I’ve won two terms as Sheriff.That’s how you can know I’m the man for the job.Now I’m ready to do the hardest thing in American politics –- win statewide in California as a Republican.When we win here... defeating Kamala Harris for the second time......we become the line of defense against these failed liberal policies spreading to the rest of the country.And we stop Kamala Harris, or whoever the Democrats put up for Governor, from using California as a liberal launchpad for their extremist agenda.It all depends on you! | | Thank you and God Bless,Sheriff Chad Bianco Chad Bianco For Governor | | Paid for by Bianco for Governor 2026 PO Box 706Riverside, CA 92502 Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

keeps promise to boot illegal migrants, alleged gangbangers: sources
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73131&L=34890&F=T&&hash=83af2db904128163ccdedb6951312a6f3ade2d9d861d9421e0ad8a7014407fde]

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73131&L=34890&F=T&&hash=83af2db904128163ccdedb6951312a6f3ade2d9d861d9421e0ad8a7014407fde]

Deportations by Immigration and Customs Enforcement surged above
100,000 since President Trump returned to the White House in January
— as he maintains his promise to boot illegal migrants, alleged
gangbangers and suspected terrorists from the United States, The Post
has learned. ICE officials have made 113,000 arrests and carried out
“north of” 100,000 deportations.

[image] [] RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch" - SEAN HANNITY Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. Order Tom Fitton's Must-Read Today! [] [600x300] [] ICE arrested 113K, deported over 100K since Trump’s return as he keeps promise to boot illegal migrants, alleged gangbangers: sources [] Source: New York Post [] Deportations by Immigration and Customs Enforcement surged above 100,000 since President Trump returned to the White House in January — as he maintains his promise to boot illegal migrants, alleged gangbangers and suspected terrorists from the United States, The Post has learned. ICE officials have made 113,000 arrests and carried out “north of” 100,000 deportations. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] March 17, 2025 Trump Moves to Deport Foreign Terrorist Supporters [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton, explains how guests in our country do not have a right to stay if found supporting violent terrorist organizations such as Hamas and how the Left views American immigration law. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] February 19, 2025 Trump Policies Slash Illegal Immigration, Thousands Make “Hard Trek Back to Their Countries” [] Source: Judicial Watch [] President Trump’s measures to mitigate the unprecedented illegal immigration crisis he inherited from the Biden administration are working and have led to an impressive 93% decline in migrants apprehended at ports of entry since his January 20 inauguration. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] January 23, 2025 Judicial Watch Sues Chicago Mayor for Records on Pledge to Resist Trump’s Mass Deportation Efforts [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch sued Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson for records regarding his vow to resist the Trump administration’s mass deportation and other immigration law enforcement activities. subject: From the Sound of Freedom to…
body:
As the producer of the feature film Sound of Freedom, I helped sound the alarm about the horrific realities of the $9.5 BILLION human trafficking and child sex industry.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zicui7ponot9vocde2gl0smho9c9b8vl67hf2800_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clge1o32cth2bs)
---
Friend, As the producer of the feature film _Sound of Freedom_ , I helped sound the alarm about the horrific realities of the $9.5 BILLION human trafficking and child sex industry._Sound of Freedom_ was a box office hit and gave us the platform to spread awareness about children who must be rescued from unimaginably horrific realities. And now, through The Sound of Freedom Foundation, we identify and track cases of child abduction and trafficking, and we tirelessly search for and rescue defenseless victims. **[**Will you partner with the Sound of Freedom Foundation today in this critical work by making your most generous tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmhbclo1g80plbve897n0993npjes3h9ph8u8ov8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clge1o32cth2bs)**
---
[ Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9bc1i4g0j5o7hmftil5cu4bh1b828slvrnedsi8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clge1o32cth2bs)
---
A **massive surge in immigration** , **skyrocketing drug use** , and**homelessness** are some of the factors that increase the likelihood of being trafficked......but, the reality is that perpetrators of child sex trafficking are skilled in identifying victims and exploiting their vulnerabilities.The result is heart-wrenching for victims and their families.An empty seat at the dinner table.A backpack collects dust as it hangs in the hallway.The pain and anguish that comes from being the family whose child has been abducted by criminals and sold into sex trafficking.And, worst of all, the innocent child who's scared, hurt, and abused by human traffickers.Right now, children are waiting to be rescued from horrific conditions, and it's up to you and me - working together through the Sound of Freedom Foundation - to help God's children return to their parents. **[Your immediate support of $25, $35, $50, $100, or more would be a blessing toward saving the lives of innocent children. I pray you'll help us to rescue victims of sex trafficking with your tax-deductible gift to the Sound of Freedom Foundation today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1eac70u1pu2an5tan9ns4pk8vo41p6nuarj6bn8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clge1o32cth2bs)**
---
[ Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd5866vl3qqoak6vijlfle8de5j1botnpgsc5d7g_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clge1o32cth2bs)
---
In many cases, including those of the children whose story was told in _Sound of Freedom_ , abduction occurs internationally and there are costs associated with hiring attorneys, filing petitions, and even traveling to the country where the child is located.While the cost of returning an abducted child varies depending on the case, the truth is that the rescue of a missing child is an incredibly complex and expensive task._No family deserves to continue staring at an empty seat at the dinner table because there isn 't the financial ability to continue their fight._God's children are NOT for sale, which is why we must act immediately to SAVE these innocent lives from sex trafficking. **[**I hope I can count on your tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, or more to the Sound of Freedom Foundation today to help us reunite young girls and boys who have been trafficked.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z33b4tt716akh0v9d7ept5h9lga0gdfriivt9vbo_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clge1o32cth2bs)**
---
[ Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkbn8r2pfvs7olf1ms8p4b571j6dg5qj2qaf7ju0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clge1o32cth2bs)
---
Together, we can set them free!Many blessings,Eduardo Verastegui
_Sound of Freedom_ , Producer
For the Sound of Freedom Foundation

clean_body: As the producer of the feature film Sound of Freedom, I helped sound the alarm about the horrific realities of the $9.5 BILLION human trafficking and child sex industry. | | | Friend, As the producer of the feature film Sound of Freedom , I helped sound the alarm about the horrific realities of the $9.5 BILLION human trafficking and child sex industry.Sound of Freedom was a box office hit and gave us the platform to spread awareness about children who must be rescued from unimaginably horrific realities. And now, through The Sound of Freedom Foundation, we identify and track cases of child abduction and trafficking, and we tirelessly search for and rescue defenseless victims. A massive surge in immigration , skyrocketing drug use , andhomelessness are some of the factors that increase the likelihood of being trafficked......but, the reality is that perpetrators of child sex trafficking are skilled in identifying victims and exploiting their vulnerabilities.The result is heart-wrenching for victims and their families.An empty seat at the dinner table.A backpack collects dust as it hangs in the hallway.The pain and anguish that comes from being the family whose child has been abducted by criminals and sold into sex trafficking.And, worst of all, the innocent child who's scared, hurt, and abused by human traffickers.Right now, children are waiting to be rescued from horrific conditions, and it's up to you and me - working together through the Sound of Freedom Foundation - to help God's children return to their parents. In many cases, including those of the children whose story was told in Sound of Freedom , abduction occurs internationally and there are costs associated with hiring attorneys, filing petitions, and even traveling to the country where the child is located.While the cost of returning an abducted child varies depending on the case, the truth is that the rescue of a missing child is an incredibly complex and expensive task.No family deserves to continue staring at an empty seat at the dinner table because there isn 't the financial ability to continue their fight.God's children are NOT for sale, which is why we must act immediately to SAVE these innocent lives from sex trafficking. Together, we can set them free!Many blessings,Eduardo Verastegui Sound of Freedom , Producer For the Sound of Freedom Foundation 5442 Thornwood Drive, San Jose CA 95123 Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Sheriff Chad Bianco
subject: We can win in California again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bianco for Governor 2026
body:
Kamala Harris is gearing up for the California Governor’s race.

| |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,You may recognize me as Riverside County Sheriff. As Sheriff I am responsible for the County's five jail facilities, six court buildings, a civil bureau, the Coroner's Bureau, Public Administrator's Office, twelve patrol stations, seventeen contract cities, 4,200 dedicated employees and an operating budget of just over one billion dollars.It’s a lot of responsibility, but having the honor of keeping my home safe is the best job in the world.
---
| | Throughout my career in law enforcement, I have fought back against the pro-criminal policies coming out of Sacramento. We have held the line and kept Riverside County safe. Now, the threat that the Democrat leadership poses to our communities is graver than ever before.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2tbnrbkgje9i3oj51931ti8qd07o6ebgpgnvv58_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clie8or2c1h2bs)
---
| | That’s because Kamala Harris is positioning herself to run for Governor of California. **[Today, I’m asking you to help me defeat radical Kamala Harris in the race for California Governor.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zge39g1d4fdtfdar9rfrkadf2tjn751em71idfi8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clie8or2c1h2bs)** Californians are waking up to how disastrous these years of Democrat rule have been. There is no better way to highlight that failure than putting myself, a Sheriff who has spent decades defending law and order, up against Kamala Harris, who as Attorney General oversaw the severe decline in public safety that we are living with today.Kamala Harris, Karen Bass, Katie Porter, and Adam Schiff want us to forget the harm that Democrat rule has caused to California.But you know how these years have been:
---
* Democrats’ lack of preparation and water management allowed wildfires to ravage the state, while Karen Bass and Gavin Newsom were nowhere to be found.
* Despite Democrats spending hundreds of millions to “fix” it—crime, homelessness, and drug addiction skyrocketed.
* Democrats wasted billions of dollars on “high-speed rail” with nothing to show for it.

---
As they say: fool me once, shame on you... Fool me twice, shame on me.Well Californians ought to be ashamed.There’s rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is unbearable...Californians are being taxed to death just to watch their hard-earned dollars go towards fighting against Trump’s common-sense policies like wildfire prevention, immigration reform, and water storage improvement.These California Democrats don’t care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I’d go even further to say they _welcome_ the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent.And I wouldn’t blame you if you said, “Chad, I’m afraid California’s best days are behind us.”But listen, here’s something you need to remember...**_Republicans turned things around_ by electing Ronald Reagan as Governor of California.****_And we can do that again_**. **But there’s no way I can pull it off without you.****[That’s why I’m asking you to rush your $35 donation to my campaign today.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkruttqat3jtt7i8gobkda3h5um7ih0ga69jce3g_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clie8or2c1h2bs)** More and more everyday Americans are waking up to the harm that years of Democrat rule has caused them, and they are turning their backs on the party that betrayed them. A recent statewide poll showed Gov. Gavin Newsom's approval rating among likely voters at 44%. The number for the state legislature is even lower, with a 40% approval rating. Fewer than 20% of L.A. residents give Mayor Karen Bass high marks for fire response. Six in 10 voters said they felt the state was going in the wrong direction. The polling for Republicans has never been stronger in 20 years because of the dissatisfaction with the Democrats controlling their government.The time is right...But California is massive. We need to ignite a massive grassroots movement to compete across all 163,696 square miles and in all 58 counties. **[**When you rush your Bianco for California contribution of $35 or more...**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmure4av4489fqsinse5fn7p0198bddc6ei7brj8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clie8or2c1h2bs)**...you’re helping us fund ads, appearances, events, fliers, door knockers, EVERYTHING that blankets California with the message: _You don’t have to accept failed Democrat policies that make all of us less safe, less prosperous, and less free.__**We rely on everyday Americans like you**_ — _Not liberal Hollywood elites_ —to fund this campaign. **[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in to my campaign and give us the resources we need to go up against the Kamala Harris fundraising goliath.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2rbqeilrhd3g282fv840ccsi768q4umkpcrobmg_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clie8or2c1h2bs)** The Democrat machine that raised a billion dollars for Kamala Harris is going to come out in full force in her home state of California. But people are fed up with her, with her incompetence, and with the years of Democrat rule.Even if she outraises me 10-to-1, I’ll have a good fighting chance.This race is the toughest in the nation. But I have been doing something just as tough—tackling crime in California.Here is what Democrats don’t understand about the crime problem: when someone breaks the law or is a violent repeat offender, you put them in jail. It’s not a systemic or societal problem. Or a racism problem. It is an accountability problem.I’ve been wrangling criminals without help from these Democrats for years.And despite Liberal politicians and the local media trying to get rid of me, I’ve won two terms as Sheriff.That’s how you can know I’m the man for the job.Now I’m ready to do the hardest thing in American politics –- win statewide in California as a Republican.When we win here... defeating Kamala Harris for the second time......we become the line of defense against these failed liberal policies spreading to the rest of the country.And we stop Kamala Harris, or whoever the Democrats put up for Governor, from using California as a liberal launchpad for their extremist agenda.It all depends on you!
---
| | [ **DONATE **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z49lqmm99nm9h19ugd9ghj9ukg0obcthlc6t9l8g_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clie8or2c1h2bs)
---
Thank you and God Bless,Sheriff Chad Bianco

Californians are waking up to how disastrous these years of Democrat rule have been. There is no better way to highlight that failure than putting myself, a Sheriff who has spent decades defending law and order, up against Kamala Harris, who as Attorney General oversaw the severe decline in public safety that we are living with today.Kamala Harris, Karen Bass, Katie Porter, and Adam Schiff want us to forget the harm that Democrat rule has caused to California.But you know how these years have been: Democrats’ lack of preparation and water management allowed wildfires to ravage the state, while Karen Bass and Gavin Newsom were nowhere to be found. Despite Democrats spending hundreds of millions to “fix” it—crime, homelessness, and drug addiction skyrocketed. Democrats wasted billions of dollars on “high-speed rail” with nothing to show for it. As they say: fool me once, shame on you... Fool me twice, shame on me.Well Californians ought to be ashamed.There’s rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is unbearable...Californians are being taxed to death just to watch their hard-earned dollars go towards fighting against Trump’s common-sense policies like wildfire prevention, immigration reform, and water storage improvement.These California Democrats don’t care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I’d go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent.And I wouldn’t blame you if you said, “Chad, I’m afraid California’s best days are behind us.”But listen, here’s something you need to remember...Republicans turned things around by electing Ronald Reagan as Governor of California.**And we can do that again. But there’s no way I can pull it off without you. More and more everyday Americans are waking up to the harm that years of Democrat rule has caused them, and they are turning their backs on the party that betrayed them. A recent statewide poll showed Gov. Gavin Newsom's approval rating among likely voters at 44%. The number for the state legislature is even lower, with a 40% approval rating. Fewer than 20% of L.A. residents give Mayor Karen Bass high marks for fire response. Six in 10 voters said they felt the state was going in the wrong direction. The polling for Republicans has never been stronger in 20 years because of the dissatisfaction with the Democrats controlling their government.The time is right...But California is massive. We need to ignite a massive grassroots movement to compete across all 163,696 square miles and in all 58 counties. ’re helping us fund ads, appearances, events, fliers, door knockers, EVERYTHING that blankets California with the message: You don’t have to accept failed Democrat policies that make all of us less safe, less prosperous, and less free.We rely on everyday Americans like you — Not liberal Hollywood elites —to fund this campaign. The Democrat machine that raised a billion dollars for Kamala Harris is going to come out in full force in her home state of California. But people are fed up with her, with her incompetence, and with the years of Democrat rule.Even if she outraises me 10-to-1, I’ll have a good fighting chance.This race is the toughest in the nation. But I have been doing something just as tough—tackling crime in California.Here is what Democrats don’t understand about the crime problem: when someone breaks the law or is a violent repeat offender, you put them in jail. It’s not a systemic or societal problem. Or a racism problem. It is an accountability problem.I’ve been wrangling criminals without help from these Democrats for years.And despite Liberal politicians and the local media trying to get rid of me, I’ve won two terms as Sheriff.That’s how you can know I’m the man for the job.Now I’m ready to do the hardest thing in American politics –- win statewide in California as a Republican.When we win here... defeating Kamala Harris for the second time......we become the line of defense against these failed liberal policies spreading to the rest of the country.And we stop Kamala Harris, or whoever the Democrats put up for Governor, from using California as a liberal launchpad for their extremist agenda.It all depends on you! | | Thank you and God Bless,Sheriff Chad Bianco Chad Bianco For Governor | | Paid for by Bianco for Governor 2026 PO Box 706Riverside, CA 92502 Pop Acta Media | 1600 Daily PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

# **[Oklahoma governor signs order directing state to prioritize religious freedom](http://trk.libertyledger.-pG3444Y8Zye3CQQ)**
---
Oklahoma Gov. Kevin Stitt attends a roundtable at the White House in Washington, D.C., on June 18, 2020. / Credit: Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead (public domain) CNA Staff, Apr 1, 2025 / 15:34 pm (CNA). Oklahoma Gov. Kevin Stitt this week signed an executive order instructing state officials to ensure Oklahoma’s laws are “the most robust” in the nation at protecting religious freedom, with the governor also criticizing the state attorney general for attempting to block a proposed Catholic charter school there.The order, announced on Monday, initiates a review of various state laws and policies to ensure they comply with religious freedom protections enshrined in both the U.S. Constitution and the Oklahoma Constitution.

name: Sheriff Chad Bianco
subject: We can win in California again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bianco for Governor 2026
body:
Kamala Harris is gearing up for the California Governor’s race.

| |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,You may recognize me as Riverside County Sheriff. As Sheriff I am responsible for the County's five jail facilities, six court buildings, a civil bureau, the Coroner's Bureau, Public Administrator's Office, twelve patrol stations, seventeen contract cities, 4,200 dedicated employees and an operating budget of just over one billion dollars.It’s a lot of responsibility, but having the honor of keeping my home safe is the best job in the world.
---
| | Throughout my career in law enforcement, I have fought back against the pro-criminal policies coming out of Sacramento. We have held the line and kept Riverside County safe. Now, the threat that the Democrat leadership poses to our communities is graver than ever before.
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr7t0a33osqusdhvpm433sa5o7hu2an5dtr49pno_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clie4pb2cph2bs)
---
| | That’s because Kamala Harris is positioning herself to run for Governor of California. **[Today, I’m asking you to help me defeat radical Kamala Harris in the race for California Governor.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z06m02icm2hadh7bdrg02g33e6pmiso8co84vmd8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clie4pb2cph2bs)** Californians are waking up to how disastrous these years of Democrat rule have been. There is no better way to highlight that failure than putting myself, a Sheriff who has spent decades defending law and order, up against Kamala Harris, who as Attorney General oversaw the severe decline in public safety that we are living with today.Kamala Harris, Karen Bass, Katie Porter, and Adam Schiff want us to forget the harm that Democrat rule has caused to California.But you know how these years have been:
---
* Democrats’ lack of preparation and water management allowed wildfires to ravage the state, while Karen Bass and Gavin Newsom were nowhere to be found.
* Despite Democrats spending hundreds of millions to “fix” it—crime, homelessness, and drug addiction skyrocketed.
* Democrats wasted billions of dollars on “high-speed rail” with nothing to show for it.

---
As they say: fool me once, shame on you... Fool me twice, shame on me.Well Californians ought to be ashamed.There’s rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is unbearable...Californians are being taxed to death just to watch their hard-earned dollars go towards fighting against Trump’s common-sense policies like wildfire prevention, immigration reform, and water storage improvement.These California Democrats don’t care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I’d go even further to say they _welcome_ the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent.And I wouldn’t blame you if you said, “Chad, I’m afraid California’s best days are behind us.”But listen, here’s something you need to remember...**_Republicans turned things around_ by electing Ronald Reagan as Governor of California.****_And we can do that again_**. **But there’s no way I can pull it off without you.****[That’s why I’m asking you to rush your $35 donation to my campaign today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za4n7kln6mpoecmu32anm3dqat5gq3njpu8qvb70_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clie4pb2cph2bs)** More and more everyday Americans are waking up to the harm that years of Democrat rule has caused them, and they are turning their backs on the party that betrayed them. A recent statewide poll showed Gov. Gavin Newsom's approval rating among likely voters at 44%. The number for the state legislature is even lower, with a 40% approval rating. Fewer than 20% of L.A. residents give Mayor Karen Bass high marks for fire response. Six in 10 voters said they felt the state was going in the wrong direction. The polling for Republicans has never been stronger in 20 years because of the dissatisfaction with the Democrats controlling their government.The time is right...But California is massive. We need to ignite a massive grassroots movement to compete across all 163,696 square miles and in all 58 counties. **[**When you rush your Bianco for California contribution of $35 or more...**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8mfdifdv5863n85261g84g3cfu4kg3c357vc2c0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clie4pb2cph2bs)**...you’re helping us fund ads, appearances, events, fliers, door knockers, EVERYTHING that blankets California with the message: _You don’t have to accept failed Democrat policies that make all of us less safe, less prosperous, and less free.__**We rely on everyday Americans like you**_ — _Not liberal Hollywood elites_ —to fund this campaign. **[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in to my campaign and give us the resources we need to go up against the Kamala Harris fundraising goliath.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkcakhduh4t1pnrcncrpj39id9gn8u12hcv4ghho_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clie4pb2cph2bs)** The Democrat machine that raised a billion dollars for Kamala Harris is going to come out in full force in her home state of California. But people are fed up with her, with her incompetence, and with the years of Democrat rule.Even if she outraises me 10-to-1, I’ll have a good fighting chance.This race is the toughest in the nation. But I have been doing something just as tough—tackling crime in California.Here is what Democrats don’t understand about the crime problem: when someone breaks the law or is a violent repeat offender, you put them in jail. It’s not a systemic or societal problem. Or a racism problem. It is an accountability problem.I’ve been wrangling criminals without help from these Democrats for years.And despite Liberal politicians and the local media trying to get rid of me, I’ve won two terms as Sheriff.That’s how you can know I’m the man for the job.Now I’m ready to do the hardest thing in American politics –- win statewide in California as a Republican.When we win here... defeating Kamala Harris for the second time......we become the line of defense against these failed liberal policies spreading to the rest of the country.And we stop Kamala Harris, or whoever the Democrats put up for Governor, from using California as a liberal launchpad for their extremist agenda.It all depends on you!
---
| | [ **DONATE **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztnau3l6hgib1l34eue8c9rtag8iodqouvl47r8o_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clie4pb2cph2bs)
---
Thank you and God Bless,Sheriff Chad Bianco
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq4etqj0laup00ocn6iukf7sqduqape6m3ke3kk0_rp22sh2s8i6eob6clie4pb2cph2bs)
---
Chad Bianco For Governor

BRING YOUR PETITIONS TO DROP OFF

# STATE BOARD OF ELECTIONS DEADLINE

# THURSDAY, APRIL 3 AT 5PM

PLEASE FED EX OR OVERNIGHT ALL PETITIONS TO: AMANDA CHASE 2023 CHURCH STREET #250 APPOMATTOX, VA 24522
PLEASE CALL 804 370 8727 IF QUESTIONS OR EMAIL AMANDA@CHASEFORVA.COM
---

|
Dear Hello As of this morning, we have met the 400 minimum signature requirement for 5 of the 11 congressional districts and we are close in most of the rest. We still need help in Congressional District 3, which includes Norfolk and Newport News, and in District 2, which is the Chesapeake/Virginia Beach area and finally Arlington and Loudoun County. Today my team will be collecting signatures this morning in Richmond and this evening in Loudoun.
If you still have petitions, I will be at the Pro-Life Rally in Richmond this morning. I will be at the Bell Tower for the rally and will stay until after it is over.
You can drop off at our campaign headquarters, located at 2023 Church Street #250 in Appomattox.
There will be a Candidate Signatures Open House in Loudoun from 5-8pm this evening at the 10th Congressional District GOP Headquarters, 20098 Ashbrook Place, Suite 150, Ashburn, VA 20147. This is the final opportunity to help get my name on the ballot. I will have volunteers there to get your signature.
Today, after the pro-life rally, I will be at the Chick Fil A near Chesterfield Towne Center, 1590 Koger Center Blvd, North Chesterfield 23235 at 2pm to pick up petitions.
If all else fails, please Fed Ex. I will need to receive no later than midnight tonight.
Here is where we still need help as of last night. These are signatures we have in hand that have been verified thus far. They do not include collected signatures that are in route or haven't been verified yet.
STILL NEEDED: [~~CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICT 1 (HENRICO/CHESTERFIELD)~~](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xnvsIZHAkWB1JVWzDmiAHSeX8kV-yFRZQmVMYzDgn438SV-8xsfKzJe68CAFaokDpgKmpvNj7uV64iAWEq9e1_Kzbq2miTfKOyyLZXLXsYhEiBwKHXfbWoJLetbewqnhHJoqnbSv6ZjGrxVXZ6ILjwkhxnkcdV9QtJecbCAca_mGMjoVpb3EmpuFgkl2vh_YqTtICDA4NKk=&c=CHQfRM2Wzw6uwX203cm1zrYHug3vbTVGPzDmXXMKqUp4BN5yvBjR4g==&ch=9EDLiQSBADdcJk31g7PxvO6sSzhXCyseMukog-sPNOf-542PE039wA==)~~COMPLETED~~ Click on each of the congressional links above to see the map of the district along with cities and counties in each district.
TOMORROW, Thursday, April 3 by 5pm we must turn in our signatures to the Virginia State Board of Elections.
You can still collect through TODAY, but we need in hand before midnight TONIGHT. You will probably need to hand deliver. We must turn in our forms before 5pm this Thursday.
Please stop by the following locations to sign Amanda's petition or pass off petitions.
Wednesday, April 2 Richmond City 10:50am-noon, Pro-Life Rally, Virginia State Capital, Bell Tower *come sign our petition or drop off petitions
Please remember to notarize your form before you Fed Ex it to our Appomattox campaign office:
Friends of Amanda Chase 2023 Church Street #250 Appomattox, VA 24522
Give us a call at 804 370 8727 and we will walk you through what to do, or you can read instructions below.
WE CANNOT COLLECT SIGNATURES ONLINE.
Signatures must be witnessed in person by signing an old fashioned paper petition ballot.
Are you ready to say yes? Here's what you need to do:

1. Print off the attached form on one sheet of paper, front and back. Double sided only.
2. YOU cannot sign your own petition. Please sign someone else's petition.
3. Witness your friends, family and neighbors sign the petition form.
4. Please make sure they actually sign the form.
5. Please also make sure their writing is legible so that signatures can be verified.
6. You must also witness every signature and visit your local bank to have a notary sign off on your petition form before mailing.
7. Keep in mind that you can't sign your own petition form.
8. Please collect signatures by[ Congressional District.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xnvsIZHAkWB1JVWzDmiAHSeX8kV-yFRZQmVMYzDgn438SV-8xsfKzIIb3Z_mv2EmW4W8uBx8viyGMCnCUKSpV8I9X-ynkADYd44IIJ4og0d6zW5i_GMDwOLkXhMUTBySpgWuhJHljMlpU8xN_UsmbaT6U1QzYDIpTUUE5yeX9mCszAZ-1EeSDGODFb2eMw9_orq1rGh1E2A=&c=CHQfRM2Wzw6uwX203cm1zrYHug3vbTVGPzDmXXMKqUp4BN5yvBjR4g==&ch=9EDLiQSBADdcJk31g7PxvO6sSzhXCyseMukog-sPNOf-542PE039wA==) One Congressional District per form. You can write the Congressional District in the upper right hand corner.
9. Get the petition notarized at your local bank for free.
10. Please send us the original, not a photocopy.
11. Drop the petition off in person to: 2023 Church Street, Appomattox, VA 24522
12. Or Fed Ex the petition to:

Friends of Amanda Chase 2023 Church Street #250 Appomattox, VA 24522
Please call us at 804 370 8727 or email me at amanda@chaseforva.com if you have any questions.
---

subject: Thank you, Wisconsin! And F*** you, Elon
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign: "Thank you, Wisconsin! And F*** you, Elon!"](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te5d50df5-a27f-4da9-af7e-e6d0d1c61cb7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Elon Musk spent tens of millions of dollars to try to buy an election for a MAGA judge in Wisconsin. [**And Wisconsin told him exactly where he could stick that money.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td0618c8b-67a0-4e2d-b0f8-d5c7d8367c0a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Elon's (and MAGA's) candidate lost, and Susan Crawford -- the candidate of sane people -- won, meaning hat Wisconsin will keep its liberal majority on the court. And that Musk will look like a jackass. As will Trump. The good side won. And the broligarchs lost. [**Please add your name: "Thank you, Wisconsin! And F*** you, Elon"**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td60721cd-a547-4b6d-84ef-78032f8072c1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Thank you, Left Action

name: Robert J. O'Neill, SEAL Team 6
subject: I've faced down evil, but what the Democrats are doing to this hero is despicable...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
You may not know who I am, but I’d like just 5 minutes of your time.

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
**As the Navy SEAL who took down Osama Bin Laden, I know what it means to risk everything for our country.** But today, I see a new threat—one from within. The radical left is working to dismantle President Trump’s agenda and destroy everything we hold dear.

**That’s why I’m standing with my fellow combat vet, Congressman Troy Downing.**
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Troy is a true American hero. After 9/11, he enlisted in the Air Force and flew helicopters into combat zones to rescue wounded soldiers. Now, he’s fighting for our values in Congress.

But the Democrats and the DC Swamp see him as a threat. They know he won’t play their corrupt games, so they’ll stop at nothing to take him down.

**[_I’m asking you to stand with Troy today._](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-nM0GDXoQjVSKQ)**
---
[ **HELP A COMBAT VET**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-y8q4Zmu5Akw)
---
**As a SEAL, I don’t like asking for help. But this is too important. I humbly ask you to support this warrior who puts everything on the line for our country.**

Troy won’t back down. He won’t quit when the odds are stacked against him. He’ll keep fighting for us, no matter what.

Let’s help this combat vet continue to serve our country and defend President Trump’s agenda.

Never quit,

Robert J. O’Neill
Navy SEAL
---
[ **HELP A COMBAT VET**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-KmCjSaiujym49AJ7ZQ)
---
---
|
---
| | Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
---

Billings, MT 59104

name: Solar Power Pack
subject: I hope this gets to you before we sell out again...
body:
In today’s society, we rely too heavily upon a dependable source of power...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20919/6374453/c1181274d87c00c933d105d8bc368c15b35ea16c/7d015d292cef0563f825f0b793192d41ea4ddda8)
---
| | |
---
_April 2nd, 2025_
---
| | |
---
In today’s society, we rely too heavily upon a dependable source of power. When disaster strikes, and power is removed from our lives - it causes complete and total chaos for all who were not smart enough to prepare for it. We don’t want that to be you - **and you shouldn’t either.** Now listen, I’m not saying go out and spend your life savings on freeze-dried food, batteries, cases of water and an underground bunker.. But I do think everyone should have these items.
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20919/6374453/c1181274d87c00c933d105d8bc368c15b35ea16c/7d015d292cef0563f825f0b793192d41ea4ddda8)
---
Equipping you and your family with a few tools that will make this inevitable situation less stressful is what we’re here to provide. You can grab yours for just the cost of shipping by [clicking here.](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20919/6374453/623319b820bdda4e867a70dc73276b1055357528/7d015d292cef0563f825f0b793192d41ea4ddda8) Months ago, we picked two of our Best Selling items, tossed them in our new Dry Bag, and completely sold out within the week. The feedback from our customers was so positive that we had to bring this bundle back. I’m sorry it took so long to get everything back in stock, that’s just the way she goes sometimes. If you take self reliance & preparedness seriously, [go checkout what I’m talking about.](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20919/6374453/623319b820bdda4e867a70dc73276b1055357528/7d015d292cef0563f825f0b793192d41ea4ddda8) I hope this gets to you before we sell out again. Please be sure to reach out with any feedback, our team truly does value all of the input we’ve received over the years. Last chance: [tap here to just pay shipping](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20919/6374453/623319b820bdda4e867a70dc73276b1055357528/7d015d292cef0563f825f0b793192d41ea4ddda8). As always; Stay safe & God Bless.
---
| | |
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20919/6374453/c1181274d87c00c933d105d8bc368c15b35ea16c/7d015d292cef0563f825f0b793192d41ea4ddda8)
