## Historic Flooding Threatens Heartland
A sprawling, slow-moving storm system is threatening to unleash [dangerous flooding across](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGPozAQRn-N6YzGY0OgcHHSiS7XnE5XIoPHMBvHjrA3Ef9-le23_j49Pb3_1_nqOHLa_rg72RryjICdBCMBZ-84nrNpvA1ESLohqy5Gd8OgQTe7XbzqaejDOA4Xs_TrsroVlTG9J9UrrRu2bxoYQAXQAbSugzCsxoewKFQehQHyXPPRfmROdacQz_yko13zvYl2r_VRhP4lcBI4uWVN9Crtlt-zwOnfX4GTd2mjI38W-ciVUmUX4yl3LjUfvMoQc_acNrlzle64uVRckXnnLF9EN4HT-3gKPbEX-rdC0P0IODaH9Y8Xx8ilvwgD291x_NaqP2V6WvwKAAD__2REaow) the central U.S. starting today, with up to 18 inches of rain possible in some areas. Fueled by tropical moisture from the Caribbean, the system could dump [four months' worth of rain](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOozAQhJ_GdEbGmGAKF9fQ5dor0WKv8Z4MjswmKG9_yqX-25lPo9H3577cgTId22_Y0XEsi1Z6kMpIpZcAlN-LaYKLiBr7Bl03mn6wtld9k1zwk0bsg7exAz-NdhqsMutqzQR2iH1D7rOmjNKdUoNSLQwqWm9CjGunu6CFURiIS23_Fjo4Yczv8sLa-rI32SXmxyn6X0LPQs_XdbXg_fNC4PRlhJ7x-FTfSMZS0cPJp9Az8F7OR8JKXlZ6YZVcJFfaNqzS48EVsnyeMuZSAh2b5AQsd3jLFX3ZUWaKKDlVBMbjAyQ6uVTyQs_deFOT6ZrqwuOinOm8jcKobQfK_8_zTzJfTv8LAAD___KaeoY) in less than a week. Flash flood watches cover more than 22 million people, and major rivers like the Ohio and Mississippi face the risk of significant surges. Meanwhile, [severe storms and tornadoes](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAUhH8N3mw9nnHsDAxd2NK1o0X8HgkVhghoLP_7iu5d7pZPd6f7uq0364OPj0-7s64urQg49aB6wJWsD-eqOtKOGXnsWMtZjdOyjDB2T31fnJyB6LIptlflmK9KbhMxTWpb7kvndUsDBSgBJoDBTuCWTZFzd4mSUChg8jXl4Tv5WJ_swpnenIct7V3Qz1pfRYwfAo1AcxzH8FNsTWTPBgg0paZ8CjSRj9LMVp-iQNNqBRpQTWQD-c2Z-8bv_eEjlb6mHC0lLr0LKZGPj96lzJstVaBZcJ5GKUeAWaDpsqbX4UPw5TILBY_d-vA3sv532lvjbwAAAP__AqVtfg) are expected Tuesday and Wednesday from Texas to the Midwest, with heavy snow in northern Minnesota adding to the storm's punch.
## Israel Plans to Reoccupy 25% of Gaza
Israel plans to [reoccupy 25% of Gaza](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOnTAQRb_GdEbD2OyjcfGSiG5TJEVKNNhjcGQwsr0Pka-PSOqtRpp7daR7fr1P7xRi2JfvtLGpPk0I2EvQEnByFOI16cYZz4ysGjbdQ6t-GBSoZjVae3APVHbWVtluts4Pg9Wznec3QLJNMDcNNGAH0AO01IMfrHbezx12DoUGdqGm3P5OYa8r-3ilF-fWpq2JZq31KEI9BY4Cx_M8263sdyZw5F1-FIHjzud9zpSjEziGkomjrElmTtZ-HJfEXiYvF_pD9_vIXIpcaaPyvxWZCss1lUoLF5m8DzZQlIWuG0xZPp_dV_ixH0KNyQYn1LcvtzE-y0_OR5ONO84QYyhvD6Fh2SjEfwPqZ0JfBv8GAAD__yAJelM) over the next two to three weeks as part of a renewed ground campaign aimed at forcing Hamas to release hostages, an official said Monday. The renewed ground operation follows a breakdown in cease-fire talks and has already triggered new evacuations, including in Rafah. If no new deal is reached, officials say the operation could expand further, potentially displacing [most of Gaza's 2 million residents](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGP3CAQRn8N7lgNg332FhRp6C5tSmtsBpsIGwTsbZxfHzn9td-Tnj69X5_zJ4UYzu0nHWyaTzMCDhJ6CTg7CvGa-84Zz4ysOzZq7PUwTRp0t5vJ0fMJoD6maR1Aj8pN46IRlmWlRcGzC-a2QQ-oAAaABw3gp7V33i8KlUPRA7vQUnn8TuFsO_t4pS8ujzUdXTR7a7kK_UOgFWjPK6fabiTQ3mKBFrRAq5VA-04lOnnyuwq0oRbiKFuSaV1f-ZI4yOTlRn_pHinneMmD_oTjdchcuNZX4Zv4wix3OqjKPdVGG1dZOKfSBNquGJffIcZQP0bRw3ZQiP-vtu_SfRn8FwAA__94PnCM). Israel is demanding the release of 11 living hostages and the remains of 16 others, rejecting Hamas' latest counteroffer.
## Forbes Unveils 2025 Billionaires List
_Forbes_ released its annual [World’s Billionaires list Tuesday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGu4yAQRb8Gd1jDGDvegmIbumy7pYXNYM8ugQhQrLyvf3L610wz0j333L_35e44ctr_uAeZFvKCgKMELQEX7zi-F915E4iQho6MuulhnOcBhu4w080Bjh6Vp6CJ_DSPv9ygUalpnYaJOjZXGmhABTAC9G6EMG_ah7AqVB6FBvLccun_ZU7toBDf-UWl3_Kji-Zo7VnF8FugFWjP8-xDLivV6y3QVm5UBdqdUnJbTo1TFmgvpkAL-jpKoE10ypVj5JwcF6ry41i343TlixLtOxVZiVOg6GV9Fk57bURJuuQlzqPM7aBS5VVStoNkcel_le3gKt_kikDbFeOf5wWp001o2B-O40ej_TTry-B3AAAA__8kZ3qh), featuring a record 3,028 people and 288 newcomers—more than ever—including household names like Bruce Springsteen, Jerry Seinfeld, and Arnold Schwarzenegger. The richest new entrant is Marilyn Simons, widow of hedge fund legend Jim Simons, with an estimated net worth of $31 billion. Not far behind is Lyndal Stephens Greth, daughter of late oil tycoon Autry Stephens, at $25.8 billion. The U.S. led the pack with 103 new billionaires, followed by Germany, China, India, and Russia. Nearly 70% of the newcomers are self-made, many from tech, crypto, and AI—including Anthropic cofounder Dario Amodei and Scale AI’s Alexandr Wang. Bruce Springsteen hit $1.2 billion after selling his music catalog, while Seinfeld and Schwarzenegger each landed around $1.1 billion thanks to Netflix, syndication, and smart investing.

| Flying together with our sponsor [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyMkb2u2zAMhZ9G3mxQlGTrDhoKXHhL144CLVGxGvkHtpAgb18kSMcCHUl8-MiD8-viL5RLXq8_aWFX0-YR0LSgW0AfKZen1010iRlZNezkoJWxVoFqZhe1pkGbyRolgeNXL5EThQCkEpPBJruXDTSgBDAAHRlINuiY0iRRRhQaOOa6Hd3vLa915lSe252PLmxLU9xc634K9UPgKHCsB4VbNzOVOj_fPOX4IgWOtlcTT4NpewvUakumnWSfWg7KhiFGGb8Goca9UOCF1yrU9-eUP_dtPbfDf-aVH2fhWvlY_etzNAJ7ijkK9S2XfFa6scC-vhcxHxzq5P_b5f8qmsPF_ZFLyWc_CA3XhXJ5x67_quHu8E8AAAD___BNjQw) **The No. 1 Mistake That Makes Bad Knees Worse** Harvard reveals a shocking truth: one common mistake is robbing you of an active life.

clean_body: A sprawling, slow-moving storm system is threatening to unleash the central U.S. starting today, with up to 18 inches of rain possible in some areas. | | | | | | Wednesday, April 2, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day In 1917, President Woodrow Wilson requested that into battle against Germany during World War I. Four days later, Congress complied and declared war on Germany. It turns out that happiness and success can be helped along by following these Check them out in our Wednesday Wisdom section below, and if you have any rules of our own to add, please let us know by replying to this e-mail. Today's sponsor is . Are you ready to reverse joint discomfort and reclaim your mobility? Be sure to check them out! | Historic Flooding Threatens Heartland A sprawling, slow-moving storm system is threatening to unleash the central U.S. starting today, with up to 18 inches of rain possible in some areas. Fueled by tropical moisture from the Caribbean, the system could dump in less than a week. Flash flood watches cover more than 22 million people, and major rivers like the Ohio and Mississippi face the risk of significant surges. Meanwhile, are expected Tuesday and Wednesday from Texas to the Midwest, with heavy snow in northern Minnesota adding to the storm's punch. Israel Plans to Reoccupy 25% of Gaza Israel plans to over the next two to three weeks as part of a renewed ground campaign aimed at forcing Hamas to release hostages, an official said Monday. The renewed ground operation follows a breakdown in cease-fire talks and has already triggered new evacuations, including in Rafah. If no new deal is reached, officials say the operation could expand further, potentially displacing . Israel is demanding the release of 11 living hostages and the remains of 16 others, rejecting Hamas' latest counteroffer. Forbes Unveils 2025 Billionaires List Forbes released its annual , featuring a record 3,028 people and 288 newcomers—more than ever—including household names like Bruce Springsteen, Jerry Seinfeld, and Arnold Schwarzenegger. The richest new entrant is Marilyn Simons, widow of hedge fund legend Jim Simons, with an estimated net worth of $31 billion. Not far behind is Lyndal Stephens Greth, daughter of late oil tycoon Autry Stephens, at $25.8 billion. The U.S. led the pack with 103 new billionaires, followed by Germany, China, India, and Russia. Nearly 70% of the newcomers are self-made, many from tech, crypto, and AI—including Anthropic cofounder Dario Amodei and Scale AI’s Alexandr Wang. Bruce Springsteen hit $1.2 billion after selling his music catalog, while Seinfeld and Schwarzenegger each landed around $1.1 billion thanks to Netflix, syndication, and smart investing. body:
Sound of Freedom was a box office hit and gave us the platform to spread awareness about children who must be rescued from unimaginably horrific realities.

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/eRghGmh3FKPqY1XfvQv9WsigSxtgOvsT70WFaSW78qwm46v9Z7du1VfMfUAFeDIn3f3ZNumn7dvRWGVN4h8WTIPgrNTmBbjlf-iVdvdfWZkd1-TvxZID8qIB2zRjHpTr4oWhZZqmgFxec91lOWxJlGrOu3Tt6K3AbAUiKzGgr1g1Cap3kUsSvmiJRlmdWuMHLyz-EO-wcguJ1Bc__gDC9H4QiMzVbHAusRv9n4FNad67K6Odj8l33flq6jpnHqlEEwyvaLMBokUBgTI4lGxAT2XrnZsbVUCmSrTUiRbhDLIOZzu5ZUUKiOxi0aGDyf8PZr2Jq2-z6-oMkA/iDkRk_gPh1FCV-cnsbpZKeg8vyuqej8V/7)
---
Friend, As the producer of the feature film _Sound of Freedom_ , I helped sound the alarm about the horrific realities of the $9.5 BILLION human trafficking and child sex industry._Sound of Freedom_ was a box office hit and gave us the platform to spread awareness about children who must be rescued from unimaginably horrific realities. And now, through The Sound of Freedom Foundation, we identify and track cases of child abduction and trafficking, and we tirelessly search for and rescue defenseless victims. **[**Will you partner with the Sound of Freedom Foundation today in this critical work by making your most generous tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/2CPTr8U6H1VpK7tTUKZeB8uCtP5kfqlKQPt6bYWmooqtkay1YYg3s82a5jvghd2XWMFiiGUmkyuHH7eyYFRbmrn5KgXeypVEzdNHb3rUeIJnSzCukihedUbSv0SDakwCjdEwaeTqMLuNRjGHkBjWSTmE_rkm_QUXMBrQD30o14n2FGQYKlKcq4v8LqG6FurLcXk_6ZpThFvB8QVllK8p9Qjl0E5E1AIn86feiekU0kGkCoPVQzeuNogLQ6_qeeE86TAX2qFwja5k9Xy1bVxxRge9U_qEOsHAvLM7F4kmSVBI3zB5P0FCQZlG6HBLQl1d_SvMQhTYFkOy_w/TaaHD6xqLKUhy0VZPATcNOLCFISSVEAp/7)**
---
[ Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/FdryxxSi-7DjNkwk_83Ivbx4RzqbtPrh9f75zM5JAtonnS1e0ipBWe0Viia4G2VWYq9tmspdk1hUGvkBrEgoKsl7KPmfxyj5cLnW8ggxLzV-k-i1HW-u2N4SUWG6JlT8RHTBeqFarqxugp42OlvlpnaSwSZOWz2uH7uuTndu9fIiSPKX206dC0UEJygi-vCdj6OxeE4bYxuUiAYHVGWDmzYAuGUDMNdDsxlJu4rnOnNwKK4utYqjAhi1SW3pVoR2KcTwgMQDGcYI51Ol3u8jzFHwPONVWbhnNod0B7aXWIYbcSWfeLhJtUt9HktgywNFrXq32u3OLqYSlA/5EZeiv1Q-qCN0Z_-xWNXiX6YqLLAFADz/7)
---
A **massive surge in immigration** , **skyrocketing drug use** , and**homelessness** are some of the factors that increase the likelihood of being trafficked......but, the reality is that perpetrators of child sex trafficking are skilled in identifying victims and exploiting their vulnerabilities.The result is heart-wrenching for victims and their families.An empty seat at the dinner table.A backpack collects dust as it hangs in the hallway.The pain and anguish that comes from being the family whose child has been abducted by criminals and sold into sex trafficking.And, worst of all, the innocent child who's scared, hurt, and abused by human traffickers.Right now, children are waiting to be rescued from horrific conditions, and it's up to you and me - working together through the Sound of Freedom Foundation - to help God's children return to their parents. **[Your immediate support of $25, $35, $50, $100, or more would be a blessing toward saving the lives of innocent children. I pray you'll help us to rescue victims of sex trafficking with your tax-deductible gift to the Sound of Freedom Foundation today.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/tRFbxxfaiHDXvEJ9QXKGdH6eYiQlSqzx9fpXGO2HPKLE2piAlloUNCkC8107jPD8gM1Z7pk4EzNoHDuW7JdnG0Ckd3Tznq2QZQUWDAYvslA-eJi3CGktBPPRKSQpdXmt97Vnqg4eoLgN0lQTId-AUfY4syTOBQJwbG-c7VR22098S6xG21-IOtEm-tr02aHu5cEeq2LZW8jITiykYkNcbtJ7a-VOQikaf1yVfWviv1HuKGYCPlPpx972MOTRCr1ac8hKfLNMq8iLlBk9RE6KIkY6uMfJIhT-SKjgJ7zOAhw5a7UP6kAgVD81gIeJcHGo3iTCFa_LeVszfw/njWZET2vj7fz74IjqtRhpypRHmfAY8C7/7)**
---
[ Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/Q1EWHUNkHc6IA-U1SdHek-HnGHsgkUsJBhk3ZfH829Kw66B8SO5N74ZtoQEUCuF6NH3pis2dDDwqRASW8LZYjECmnovkYApuRR-Vqw_VZRJrXJJlyn3TbveqipY9MGNWgMJ-DgjVcCiqTTSvnmyjuDNvvOI9Va3DMDTp4fp9QZ-g44BZYPbtsodPzmUzJ73mA2pJZQNlP19zOlpWeNaG3REiJ3uqB_zlmGCCLVwxRghEDNdOciFdHaWl_04Il3c-hQNKjqIXrxLMcwFSeIYEHsOnhiDgd9oTFERrLs1GWlUGL8A1ZD4hJQ6Ds07tmsLTG-aDuFauKcibeA/jniH9jbZnuhxovVeFvVvyySwNcMUhj4X/7)
---
In many cases, including those of the children whose story was told in _Sound of Freedom_ , abduction occurs internationally and there are costs associated with hiring attorneys, filing petitions, and even traveling to the country where the child is located.While the cost of returning an abducted child varies depending on the case, the truth is that the rescue of a missing child is an incredibly complex and expensive task._No family deserves to continue staring at an empty seat at the dinner table because there isn 't the financial ability to continue their fight._God's children are NOT for sale, which is why we must act immediately to SAVE these innocent lives from sex trafficking. **[**I hope I can count on your tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, or more to the Sound of Freedom Foundation today to help us reunite young girls and boys who have been trafficked.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/K6rC1z6uuJbT28MibSxCWIqWksRK3_q98MxKn0KpqDkTQ1Jsa2arIaOlVALjVsIVdsyZe-wy_dqQfF80rsI3HBXwbMHwp_v5_TpKySaJJDxPHL2_NwglNyuQTg8uo5uN1sDQGrIcJp8rxHsvzmMktvJLq_FPGnUvB_1gS60RJN4NoZ93CaEffg976EkZKDkN9TjSUFWD7bLvYf-sXkEk008kdCXDVjDb27LqXTjjbf6AnLgRTJX7TEnRtGH6gPun_Up0epZiWQcxGfft9ZhI66Go_QcQSFoWFYVc6GDeN9nP12473HKHO2BeXGEtPBYQ0uvaVXhBvwbMeA/MFpNnrDS9pAevh0tdLk7RiGszOGYe8ri/7)**

In many cases, including those of the children whose story was told in Sound of Freedom , abduction occurs internationally and there are costs associated with hiring attorneys, filing petitions, and even traveling to the country where the child is located.While the cost of returning an abducted child varies depending on the case, the truth is that the rescue of a missing child is an incredibly complex and expensive task.No family deserves to continue staring at an empty seat at the dinner table because there isn 't the financial ability to continue their fight.God's children are NOT for sale, which is why we must act immediately to SAVE these innocent lives from sex trafficking. Together, we can set them free!Many blessings,Eduardo Verastegui Sound of Freedom , Producer For the Sound of Freedom Foundation 5442 Thornwood Drive, San Jose CA 95123 Pop Acta Media | Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Dani Hupper, Evergreen
subject: Sen. Booker shared YOUR stories
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
And he broke an all-time record doing it
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3454688/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi—

In case you missed it, Senator Cory Booker just broke a record for a marathon speech he gave on the Senate floor in protest of Trump and Musk’s extreme threats to our democracy, climate, and communities.

**Why should you care?**

Because advocates like you have been emailing, calling, and demanding that their electeds do something about MAGA’s extreme coup. And the fact that Booker just spent all of yesterday and the night before standing in front of the Senate reading stories directly from his constituents about how Trump’s drastic cuts are taking a toll on their daily lives **demonstrates that _your advocacy is working._**

**And what happens next will require us to raise our voices again.**

Because the Senate plans to vote on a spending bill that would lead to deep cuts to federal programs people rely on—all to fund a $4.5 trillion tax break for billionaires and big corporations.

If passed as proposed, **the budget resolution would tee up a full reconciliation bill that could effectively eviscerate critical energy investments and tax credits that help working families and lower energy costs.**

[**Will you email your Senators right now and tell them to vote against it?**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3454689/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[SEND A MESSAGE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3454690/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Republicans are pushing hard for a resolution that would cut funding off **_permanently_** , going after life-saving programs like Medicaid and gutting popular Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) programs that save families money, make transportation safer and healthier, and create good-paying jobs.

At a time when people are already struggling to keep up with everyday costs, passing a budget resolution that robs the public to give tax cuts to the wealthiest people in the country would be ludicrous, and completely out-of-touch.

Senator Booker knows it, and we commend him for rising up in this moment, standing up for his constituents, and exposing the MAGA agenda for what it is: **_“a complete disregard for the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.”_**

If he can stand on the Senate floor for 25 hours, [**I hope you can take one minute to write to your Senators today about rejecting a budget resolution that would repeal IRA tax credits and other federally-funded programs that working Americans depend on.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3454691/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[EMAIL YOUR SENATORS](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3454692/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Thanks for all that you do. |
---
| | |
---
### Dani Hupper
Campaigns Director
Evergreen Action
---
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |

name: Craig Riedel for Senate
subject: PRESS RELEASE: Craig Riedel Announces Run for State Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Craig Riedel
body:
| | | | |
---
April 2, 2025
America First Conservative Craig Riedel Announces Candidacy for Ohio's 1st Senate District
DEFIANCE - Craig Riedel today announced his candidacy for Ohio's 1st State Senate district in the May 5, 2026 primary election. A husband, father, successful businessman, and former State Representative, Craig Riedel is a lifelong resident of Northwest Ohio.
"Our district needs an America First champion who will build on the outstanding work of Senator Rob McColley," said Craig Riedel. "I have the backbone required to defend our Northwest Ohio values, the private sector experience to jumpstart Ohio's economy, and the vision to make Ohio the most conservative state in the country. We need to eliminate Ohio's burdensome income tax, create a state-level Department of Government Efficiency ("DOGE"), and eradicate DEI from all our public institutions."
The 1st District encompasses all or parts of 10 counties in Northwest Ohio: all of Defiance, Fulton, Hancock, Hardin, Henry, Paulding, Putnam, Van Wert, and Williams Counties, and part of Logan County. The incumbent, Senate President Rob McColley (R-Napoleon), is term-limited in 2026.
Craig and his wife of 36 years, Danette, reside in Defiance. They have two children, Steve and Renee, and three granddaughters. Riedel served as State Representative for the 82nd Ohio House District for six years. Before that, he spent 27 years in the steel industry at Nucor Vulcraft Group.

For more information about Craig Riedel and his campaign, visit craigriedelforohio.com. A headshot can be accessed [here](https://4n5jswhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001a_FsueKmLFiMC4QFuVFM13Vkr5khPngImBsQGHUKDNOR_CkrB8b5YLxZ4IVoj-4UHRPG-FUIbXqEOiIQTLnWrDONThu5HUrMq126p5cwirwCfp4cJ30CJgGZHskVqnhWFiXEFVW5ll64zuqbBTEND0iG7Lo5hFVWvSU26o5AAth_Spll4zEK05jSAhzGYzwgITRuVN6tDV90EoyVjhJi0g==&c=sqZmgMr7pGrcKEAikMDgLqO8gR9HKdxG8VrSRRUWNW1mIE-PqjrXuA==&ch=2iIy8qbDefTiG37Y7ZwspQQ0ofyffsj1ca5YvbY8B6HrNSJ7A8BVlQ==). Inquiries can be sent to craigriedelforohio@gmail.com.
# # #

body:
Actors Matthew McConaughey and Woody Harrelson, along with a producer for _The Chosen_ TV series, testified Monday in support of a measure that would [provide $2.5 billion over the next decade](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOszAQhJ_GdEZmMfBTuPgbulx7JdrYS2zF2AhvAnn7U3L1tTOaT6Pv-zJfMMSQbl-4kuFzyTMo6KTSUsHsMMTXrCtnrsqNTUWmGXTbjU0PfeUNdb1FAosaCHtouwHtYptmQUBne6qCecOUVtCobtD_ahpgbNurHpzqxiuQ0Ipc4LzX7InpxLLEV37SXtu8VtF45q2I9r-AScB0HEd9PzG9SwFToqMImD4zueUYONh3sCKzp0Ou1uaEj5unl8TkZGZPuyyMe5Hbo3hZKCGT5CxXvJP8BSU6WS4hrtLjk5KAqdqN244QYyj9ILS6rRji5yD_aexp4CcAAP__6PVxyA) for films made in Texas.

# Wednesday, April 2, 2025

**Good Morning!** On this day in 2003, Texas Rangers slugger Alex Rodriguez became the youngest player in MLB history to [hit 300 home runs](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFu7CAURL8GOlaXC4Z1QfEad_valBaE6wUJBwvQZv330SZSupSjGc2Rztttvflc8sf9v9_JjedWVwScBGgBuEafy7lqHl2AOEtOTlqtplkaNDw5ZSRKGYKME20I183oABE28NoEC5Fn9zoDDShhsvp6IYuzUkHbCNMckJgGinnUdhmJBj1938pZH9Qu73XnxaUxjs7UP4YLwyX6Unyn59Go99eC4dKP2kb_LcVPFin3UdspvGg1dqEARhKp7tQYLry5eHzmUnI3lmm47z6Xb-L4U8HD4VcAAAD__wAPXsM). He was 27 years and 249 days old. Hollywood actors visited the Texas Capitol on Monday to testify in support of a bill that would provide $2.5 billion to the Texas film industry over the next 10 years. Check out [the story](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOszAQhJ_GdEZmMfBTuPgbulx7JdrYS2zF2AhvAnn7U3L1tTOaT6Pv-zJfMMSQbl-4kuFzyTMo6KTSUsHsMMTXrCtnrsqNTUWmGXTbjU0PfeUNdb1FAosaCHtouwHtYptmQUBne6qCecOUVtCobtD_ahpgbNurHpzqxiuQ0Ipc4LzX7InpxLLEV37SXtu8VtF45q2I9r-AScB0HEd9PzG9SwFToqMImD4zueUYONh3sCKzp0Ou1uaEj5unl8TkZGZPuyyMe5Hbo3hZKCGT5CxXvJP8BSU6WS4hrtLjk5KAqdqN244QYyj9ILS6rRji5yD_aexp4CcAAP__6PVxyA) in today's _Roundup_ section, and let us know what you think about it in our poll. Today's sponsor is [DeleteMe](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FOwzAQgOGnsbdGl8slrgcPDGSiIDGAmCI7d26MnLpKrdK-PSo78y990v95mA4-5XQ6vvpVXL3FMiFgvwPaAU7sU75PpNkFYNtqca2hrrftgINenI84Y8TAdiZCHlqxHjz7AfcdxDno5B4YEGALvaF9IwZt1wUyDL0NKIpAONWyNXWRKjd_iflerrI1c1l1dkutZ9U9KRwVjt8lnViyVFnl0RWO48vX28fzu94cn39SzukyGEVwXH3Kf0T99-nq8DcAAP__B5BN-A), offering a quick, easy, and safe way to remove your data online.

## Film Incentives Bill Advances
Actors Matthew McConaughey and Woody Harrelson, along with a producer for _The Chosen_ TV series, testified Monday in support of a measure that would [provide $2.5 billion over the next decade](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOszAQhJ_GdEZmMfBTuPgbulx7JdrYS2zF2AhvAnn7U3L1tTOaT6Pv-zJfMMSQbl-4kuFzyTMo6KTSUsHsMMTXrCtnrsqNTUWmGXTbjU0PfeUNdb1FAosaCHtouwHtYptmQUBne6qCecOUVtCobtD_ahpgbNurHpzqxiuQ0Ipc4LzX7InpxLLEV37SXtu8VtF45q2I9r-AScB0HEd9PzG9SwFToqMImD4zueUYONh3sCKzp0Ou1uaEj5unl8TkZGZPuyyMe5Hbo3hZKCGT5CxXvJP8BSU6WS4hrtLjk5KAqdqN244QYyj9ILS6rRji5yD_aexp4CcAAP__6PVxyA) for films and TV shows made in Texas. With Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick in attendance, the 11-member Senate Committee on Finance unanimously approved legislation to boost funding for the Texas Moving Image Industry Incentive Program, which has [attracted filming for productions](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2OgzAQBOCnMZ2RWQwOhYtr6HLtlcjYS2zJP8jshfD2p6S_fjTzaX7uy92EGPLj2yTU9NrKAgIGLiQXsDgT4rXIxulVuKlrUHdK9sPUjTA2Xk_W9f0qwCo7Df3NKTOObthgsHba1KaaoN9lQgroxKDkrUUFU9-vUjkxTCsgkwJdoFJb8kj4MscWr_LE2tqSmqg90X6w_ovBzGA-z7NN12GyyVRyKO8QgxkzYSUTcsJMDGZTKdiIDOZkiDyePFlbsvl9eLz4WYq7uDe1YjxK5p9VvoWYDv7Wghyh3f3eVO32M8QYjlExKR7JhPhh0b8_PTX8BQAA___Rfm0d) like Taylor Sheridan’s _1923_ and _Yellowstone._ [Senate Bill 22](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L1u6yAYxvGrgS3o9ctXGBhOFFlnSDo0Q0cLG-ygkmIZ6tp3XyV795-eR_p_XLuriyl-TW_uEWzdxtwhoDyAOAB23sW0d4J624M3DQ220YJL0yhU9G5xMProTa-8GpQ0UrgBghjNqAyMqD2N9jkGArABqcWRBY2G815oD9L0GIiA4GPNC6v3UMPmypj2vIaFDflBk73XOhfC_xFsCbaDm2PNib0gm_JKsD3FlC45f37PBNv_sdS87MyVeSO8vYTpFkoh_Hw07wTV0xJ-vp0Q6WL9_BNTikVpImB6uJhep_XPCqvF3wAAAP__rZdd2Q) increases incentives for low-budget films and provides additional funding for filming in rural areas and projects that portray a positive image of Texas. Some lawmakers expressed a desire to restrict funding of profanity-laden films, explaining that Texas is “still in the Bible belt.” McConaughey said additional funding from the state would allow the Texas film industry to eventually stand on its own. "_There's going to be a point where we are not going to need financial incentives from the state because the infrastructure will be in place_ ," [he said](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGuqzAQRL_GdCB7veBQuHgNXV57S2TjJaxkwHIcSP7-ivS3HI10ZnR-7uPdceTt8d-tZMt73keQ0NYSawljcBw_I1bBehl6VZFVBnXbqw66arEdKm1mddMy6B68n_2sQQZvFJIyPVZsL5hECUq2Bm8NGei19miCbHsPJFBS4LLnpixU6O2ec_zsB-Vm2tcq2qWU9BT6n4BBwHCeZzMted-uVsAwvWJ5ZRIwlEPA4HLhKX7jRapnjmvN20Rb4YNql1LeDwr19QmwvTVpSVW2IZ0cIz87I1A-VsfxO17-tHFY-A0AAP__j_1hSg).
## Dallas Citizen Group Threatens Lawsuit
Dallas HERO—the nonprofit that pushed for the passage of a city charter amendment to maintain a police force of 4,000 officers—[threatened to sue the city](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL3OozAQAJ_GdEbLYv4KF9fQ5dorkcFLWGljI-zEyduf8vVfPdJoNP9uy82xcLj_dQ-y-b3HBQE7DUYDLt6xfBZTebuCn5qKbDOYtpuaHvvqsOB66L0fibqtdehGnAjW1gzr3rgBuortVwYGsIFuMGNNA05tu5rBQzetSMoAec7xqvNBmd4u7fKJL7rqLT4qsUfOZ1LtH4WzwrmUUod183v5YoVzoJIUzhI3Jwpn70Rc0gddUYsr6clZnzElXoU0h-0il0ifUXgjHfedN7qSPikkjkHvz-A53BXO7Qgd9I3CubqsPwuLcOoHZeD-cCw_bfnXWS-L_wMAAP__PfJtXA) if officials don’t demonstrate a “good faith effort” to hire the 900 or so officers needed to meet the quota. “ _Prop U is not a suggestion_ ,” executive director [Damien LeVeck said](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQRb_GdEbjsY2hcPEaurx2SzTYQ7Dk4AickPz9KttsteXVlY6OztdlulDKabv-pxv7-lrKhIBWgpGAU6SU35Npop8hDqphr5zRdlAdds3qlZqDW1QIRmsOCw_OAvUctWIkrWyT_AcGBlCBdaZv2eGg9WxcBDvMyMIAx1TL3taVK7_oWPK7PHlvQ7k12a-13g-h_wkcBY7nebbnQvQ5BY601xQyCxw3Pg-BYy6BssAxUs50yFAeW33_7pX3Iuu6M1XeDpnpPB6pynvJKbBc0562q8AReydxsL0xupMdByeNXaKclQPZOwLoYt-BMs3u4_1MOaejc8LA9UYp_3jXP0M-PX4HAAD__8j6c1A). “ _It’s part of the city’s charter, placed there by the will of the voters. Compliance is not optional._ ” LeVeck said city leaders have not given “straight answers” about their plans to hire new officers and have resisted the nonprofit’s call to [survey current officers](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGPnDAQhX-N6WZljFlC4WIVie7SRqnQYA8wirGR7T0f_z4i_ZVPn_Se3vf7Y_5A9hy2X3iQKV9rnJVUPUgNUs0O2V-zbpxZpBvbhkw76K4f26d6NruxclFE2vakcbFk174dJK6dxd4-rRoaNneZ1FK1sh_0jwcNauy6RQ9O9uOiSGhJjktMj7JToS_Mq7_iJ6WHjUfjzV7KmUX3EmoSaqq1Po4cbibURAHeWajpfC-eLWRcqVyAwQEdlDYKlunmGwVK6IWaHHqPGXZKEcqeCAuFDIEqeKz5zQV4BcvlghoDFMh7rMAFMtSY_nLYoMSKycHO6U5HTAQ2nvcKJni92p-tPv40ybizsvecn4PQcjuQ_f9D5VvDn0b9CwAA___ef4Ii) about compensation to ensure it is among the top five in the Dallas-Fort Worth metro, a condition of the amendment. Earlier this year, the city council voted to increase this year’s hiring goal from 250 to 300 new officers. A proposal to increase that figure to 400 was rejected after Interim Police Chief Michael Igo said training so many recruits would require pulling officers off of patrol.
## April Fool's Day Pranks
Businesses around the state celebrated April Fool’s Day yesterday with fake announcements. Austin’s CapMetro public transit [rebranded as CatMetro](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FygzAMxvGngQ1OCIPrwUOXbOnakROWSNyaOIeVNLx9j-7df_d99_88T2eKKd4uH7SK19eSJwQcGjAN4MQU0z6Zmv0M7LpafGdNP7huxLG-eqQehLtlEYsc2AFR4NnhPPAYXBjq6I8xMIAdDNa8tWLR9f1sLMPgZpTKgHDUvLV6FZUXlSXt-SlbG_JaJ39VvZeqf6_wVOGJ9KWZaW9HWkPU_UAVnsIj6WOTA9y3mJol51Sar_wtpaFH0XirN8_3n5hSLKOtDFxWiunvQv9tfnr8DQAA__-C0Vsk), and local creamery Lick Honest Ice Creams posted a social media ad for its new brisket-flavored ice cream. On this day in 2003, Texas Rangers slugger Alex Rodriguez became the youngest player in MLB history to . He was 27 years and 249 days old. Hollywood actors visited the Texas Capitol on Monday to testify in support of a bill that would provide $2.5 billion to the Texas film industry over the next 10 years. With Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick in attendance, the 11-member Senate Committee on Finance unanimously approved legislation to boost funding for the Texas Moving Image Industry Incentive Program, which has like Taylor Sheridan’s 1923 and Yellowstone. increases incentives for low-budget films and provides additional funding for filming in rural areas and projects that portray a positive image of Texas. Some lawmakers expressed a desire to restrict funding of profanity-laden films, explaining that Texas is “still in the Bible belt.” McConaughey said additional funding from the state would allow the Texas film industry to eventually stand on its own. "There's going to be a point where we are not going to need financial incentives from the state because the infrastructure will be in place ," . Dallas Citizen Group Threatens Lawsuit Dallas HERO—the nonprofit that pushed for the passage of a city charter amendment to maintain a police force of 4,000 officers— if officials don’t demonstrate a “good faith effort” to hire the 900 or so officers needed to meet the quota. “ Prop U is not a suggestion ,” executive director . “ It’s part of the city’s charter, placed there by the will of the voters. Compliance is not optional. ” LeVeck said city leaders have not given “straight answers” about their plans to hire new officers and have resisted the nonprofit’s call to about compensation to ensure it is among the top five in the Dallas-Fort Worth metro, a condition of the amendment. Earlier this year, the city council voted to increase this year’s hiring goal from 250 to 300 new officers. A proposal to increase that figure to 400 was rejected after Interim Police Chief Michael Igo said training so many recruits would require pulling officers off of patrol. April Fool's Day Pranks Businesses around the state celebrated April Fool’s Day yesterday with fake announcements. Tic Tac announced its new , Bill Miller Bar-B-Q hawked its “Autumn Spice” lipstick, and San Antonio’s Ranch Motel advertised a game of nude pickleball. On Monday, Attorney General Pam Bondi announced that the Department of Justice is seeking a 20-year prison sentence for 24-year-old Cooper Jo Frederick. () ➤ Bexar County: Authorities seized a pack of dogs that attacked three people, including a sheriff’s deputy, over the weekend. The owner of the nine dogs was detained and received 17 citations. () ➤ Denton: The University of North Texas has banned drag shows to comply with state and federal laws and executive orders. Two student organizations had planned on-campus drag shows this month. () ➤ Tyler ISD: Three former district employees are in custody following accusations of abuse toward a student with Down syndrome. According to court documents, surveillance video recorded the educators taping the student’s hands together and forcing him to walk in circles for several hours last month. () ➤ Collin County: The Texas Commission on Environmental Quality asked the developers of the controversial EPIC City project to confirm that no construction has occurred, citing the lack of permits. On Monday, residents voiced opposition to the proposed community at a packed county commissioners meeting. | | Friday’s the last day of the 2025 legislative session, and Georgia lawmakers are rushing to pass TWO last-minute voter suppression bills. [**We’re fighting back, but we’re counting on urgent support from grassroots activists like you in the final sprint — please make a donation right away to help protect the freedom to vote.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105008483/537094824/-99196721?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250401_f_GALeg_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODEzNTBhMy1iMTBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J2Es19sJrUYrcbfgRmt-dDPUu7g7XMnJ_LSLuYuK9Ns=) **The bills would make it harder to cast a ballot and easier for extreme activists to challenge Georgians’ right to vote. The provisions would:** **1\. Ban Georgians from dropping off mail ballots over the weekend before Election Day** — targeting the exact moment when busy people likely have more time to return their ballots. **2\. Allow cuts to Saturday early voting** — when many parents, students, caregivers, and folks who work long hours during the week have time to vote — for certain local elections. **3\. Give unelected State Election Board (SEB) members more control over who stays on the voter rolls** — rewarding the SEB’s Trump-aligned majority for bending to conspiracy theorists, breaking public trust, and violating the law. **4\. Enshrine policies that bipartisan elections experts have called out as harmful,** like mandated video surveillance of absentee ballot drop boxes and expanded partisan poll watcher access to sensitive areas in elections offices. [**Chip in right now to fight back against policies like these that restrict voting rights and damage our elections.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105008487/537094831/-99196721?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250401_f_GALeg_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODEzNTBhMy1iMTBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J2Es19sJrUYrcbfgRmt-dDPUu7g7XMnJ_LSLuYuK9Ns=) Let’s be clear: the legislation fits into a broader pattern of voter suppression in Georgia. In the past few years, new laws have made mass voter purges easier, imposed burdensome voter ID requirements, criminalized handing out food and water to voters in line, and placed unnecessary limits on ballot drop boxes. These new provisions, if they pass, would once again make it harder to cast a ballot, especially for voters of color, students, and frequent movers. Everyone should have an equal opportunity to make their voices heard in our democracy. They should be able to vote at a time that fits their schedule. And they shouldn’t have to worry that some partisan activist they’ve never met could challenge their eligibility and get them purged from the voter rolls. **To protect the basic fairness of our elections, we must stop these attempts to restrict access to the ballot.** **And we’ve got to act fast.** **Before the legislative session ends on Friday, it’s all-gas-no-breaks. We’re rallying Georgians to contact their lawmakers and speak out against these bills, we’re lobbying legislators, and we’re raising the alarm about how these new changes would undermine public trust in our elections. ** [**As we race to prevent these bills from passing, will you make a donation of any amount to defend our democracy?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105008489/537094839/-99196721?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250401_f_GALeg_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODEzNTBhMy1iMTBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J2Es19sJrUYrcbfgRmt-dDPUu7g7XMnJ_LSLuYuK9Ns=) Thank you, The Fair Fight Action Team | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105008490/537094847/-99196721?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250401_f_GALeg_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODEzNTBhMy1iMTBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J2Es19sJrUYrcbfgRmt-dDPUu7g7XMnJ_LSLuYuK9Ns=)

name: MTG
subject: Defund NPR & PBS
body:
They can hate us and pay for it themselves.

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aghL/?__vbtrk=MjgzMzA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgzMzA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Fellow patriot – The D.O.G.E. Committee recently held a hearing with the heads of PBS & NPR.
And I heard more than enough to be able to say this:
_**The time has come to completely & totally strip all federal funding from these organizations.**_
These organizations are using our **hard-earned tax dollars** to **_suppress the truth_** , **_silence viewpoints that don’t align with their agenda_****,** and **_push a biased narrative that doesn’t represent the American people_**.
**_NPR & PBS can hate us on their own dime._**
**_We’re done footing the bill for their propaganda._**
NPR and PBS have operated as taxpayer-funded platforms for elitism and one-sided reporting, hiding behind the guise of “public service”. They’ve shown time and again that **they’re more interested in advancing their own ideology than they are in providing fair and honest journalism.**
We refuse to let them continue to attack our values and suppress our voices while **we pay for it.**
[DEFUND NPR & PBS](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aghL/?__vbtrk=MjgzMzA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgzMzA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Radical Leftist Democrats are raising boatloads of money in defense of NPR and PBS.
Why? Because they know that their vice grip on Deep State power comes from the federal government’s propaganda arm and**if we don’t match them dollar-for-dollar then we will lose this fight.**
**__[Democrats will stop at nothing to keep their propaganda on the air... So I’m taking the fight directly to them. I’m asking you to chip in whatever you can to bring the fight to the Radical Left Democrats who are fighting tooth and nail to keep diverting your money into PBS& NPR](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aghL/?__vbtrk=MjgzMzA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgzMzA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)__**** _._**
American taxpayers shouldn’t be forced to fund media that openly disrespects our views & our values.
**Our money should go to real priorities, not****to bankroll their agenda.**
**__[We won’t let NPR and PBS hate us on our dime any longer](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aghL/?__vbtrk=MjgzMzA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgzMzA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)__**** _._**
[DEFUND NPR & PBS](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aghL/?__vbtrk=MjgzMzA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgzMzA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Sign this petition today and stand with countless other Americans who are fed up with being silenced by the very outlets that we’re being forced to fund.
_Sincerely_ _,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aghL/?__vbtrk=MjgzMzA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgzMzA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**_Marjorie Taylor Greene_**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aghL/?__vbtrk=MjgzMzA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgzMzA2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

name: History Facts
subject: What happens to Stonehenge on the solstice?
body:
Humans have long viewed the sun as a crucial part of life.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68eolnkmmzht1whquscgx6lfnlal2fvcs9bnwt553p93049jj4ezpb38god2nyz96pj47yoz3drup6h4v7bp10tbxsa4wfdyfed5ob28fz21esecgn5puaq8exm4ibynzf7k87ardsntpklj7&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su389j&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Stonehenge was designed to frame the sunset on the winter solstice.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su389j&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su389j&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su389j&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| H umans have long viewed the sun as a crucial part of life. Many early civilizations such as ancient Egypt and Rome, as well as the Japanese and the Maya, even deified the sun. It was so revered by the Neolithic people of modern-day England, in fact, that [it’s believed](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su389j&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) they may have built Stonehenge to frame the rising sun on the summer solstice and the sunset on the winter solstice.
---
Starting about 5,000 years ago, the prehistoric monument was constructed in several stages on Salisbury Plain in Wiltshire, England. Without any written record, many theories about the origin and purpose of the mysterious monolith have emerged over the years. One of the most plausible is that Stonehenge was built as an astronomical observatory to help mark the seasons. On the winter solstice, the sun [currently falls](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su389j&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) behind one of the site’s several trilithons — a structure consisting of two vertical stones with a horizontal one across the top — creating a picture-perfect framing. Although some of the rocks have fallen over the years, affecting the current view, laser surveys have all but confirmed that Stonehenge was designed in relation to the path of the sun on the solstice. On the winter solstice, the sun also sets perfectly in line with an individual stone known as the Heel Stone, about 100 feet away from the main site. On the summer solstice, the sun rises over the Heel Stone.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su389j&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su389j&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## The Black Sabbath and "Spinal Tap" Stonehenge jokes were likely a coincidence.
For their _Born Again_ tour in 1983 and 1984, the metal band Black Sabbath created a replica of Stonehenge, a nod to the track of the same name from their latest album. But the prop ended up being too big for all of the pieces to actually fit on stage, the result of a mix-up between meters and feet in the design specs. In 1984, a suspiciously similar mistake occurred in the mockumentary _This Is Spinal Tap_. In the film, the fictional rock band decides to create a replica of the prehistoric monument for their own song “Stonehenge,” only the prop ends up being comically small. It has widely been speculated that the joke was inspired by the Black Sabbath mishap, yet it’s possible it was just an unlikely coincidence. _This Is Spinal Tap_ director Rob Reiner maintains that the movie’s production timeline [would have made a Black Sabbath mockery impossible](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su389j&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com); according to some reports, Reiner filmed a 20-minute demo reel in 1982 that included early versions of the Stonehenge scenes, a year before Black Sabbath’s tour.

clean_body: Humans have long viewed the sun as a crucial part of life. | H umans have long viewed the sun as a crucial part of life. Many early civilizations such as ancient Egypt and Rome, as well as the Japanese and the Maya, even deified the sun. It was so revered by the Neolithic people of modern-day England, in fact, that they may have built Stonehenge to frame the rising sun on the summer solstice and the sunset on the winter solstice. Starting about 5,000 years ago, the prehistoric monument was constructed in several stages on Salisbury Plain in Wiltshire, England. Without any written record, many theories about the origin and purpose of the mysterious monolith have emerged over the years. One of the most plausible is that Stonehenge was built as an astronomical observatory to help mark the seasons. On the winter solstice, the sun behind one of the site’s several trilithons — a structure consisting of two vertical stones with a horizontal one across the top — creating a picture-perfect framing. Although some of the rocks have fallen over the years, affecting the current view, laser surveys have all but confirmed that Stonehenge was designed in relation to the path of the sun on the solstice. On the winter solstice, the sun also sets perfectly in line with an individual stone known as the Heel Stone, about 100 feet away from the main site. On the summer solstice, the sun rises over the Heel Stone. | By clicking a link in this email, you're agreeing to our and . By the Numbers | | Approximate visitors to Stonehenge in 2022 977,000 | | Archaeological features at the Stonehenge World Heritage Site 700 | Archaeological features at the Stonehenge World Heritage Site 700 | | Miles the stones were transported to the Stonehenge site 180 | | Percentage of the stones that are buried underground 25% | Percentage of the stones that are buried underground 25% | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- The Black Sabbath and "Spinal Tap" Stonehenge jokes were likely a coincidence. For their Born Again tour in 1983 and 1984, the metal band Black Sabbath created a replica of Stonehenge, a nod to the track of the same name from their latest album. But the prop ended up being too big for all of the pieces to actually fit on stage, the result of a mix-up between meters and feet in the design specs. In 1984, a suspiciously similar mistake occurred in the mockumentary This Is Spinal Tap. In the film, the fictional rock band decides to create a replica of the prehistoric monument for their own song “Stonehenge,” only the prop ends up being comically small. It has widely been speculated that the joke was inspired by the Black Sabbath mishap, yet it’s possible it was just an unlikely coincidence. This Is Spinal Tap director Rob Reiner maintains that the movie’s production timeline ; according to some reports, Reiner filmed a 20-minute demo reel in 1982 that included early versions of the Stonehenge scenes, a year before Black Sabbath’s tour. body:
Kamala Harris is gearing up for the California Governor’s race.

| |
---
| |

| | Dear Friend,You may recognize me as Riverside County Sheriff. As Sheriff I am responsible for the County's five jail facilities, six court buildings, a civil bureau, the Coroner's Bureau, Public Administrator's Office, twelve patrol stations, seventeen contract cities, 4,200 dedicated employees and an operating budget of just over one billion dollars.It’s a lot of responsibility, but having the honor of keeping my home safe is the best job in the world.
---
| | Throughout my career in law enforcement, I have fought back against the pro-criminal policies coming out of Sacramento. We have held the line and kept Riverside County safe. Now, the threat that the Democrat leadership poses to our communities is graver than ever before.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/oehDaV9EbUTMwbmDgDQt8mD-sau7R1oCBWZyPedoHE86oqfifDCJCSmrDPthmhqw5S3hCq6JK1H5umfOFDPNkSWJOtz7jucGjaKy6cVcXV6jr50EvoCdUMK8oFF3QdoZYbFzSrnjmwFsL-RnmRpifq4RCoKDwPVyRzokQ_5NjOmpMrQu9SQQ24Dob9d9B6PidfCfmeuXVIkj8-YI8THX3dtNkGHMld0iHRJ1Y7Z2TBfvwDN3xVWTzLpYbH7k8_kdRETyryIa3d1SHI5jgJyJkdT2PcBb8k23KXqozcGPTNmDsBmUvg4ErkDze5I6er2AfLnO5jQdEMS_ItRnzVCAv5k3IWOVh7jfnIdaCmtFRLEGxXzapsxo804qYwzeRMq5Ent0F1SjYCtWTN5t-91iPjltkm3nwU--p8gnZ8UnG6cZD4LwI-SznBTu43HlzIGTgs_OYP3sZKVqkA/BCguD4Kpa2dKG0dq3mdXNpGBMnLz55k8/7)
---
| | That’s because Kamala Harris is positioning herself to run for Governor of California. **[Today, I’m asking you to help me defeat radical Kamala Harris in the race for California Governor.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/_3bWcccQJJ_qKRcN9bxK58Akdtg_onE8ErfM9pvYCyEoviqmwKUcMLvcew_-YlgNMRBDCb2QRTPTmJCxa-MrkD5Ks2aT93SBvztfMnjLZs4Jj1A9bt0fuB9iJRHhBcf9ybjXE-ILBXDcydkHzealkwApApTf4yK2o7HBvH1ApgCka5YhWMeEmWLabRgJrh4BnR0QqsKN17H4UZHy4vW3bYNf1O939PuHauPh7EZfUJGz6EG8Vfb1AXrEI_cvx44R45hHtSBG_kVIYheiT-_9ZnORxtKwEwiAJqFf0Osupj8gqITrTFFc56iiUVPd7_lGBv_fM0xfIlI4fwHxa6V9itJzigXamN8YsLKABfSob4tYHi_o_BZkJOb9blH4uU1323pKteE4TFMROA4yh2cYrxXUkFDzMDwxJ9nMyJYDEhuZ3fjIXCbBiqt-8Y9sBWtRPk5Dukd0ud-hSQ/jTja87l42fef2QCW_goYjqaU7TVlabYj/7)** Californians are waking up to how disastrous these years of Democrat rule have been. There is no better way to highlight that failure than putting myself, a Sheriff who has spent decades defending law and order, up against Kamala Harris, who as Attorney General oversaw the severe decline in public safety that we are living with today.Kamala Harris, Karen Bass, Katie Porter, and Adam Schiff want us to forget the harm that Democrat rule has caused to California.But you know how these years have been:
---
* Democrats’ lack of preparation and water management allowed wildfires to ravage the state, while Karen Bass and Gavin Newsom were nowhere to be found.
* Despite Democrats spending hundreds of millions to “fix” it—crime, homelessness, and drug addiction skyrocketed.
* Democrats wasted billions of dollars on “high-speed rail” with nothing to show for it.

---
As they say: fool me once, shame on you... Fool me twice, shame on me.Well Californians ought to be ashamed.There’s rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is unbearable...Californians are being taxed to death just to watch their hard-earned dollars go towards fighting against Trump’s common-sense policies like wildfire prevention, immigration reform, and water storage improvement.These California Democrats don’t care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. **_"All we're trying to do is restore the will of the people through the president. There's a vast unelected Federal bureaucracy that is opposed to the President and the cabinet. _**

**_That means we don't live in a democracy we live in a bureaucracy. I think what we're seeing here is a thrashing of the bureaucracy while we try to reestablish democracy and the will of the people."_**

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 4/2/2025
body:
Colorado’s gender bills sideline parents and rush kids into harm
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/s0u2b9faf33)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/s4rfb241252)**
| | Hi folks,
Listen to today's **Mountain Minute Podcast** [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/s0tf251588f), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/scte77a7b29) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/s7lfcfaf50a)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
**🏛️ Colorado Legislative Session Updates...** Colorado lawmakers introduced a [$43.9 billion budget bill](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/s5pd624209e) filled with major cuts, sparking debate over priorities as the state faces fiscal shortfalls. In a shift away from far-left climate policy, Governor Polis signed a bipartisan bill adding nuclear energy to Colorado’s clean energy mix, a move conservatives say is [long overdue](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/sbv0fbc761a).
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Rep. Gabe Evans will host a telephone [town hall TONIGHT](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/sal78fe869e) to field live, unscripted questions from 8th District residents. And a new report reveals several Colorado judges made [political donations](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/sdp9e824215) in violation of ethics rules. Meanwhile, the NRA and several gun rights groups [filed a lawsuit](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/s1u27ffd2bc) to block Colorado’s new 6.5% excise tax on firearms and ammunition, calling it an unconstitutional attack on Second Amendment rights.
🇺🇸**On the National Stage...** A Colorado man was [federally charged](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/sdj0bb54e4d) after allegedly firebombing a Tesla dealership in Loveland—Attorney General Pam Bondi called it “a warning” to extremists. Russia says it’s taking the [U.S.-backed Ukraine cease-fire](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/scib584d2d6) “seriously” but won’t accept it as is, while Trump warns of sanctions on Russian oil buyers if talks stall.
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** Shaina Cole warns that [two gender-related bills](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/s9p3a696951) advancing through the Colorado legislature undermine parental rights and push children toward irreversible medical procedures without proper safeguards.
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, April 2, 2025.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Cole: Colorado’s gender bills sideline parents and rush kids into harm](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/s9saa9eddd6)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/s0i21e9766e)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/s3lac057071)
On Friday, March 28, Colorado legislators introduced House Bill 25-1309 and House Bill 25-1312, proposals crafted to safeguard transgender youth. Their aims are well-meaning: one mandates insurance coverage for gender-affirming treatments such as hormone therapy and surgeries, while the other anchors gender identity within custody law to protect vulnerable children.
Yet, beneath these noble intentions lies a troubling prospect—lasting harm to the very youth they seek to shield, coupled with an alarming shift of authority from parents to the state.
Consider HB 25-1309, which compels insurance providers to fund gender-affirming care when deemed medically necessary. The goal is clear: ensure access for transgender youth. However, this mandate risks ushering children toward irreversible decisions with consequences that may echo for decades.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/s8i9786c7fd)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/s2m166a5772)
|
---
**[Polis greenlights nuclear power as Colorado rejects “Green New Deal”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/s9g789b3dec)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/sbv3030499f)
* Governor Jared Polis signed HB25-1040 into law, officially adding nuclear energy to Colorado’s clean energy portfolio—a major shift backed by bipartisan support and grassroots pressure.
* The law doesn’t mandate nuclear projects but allows utilities to invest in next-gen nuclear tech like small modular reactors, offering a path to energy independence and grid stability.
* While progressives warn of environmental risks, rural leaders, unions, and business groups see nuclear power as essential for replacing lost coal jobs and securing Colorado’s energy future.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/scu6ab3a53d)**
|
---
**[Rep. Gabe Evans to host telephone town hall Wednesday evening](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/s8p4ad0299a)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/s5h27ba22fb)
* Rep. Gabe Evans will host a telephone town hall on Wednesday, April 2 at 6:30 p.m. MT, giving 8th District residents a chance to ask live, unscripted questions and hear updates from Washington.
* The event is designed to reach voters across rural and hard-to-access areas, emphasizing transparency and accessibility.
* Evans, a former police officer and National Guard veteran, plans to discuss public safety, border security, fiscal policy, and current legislation affecting Coloradans.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/s0u0ce3efca)**
|
---
**[NRA joins El Paso County man in suing to stop voter-approved Colorado excise tax on guns, ammo](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/s3u5f0c2957)** [KRDO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/sbgd65883af)
* The NRA, along with several gun rights groups and an El Paso County resident, has filed a lawsuit to block Colorado’s new 6.5% excise tax on firearms and ammunition, arguing it violates the Second Amendment.
* The tax, passed by voters under Proposition KK, took effect April 1 and is expected to raise $39 million annually for mental health, school safety, and crime victim services.
* Plaintiffs are seeking a permanent injunction, claiming the law unfairly burdens law-abiding gun owners and aims to suppress constitutionally protected freedoms.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/s8hd7828de7)**
|
---
**[Colorado lawmakers propose budget full of cuts and cash sweeps](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/s9vde705cb4)** [COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/s1g29c60355)
* Colorado lawmakers introduced a $43.9 billion state budget proposal that includes hundreds of millions in cuts, fund transfers, and eliminations to close a $1.2 billion shortfall.
* Cost-saving measures include eliminating programs like the State Employee Reserve Fund, property tax deferrals, and community health worker reimbursements, along with sweeping money from 52 cash funds.
* While some funding increases remain—such as for early childhood programs—the budget reflects deep structural challenges and signals tough choices ahead for education, public health, and social services.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/sfi6a61e4e8)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Education Department cracks down on schools that keep secrets from parents](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/s7ne0c7c064)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/setee372ef9)****BY RMV STAFF****| NATIONAL | MARCH 31** _The U.S. Department of Education under Secretary Linda McMahon has announced a sweeping effort to enforce existing federal laws that protect parental rights in public schools. The March 28 directive reaffirms parents’ authority over their children’s education and mental health records—specifically targeting public school policies that have kept parents in the dark._
**[Rahn: Trump’s election order restores faith in voting](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/s5pec9f9f10)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/ser37b37743)****BY PRISCILLA RAHN | COMMENTARY | MARCH 31** _As a Frederick Douglass Republican and former Vice Chair of the Colorado GOP, I’ve always believed that a fair and transparent electoral system is the foundation of our nation. President Trump’s recent executive order, “Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections,” addresses critical vulnerabilities in our election system—vulnerabilities that have eroded trust and threatened the integrity of our democracy._
**[A shepherd in the trenches: Rep. Scott Bottoms answers the call to fight for Colorado](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/sfoc3096232)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-0jnw/s5m2694792a)****BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | MARCH 31** _El Paso County Republican Rep. Scott Bottoms walked the quiet State Capitol halls with his wife, prayers filling the empty space. They spent hours there—no fanfare, just a pastor seeking God’s will on a new path after years of preaching in Colorado Springs._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🚙 DID YOU KNOW?** President Lyndon B. Johnson loved using his amphibious car—the Amphicar—to **prank guests by driving it straight into the lake** at his Texas ranch, pretending the brakes had failed. One panicked victim, aide Joseph Califano Jr., later recalled LBJ laughing, “He didn’t give a damn about his president—he just wanted out of the car!”
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "You don't have to make them see the light -- just make them feel the heat." —Ronald Reagan
|

subject: I’m tired and a little hoarse, but I cannot stay silent.

body:
My remarks on the Senate floor
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0a98d571-c760-42af-9295-a6367cf44fb6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

[](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6f9548bf-fe0e-44d9-858b-8cc012353de3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
| Peter, it’s Cory. Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. [If you’re willing and able, support our movement for justice, opportunity, and freedom by splitting a donation between me and Blue Amp Action today.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3787ba50-490f-4b05-a1dd-f2b982dc9823/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | Peter, it’s Cory. Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. | | | | | | | With love and gratitude, Cory | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. name: Dan Sullivan
subject: My work isn’t done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alaskans for Dan Sullivan](http://e
body:
I officially announced my reelection campaign for U.S. Senate here in Alaska

| | |
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs384u5r40bh17luuahdq8dfcl9v4qbsg054lo7o_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdg69or0cdh2bs)
---
Last night, I officially announced my reelection campaign for U.S. Senate here in Alaska!
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zt9t4k48ksta9eidmgvo8cecplc7ea0jcdfjd638_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdg69or0cdh2bs)
---
When I first ran in 2014, it was because I believed Alaska needed a stronger voice in Washington, D.C. Our challenges and opportunities are different than the rest of the country, and we needed someone who would boldly fight for them. **Over the last 12 years, I have worked to:** ✩ **__Unleash__ Alaskan energy** ✩ **__Rebuild__ __ our military****✩ _Fight_ for our veterans** **✩ __Create__ good-paying jobs for our hard-working families****✩ _Secure_ our southern border** While I believe we've made tremendous strides forward, Joe Biden was a disaster for Alaska's prosperity. His administration imposed 70 overreaching executive orders with a single goal: **to lock up Alaska. ** I’m proud to have led the fight against the Biden administration every step of the way. Working with President Trump’s strong leadership, we’ve already helped “lift the sanctions on Alaska. Last month, Trump **took action** with one of the very first measures of his second term, when he signed an executive order to unlock Alaska’s “extraordinary resource potential.”**

____[____Today, I am asking for your help to jumpstart my re-election campaign so we can continue working to unlock Alaska's potential.____](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkteuic6nil8rks1iv1o8e36dp5btb145ga3asp8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdg69or0cdh2bs)____**
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp0dpabd9ga81urd0plk6qsus7ftrtqforpli110_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdg69or0cdh2bs)
---
What I find concerning is that keeping our state on lockdown isn't just a Biden administration policy, but a major item in the Democrats' playbook. From shutting down our energy potential to controlling our land – there's no question they will spend millions of dollars to flip this U.S. Senate seat to push their **anti-Alaska agenda. ** **They know what I stand for.

_They know that I will always fight for Alaska and our way of life. _** This reelection race comes at a pivotal time. Republicans have control of the Senate, but only by a hair. Expanding our majority is necessary to ensure President Trump's America First policies are supported by Congress. _That's how we usher in the Golden Age of America. _ As it stands right now, 22 Republican seats are on the line in 2026. I know that Chuck Schumer and his extreme allies are sure to seize every opportunity they can to try and flip the Senate back into their control – **and Alaska will be in their crosshairs. ** ****[****If you have my back, please help me jumpstart my reelection campaign with a donation of $5, $15, $20.26, or any amount up to $7,000 today!****](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuq4ud9uolf6hk9n1mgdocuj04ah2vc9hknsn55g_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdg69or0cdh2bs)****
---
Sincerely,
**Dan Sullivan
** _U.S. Senator, Alaska_
---

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: URGENT Call to Action: Call the Senate NOW
body:
Don’t let the Senate screw up President Trump’s agenda by caving on spending and tax cuts.
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** We have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to pass a budget that **truly** cuts both taxes **and** spending--just like the House bill does. The House has laid out **real, concrete** instructions to cut spending. **Now it 's up to the Senate to do the same.** We're sick of the empty promises. Enough with "we'll cut later." _Later never comes._ Also, look at what's happening in Wisconsin: The Left won the WI Supreme Court last night and will gerrymander conservatives out of two House seats. If we lose the House, Democrats will be back at impeachment again--and everything we've been fighting for goes up in smoke. The last two years of President Trump's historic term would have to be spent fighting the left, if they control the House.
**In order to deliver the reforms that Americans voted for, which would then propel voters to vote for American First in the midterms, the Senate must pass a budget that mirrors the House bill and contains real, concrete instructions to meaningfully cut spending like the House bill.****
**President Trump fought through everything the left hurled at him --up to and including an attempted assassination that came within millimeters of taking his life--to reach the White House. He did it so he could fix America and help us all live freer, more prosperous lives. **_But this won 't happen without you taking action today._****_
_**We 've seen the Senate mess up before (remember Obamacare repeal?), and we can't let them do it again.
**ACTION:[ Use our action page to email and call your senators right now](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aa4a18b0/1edb9794aa494c0e "Use our action page to email and call your senators right now")** and tell them to pass a budget as **close as possible to the House bill** with **real, immediate** spending and tax cuts. No more backtracking. This is our best chance to get it right. **_Calling in addition to emailing is VERY important. Please make sure to call!_****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************
---
| | [ TAKE ACTION ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aa4a18b0/1edb9794aa494c10)
---
| **** ******The left is fighting like crazy to defeat America First in every way. If you want America to prevail, you must act now.****
**Thank you for your time and thank you for your dedication to our country!
In liberty,
Jenny Beth Martin __ **__** **** ************

* **TOP NEWS**

“**More Houstonians are staying home at night and moving neighborhoods to avoid crime, poll says** ,” Houston Chronicle's**Matt deGrood** — “Around 77% of Houston survey-takers say they are staying home more at night to avoid crime and 51% said they’d moved homes in search of a safer neighborhood, according to the results of a [new poll by a nonprofit organization](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.yT0LsjtC9VeS77VMJuB_4lRXqa_G1AbZ7YGW4cxQmSIzGNzEJfvzNbN3NrBFhrasIXhk7pyOjXnFl6KLzuEakTvCHomnP6kw_2xx7IenLdEL2SiJbp25n-9DXDWp58r7am4E3-EiWvyj_0ayhCkK1HXXHH4rQjskW0z0QYtdEmgJ7JZR1veR8z6KeN_vKfnDnlIXJ-D967DJ7ln3H1S3Rsg-N4Sm4htfdPFrU3NW5HsYk982hBnyBxJQyPqCcTdcw6XgCdZrwog-7-8OXTPMGcxlG3YoaXBitIX3IONpZ7pekOma77bxuVzJzo637Wt0rQ81hRP8ws0OEcsQ69dWvfL03inKaZS-CCiOfe6kJLFU-4X5_fGxLG6nVnh8mpCN0B62S84bAqzEr-MEVImVKNAiuTKhjmAh8K6XuG507HiZR3e_f2Oi9Vg4BoTKgqZ815We9OtNvGYllODzg_l54MbXVo4yREVgi_K-4zJhJ2c/4fb/2_LEswg7S7OOetbXWMjeMg/h11/h001.DaTYpmtnmy37UzeUUiWZsIhoexESMZVOyBIdK8P1V3M) studying how those living in the country’s biggest cities perceive crime.

The survey results come amid a nationwide decline in most types of violent crime after a spike during the coronavirus pandemic. [Houston in 2024 saw significant decreases in property crime](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eNCDHcRdv524vOoQmRT6HI43Rg55yAp-yJ6gTrq7xIMLbKdZwMEZi396jewVC_ieRFDjj3WV2JJvWizcApaPea4XrLQlgRazitbOfca8cej-bfnB5pJuMXKrK6b0fF3MJ4DLilBMivLEMXVXQ_dlh59mJvgnbY_AiYpn5QIFjq-ZaCVVf3kAB8nrcWGzrlDfhU4-fmEwYLClitGrCYGK8u_lKzNlgKFCENPMm7PXABlcViruVugnf3TdUN-W1TFTUkgKWj8ZLUKLXwd1U4tc5boh4hX1VxA0mIaLGmM0A_YEp4jcjbXkWOnPwB4fgJNXlOTOdl9waUdlcGBDwMspTR6uOrWyF_4mIireUiAlOCqyqpdlsZx7gxGPd3wiG4Wbb429VLEAJ86DYPlVqP2CsCAF6gjCp3l33NZjtfDhgU8EcXpMpVmTR4ASWDLkTHxDdRxYhbUm3yDL6J4eTWLixkgAMyHsgclX_GR_iZrQ8rpkXD_dgPP6ruiwsg2ZpAtkow/4fb/2_LEswg7S7OOetbXWMjeMg/h12/h001.0Q0OUpWDSfp4Pv-dkvnsjIxp0_esri-xKzPyN93IpOk) and a decline in homicides, though violent crime ticked up about 5%.

“My conclusion is the public perception of crime is much more complex than I think we’d ever thought,” said **Ron Faucheux** , the analyst that directed the polls.
» [BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.IpGzAqnc3m6dMmKQdod4OdZdsfX-sjnRfDuEmaXW-5lN-IqpP1xu2_Ygevf9CBs8iGkDwdDuKv-OIdRCcryDDgoqnwbBfsyGSk_4VJrOSCvmgxZEZTEXv72w0U68JXHpny88FhFoE4mM3a9phL8bbFTky6P06YVvr88yySSIsc6WesKpYmWihTtXhsuv4foSxeNTozxePEZYPYTIquHU8ko61Bh6eUSwb_9bmLSJeo6-yJ3OuCasy5NOX8cMcKciwthV-gl4kw76VmN7z6XVXAAzJxAvAGGbNz-44Aeo3unvjweIVSEF8rSS9JSucJ7huiNyNWc2UKaOdCh0CZduvONsH3P2hViQSoFXQ9H4ZLJe1tGaLeT7-NUyA8Z4a47Q57hhCmFRU4_aIUeW7Wrna46KPQmL3wl9mXCHxbB40cY/4fb/2_LEswg7S7OOetbXWMjeMg/h13/h001.XHtElPGR9H29otVWCy6L6WYvu47SKeGknmT31OKnLXs)
As part of the project, Faucheux led scientific polls in Houston, New York City, Philadelphia, Phoenix and Chicago – the country’s six biggest cities – and one on a national level, asking people a wide range of crime-related questions specific to the city. Evan F. Trestman Philanthropies, led by a New Orleans-based attorney who became interested in understanding crime after his grandfather and father were murdered 20 years apart, provided $300,000 for the project

**Marc Levin** , the Houston-based chief policy counsel for the Council on Criminal Justice, said he finds the work interesting because it does something unique: In a world full of data about crime, the polls attempt to quantify the less tangible feelings people have about the issue.
» [BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.IpGzAqnc3m6dMmKQdod4OdZdsfX-sjnRfDuEmaXW-5lN-IqpP1xu2_Ygevf9CBs8iGkDwdDuKv-OIdRCcryDDgoqnwbBfsyGSk_4VJrOSCvmgxZEZTEXv72w0U68JXHpny88FhFoE4mM3a9phL8bbFTky6P06YVvr88yySSIsc6WesKpYmWihTtXhsuv4foSxeNTozxePEZYPYTIquHU8ko61Bh6eUSwb_9bmLSJeo6-yJ3OuCasy5NOX8cMcKciwthV-gl4kw76VmN7z6XVXAAzJxAvAGGbNz-44Aeo3unvjweIVSEF8rSS9JSucJ7huiNyNWc2UKaOdCh0CZduvM-Tb6uPKTM0wvzjBN56Zayn5A4LGmVu_l02iG59rkVgxqHAHBv5A5vDRC29j7aDavZ1b0TTxmzxLlSzQYZC5ck/4fb/2_LEswg7S7OOetbXWMjeMg/h14/h001.Kf7tBdnfixnNAm6KA5uah94TCXxXm0313DyHqSS-AiM)
“This really exposes some of the limits of the crime data that we do have,” he said. People often make judgments based on less analytical measures, such as homicide numbers. “If someone decides to walk alone in their neighborhood at night, what is the risk? ...Often times, with quality of life stuff, I think they’re looking around at shorthand symbols that they think signal how safe or dangerous an area is.

The overwhelming majority of respondents in Houston said they were more careful about avoiding unsafe places, that they were staying home more at night and that they favored laws that would keep criminals in prison longer, according to the poll.

While worrying about crime, a slight majority of the same Houston residents polled, around 54%, were either very satisfied or somewhat satisfied with the service from the Houston Police Department, records show.

When polled on proposals to improve the agency, improving mental health and addiction treatment facilities received the most enthusiastic support, with around 55% strongly supporting it. Other proposals with more than 50% signaling strong support included improving the agency’s capacity to investigate and solve crimes, increasing the use of computer analytics to solve crimes and expanding career counseling and recreational programs for young people.

Increasing patrol manpower and police pay both received slightly less than 50% - 44% and 46% respectively – of people saying they strongly support them, but an overall majority of more than 80% said they'd support it, records show."
