**MEMORANDUM**
TO: Interested Parties
FROM: DNC Chair Ken Martin
DATE: April 2, 2025
RE: Last Night’s Results Show Democrats the Path Forward

* * *

In their first two months in office, Donald Trump and his shadow president Elon Musk have taken a sledgehammer to [Social Security](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=5344e01a8f&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and [veterans](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=4a9ddec1c6&e=d6c5c7d7ec)’ support. They have threatened [Medicaid and Medicare](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=c724883ee9&e=d6c5c7d7ec) in the name of gifting trillions in [tax cuts](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=09e2069551&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to billionaires, and they continue to slash the critical programs Americans rely on. Today, on so-called “Liberation Day,” Trump is tanking our economy as consumer confidence [plunges](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a9050b1c90&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to a four-year low and fears of recession [spike](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=9e11b71efc&e=d6c5c7d7ec).

In response, Americans across blue, purple, and red states are furious. They are showing up to Republican town halls across the country to [demand accountability](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=23e3c28119&e=d6c5c7d7ec) from their GOP representatives. And though midterm elections are more than a year away, where they’ve had the chance, Americans are also making their discontent with Trump, Musk, and the GOP heard at the ballot box.

**Last night’s decisive victory in Wisconsin is the clearest example of discontent with Trump and Musk yet.**
* Elon Musk and the Republican turnout machine put everything they had into winning this race, and yet the people of Wisconsin squarely rejected them and billionaire special interests as they elected Susan Crawford to the state Supreme Court by nearly double digits.
* Musk poured tens of millions of dollars into the Wisconsin Supreme Court race, promoted a million-dollar [giveaway](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=0dbed67636&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to Brad Schimel supporters, and gave his favored candidate a microphone on his social media platform Twitter/X – all as Musk’s company Tesla prepares for the possibility of [hearings](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=e8ff513400&e=d6c5c7d7ec) in the Wisconsin Supreme Court.
* Right-wing influencers promoted the importance of this election for weeks, and Musk turned Twitter/X into his own turnout platform to try to drive votes for the candidate he bought and paid for.
* **Yet, Wisconsin voters decisively rejected all of this and chose people over billionaires. It wasn’t even close.**

**On top of this, last night’s special elections in Florida showed Trump, Musk, and Republicans that they’re in trouble in even the reddest of districts.**
* **Democrat Gay Valimont claimed the best performance from a Democrat in Florida’s 1st Congressional District this century and became the first Democrat in almost two decades to flip Pensacola.**
* In Florida’s 6th, Democrat Josh Weil secured a massive **overperformance in this Trump +30 district** and validated Republicans’ widely-covered [concerns](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=e68ac9b1c8&e=d6c5c7d7ec) about Republican candidate Randy Fine.

**Democratic overperformances in elections have become an undeniable trend. In 2025, Democrats have consistently overperformed the top of the 2024 ticket in special elections.**
* Earlier this year, Democrats maintained control of the Virginia House of Delegates and Virginia Senate.
* In Iowa, Democrat Mike Zimmer flipped a district Trump won by 21 points, overperforming the top of the November ticket by 14 points, while Iowa Democrat Nannette Griffin overperformed by 24 points.
* Last month, Minnesota Democrats held the Minnesota Senate and won a House seat.

**Last week brought even more warning signs for Republicans.**
* Democrat James Malone claimed an [upset victory](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=e87c89a463&e=d6c5c7d7ec) in an R+23 district in Lancaster County, Pennsylvania, [crediting](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=08ba6bdd06&e=d6c5c7d7ec) voters’ anger at Trump’s chaos as a major factor in his win.
* Louisiana voters overwhelmingly rejected ultra-conservative Republican Governor Jeff Landry’s constitutional amendments.
* Trump [pulled](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=81e1282b82&e=d6c5c7d7ec) his UN nominee Rep. Elise Stefanik – worried voters in her district would opt for Democratic representation if the question was put to them.
* And after last night, Republicans everywhere can no longer deny the toxicity of Trump 2.0.

Democratic momentum goes beyond winning special elections. The last two months were the best February and March in DNC history for grassroots fundraising. We know there’s still a long way to go to winning the House in 2026 and the presidency in 2028, but we’re seeing early what happens when we organize everywhere, fight like hell, and mobilize grassroots energy in defense of the values we hold near and dear.

Yesterday’s election in Wisconsin reaffirmed that the American people won’t tolerate Trump and Musk’s chaos. Our overperformances in Florida showed that no area is out of reach. It also affirmed that Democrats are rising again. As Trump’s approval ratings continue to [fall](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=66f8d24cc6&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and Musk’s [plummets](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a537b8c447&e=d6c5c7d7ec), Democrats are overperforming, winning races, and building momentum. The DNC proudly invested in GOTV efforts in both [Wisconsin](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=9ce853c404&e=d6c5c7d7ec) and [Florida](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=499d4017b6&e=d6c5c7d7ec). In the days and months ahead, we will continue to show up and organize everywhere, because we know our message is resonating.

As we look to the future, Democrats are ready to hold Republicans accountable and win critical elections in Virginia, Pennsylvania, and New Jersey this year and – with the people on our side – take back the House in 2026.
---
|
---

Dear Peter,

We thought you may be interested to receive this breaking conservative news story.

Illinois Review is the largest conservative media source in Illinois and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump.
http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f40349338-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f40349338-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f40349338-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f40349338-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f40349338-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 IllinoisReview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f40349338-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
Keith Pekau Loses in a Landslide as Orland Park Voters Deliver ‘Madman’ Mayor Humiliating Defeat in Election Night Disaster (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/04/keith-pekau-loses-in-a-landslide-as-orland-park-voters-deliver-madman-mayor-humiliating-defeat-in-election-night-disaster.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f40349338-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/04/keith-pekau-loses-in-a-landslide-as-orland-park-voters-deliver-madman-mayor-humiliating-defeat-in-election-night-disaster.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f40349338-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau, left, talks to supporters April 1, 2025, after conceding his race for a third term to former trustee Jim Dodge. (Mike Nolan/Daily Southtown)
By Illinois Review

Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau – known for publicly harassing and intimidating constituents, lost his re-election by a landslide as voters sent a clear message – electing former trustee Jim Dodge by a 15-point margin, 57-42.

In a statement released on the Orland Park for All facebook page, Dodge declared victory, but kept to a non-partisan tone.

“This is the first day, or the onset, to a return to dignity where we will bring back respect, transparency, and civility to Orland Park. Together, we will breathe new life into our community, ensuring that every voice is heard and valued.”

Dodge’s slate, Orland Park for All swept election night, as voters resoundingly rejected Pekau’s People Over Politics slate. Mary Ruan Norwell was elected Clerk, while Dina M. Lawrence, Joanna M. Liotine Leafblad and John Lawler easily won their trustee races.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/04/keith-pekau-loses-in-a-landslide-as-orland-park-voters-deliver-madman-mayor-humiliating-defeat-in-election-night-disaster.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f40349338-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Orland Park Mayoral candidate Jim Dodge celebrates with District 135 school board member Nicole Browner during the election night party at Blissful Banana restaurant in Orland Park on April 1, 2025. (James C. Svehla/for the Daily Southtown)
Pekau’s entire slate of trustee candidates were all defeated, including incumbents Brian Riordan and Sean Kampas. Carol McGury also lost by six points.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/04/keith-pekau-loses-in-a-landslide-as-orland-park-voters-deliver-madman-mayor-humiliating-defeat-in-election-night-disaster.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f40349338-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Kampas became infamous (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/witnesses-keith-pekau-harasses-intimidates-female-orland-fire-dist-candidates-follows-them-in-his-car-while-they-knocked-on-doors.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f40349338-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823) after this publication revealed in March 2023 that he was heckling and following a group of Orland Fire Protection District candidates in a vehicle as a form of harassment and intimidation while they knocked on doors.

The driver of the vehicle harassing the off-duty firefighters and volunteers? Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau.

Joining Pekau in his gray Dodge Durango, and riding shotgun was Kampas – an ally and close confidante who’s known for rubber stamping anything Pekau presented during Village board meetings.

And during community events, Kampas, an IT consultant, was often seen wearing an official Orland Park Police Emergency Services polo with an official police badge attached to his belt – giving the impression that he is a member of law enforcement. In Illinois, it is unlawful to impersonate a police officer, and a Class 4 Felony, punishable by up to three years in jail and $25,000 in fines.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/04/keith-pekau-loses-in-a-landslide-as-orland-park-voters-deliver-madman-mayor-humiliating-defeat-in-election-night-disaster.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f40349338-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau, top right, walking to the front to address a nearly-empty room at the Orland Park Public Library on March 22, 2023. (Source: Illinois Review)
In February, the Illinois State Board of Elections ruled unanimously (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/02/state-election-board-vindicates-illinois-review-in-6-0-vote-as-mayor-pekau-allies-fail-to-silence-conservative-voice.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f40349338-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823) 6-0 in favor of Illinois Review after allies of Mayor Pekau filed a frivolous case in 2023 meant to intimidate and silence the state’s largest conservative news publication.

During a hearing in downtown Chicago this past winter, ISBE general counsel Marni Malowitz characterized the complaint against IR as “impinging on First Amendment rights.”

On August 1, 2023, Illinois Review broke
news (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/08/mayor-keith-pekau-was-running-federal-congressional-campaign-raising-money-from-city-contractors-from-taxpayer-funded-village-hall-foia-requests-reveal.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f40349338-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823) that Pekau and his village trustees were using taxpayer-funded village resources to run his failed congressional campaign against incumbent U.S. Rep. Sean Casten (D-IL).

Days later, William Healy, an Orland Park village trustee, filed a complaint against Illinois Review General Counsel Scott Kaspar. Healy, a CPA, remains under
investigation (https://www.chicagotribune.com/2022/10/12/column-complaint-accuses-orland-park-mayor-keith-pekau-of-using-mayoral-campaign-funds-for-congressional-bid/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f40349338-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823) by the Federal Election Commission for allegedly comingling state and federal campaign contributions relating to Mayor Pekau’s failed congressional bid, where he served as treasurer.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/04/keith-pekau-loses-in-a-landslide-as-orland-park-voters-deliver-madman-mayor-humiliating-defeat-in-election-night-disaster.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f40349338-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Ramzi Hassan and Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau. Hassan is a major campaign donor to both Pekau and then-Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot. (Facebook/Edwards Realty)
At a preliminary hearing in October 2023, the ISBE hearing officer found that Kaspar and IR editor-in-chief Mark Vargas had done nothing wrong – and that Illinois Review was an independent and long-standing news organization not under the purview of the Board’s election authority.

For the last several years, IR has published dozens of
articles (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/tag/keith-pekau?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f40349338-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823) highlighting and exposing Peaku’s attempts at a power grab, how he favored big donors and city contractors over residents, his bullying tactics and how he used fake news websites (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/mayor-keith-pekau-used-fake-news-websites-to-control-the-narrative-ensuring-favorable-coverage-publishing-over-70-stories-since-2017.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f40349338-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823) to control the narrative and ensure favorable news coverage.

Speaking to a small group of supporters on Tuesday evening, Peakau
conceded (https://www.chicagotribune.com/2025/04/01/orland-park-mayoral-race-results/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f40349338-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823) .

“I got shellacked.”

The defeated mayor continued,

“I did what I could. Obviously, the people spoke.”

Beth Damas Kaspar and her Orland Park Fire Protection District Board of Trustee candidates including Donald Jeffers and Bridget Tolan had a big night as well. For the last several weeks, Pekau and his allies, including Cook County Commissioner Sean Morrison viciously attacked the candidates and their families on social media.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/03/il-gop-funds-mailer-opposing-trump-delegate-as-state-party-remains-target-in-federal-postal-service-investigation.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f40349338-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
A mailer indicating that it is “Paid for by the Illinois Republican Party” endorsing certain preferred candidates against Republican incumbent Beth Damas of Orland Park, Illinois. (Source: Illinois Review)
The Illinois Republican Party even paid for a mailer (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/03/il-gop-funds-mailer-opposing-trump-delegate-as-state-party-remains-target-in-federal-postal-service-investigation.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5f40349338-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823) supporting Pekau’s slate of candidates running against Damas’ slate. But even that fell short on election night.

In a big way.

name: Trump News
subject: Trump Patriot Constitution Survey
body:
Go on record

Friend,

_We, the people. We, the people. We, the people._

These are the THREE most important words in American history.

When Joe Biden was in office, he did everything he could to ignore the Constitution and deny the American people their rights. From attacking free speech to unconstitutional mandates, he trampled on the very foundations of our democracy.

__But President Trump stands for the Constitution.__ He defends our First Amendment rights, fights against government overreach, and ensures that the American people--not corrupt bureaucrats--have the power.

Now, we need YOUR input. We're launching the **[Trump Patriot Constitution Survey](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zdtbeh8iph6b42ur6sms3plo2jimmt9vt1omi3qg_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdi6ap72cjh2bs)** to hear directly from top conservatives like YOU about your position on defending our nation's founding principles.

name: Cory Booker
subject: I spoke for over 25 hours straight on the Senate floor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| Family, it’s Cory. Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. ---

White House Press Sec Karoline Leavitt **[snapped at a reporter](https://substack.com/redirect/a7639fa0-a1ec-43e9-b3b0-5adc219378da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for claiming that the Trump administration is designating individuals as gang members simply by their tattoos and other superficial criteria.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/a7639fa0-a1ec-43e9-b3b0-5adc219378da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a7639fa0-a1ec-43e9-b3b0-5adc219378da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Three months into the Trump administration, Karoline Leavitt has proven herself to be fit for the impossible role of Press Secretary, verbally slaughtering reporters and setting the record straight on the media's spinning and false claims. Comparable to Kayleigh McEnany and Kellyanne Conway, two other Trump representatives known for their scrappiness and willingness to take the gloves off and throw down with reporters, Leavitt has not shied away from a single confrontation in the press room or on the White House lawn yet.
It would be understandable if reporters were scared of her. The reporter who asked this question is now if he wasn't before...
He told Leavitt that one could get classified as a gang member "by simply having certain symbols or tattoos" and "wearing certain streetwear brands,... That alone is enough to get someone classified as TDA and sent to El Salvador," the reporter explained.
"That's not true," Leavitt fired back.
"According to this document it is!" the reporter followed up.
"According to the Department of Homeland Security and the agents, have you talkjed to the agents who have been putting their life on the line to detain these foreign terrorists?!" Leavitt asked. "TDA is a vicious gang who has taken the lives of American women!"
"Shame on you and shame on the mainstream media for trying to cover for these individuals!" Leavitt exploded at the journalist. "And you are questioning the credibility of these agents who are putting their life on the line to protect your life and the life of everybody in this group and everybody across the country!!"
_**(Continues below)**_
* * *
**[Presented By Goldco](https://substack.com/redirect/364e4ccf-588d-45d6-bca2-1aca45ce22c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/364e4ccf-588d-45d6-bca2-1aca45ce22c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Leavitt added one more truthbomb before moving on, "They finally have a president who is allowing them to do their jobs and God bless them for doing it!"
**[An ACLU filing](https://substack.com/redirect/ba44fb64-d449-43af-80dd-5935e623b890?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** from last week allegedly revealed that the Trump administration is using a scoring system named "Alien Enemies Act: Alien Enemy Validation Guide," to identify TDA gang members and designate individuals for deportation.
Tattoo symbolism and other personal associations are some of the criteria listed in the filing but by no means is it the only criteria for TDA designation. Prior criminal activity, court records and or law enforcement records connecting an individual to the gang, as well as financial transactions and phone records revealing gang connection or other criminal activities are more indicators being used to identify TDA affiliation, according to the filing.
Watch Karoline Leavitt give this reporter hell for asking his misleading question:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/a7639fa0-a1ec-43e9-b3b0-5adc219378da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Tattoo symbolism and other personal associations are some of the criteria listed in the filing but by no means is it the only criteria for TDA designation. Prior criminal activity, court records and or law enforcement records connecting an individual to the gang, as well as financial transactions and phone records revealing gang connection or other criminal activities are more indicators being used to identify TDA affiliation, according to the filing. name: Wesley Bell
subject: Proud of what we have to show for this team
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Peter,

I can’t thank you enough for your continued support.

It’s because of you that we were able to meet our FEC fundraising goal and post fundraising numbers that reflect the true strength of this movement.

Your belief in me and our movement isn’t just about numbers — _it’s about the real impact we’re making for St. Louisans every day._ Whether it’s fighting for an economy that works for you, ensuring our children have access to quality education, or fighting for life-saving access to healthcare, **this work is possible because I have you standing with me.**

We’re proving that when good people come together, we have what it takes to keep this campaign in fighting shape year-round and get things done amidst the chaos in Washington. We're in a great spot as we enter the next quarter, let's keep this momentum going.

Onward

Wesley | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105027321/537136823/552493051?refcode=em25_250402_eoqty_enask_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250402_eoqty_enask_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=49dcefd2-ca0f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDlkY2VmZDItY2EwZi1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mcXpQAUF-Bbrf6NbutYaBLsVj_PNI5lZEUzhIPlN-bk=)

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: I’m standing my ground
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105028155/537138928/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDAxMGJmYS1jYTBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mYeUWRY1dzrPta79gHg69dLrY6weR6dqLiKh0M-b684=&emci=5c010bfa-ca0f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=70010bfa-ca0f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=13185894) Hey Derek, happy Wednesday! I wanted to take a moment to reach out and say thank you for your support during our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline and over the last few months. It truly means a lot—and it’s fueling the fight we’re in together. Look, since Donald Trump took office, we’ve seen some awful attacks on our rights, our democracy, and working people. From allowing Elon Musk to gut our government, to threatening cuts to Medicaid and food programs, from slashing VA funding to a reckless trade policy—these attacks have been more than just hard to watch, they’re heartbreaking and they have devastating impacts on our communities. We could sit back and let it get us down. We could accept the fear, the frustration, the exhaustion of fighting against this corrupt agenda. **Or—we can do what tough people have always done when the deck is stacked against us: stand up, fight back, and refuse to back down.** I came to Congress to represent the people of Western PA, not to sit by quietly and watch Donald Trump, his billionaire friends, and Republican enablers slash health care, make it harder to afford groceries, and prioritize corruption and profiteering off our government. This fight is up to all of us. Now isn’t the time to sit on the sidelines, it’s the time to step up and take action. _We’ve got to stand our ground._ [_**So what do you say, Derek? Will you chip in today to help take on the Trump agenda and fight for working people? clean_body: Hey Derek, happy Wednesday! I wanted to take a moment to reach out and say thank you for your support during our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline and over the last few months. It truly means a lot—and it’s fueling the fight we’re in together. Look, since Donald Trump took office, we’ve seen some awful attacks on our rights, our democracy, and working people. From allowing Elon Musk to gut our government, to threatening cuts to Medicaid and food programs, from slashing VA funding to a reckless trade policy—these attacks have been more than just hard to watch, they’re heartbreaking and they have devastating impacts on our communities. We could sit back and let it get us down. We could accept the fear, the frustration, the exhaustion of fighting against this corrupt agenda. Or—we can do what tough people have always done when the deck is stacked against us: stand up, fight back, and refuse to back down. I came to Congress to represent the people of Western PA, not to sit by quietly and watch Donald Trump, his billionaire friends, and Republican enablers slash health care, make it harder to afford groceries, and prioritize corruption and profiteering off our government. This fight is up to all of us. Now isn’t the time to sit on the sidelines, it’s the time to step up and take action. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb7781916-4ce4-487d-ae44-be5d22b07edf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, Senator Cory Booker just took a courageous stand against Trump and his MAGA cronies. For over 25 hours, he gave a voice to the American people – and he broke the record for longest speech on the Senate floor. He took stunning action to defend Medicaid, Social Security, and other government services we depend on. He called out Trump’s dangerous cuts to the Education Department and other important agencies. And he took the MAGA movement to task for prioritizing profits over what people really need. Sen. Booker stood up for us – and now we need to stand with him. [Will you add your name to thank Senator Booker for his bold stance in the fight against MAGA extremism? Your signature will show a commitment to defeating far-right Republicans and restoring a Democratic majority that can stop Trump. It’s important that we’re all united in this fight, so please sign on by 11:59 PM tonight.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te33a8045-1fb5-46b7-b1f8-ad71478a7e3b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Jim Risch (R-ID)
subject: I appreciate President Trump’s rock-solid support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Friend,

It's an honor to have **[President Trump's](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2za2g9vq3g3vd884vdlesinve931r8e6pk2ecr2ug_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdi66o74c1h2bs)** endorsement in this pivotal U.S. Senate re-election fight to expand our critical new America First GOP Majority in the U.S. Senate!

And since I can't say it any better than our Commander-in-Chief, I'll let him speak for himself -- right here in his tremendous endorsement:

[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z35muq46i2itp0fahanpppab1q5akgupo5lmdutg_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdi66o74c1h2bs)

I know what President Trump knows -- that we can't take anything for granted in this Midterm Reelection race -- and that maintaining our indispensable GOP Senate Majority throughout President Trump's full term starts with maintaining the seats we already hold.

So I'm not at all surprised he's getting out in front of the rapidly approaching Midterm Election with his crucial endorsement of my campaign **[\-- and now I need YOU to join him!](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z959ls2ama0vq1i8hohk6ls6pmgbpgahe8sjjmho_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdi66o74c1h2bs)**

Will you **[give me YOUR Endorsement in this Idaho U.S. Senate race right now?](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zggdoj8migb94vgsru105c0pe5dqe56nlrgrm3jo_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdi66o74c1h2bs) **

**[Your key support at this early stage](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zomqb1hc5i1hlkua86uba0fr8ls6cjppdrqb0ogo_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdi66o74c1h2bs)** will go a long way toward ensuring we can lay the foundation for success and get our winning message of commonsense conservative principles and policies to the voters who will decide.

_Thank you,_ friend, for your continued support of our shared Conservative values.

Sincerely,
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zccg6n7h6smtbeuro05a2qqk861gjcgm010lck48_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdi66o74c1h2bs)
Jim Risch

[ENDORSE JIM RISCH >>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z71d0kea2drg5csc6adbo9tt484qhp04osloasf8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdi66o74c1h2bs)

name: Trump News
subject: Trump Patriot Constitution Survey
body:
Go on record

Friend,

_We, the people. We, the people. We, the people._

These are the THREE most important words in American history.

When Joe Biden was in office, he did everything he could to ignore the Constitution and deny the American people their rights. From attacking free speech to unconstitutional mandates, he trampled on the very foundations of our democracy.

__But President Trump stands for the Constitution.__ He defends our First Amendment rights, fights against government overreach, and ensures that the American people--not corrupt bureaucrats--have the power.

Now, we need YOUR input. We're launching the **[Trump Patriot Constitution Survey](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zitiieqqdnovr02bof4rv0ovohl7el0l52o7juc8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdi66o74c5h2bs)** to hear directly from top conservatives like YOU about your position on defending our nation's founding principles.

**TRUMP PATRIOT CONSTITUTIONAL SURVEY**

DO YOU SUPPORT PROTECTING CONSTITUTIONAL RIGHTS? | [YES >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0tanvvqdr6sog9tmsebavjbk971sprqb08j3hu8_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdi66o74c5h2bs)

America's future depends on patriots like YOU who refuse to let the radical left rewrite our nation's founding principles. **[Make your voice heard in the next 15 minutes.>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zli2n0db410s5v8lkvthh15t8gh51t4m9mr0rn78_rp22sh2s8i6eob6cdi66o74c5h2bs)**

name: Cory Booker
subject: My remarks on the Senate floor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
Friends — I hope you'll read the note below from Senator Cory Booker, whose incredible 25-hour speech on the Senate floor yesterday (the longest in history!) represented a powerful protest of this dangerous Administration and lifted up the stories of so many Americans who are hurting right now. I'm proud to call Cory a friend and am glad to share his message with you today, particularly after our own success in the House where we shut down the House floor and stalled Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and Mike Johnson’s harmful agenda. Together, we can and we will fight back! —Sara Jacobs
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-booker [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-booker]
Family, it’s Cory.
Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.
I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up.
What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard.
I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment.
It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered.
It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together.
If you’re willing and able, support our movement for justice, opportunity, and freedom by splitting a donation between me and Congresswoman Sara Jacobs today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-booker]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-booker?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-booker?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-booker?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-booker]
With love and gratitude,
Cory

clean_body: Friends — I hope you'll read the note below from Senator Cory Booker, whose incredible 25-hour speech on the Senate floor yesterday (the longest in history!) represented a powerful protest of this dangerous Administration and lifted up the stories of so many Americans who are hurting right now. I'm proud to call Cory a friend and am glad to share his message with you today, particularly after our own success in the House where we shut down the House floor and stalled Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and Mike Johnson’s harmful agenda. Together, we can and we will fight back! —Sara Jacobs [] Family, it’s Cory. Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. If you’re willing and able, support our movement for justice, opportunity, and freedom by splitting a donation between me and Congresswoman Sara Jacobs today. [] If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE OTHER [] With love and gratitude, Cory CONTRIBUTE [] [] Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States www.facebook.com/SaraJacobsCA/ [www.facebook.com/SaraJacobsCA/] twitter.com/sarajacobsca [twitter.com/sarajacobsca] www.instagram.com/sarajacobsca/ [www.instagram.com/sarajacobsca/] CONTRIBUTE TODAY [] We believe these emails are a critical way for Sara to stay in touch with supporters and constituents. | **“I rise with the intention of getting in some good trouble.”** Peter, those are the words Sen. Cory Booker spoke as he began the speech that broke the record for the longest Senate floor speech in history — referencing Georgia’s very own Rep. John Lewis. And I believe John Lewis would be incredibly proud to watch as Sen. Booker’s protest against Donald Trump’s extremist agenda broke a record previously held by someone filibustering against the Civil Rights Act of 1957. Sen. Booker’s good trouble made HISTORY last night, and now, we need to show our appreciation for his unwavering commitment to defending our democracy. clean_body: “I rise with the intention of getting in some good trouble.” If you’d like to unsubscribe, | “I rise with the intention of getting in some good trouble.” Peter, those are the words Sen. Cory Booker spoke as he began the speech that broke the record for the longest Senate floor speech in history — referencing Georgia’s very own Rep. John Lewis. And I believe John Lewis would be incredibly proud to watch as Sen. Booker’s protest against Donald Trump’s extremist agenda broke a record previously held by someone filibustering against the Civil Rights Act of 1957. Sen. Booker’s good trouble made HISTORY last night, and now, we need to show our appreciation for his unwavering commitment to defending our democracy. | | | Thanks, team. Forwarding my team’s full message from yesterday below. Kevin Olasanoye Executive Director, Democratic Party of Georgia Begin Forwarded Message from Georgia HQ: NPR: Cory Booker's anti-Trump speech on the Senate floor has lasted 18 hours and counting | | Peter, as we speak, Cory Booker is delivering a masterclass in fighting back against Donald Trump’s extremist agenda. He’s now been speaking on the Senate floor for 18 hours and counting — and he’s pledged to keep going for as long as physically possible. So we must show Cory our support and build UNDENIABLE momentum to help him keep fighting back. | | Thanks for signing on! Georgia Democrats | = Help Elect Georgia Democrats. The Democratic Party of Georgia works year-round to elect Democrats who share our values of a strong middle class, integrity in government, and equality and justice for all Georgians. If you'd like to donate to help fund our efforts, please = | = | Georgia Democrats have a long history of fighting for change. _Peter, Conservatives are considering abolishing TSA._

The Transportation Security Administration (TSA) is not prepared to deal with the ever-changing threats to air travel.

**TSA is an over-bloated agency.**

It's time to privatize aviation security screening.

name: Andy Kim
subject: Trump and Musk lost big
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey

| | Last night, voters in Wisconsin went to the polls and they voted against Trump and Musk and voted for their rights and a better future for their state. In a closely-watched State Supreme Court race, Justice Susan Crawford defeated her Trump and Musk-backed opponent, _even after Musk dropped tens of millions of dollars at the last minute to try and secure a win. _**Not only did Crawford win, but she won by a HUGE 10% margin.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105031598/537149258/-1146049147?refcode=2025-04-02-election&recurring=&amount=11&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=f95891ba-cf0f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTU4OTFiYS1jZjBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_cd-LlhFmrlG2Zv147-UXOd6M3G8K2I0-y2bbiu4Wq4=) **This election in Wisconsin – and elections across the country over the last few weeks, which have resulted in strong Democratic performances – show that people are fed up with the GOP destruction and chaos in Washington.** They're fed up with Trump and Musk gutting popular programs, firing veterans and civil servants, and pushing massive tax cuts for the wealthy and well-connected – and they're using their voices at the ballot box to send a powerful message. subject: Limited Government Power - Key to Individual Freedoms
body:
The Tenth Amendment was crafted in response to fears that the new federal government, established under the Constitution, might become too powerful and encroach on the rights of the states and individuals.

Photo by [Chris Lawton](https://substack.com/redirect/582f8e5d-3f69-4028-a74e-38fff53a0450?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on [Unsplash](https://substack.com/redirect/50e53d2d-10ff-4498-9f78-18fa86cc5642?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
As a conservative Republican with a libertarian bent, I see the Tenth Amendment as one of the best parts of the U.S. Constitution. Added in 1791 with the Bill of Rights, it's clear and simple: any power not given to the federal government or taken away from the states belongs to the states or the people. It's a rule that stops Washington from getting too big and keeps states and regular folks in charge of their own lives.
Back when this was written, people were nervous. The new Constitution created a stronger federal government, and some--called the Anti-Federalists--worried it'd turn into a monster, trampling states and citizens. The Tenth Amendment was the fix, a way to say, "Don't worry, the feds only get what we let them have." It's about keeping power in check and making sure the government doesn't overstep.
This amendment is why we have federalism--power split between the national government and the states. It's great because states can try their own ideas. One might set its own school policies, while another tackles healthcare its way. No forced, top-down plan from D.C. It's freedom to figure out what works where you live.
The U.S. is a big, varied place--cities, small towns, farms, coasts. The Tenth Amendment lets states handle their own issues, like roads or public safety, without waiting for some distant official to decide. Power stays closer to home, where it makes more sense.
It also puts a leash on the federal government. Take the 1995 case United States v. Lopez--Congress tried banning guns near schools, but the Supreme Court said, "No, that's a state job." The Tenth Amendment stepped in to keep the feds in their lane. It's a solid check on overreach.
Thanks to this amendment, states can make their own rules on stuff the Constitution doesn't touch--like legalizing marijuana or setting wages. Some do, some don't, and that's how it should be. It lets people live by their own values, not some blanket order from Washington.
Critics say it creates uneven rules across states, but I say that's the beauty of it. It stops the federal government from turning into a dictator. Freedom isn't perfect or uniform--it's gritty and real. The alternative is a one-size-fits-all system that crushes choice.
The Tenth Amendment is a promise that power won't all pile up in D.C. It keeps it local, where we can keep an eye on it and hold it accountable. For someone like me who values liberty and distrusts big government, it's the heart of what makes America work.

[](https://substack.com/redirect/bae147e1-f2a3-447b-9178-9d37e7ad3274?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[](https://substack..brWjnvUBlKZhoG-uMUdDvK4SRCMB6xSWCvNMDIjLQ1Q?)
clean_body: The Tenth Amendment was crafted in response to fears that the new federal government, established under the Constitution, might become too powerful and encroach on the rights of the states and individuals. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? from the desk ofDana Criswell | | | Apr 2 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Photo by on As a conservative Republican with a libertarian bent, I see the Tenth Amendment as one of the best parts of the U.S. Constitution. Added in 1791 with the Bill of Rights, it's clear and simple: any power not given to the federal government or taken away from the states belongs to the states or the people. It's a rule that stops Washington from getting too big and keeps states and regular folks in charge of their own lives. Back when this was written, people were nervous. The new Constitution created a stronger federal government, and some--called the Anti-Federalists--worried it'd turn into a monster, trampling states and citizens. The Tenth Amendment was the fix, a way to say, "Don't worry, the feds only get what we let them have." It's about keeping power in check and making sure the government doesn't overstep. This amendment is why we have federalism--power split between the national government and the states. It's great because states can try their own ideas. One might set its own school policies, while another tackles healthcare its way. No forced, top-down plan from D.C. It's freedom to figure out what works where you live. The U.S. is a big, varied place--cities, small towns, farms, coasts. The Tenth Amendment lets states handle their own issues, like roads or public safety, without waiting for some distant official to decide. Power stays closer to home, where it makes more sense. It also puts a leash on the federal government. Take the 1995 case United States v. Lopez--Congress tried banning guns near schools, but the Supreme Court said, "No, that's a state job." The Tenth Amendment stepped in to keep the feds in their lane. It's a solid check on overreach. Thanks to this amendment, states can make their own rules on stuff the Constitution doesn't touch--like legalizing marijuana or setting wages. Some do, some don't, and that's how it should be. It lets people live by their own values, not some blanket order from Washington. Critics say it creates uneven rules across states, but I say that's the beauty of it. It stops the federal government from turning into a dictator. Freedom isn't perfect or uniform--it's gritty and real. The alternative is a one-size-fits-all system that crushes choice. The Tenth Amendment is a promise that power won't all pile up in D.C. It keeps it local, where we can keep an eye on it and hold it accountable. For someone like me who values liberty and distrusts big government, it's the heart of what makes America work. Read all of Dana 's post and stay informed about politics in Mississippi | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Dana Criswell Mississippi ? ?

Derek, it's Cory.
Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.
I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up.
What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard.
I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment.
It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered.
It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together.
If you’re willing and able, support our movement for justice, opportunity, and freedom by splitting a donation between me and Tim Kaine today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-booker]

name: Cory Booker
subject: We must speak up:
body:
---
Derek, I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I’ve said again and again, this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. **We must speak up.** I am filled with hope. My team told me that tens of thousands of you have voiced your support for my remarks on the Senate floor. It will be a while before I can fully get through all your messages and powerful stories, but what’s clear to me tonight is this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. With love and gratitude, Cory Cory Booker
U.S. Senator, New Jersey | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025-booker?amount=10&refcode=em_20250402_3115_fr&refcode2=3115_22930333_PHzc1A&akid=3115%2E22930333%2EPHzc1A)
---

**Democrats like Cory Booker are standing up and speaking out.**
**We can — and will — elect more Democrats who will check Trump’s power. But it’s only possible with your help.**
[**If you were inspired by what you saw yesterday, split a contribution between Cory Booker and the DNC:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025-booker?amount=10&refcode=em_20250402_3115_fr&refcode2=3115_22930333_PHzc1A&akid=3115%2E22930333%2EPHzc1A)
**[CONTRIBUTE $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025-booker?refcode=em_20250402_3115_fr&amount=10&refcode2=3115_22930333_PHzc1A&akid=3115%2E22930333%2EPHzc1A)**

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

| |

| |
---
| | Patriot, You may recognize me as Riverside County Sheriff. As Sheriff I am responsible for the County's five jail facilities, six court buildings, a civil bureau, the Coroner's Bureau, Public Administrator's Office, twelve patrol stations, seventeen contract cities, 4,200 dedicated employees and an operating budget of just over one billion dollars. It’s a lot of responsibility, but having the honor of keeping my home safe is the best job in the world.
---

subject: I spoke for over 25 hours straight on the Senate floor

body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up.
#

Peter, it’s Cory.
Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.
I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up.
What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard.
I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment.
It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered.
It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together.
[**If you’re willing and able, support our movement for justice, opportunity, and freedom by splitting a donation between me and Ruben Gallego today.](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-booker-em-split.-xBD0a&refcode=em250402-1-90&t=1&akid=3802%2E734936%2EoDIKWq)**

name: Cory Booker
subject: I’m tired and a little hoarse, but I cannot stay silent.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up.
#

Hey friend, it’s Mark Kelly. My friend Cory Booker is running for Senate in New Jersey and needs our help. I hope you’ll read the message below from him, and [**rush a split donation between Cory's campaign and mine.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-booker.Sn3TNW&refcode=em250402-1-90&t=1&akid=6033%2E6688874%2Edr9waH)
---
Family, it’s Cory.
Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.
I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up.
What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard.
I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment.
It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered.
It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together.
[**If you’re willing and able, support our movement for justice, opportunity, and freedom by splitting a donation between me and Mark Kelly today.](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-booker.Sn3TNW&refcode=em250402-1-90&t=2&akid=6033%2E6688874%2Edr9waH)**

name: Tim Walz
subject: We did it, Peter
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
Because of your incredible support, we not only reached our end-of-quarter fundraising goal, we exceeded it.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105035091/537158869/-245982205?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmI5MjRmNy1kMzBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=omGGJi6tgsdy_zVpOP1awPc0IIcWbNPqLxAulQIagGA=)

Peter,
I can’t thank you enough.
Because of your incredible support, we not only reached our end-of-quarter fundraising goal, we exceeded it.
With Donald Trump back in the White House and MAGA Republicans in control of Congress, we knew we had to aim high this quarter. And when I started hitting the road, holding town halls in Republican-held districts across the country to elevate voices that are being ignored, your generosity kept us moving.
Every contribution, no matter the size, helps power our work: keeping our campaign on the road, pushing back against Trump and Musk, and standing up for the values we share.
The road ahead won’t be easy. But with your help, I’m confident we can overcome the challenges we’re facing—and build a larger movement across the nation.
Thanks again for everything. It truly means the world to know you’ve got my back.
Thank you,
Tim Walz

**You will only pay $9** (this poncho will sell on my website next week for $29.99)

Thats not even the best part....

**THE BEST PART:** I’m adding a mystery bonus gift for the first 200 buyers.

Stock is going to move fast.

[AT THIS PRICE,](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20932/6374453/f191ae62ab9f8f51e4555b86bf2f7bd9b97ff8bb/87cb0bc3b7a3c36fd55dd495fdcc126e3e15b0d2) These will fly off the shelves.

name: Cory Booker
subject: I’m tired and a little hoarse, but I cannot stay silent.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up.
This is a crucial moment in our fight to protect the American people and our democracy. Please add your name before midnight tonight.
|
---
| Family, it’s Cory.

Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.

**I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up.**

What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard.

I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment.

It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered.

It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together.

clean_body: This is a moment where we must all speak up. This is a crucial moment in our fight to protect the American people and our democracy. Please add your name before midnight tonight. | | Family, it’s Cory. Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Cory Booker and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = With love and gratitude, Cory = * = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: VoteVets.org
subject: GOP: You’re on notice
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Trump won Wisconsin by 1 point in 2024. Susan Crawford will win this race by a margin of over 10 points — a swing of 11 points in six months.
#
Hey everybody, two points we want to make today.
First, we’ve already seen some state and local level races around the country make incredible swings against the GOP this year.
That’s a promising sign.
Second, we won the Wisconsin Supreme Court race last night, and it wasn’t close. VoteVets recognized the importance of this race early and made a six-figure investment in it.
Trump won Wisconsin by 1 point in 2024. Susan Crawford will win this race by a margin of over 10 points — a swing of 11 points in six months. Elon Musk was paying people hundreds of dollars to sign petitions, thousands of dollars to knock doors, gave out $1 million dollar checks to supporters, and invested about $25 million in the race that we can tell.
Here’s the lesson: **Elon Musk’s billions are not going to save the GOP.**
Elon is holding his billions over the heads of Republicans in Congress, threatening to primary them if they don’t fall in line. He’s calling out Democratic Veterans in elected office on social media and in the news — even going so far as to call them traitors — and committing to spend heavily to defeat them.
We’ll say it again: **Elon Musk’s billions are not going to save you.** And to everyone in the GOP counting on keeping their heads down and pushing through Elon and Trump’s slash and burn agenda: **Consider yourselves on notice.**
We are coming for you. If you vote to gut Social Security, Medicaid, Medicare, and programs millions of Veterans depend on — **we are coming for you.** If you are going to stand by while Elon and DOGE gut the VA, fire 83,000 staff, and force Veterans to the brink — **we are coming for you.** If you pass trillions in tax cuts for the most filthy rich people in the country while leaving our Veterans hanging in the breeze — **we are coming for you.**
Next up, a crucial gubernatorial election in Virginia, with Abigail Spanberger — a VoteVets member — running. If you want us to keep this fight up and help principled leaders win in November and in 2026, please:
[**Make a donation to VoteVets.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-april25.G9aCQU&refcode=em250402-1-90&t=1&akid=34308%2E3013755%2E9_jr72)

clean_body: Trump won Wisconsin by 1 point in 2024. Susan Crawford will win this race by a margin of over 10 points — a swing of 11 points in six months. Hey everybody, two points we want to make today. First, we’ve already seen some state and local level races around the country make incredible swings against the GOP this year. That’s a promising sign. Second, we won the Wisconsin Supreme Court race last night, and it wasn’t close. VoteVets recognized the importance of this race early and made a six-figure investment in it. Trump won Wisconsin by 1 point in 2024. Susan Crawford will win this race by a margin of over 10 points — a swing of 11 points in six months. Elon Musk was paying people hundreds of dollars to sign petitions, thousands of dollars to knock doors, gave out $1 million dollar checks to supporters, and invested about $25 million in the race that we can tell. Here’s the lesson: Elon Musk’s billions are not going to save the GOP. Elon is holding his billions over the heads of Republicans in Congress, threatening to primary them if they don’t fall in line. He’s calling out Democratic Veterans in elected office on social media and in the news — even going so far as to call them traitors — and committing to spend heavily to defeat them. We’ll say it again: Elon Musk’s billions are not going to save you. And to everyone in the GOP counting on keeping their heads down and pushing through Elon and Trump’s slash and burn agenda: Consider yourselves on notice. We are coming for you. If you vote to gut Social Security, Medicaid, Medicare, and programs millions of Veterans depend on — we are coming for you. If you are going to stand by while Elon and DOGE gut the VA, fire 83,000 staff, and force Veterans to the brink — we are coming for you. If you pass trillions in tax cuts for the most filthy rich people in the country while leaving our Veterans hanging in the breeze — we are coming for you. Next up, a crucial gubernatorial election in Virginia, with Abigail Spanberger — a VoteVets member — running. name: Ted Cruz
subject: Recap: last night’s huge ramifications
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
Most people aren’t talking about this serious issue

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9TcGVjaWFsLUVsZWN0aW9ucy1SZWNhcF8yMDI1MDQwMiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVNwZWNpYWwtRWxlY3Rpb25zLVJlY2FwJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTc1In0/eZdSPENrwy7HraL5-TkucQ)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Here is the situation. Democrats are celebrating a big victory in Wisconsin today. Last night progressive candidate Susan Crawford won the Wisconsin Supreme Court election and beat conservative Brad Schimel. **This unfortunate result will have** _**enormous ramifications**_**for the balance of power in Congress,** as the now liberal Wisconsin Supreme Court is expected to issue some drastic leftwing rulings, including potential redistricting rulings for house districts. _Republicans have a VERY narrow House Majority ... _ _That 's why this was the most expensive judicial race in American history! Liberal billionaire George Soros donated at least two million dollars to the Democratic Party of Wisconsin, which passed along the money to the Crawford campaign, of course. _ The fact is _money continues to be a serious problem for Republicans_. We have Soros cash flooding nearly every race across the country, _on top of the fact_ that we're getting massively outraised at the grassroots level. **Crawford's campaign raised just under $28 million, a new record for a judicial candidate, while Schimel's campaign contributions bottomed out at just $15.1 million**** _- so we were outraised by nearly double! _**
---
[ **DONATE HERE TO RUSH REPUBLICAN SUPPORT >>**](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9TcGVjaWFsLUVsZWN0aW9ucy1SZWNhcF8yMDI1MDQwMiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVNwZWNpYWwtRWxlY3Rpb25zLVJlY2FwJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTc1In0/kPOz3pxAHOPnbgWUxNQFxA)
---
**Meanwhile, in Florida, Republicans won two special Congressional races** to replace Matt Gaetz in FL-01 and Mike Waltz in FL-06. Both were "must-win" for the GOP. And I'm very happy we won. However, it is an **ominous** **sign** that Democrats _OVERPERFORMED IN_ __BOTH__ races compared to the last elections in these deep red districts. This is largely due to their outspending our candidates by as much as 10 to 1. This is seriously concerning. **_[I'm asking every conservative Republican to step up and rush support to help me and the Republican Party level the financial playing field right now >>](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9TcGVjaWFsLUVsZWN0aW9ucy1SZWNhcF8yMDI1MDQwMiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVNwZWNpYWwtRWxlY3Rpb25zLVJlY2FwJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTc1In0/gWbl_pMIzZcpTRG_q7i7xg)_**** ** If we don't, the Democrats will derail Trump's America First agenda. _Republicans can 't sit back- we need to press hard now while we have the chance!_**_ _**
---
[ **DONATE NOW >>**](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9TcGVjaWFsLUVsZWN0aW9ucy1SZWNhcF8yMDI1MDQwMiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVNwZWNpYWwtRWxlY3Rpb25zLVJlY2FwJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTc1In0/OHtNmE1HFumfUff96HAwuw)
---
**_Thank you for_** _**_YOUR STRONG AND CRUCIAL SUPPORT_**_** _\- it makes a big difference!_**
Ted Cruz
---

name: Cory Booker
subject: I’m tired and a little hoarse, but I cannot stay silent.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2264%2E135344%2EIP8lW5)

[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-booker-apr25.ODSPOM&refcode=em250402-1&refcode2=2264.135344.IP8lW5&t=2&akid=2264%2E135344%2EIP8lW5)
---
Family, it’s Cory.
Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.
I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up.
What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard.
I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment.
It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered.
It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together.
[**If you’re willing and able, support our movement for justice, opportunity, and freedom by splitting a donation between me and Elissa Slotkin today.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-booker-apr25.ODSPOM&refcode=em250402-1&t=3&akid=2264%2E135344%2EIP8lW5)**

name: James Carville
subject: We need to play for every single win we can get.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Now _that's_ how it's done, team!!

**I'm talkin' about the big breaking news from Wisconsin last night -- we freakin'_WON!_** Not only did we stop conservatives from taking the majority on a crucial battleground's highest court -- but considering Elon and his cronies blew over $25 million to buy this seat, _this probably ruined his whole week!_

**[Democrats are making it crystal clear: We won't let Trump and Musk buy their way to victory!! But if we really want to stop these clowns, winning elections is EVERYTHING -- so will you chip in $5 to fuel the fight to take back the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250402-JamesCarville-CarvilleWisconsinCourtRR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250402-JamesCarville-CarvilleWisconsinCourtRR-Pros-sl1&akid=19937%2E9716520%2EnfooeY)**

This latest victory proves _we have an opening_. **Now, we need to play for every single win we can get.**

I'm talkin' special elections like Florida's and Ohio's. I'm talkin' battleground races like Maine's and North Carolina's. _We only need 4 seats to flip the Senate blue --**let's run the table on these clowns and send all of 'em home in tears!**_

But if Elon Musk and his cronies pumped over $25 million into one court race in Wisconsin, _just imagine how much cash he and Trump's other buddies are gonna shell out to keep the Senate in their pocket._ The GOP is ready to fight -- so I say, let's give 'em the fight of a lifetime.

To seize this moment and elect as many Democrats as we can to the Senate, the DSCC has set a $50,000 fundraising goal -- _but we need to hit it by midnight!_ **This is our only chance to take back the Senate during Trump's entire presidency, so we can't just sit around:**

**[Chip in $5 to fight for every last victory and take back the majority from those Trump-enabling bozos!!>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250402-JamesCarville-CarvilleWisconsinCourtRR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250402-JamesCarville-CarvilleWisconsinCourtRR-Pros-sl1&akid=19937%2E9716520%2EnfooeY)**

But if Elon Musk and his cronies pumped over $25 million into one court race in Wisconsin, just imagine how much cash he and Trump's other buddies are gonna shell out to keep the Senate in their pocket. The GOP is ready to fight -- so I say, let's give 'em the fight of a lifetime. To seize this moment and elect as many Democrats as we can to the Senate, the DSCC has set a $50,000 fundraising goal -- but we need to hit it by midnight! This is our only chance to take back the Senate during Trump's entire presidency, so we can't just sit around: We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | Thanks, James Carville Derivative of by JD Lasica. . The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please . to receive fewer emails. to unsubscribe. name: Sarah McBride
subject: I’m filled with gratitude
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
We blew past our goal — and it’s all because of grassroots supporters like you.
#
Hi, it’s Sarah McBride.
I wanted to take a moment to say _THANK YOU._
This week, we closed the books on our first FEC fundraising deadline of 2025. Thanks to this incredible grassroots team, we knocked our $110,000 goal out of the park!
**In fact, we received more individual grassroots donations this quarter than ever before.** And that sends a powerful message: we’re not backing down in the face of Donald Trump and the GOP’s policies hurting everyday people.
While Republicans double down on extremism, deception, and bullying, we’re building something stronger: a growing movement fueled by hope and action.
I’m proud of what we’re building together. Representing Delaware in Congress is the honor of a lifetime — and I’m here because of supporters like you.
Thank you,
Sarah
P.S. No matter what the GOP throws our way, I will keep speaking out and fighting for everyday people in Congress, and I’ll keep relying on grassroots supporters like you to power this work. [**If you’re able, pitch in to keep our momentum going?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250401-1?refcode=em20250402-1871&refcode2=1871_21716_LMJ3xK&akid=1871%2E21716%2ELMJ3xK)
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250401-1&t=1&refcode2=1871_21716_LMJ3xK&akid=1871%2E21716%2ELMJ3xK)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1871%2E21716%2ELMJ3xK)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1871%2E21716%2ELMJ3xK)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1871%2E21716%2ELMJ3xK)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

name: Jena for CO
subject: He’s doubling down on voter suppression
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://www.facebook.com/share/v/1A5sZUEKLt/ [https://www.facebook.com/share/v/1A5sZUEKLt/]
Peter –
Last week, Trump signed an executive order that could disenfranchise millions of voters. This order would make it harder for Americans across the nation to register to vote.
This order continues Trump’s pursuit of the Big Lie and voter suppression efforts. This has been Trump’s game since he lost in 2020.
Jena was interviewed on MSNBC talking about this unlawful order. Watch her interview here. [https://www.facebook.com/share/v/1A5sZUEKLt/]
https://www.facebook.com/share/v/1A5sZUEKLt/ [https://www.facebook.com/share/v/1A5sZUEKLt/]
This order is a blatant power grab designed to make it harder for Americans - especially people of color, women, and blue-collar people - to have their voices heard.
As Secretary of State, Jena has fought hard to make our elections more secure, accessible, and fair. We’ve expanded voter access, implemented automatic voter registration, and ensured that every eligible Coloradan can cast their ballot safely and easily.
Trump and his allies are trying to roll that progress back.
We must stick together in this fight for democracy.
– Jena For CO

name: Scott Jensen
subject: Lawsuit dismissed?
body:
not the end | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/lawsuit-final-dismiss?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

Justice delayed is Justice denied. Judge Jerry Blackwell has dismissed my lawsuit against the Minnesota Board of Medical Practice. But we are not done yet! [Take a listen](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=d7488c536b&e=9828080a05) to my brief video going into more detail regarding Judge Jerry Blackwell’s decision. Please consider moving [this video](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=155b632e26&e=9828080a05) onwards and outwards because all people need to know how vulnerable our freedom of speech can be:
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=cc5efd83d9&e=9828080a05)
---
| I will press on and will be appealing this decision to the 8th Circuit Court of Appeals. This lawsuit focuses on the weaponization of a government agency to infringe upon freedom of speech, and its reach goes way beyond my medical license. This lawsuit fights against government overreach into the lives of anybody who might be registered or licensed or certified by a government agency. Judge Blackwell’s decision that I lack legal standing because my speech was not chilled perplexes and disappoints me. There is no question in my mind that during the 2022 Minnesota gubernatorial campaign my words and expressions were remarkably and obviously ‘chilled’ because of a fear of reprisal from the Minnesota Board of Medical Practice.

I thank you from the bottom of my heart for standing with me in this battle for our core freedoms.

It has been five years since political activists and detractors put me in the crosshairs of the Minnesota Board of Medical Practice.

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor
---
|
