clean_body: not the end | | | | | | | Peter, Justice delayed is Justice denied. Judge Jerry Blackwell has dismissed my lawsuit against the Minnesota Board of Medical Practice. But we are not done yet! to my brief video going into more detail regarding Judge Jerry Blackwell’s decision. Please consider moving onwards and outwards because all people need to know how vulnerable our freedom of speech can be: | | I will press on and will be appealing this decision to the 8th Circuit Court of Appeals. This lawsuit focuses on the weaponization of a government agency to infringe upon freedom of speech, and its reach goes way beyond my medical license. This lawsuit fights against government overreach into the lives of anybody who might be registered or licensed or certified by a government agency. Judge Blackwell’s decision that I lack legal standing because my speech was not chilled perplexes and disappoints me. There is no question in my mind that during the 2022 Minnesota gubernatorial campaign my words and expressions were remarkably and obviously ‘chilled’ because of a fear of reprisal from the Minnesota Board of Medical Practice. I thank you from the bottom of my heart for standing with me in this battle for our core freedoms. It has been five years since political activists and detractors put me in the crosshairs of the Minnesota Board of Medical Practice. In Freedom, Dr. Scott Jensen Minnesota Family Doctor | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2025 Fractured Times Media LLC, All rights reserved.

name: Cory Booker
subject: I spoke for over 25 hours straight on the Senate floor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up.

| Peter, it’s Cory.

Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.

I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up.

What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard.

I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment.

It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered.

It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together.

[If you’re willing and able, support our movement for justice, opportunity, and freedom by splitting a donation between me and Ritchie Torres today. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105039485/537169744/502635393?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250402_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmQ0ZTk4MS1kOTBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b4ZU963p2MuwfuoH1jvUo1-b-QLYt7P8b49PIilRp7M=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Cory Booker and Ritchie Torres will go through immediately: | **[CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105039492/537169751/502635393?amount=3&express_lane=true&refcode=RTFC_20250402_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmQ0ZTk4MS1kOTBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b4ZU963p2MuwfuoH1jvUo1-b-QLYt7P8b49PIilRp7M=)**

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

Family, it’s Cory. Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. subject: How COURIER (and you) helped defeat Musk in Wisconsin
body:
Last night, Democrats scored a huge win in Wisconsin.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105041419/537174158/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjM3ZDE3OWEtZGIwZi1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xr5EAnSIgGE1kN3jjAHw7cBhrnDCgaAbbRZ_VJDTVR4=&emci=2a48d575-ca0f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=637d179a-db0f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=14016711)

Peter,
Last night, Democrats scored a huge win in Wisconsin.
Susan Crawford defeated MAGA loyalist Brad Schimel in the most expensive judicial race in history. All told, Elon Musk poured in $25 million to defeat her.
**Crawford’s victory wasn’t just a rejection of Musk and Trump’s attack on the courts and democracy—it was proof that the grassroots-funded journalism you make possible can help fuel victories in important elections like this one.**
**[We’re just getting started. Can you chip in now to help us expose the right, inform voters, and fuel more important victories?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105041420/537174159/-1581427288?refcode=20250402_Wisconsin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjM3ZDE3OWEtZGIwZi1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xr5EAnSIgGE1kN3jjAHw7cBhrnDCgaAbbRZ_VJDTVR4=)**
**[Chip in $25 to support our work](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105041421/537174161/-1581427288?refcode=20250402_Wisconsin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjM3ZDE3OWEtZGIwZi1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xr5EAnSIgGE1kN3jjAHw7cBhrnDCgaAbbRZ_VJDTVR4=)**
**Powered by grassroots support, COURIER’s Wisconsin newsroom—UpNorth News—has been on the ground for weeks. **
From exposing Crawford’s opponent and his anti-abortion record to publishing election explainers in the digital spaces where disengaged voters get news, UpNorth News helped shape the narrative and inform voters in the days leading to the election.
**Nationally, one of our TikToks about Musk’s attempt to buy the race hit nearly half a million views:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105041423/537174162/-1581427288?refcode=20250402_Wisconsin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjM3ZDE3OWEtZGIwZi1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xr5EAnSIgGE1kN3jjAHw7cBhrnDCgaAbbRZ_VJDTVR4=)
**With your support, this is what COURIER does—and it works.**
We’ve built 11 newsrooms in battleground states like Wisconsin, Michigan, Arizona, and Pennsylvania. Each one produces trusted, local journalism—while our national team amplifies those stories across platforms like TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.

Susan Crawford defeated MAGA loyalist Brad Schimel in the most expensive judicial race in history. All told, Elon Musk poured in $25 million to defeat her. Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dkpccbakbhs20kr73xmy2i2mj4aor1hebxl4iiqfennk7pbofhe7elj8ck1i328wqiyuvs13rpc2495o0h9z0o541mlsnw4yshrnhlwoebcsl4jb55qo4rj8doukawwu8cxk81mrxhf5a3lomvjw&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su3m96&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su3m96&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su3m96&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su3m96&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dkpccbakbhs20kr73xmy2i2n6dceyffztv6wy2eskzjf1armw3rplvpcjt5xvzzymfagvlsku1wpsoh6g0puykqgc7er8urypym6ctwl55dlm2yi72tkdrvus9ei5q42x0nn0tjrsjuh5f2z88pg&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su3m96&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su3m96&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Team DLCC
subject: The results are in

body:
We have worked for years to build power in the battleground state of Wisconsin, and with this win, Democrats are closer than ever before to flipping both chambers in 2026. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**_BREAKING:_** In a blow to Trump and Musk, Wisconsin voters elected Judge Susan Crawford to secure a liberal majority in the state Supreme Court **For over a decade, Wisconsin had been one of the worst gerrymandered states in the country, giving Republicans unchecked power.** Securing a liberal majority in 2023 had a major impact on our ability to grow Democratic power. Defending the liberal majority keeps both chambers of Wisconsin’s legislature in play in 2026. Despite the $20 million that Elon Musk-aligned groups dumped into this race to defeat Democrats, this victory is a testament to this grassroots team's commitment to stopping the MAGA agenda in the states. Let’s keep the momentum going. name: Your good friend, Troy
subject: Taking a sledgehammer to the status quo.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I could care less about what my Democrat colleagues in Washington think about me. But your opinion matters.

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Hey there,

This is Congressman Troy Downing. I’m honored to serve my first term in Congress as a Trump-endorsed conservative. I didn’t come to Washington, DC, to make friends—I came to drain the swamp and shake things up.

But I can’t do it alone. Unlike career politicians who pad their pockets, I don’t rely on lobbyists or corporate interests to fund my campaign. **I’m fighting for YOUR and need YOUR help to keep the momentum going.**

I hate to bother you like this, but hitting our goal will send a message to the Democrats that America First conservatives are here to stay. **[**Will you rush in $10 or whatever you can right now to help us defend the conservative Majority?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**
---
[ **RUSH HELP NOW**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Together, we’re taking a sledgehammer to the status quo and putting America back on track.

Thank you for your support,Congressman Troy Downing
---

name: Center for Reproductive Rights
subject: President Trump just froze MILLIONS for birth control, cancer screenings + more
body:
Tell Congress to protect critical funding | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105045674/537183153/2141984067?sourceid=1150559&utm_campaign=25emeus-0401aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=priorities&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjI5YzBlNi1kZTBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n7Z4FQ2PCE1pnlcjB35MfQ6X-9lHQjhBLbYCkc89i5s=&emci=5bd82caa-cd0f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1b29c0e6-de0f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105045675/537183154/2141984067?sourceid=1150559&utm_campaign=25emeus-0401aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=priorities&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjI5YzBlNi1kZTBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n7Z4FQ2PCE1pnlcjB35MfQ6X-9lHQjhBLbYCkc89i5s=&emci=5bd82caa-cd0f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1b29c0e6-de0f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237)
---|---
Peter,

**This week, the Trump administration attacked Title X, the U.S.’s only dedicated family planning safety net program,** freezing as much as $66 million dollars in funding for critical reproductive health care services, including birth control, cancer screenings, and testing for sexually transmitted infections.

The Administration continues to enact its anti-rights agenda, creating chaos and endangering the health of millions of women and families across the country, and you and I cannot sit idly by. [**We must demand that Congress take action to protect this funding TODAY.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105045676/537183155/1817116919?sourceid=1150559&utm_campaign=25emeus-0401aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=priorities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjI5YzBlNi1kZTBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n7Z4FQ2PCE1pnlcjB35MfQ6X-9lHQjhBLbYCkc89i5s=&emci=5bd82caa-cd0f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1b29c0e6-de0f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237) | [**DEMAND ACTION TODAY**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105045677/537183156/1817116919?sourceid=1150559&utm_campaign=25emeus-0401aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=priorities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjI5YzBlNi1kZTBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n7Z4FQ2PCE1pnlcjB35MfQ6X-9lHQjhBLbYCkc89i5s=&emci=5bd82caa-cd0f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1b29c0e6-de0f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237 "DONATE NOW")
---
Title X serves millions of Americans each year, ensuring that low-income and marginalized communities across the country can access vital family planning and preventive care. The Trump administration has unjustifiably frozen funds for these essential services. **We immediately filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request within 24 hours to expose the administration’s motivations and strategies for attacking such a critical program.** [**Now it’s your turn to act: demand that Congress protect Title X funding!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105045678/537183157/1817116919?sourceid=1150559&utm_campaign=25emeus-0401aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=priorities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjI5YzBlNi1kZTBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n7Z4FQ2PCE1pnlcjB35MfQ6X-9lHQjhBLbYCkc89i5s=&emci=5bd82caa-cd0f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1b29c0e6-de0f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237)
[**RESTORE TITLE X**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105045679/537183158/1817116919?sourceid=1150559&utm_campaign=25emeus-0401aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=priorities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjI5YzBlNi1kZTBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n7Z4FQ2PCE1pnlcjB35MfQ6X-9lHQjhBLbYCkc89i5s=&emci=5bd82caa-cd0f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1b29c0e6-de0f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237 "DONATE NOW")
---
President Trump has proudly taken credit for the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ , which has created a nationwide health care crisis, and these cuts will only make this worse. He claims to “protect women,” but it’s the Center that has fought for and protected every person's right to access affordable reproductive health care for more than 30 years.

[**We’ve always been committed to using every tool at our disposal—including taking the administration to court—and we’re not backing down now.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105045680/537183159/1817116919?sourceid=1150559&utm_campaign=25emeus-0401aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=priorities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjI5YzBlNi1kZTBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n7Z4FQ2PCE1pnlcjB35MfQ6X-9lHQjhBLbYCkc89i5s=&emci=5bd82caa-cd0f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=1b29c0e6-de0f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=954237)

In solidarity and determination,

Center for Reproductive Rights

clean_body: Tell Congress to protect critical funding | | | ---|--- Peter, This week, the Trump administration attacked Title X, the U.S.’s only dedicated family planning safety net program, freezing as much as $66 million dollars in funding for critical reproductive health care services, including birth control, cancer screenings, and testing for sexually transmitted infections. The Administration continues to enact its anti-rights agenda, creating chaos and endangering the health of millions of women and families across the country, and you and I cannot sit idly by. | "DONATE NOW" Title X serves millions of Americans each year, ensuring that low-income and marginalized communities across the country can access vital family planning and preventive care. The Trump administration has unjustifiably frozen funds for these essential services. We immediately filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request within 24 hours to expose the administration’s motivations and strategies for attacking such a critical program. "DONATE NOW" President Trump has proudly taken credit for the overturning of Roe v. Wade , which has created a nationwide health care crisis, and these cuts will only make this worse. He claims to “protect women,” but it’s the Center that has fought for and protected every person's right to access affordable reproductive health care for more than 30 years. In solidarity and determination, Center for Reproductive Rights "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. name: Left Action
subject: Sign: Don't let these extremists take health care from millions of families
body:
| | | | |

| | |
# [Act Now—Save Medicaid!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1be022b0-9425-4fbc-b64b-472573aeb4b0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7805ea9d-49e6-4c0c-8639-d703c3fd5fa6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Medicaid is the largest single source of health coverage in the U.S., providing necessary care for more than 72 million Americans, including children, seniors, veterans, hardworking families, and people with disabilities. But some extremists in Congress are trying to cut Medicaid funding, threatening healthcare coverage for millions of Americans. [**Don't let them do it—Save Medicaid! Add your name and demand Congress reject these cuts, and take immediate action to protect Medicaid. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T27a22846-127c-4a1f-a8a6-524918003089/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**These cuts could devastate families, children, and seniors, and — tell the extremists to BACK OFF!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcaa976fd-23f3-4797-8f5b-c55928c6f6c0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Good news from Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39604%2E3422442%2EqvBUfd)
Dear Derek,
Last night was a reminder that a grassroots groundswell _can_ beat special interests. With the support of everyday Americans, Judge Susan Crawford won her election to the Wisconsin Supreme Court, defeating an opponent funded by GOP megadonors like Elon Musk.
In the leadup to this critical statewide election, we asked Porter Supporters to chip into this race. You met this moment and helped fuel Judge Crawford’s victory.
Our movement is strong because folks like you don’t lose hope, even when we face setbacks. You get right back on your feet and keep pushing for the future our kids deserve.
**Last night’s result was also a reminder that our fight to protect our rights and combat right-wing extremism doesn’t start next year— _it’s already happening._**
The work we do today matters, and there’s a heck of a lot more work to do.
We’re laying the groundwork to elect leaders like Katie Porter, who have the backbone to go toe to toe with extremists on behalf of working people.
**[If you can, will you chip in $5 to reinforce our message to special interests: that our democracy is not for sale?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250402_1_ak?refcode=em20250402-39604&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39604_3422442_qvBUfd&akid=39604%2E3422442%2EqvBUfd)**

Thanks,
Team KP

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250402-39604&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39604_3422442_qvBUfd&akid=39604%2E3422442%2EqvBUfd)**

Last night, I officially announced my reelection campaign for U.S. Senate here in Alaska!
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/F-jdKmQuGXq-dU363kqfKD1OiA0XbhxgLeu_nXeDhwrAWff6_q1yuSPkq7MJij_jCuiDNnA4VJ5_qf2eoH4bj7pph2lRnJ-YQZMuGvCuFrtgDnSOqD5lvMySnb0_1JhE-dzEScLuXOjCG0GB-Wts4TXgPNo9nNivbfjdaXR_88r7Azzs3dAcHFZKNlhDlUtD_jaWr4RaLJP88FH_jyimeHAlrCf5MUhW0osrYDwDpTOGxT1vNG8R838Mb1RyzN_5ANrOsEdAPiDWuUgRJXH1-xg3Myzu34cX1Hp9_rR_zcHeNXKGRa7B-czBHhEO5TEslIEz4zQWXN1RGdYg6RkgZcjCEg7tNqJiv5MvakHCAxHDtjRLh7gdKjNynAL_N2mVNC8fTQWOfexTUiRGFSxyaL5uX3rC3YwJz9Ze00n7fjP_4P4Smo1qDJ_esybhtw/DBitcaZS7MKah6-psyACoSp5_nyY7HbY/7)
---
When I first ran in 2014, it was because I believed Alaska needed a stronger voice in Washington, D.C. Our challenges and opportunities are different than the rest of the country, and we needed someone who would boldly fight for them. **Over the last 12 years, I have worked to:** ✩ **__Unleash__ Alaskan energy** ✩ **__Rebuild__ __ our military****✩ _Fight_ for our veterans** **✩ __Create__ good-paying jobs for our hard-working families****✩ _Secure_ our southern border** While I believe we've made tremendous strides forward, Joe Biden was a disaster for Alaska's prosperity. His administration imposed 70 overreaching executive orders with a single goal: **to lock up Alaska. ** I’m proud to have led the fight against the Biden administration every step of the way. Working with President Trump’s strong leadership, we’ve already helped “lift the sanctions on Alaska. Last month, Trump **took action** with one of the very first measures of his second term, when he signed an executive order to unlock Alaska’s “extraordinary resource potential.”**

clean_body: I officially announced my reelection campaign for U.S. Senate here in Alaska | | | Last night, I officially announced my reelection campaign for U.S. Senate here in Alaska! When I first ran in 2014, it was because I believed Alaska needed a stronger voice in Washington, D.C. Our challenges and opportunities are different than the rest of the country, and we needed someone who would boldly fight for them. Over the last 12 years, I have worked to: ✩ Unleash Alaskan energy ✩ Rebuild our military✩ Fight for our veterans ✩ Create good-paying jobs for our hard-working families✩ Secure our southern border While I believe we've made tremendous strides forward, Joe Biden was a disaster for Alaska's prosperity. His administration imposed 70 overreaching executive orders with a single goal: to lock up Alaska. I’m proud to have led the fight against the Biden administration every step of the way. Working with President Trump’s strong leadership, we’ve already helped “lift the sanctions on Alaska. Last month, Trump took action with one of the very first measures of his second term, when he signed an executive order to unlock Alaska’s “extraordinary resource potential.” __ What I find concerning is that keeping our state on lockdown isn't just a Biden administration policy, but a major item in the Democrats' playbook. From shutting down our energy potential to controlling our land – there's no question they will spend millions of dollars to flip this U.S. Senate seat to push their anti-Alaska agenda. They know what I stand for. They know that I will always fight for Alaska and our way of life. This reelection race comes at a pivotal time. Republicans have control of the Senate, but only by a hair. Expanding our majority is necessary to ensure President Trump's America First policies are supported by Congress. That's how we usher in the Golden Age of America. As it stands right now, 22 Republican seats are on the line in 2026. I know that Chuck Schumer and his extreme allies are sure to seize every opportunity they can to try and flip the Senate back into their control – and Alaska will be in their crosshairs. ** Sincerely, Dan Sullivan U.S. Senator, Alaska | | | ** | | | | | Dan Sullivan is a retired member of the U.S. Marine Corps. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the US Marine Corps or the Department of Defense. Pop Acta Media | Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Cory Booker
subject: I spoke for over 25 hours straight on the Senate floor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up.

|
---
Peter, it’s Cory.

Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.

I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up.

What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard.

I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment.

It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered.

It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together.

name: Cory Booker
subject: I spoke for over 25 hours straight on the Senate floor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up.
| Family, it’s Cory.

Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.

I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up.

What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard.

I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment.

It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered.

It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together.

[_If you’re willing and able, support our movement for justice, opportunity, and freedom by splitting a donation between me and the Voter Protection Project today. »_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88581?t=6&akid=19423%2E878179%2EVoqqy2) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Cory Booker and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88582?t=7&akid=19423%2E878179%2EVoqqy2)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88583?t=8&akid=19423%2E878179%2EVoqqy2)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88584?t=9&akid=19423%2E878179%2EVoqqy2)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88585?t=10&akid=19423%2E878179%2EVoqqy2)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88586?t=11&akid=19423%2E878179%2EVoqqy2)
With love and gratitude,

Cory
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19423%2E878179%2EVoqqy2). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19423%2E878179%2EVoqqy2).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19423%2E878179%2EVoqqy2) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=19423%2E878179%2EVoqqy2). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19423%2E878179%2EVoqqy2)

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Showing up in a big way
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105047094/537186414/-1812448514?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTc2ZTgxNC1lMTBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ms2wdDFEPA1kRERE25YbG1B2b5n_WmccPm64EJofsCU=)
Hi Peter, I wanted to give my sincerest thank you to everyone who supported our campaign ahead of Monday’s FEC fundraising deadline. With each of you showing up in a big way, we were able to deliver a strong first quarter, and set us up for a cycle where we can protect our seat and help our allies in other critical swing races, at a time when retaking the majority has never been more important. Thanks to you, we know we have the grassroots energy to hold IL-17. Your ongoing support is making this work possible. **So what happens now? Our work continues.** Every single day that this administration tries to rewrite who we are, we must keep showing up, making ourselves seen and heard, and steering our country back towards the vision we believe in. Thank you again, Peter. We’re in this together. \- Eric | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105047095/537186415/-1812448514?refcode=em-4.2.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTc2ZTgxNC1lMTBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ms2wdDFEPA1kRERE25YbG1B2b5n_WmccPm64EJofsCU=)

name: Josh Weil
subject: Thank you. Together We Shocked the Country.
body:
We built a people powered movement beholden to no one except the everyday Americans who built it, and it shocked the nation.
| | | | |
---
Team,
We built a people powered movement beholden to no one except the everyday Americans who built it, and it shocked the nation.
In the days leading up to the election, the strength of our campaign had President Trump and the billionaire oligarchs completely panicked. Trump sacked the nomination of GOP Rep. Elise Stefanik for UN Ambassador to prevent the possibility of losing the House majority, he took time out of his schedule to campaign with my opponent, and his cronies dumped $4 million dollars of dark money into the race in the closing days.
Despite this, we were able to shift the district blue by historic margins.
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Although we did not win, these results should terrify Republicans in Congress who are thinking of supporting Trump's plan to end Social Security and cut Medicaid & Medicare while giving billionaires trillions of dollars in tax-breaks. Working class Americans across Florida and this nation will not stand for it.
If the results of our campaign are replicated across the country, the GOP will stand to lose 40+ seats in the upcoming 2026 midterms.
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Last night, in my speech to supporters, I said that I don't believe that FL-6 is a deep red district - but a neglected district. Because of your support, we were able to make an investment in the type of grassroots organizing that has never been done before in this district.
This fills me with hope for the future of FL-6. We are so grateful for every single donor, volunteer, and team member, who gave it their all to fight against tyranny and for a brighter future.
From the bottom of my heart, thank you for your support and belief in our campaign.
Josh Weil
---

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Shaking the table
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2513%2E4032634%2ETb43cF)
---
My friend Cory Booker stood on the Senate floor for 25 hours and 5 minutes yesterday. He shared the testimony of some of the 69 million Americans who need Medicare and Medicaid to see a doctor or get their lifesaving prescriptions. He gave voice to students whose future Trump is harming by dismantling the Department of Education. He spoke for the immigrants who’ve been snatched off the street or from their homes by ICE, disappeared to detention centers or deported without due process. While speaking, he broke the record previously held by Strom Thurmond for the longest floor speech of 24 hours and 18 minutes to oppose the Civil Rights Act. As Cory shared, these are not normal times in our nation. And I agree. I joined him on the floor last night to sound the alarm on Trump and Musk’s scheme to indirectly cut Social Security benefits. Donald Trump and Elon Musk are literally taking a chainsaw to our government right in front of our faces — and we can't be business as usual. There are still levers Democrats can pull — from Congressional oversight, to using procedural tactics, to leveraging the courts. **We need to fight with every tool we have to expose the corruption at play, mitigate this administration's damage, make the case for our party to adopt bold policies that support working people, and inspire voters with an alternative path forward.** [**Voters don’t want Democrats to play dead for the next four years. This is one example of how Senate Democrats can show up — and Cory and I are going to continue to pull every lever we have to keep up this fight. If you agree with this plan, please split a contribution to support Cory Booker and our campaign.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2973?t=8&akid=2513%2E4032634%2ETb43cF)

name: Michelle, United We Dream Action
subject: Fighting Trump’s fear-driven agenda
body:
Three examples of Trump’s extreme executive overreach. | | | Peter, **** **** In just two months, Trump has leveraged extreme executive overreach to intimidate our communities and illegally kidnap and detain immigrants — regardless of their status. He and his administration are enacting their mass deportation agenda by systematically attacking the very people and spaces that could keep his power in check. Here are just three examples: 1\. He’s deploying plain-clothes and masked ICE agents to infiltrate university campuses and detain students exercising their right to protest.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplrSAY5-5Vpgz-Pkc9SRxIYNdyf0oC66RuC6iP1AZjiwD9pEG89hcDtYdZ0oGey7O-1smKPT3zl_jsKEg530ibVgItsw-2vGwD6jkw87BbE3M_oFJbz8k-buWOU6mZ0IeRbzFIETEdAIjKm8lb9HkXHuyxKCTMkwX_4E4s9TMMYralaEvA_odfbdmEo57YUhrXmLS30EM-movbo6lKWDebgq8hpqFFFlnHt1k_idPOkoRQmYk6a6ZpkFsGN3FtgJtZ1iqDl7gP8HaCdZyc9VeJ-lcb0dGXX4tyEkpyAbE4ZJSdnxbORdXpdJe2IsCG7chF3e9u49kOp4X4ayt1ye6fRG_fNH2TGGHlgMJ_Q3JLPQLbsBeGrXbQLdMF2cnrIY7_nxCwuU98GffvwGhzFE6ZeT4g1AQ0w8JoLYlV0dQhrYftXXy17AbUGdDnIB-Guj31T/4fb/YoDcd6xOSmmZx8sBGY11oA/h0/h001.1pwZE1hteF7sGgSbbGsMCCvpB1kYGm4v9i2yrsWydtM)

2\. He’s removing all barriers to absolute power so that he can do anything he wants, including going after you, me, our friends, our loved ones — anyone he considers an enemy.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplrSAY5-5Vpgz-Pkc9SRxIYNdyf0oC66RuC6iP1AZjiwD9pEG89hcDtYdZ0oGey7O-1smKPT3zl_jsKEg530ibVgJ0t2KgPSKISaoY2NrQabrhUKeqdRbl6nbxV4DqBPbwsorezj3NR-PnYs4D06JXRveE7C2eKrWPMsDq0q2KbNAe8NsEq2shSq9yg05oYxRlggCvqy4OAcs55LHiESP5qYwR8ozzhtBy1PPBY4IJWkuZ4tsyvv41MowMFC--uMEXhnFBFSy6B7MA3kc0HbGRQuaPuVO4ABSWdfo5JPpKxJegLkXZAJdLKIo3CV0yh_WhGEvqn4rsQLNYzdoYqvUZqYHofd4u8IWRywQahcBZvsBTmzaKI_6icPdWZQN5PPyT2wQZOKVAXLyUYEIiiygXjGy9sY_rTA03lDPwZ534QrP_BZQvz88r5_wP7d8nTZ10N/4fb/YoDcd6xOSmmZx8sBGY11oA/h1/h001.VmRbTPZuY0r1wICFIDEj_YbjtoG3mHha1xjd-2jSXm4)

3\. His unconstitutional attack on public education will affect millions of students, including immigrants, low-income students, and students with disabilities — all to further enrich billionaires like Elon Musk.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplrSAY5-5Vpgz-Pkc9SRxIYNdyf0oC66RuC6iP1AZjiwD9pEG89hcDtYdZ0oGey7O-1smKPT3zl_jsKEg530ibVgKWilhLLwtWJE4956SRN-lM_TKxqmBM354lI4O8HT9sSth9PJL_KlPSRSZlKpWHFMIbJ9NzeU8POF3F487t8loOWt6hw0WgRRjJcxG7cBI6kflNwkMQlkODA77HM0-o4h7SZsZAy2KLEH12-4l4acu9qVed0pMYAP1GsJeGv8gATUq7AsT0xlYBD5li8AzsKxt6LepiqmOkoYZI3BANtfG650mZdurh2j-Gj5Bm0EpM7o-gGdye9Qznz9WEQQns6WKYPvmKAXCvnixoYDliTJQ7E_-whHsw2_WzennfVcg-AQqu3_YUGwOpVjyFBKxjmNoDcqkxDSCNMvqTTka6B02lIu_BEUdU_isThCA2hOe4I/4fb/YoDcd6xOSmmZx8sBGY11oA/h2/h001.0IH7KbISOUR-OTOr5GLHLNmPoRaxGo-VaDcXvIaZp6g)

**United We Dream Action is fighting back** , building a bold coalition of immigrant youth, workers, and community activists to stymie Trump’s fear-driven agenda. Together, we’re calling out Trump’s inhumane policies and demanding Democrats in office protect our communities from mass kidnapping and indefinite detention. **[We can’t win this fight alone — we need your support. clean_body: Three examples of Trump’s extreme executive overreach. | | | Peter, ** In just two months, Trump has leveraged extreme executive overreach to intimidate our communities and illegally kidnap and detain immigrants — regardless of their status. He and his administration are enacting their mass deportation agenda by systematically attacking the very people and spaces that could keep his power in check. Here are just three examples: 1\. He’s deploying plain-clothes and masked ICE agents to infiltrate university campuses and detain students exercising their right to protest. 2\. He’s removing all barriers to absolute power so that he can do anything he wants, including going after you, me, our friends, our loved ones — anyone he considers an enemy. 3\. His unconstitutional attack on public education will affect millions of students, including immigrants, low-income students, and students with disabilities — all to further enrich billionaires like Elon Musk. United We Dream Action is fighting back , building a bold coalition of immigrant youth, workers, and community activists to stymie Trump’s fear-driven agenda. Together, we’re calling out Trump’s inhumane policies and demanding Democrats in office protect our communities from mass kidnapping and indefinite detention. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Contributions to United We Dream Action are not tax deductible. The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Action are ActBlue Civics Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. Thank you for supporting our work to fight back. — Michelle, United We Dream Action Follow us on: | | | | |

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Positive news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com [https://ericswalwell.com]
Excited to start a new month off with some positive news, team:

Thanks to your support – and contributions from hundreds of Democrats across the country – we were able to hit our fundraising goal for March.

It’s never been more important for us to keep this campaign on track. With Trump and his attack dogs like Elon Musk and Pete Hegseth running amok in our government, we cannot grow complacent.

Cory Booker knows it after breaking the Senate floor speech record in protest against Trump's agenda. And Judge Susan Crawford knows it with her massive victory last night against her Elon-backed opponent. And this team knows it, with making this an outstanding end-of-quarter.

I know we’ve asked a lot of you since Trump returned to the White House this year, but every month we hit our fundraising goals, we send a powerful message to GOP extremists that the American people are standing with us — not them.

You are a critical player in this fight, friend. Let’s keep pushing.

Thank you,

Eric Swalwell

**Peter, this is major – Democrats just pulled off a major upset in Wisconsin's Supreme Court election. **
This victory isn't just a win at the ballot box. It's proof that the American people _reject_ the Trump administration's dangerous agenda. And it proves that when we organize, when we show up, when we fight – we win.
And this is just the beginning, Peter.
Over the next few months, you’re going to see a wave of Democratic victories across the country. You're going to see us take back power – and with Democratic attorneys general around the country leading the charge, you're going to see us hold Trump, Elon, and their allies accountable!
**Together,_we_ will be the last line of defense against their attacks on our rights, our freedoms, and our democracy. But we can’t do this without you. _[So to celebrate this major victory and keep the momentum going, I am asking you to chip in $5 or more now to help us meet this moment, defend our democracy, and stop the Trump administration's reckless agenda in its tracks.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105047519/537188002/-2022258813?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1879-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmE1N2I5Ni1lMjBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M5hye6YhwTeV7CcHfaG4lfC_I-4vizHjt0HhSNsdOnU=)_**

You're going to see us take back power – and with Democratic attorneys general around the country leading the charge, you're going to see us hold Trump, Elon, and their allies accountable! Together,we will be the last line of defense against their attacks on our rights, our freedoms, and our democracy. But we can’t do this without you. = | | = Together, we fight. And together, we win. – Letitia James | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY 2026 PO Box 20656 Brooklyn, NY 11202 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

Having your continued support is key to strengthening & growing our Party here in Massachusetts -- especially with 2 winnable special elections coming up this spring.

If you want to receive fewer emails, click If you want to unsubscribe, click | = Folks, get a load of this bullsht. 👇 First, MAGA extremists in the House made a push to repeal proxy voting for members of Congress who are pregnant or new parents. Then, nine Republicans joined Democrats to vote AGAINST the rule that would do just that. Now, Mike Johnson canceled voting for the rest of the week and sent us all home. So let me get this right...extremists opposed proxy voting for pregnant women and new parents because they said they should be in DC for work, and their response is to send us home and not work at all? Right, makes total sense. 🙄 This is exactly why we can’t afford another two years of Republicans running the House. It’s clear as day that Democrats need to retake the House majority so we can do the work that our constituents elected us to do. subject: Trump was never joking about seeking a third term
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, I’ve been saying for months that Donald Trump was never joking about wanting to serve a third term as president — and on Sunday, he confirmed it, stating clearly, “I am not joking.” [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105050049/537194688/-1870564982?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250402_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWQzZjVlNi1lNTBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gWyMt_ya2dGMGkdxbN7EvSD8i5C2tI9cDscwCe8LaCI=)_NBC News, 03/30/2025_ **Peter, Trump is unquestionably plotting to take total control of our government – and his quest for a third term is simply the final nail in the coffin of American democracy.** Let’s take stock of Trump’s efforts to whittle away at our democracy. _First_ , on his first day, **he pardoned 1,500 convicted criminals** , hundreds of whom assaulted police officers on January 6 at his direction. Essentially, he has enlisted a rogue militia at his service. _Second_ , **he fired 18 inspectors general** , including some immediately after they released critical reports about him. Now, there are effectively no independent checks on his unqualified, partisan cabinet appointees leading the federal government. _Third_ , **he fired prosecutors and FBI agents** who held him accountable for concealing classified documents and orchestrating a conspiracy to overturn the 2020 election, **gutted the Public Integrity Section at DOJ** , and announced that DOJ would not prosecute foreign corruption cases. _Fourth_ , with Congressional Republicans handing over all Congressional authority to him,**he is now targeting the Judiciary** , laying the groundwork to defy court orders. If successful, this would eliminate _all_ checks and balances on him. _Now_ , **he is trying to normalize the idea of him serving a third term.** _**Make no mistake, Peter: Donald Trump does not plan to get elected in a free and fair election in 2028. He is hollowing out all forms of accountability and our democratic institutions so that he can install himself as President a third time.**_ I am working day and night to expose Donald Trump’s attacks on our democracy and the rule of law, but I need your help. **[Can you chip in to my campaign to show Donald Trump and his MAGA lackeys in Congress that we will not let him dismantle our democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105050051/537194690/-1870564982?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250402_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWQzZjVlNi1lNTBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gWyMt_ya2dGMGkdxbN7EvSD8i5C2tI9cDscwCe8LaCI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105050053/537194692/-1870564982?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250402_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWQzZjVlNi1lNTBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gWyMt_ya2dGMGkdxbN7EvSD8i5C2tI9cDscwCe8LaCI=)

Third , he fired prosecutors and FBI agents who held him accountable for concealing classified documents and orchestrating a conspiracy to overturn the 2020 election, gutted the Public Integrity Section at DOJ , and announced that DOJ would not prosecute foreign corruption cases. Fourth , with Congressional Republicans handing over all Congressional authority to him,he is now targeting the Judiciary , laying the groundwork to defy court orders. If successful, this would eliminate all checks and balances on him. Now , he is trying to normalize the idea of him serving a third term. Make no mistake, Peter: Donald Trump does not plan to get elected in a free and fair election in 2028. He is hollowing out all forms of accountability and our democratic institutions so that he can install himself as President a third time. I am working day and night to expose Donald Trump’s attacks on our democracy and the rule of law, but I need your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Together in this fight, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up. | | | If you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-gP0Xd1LL-Lub7Gk22PHy9v_zDMKsOhIsGaYsSQAIlT46RJ1cLFi0RbsWsZWZVQtXmgyDsn337uID04JUXAsI6orsUbi_w-ZL2hmMGJwRhHLbfiBOwBKWdJTuUTBE_692_HwJU8h4R78H-dzdZt0S73ts6S5n9DP7N24ZazXlykEcd0Ae0SYdoj4b2EPcAyGunwLAtblBP5rFKyQVyfWD47Wta_MJKAife3920fD-3M-qpzZT61uQYut-jQRk5l1kkt9A7dZYVy_gIBXQolWDCyIoYaop0hYgBANVNUXPEL4kAv9FIiO02UH5vpTw4-i261-ltWie6oCIi-WwtaEvFgQzASIVwgU-s0X1ymf8Jm5MAbc8I3vrvU-BxMO2gq6bIxYrn5PpjpWNP6apV-JerRIlELpTv1MXyAndYH_48Ck9jDKczQ97WfAQO5Vum2II/4fb/W8hyeCoASBCDBbhCwpbsNA/h0/h001.cZr9jfUWvC_7IkSIpsfeeM_TAF8KOtIAQUlTVVOIUIw) | | Family, it’s Cory.

Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.

I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up.

What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard.

I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment.

It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered.

It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together.

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105050332/537195677/1706257898?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWY1MTRhNy1lNjBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jglF9KGVVyiyKe6jhzsP34UMoGq0aE73OmUoy_3-l7k=&emci=03f514a7-e60f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=15f514a7-e60f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5944223)
Peter, **One down, one to go.** Wisconsin voters made their voices heard -– and democracy won. Congratulations to Justice-elect Susan Crawford on a big win for fairness and Wisconsin values. When out-of-state money tried to tip the scales, folks stood up and said: not here. We will always fight for what’s right -- and for each other. It’s a massive victory for reproductive freedom, public services, and working people across Wisconsin. And it’s another display that people are fed up with extremism and chaos that doesn’t deliver real results. As the results came in, Rebecca was waiting tables back home in Eau Claire, but was eagerly checking every new vote when she had a moment’s break. And she’s extra inspired today to make sure working families across Wisconsin have a real seat at the table -- not just in Western Wisconsin or Madison, but across the country. subject: Republicans are slashing Social Security, and the impacts are devastating.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
Make your voice heard here → |
#
---
Republican-led cuts to Social Security are already having a massive impact, Peter. Thousands of staff firings.
Website crashes.
Millions of seniors are locked out of their accounts.
And ZERO accountability. President Trump and Republicans in Washington are attempting to wipe out one of America’s most successful anti-poverty programs in history — all so they can cut taxes for billionaires. Meanwhile, Oregonians are getting left in the dust. **Our seniors deserve dignity and respect after a lifetime of work.** We need to stand together — _just like we’ve done in the past_ — and save this critical lifeline that thousands of Oregonians rely on. [**Make your voice heard, Peter. Sign our petition to demand Republicans in DC stop these harmful cuts and support protecting and strengthening Social Security for generations to come.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105050366/537195882/1339987939?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250402_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzA1M2NjNi1lNjBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-W9h0y1NQJCEr1N49HXw6RMIbDyLUPxUHF9jaL37-WU=&emci=88e58de3-030f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=e7053cc6-e60f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15353729) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105050367/537195883/1339987939?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250402_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzA1M2NjNi1lNjBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-W9h0y1NQJCEr1N49HXw6RMIbDyLUPxUHF9jaL37-WU=&emci=88e58de3-030f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=e7053cc6-e60f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15353729)

name: New PA Project Education Fund
subject: Understanding executive orders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New PA Project Education Fund
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/NPP_Ed_logo_RGB_green1-01.jpg]
Hi Friend,
Welcome to the latest New PA Project Education Fund (NPPEF) newsletter!
As a voting rights organization, we are vehemently opposed to any additional barriers that would make it more difficult to register to vote, and to make our voices heard at the ballot box.
Trump regime’s March 25th executive order [https://responsivegov.org/research/key-takeaways-from-president-trumps-election-integrity-eo/] attempts to disproportionately harm working people, young voters, new Americans, anyone who has changed their name, such as married women, and Black and brown communities.
The government already has the information it needs to determine who is eligible to vote. This order wants to strip that fundamental right from more than 21 million eligible Americans who can’t produce, don’t have, can’t afford, or struggle to access the required documents.
Trump wants to rewrite the rules to block us from voting because they know that when we all participate, we elect leaders who work for us, not just the rich and powerful.
This attack on our voting rights, voter registration and access to the ballot makes what we do more important and impactful than ever.
In 2025, we have the opportunity to vote in local, municipal and judicial elections. Make sure you make your voice heard at the polls.
#DefendDemocracy
REGISTER TO VOTE OR CHECK YOUR REGISTRATION [https://vote.pa/check/?org=nppef]
Social Media of the Week
https://www.instagram.com/p/DHviQA0y44T/ [https://www.instagram.com/p/DHviQA0y44T/]
From @newpennsylvania [https://www.instagram.com/whenweallvote/]
"While being "apolitical" may sound like a high ground, it is the least useful stance in a democracy.
Let's unpack why this statement is problematic:
Oftentimes, those who say they are not political are likely comfortable with the current political climate. They are likely privileged enough to be comfortable. #CheckYourPriviledge
Someone struggling in our current society wants to know if their government is going to make decisions that help them survive.
Someone who is comfortable has the privilege to turn a blind eye to their government.
Whichever is you, you benefit from the rights and freedoms advocated for by those before you. You hold a responsibility to partake in politics - which means staying informed about your society and using your rights (like voting!).
Comic by @sanitarypanels [https://www.instagram.com/sanitarypanels] "
#Democracy #USA #Politics
SHARE ON INSTAGRAM [https://www.instagram.com/p/DHviQA0y44T/]
WHAT ARE EXECUTIVE ORDERS?
There's a good amount of confusion about what an executive order is, what they can and can't accomplish, and why they matter.
An executive order is a legally binding mandate, or instruction , on federal executive branch agencies only. It is a road map for those agencies on how to implement the federal law. It DOES NOT have power over independent entities like Congress or the courts.
Executive orders are not law. They are simply an expression of how the President intends to exercise powers he already has. It is important to understand that the executive orders of the Trump administration include actions that are either beyond the President's power to take wholly by himself or potentially unlawful.
" An executive order [https://www.stevevladeck.com/p/bonus-134-what-executive-orders-can?utm_campaign=email-post&r=5a4awk&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email] can be challenged in federal court and can be overturned by a federal judge (or by Congress) if that order is a misuse of a president’s authority in violation of Article II of the U.S. Constitution."
It is not something that gives a president additional powers. Despite the attempts of the Trump regime, the president is not a king and must respect the structure of American democracy.
Trump is misusing executive order [https://www.aclu.org/news/privacy-technology/what-is-an-executive-order-and-how-does-it-work] authority when he orders the government to take actions that are not authorized by the Constitution or are in violation of federal law. Executive orders can cause chaos, damage the democratic process and harm our most vulnerable communities. Trump’s most recent executive orders, attacking our voting rights [https://responsivegov.org/research/key-takeaways-from-president-trumps-election-integrity-eo/] , rolling back [https://www.aclu.org/news/racial-justice/trumps-executive-orders-rolling-back-dei-and-accessibility-efforts-explained] DEI efforts, attacking birthright citizenship [https://www.aclu.org/news/immigrants-rights/quiz-how-much-do-you-know-about-birthright-citizenship] and targeting trans people [https://www.aclu.org/news/lgbtq-rights/trumps-executive-orders-promoting-sex-discrimination-explained] are unlawful.
So far, most of the current regime's orders have been challenged by our courts, and will continue to do so. If you want to do your part and voice your voice against those orders or proposed bills that you do not agree with, let your legislators know!
FIND YOUR LEGISLATOR [legis.state.pa.us/cfdocs/legis/home/findyourlegislator]
RECENT EVENTS
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/31667256787A6A55374A37313157315262624B4766797953714576612B596D6165654E2F376E6341632B62627279712F477470355074696B48733838494B612F/editor_images/signal-2025-03-25-135800.jpeg] Team training
Earlier this week, our teams gathered statewide for a professional development workshop. Many overcame their fears of public speaking.
We want to make sure our team members give their best, and always work with integrity.
One of our staff members had this to say: "Getting to really know each and what pushes us, makes the connections even better!"
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/Screenshot%202025-03-28%20091847.png] WCM401
Watch it here [https://www.facebook.com/NewPennsylvaniaProject/videos/664843226078745] Thursday night we continued the conversation around why courts matter and how they affect your quality of life.
In a very engaging zoom session, New Pennsylvania Project's founding CEO, Kadida Kenner, answered attendees questions and explained topics like cross-filing.
She also went over the dangers present when one branch of the federal government ignores another one, and what you can do to protect the courts' independence!
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/7237344C447445787878394747342B75584E47375A57552F745265427662334B544A4A36505A58657A5871474B7A5A6E53705571424758325657365969365747/editor_images/WCM%20logo.JPG] #CourtsMatter
Two years ago, PA set the record with the most expensive judicial elections ever. With control of the PA Supreme Court up for grabs this year will be no different.
After Trump issued [https://democracydocket.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=983e6d70ee3d5a11b424b5e02&id=e03adc0baf&e=97c28d8f11] his executive order on Tuesday, Democratic election officials and voting rights advocates swiftly vowed [https://democracydocket.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=983e6d70ee3d5a11b424b5e02&id=bb76858ac3&e=97c28d8f11] to fight it. This attack on voting rights highlights the importance of courts and why we need to take very seriously the judicial election happening in Pennsylvania this year. Without proper checks and balances, all of our rights are at stake.
Meanwhile, Michigan GOP lawmakers asked [https://democracydocket.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=983e6d70ee3d5a11b424b5e02&id=fc78c6c110&e=97c28d8f11] the U.S. Supreme Court to review their ability to challenge voter-approved amendments to the state constitution that protect ballot access, claiming these initiatives undermine their authority to regulate federal elections.
It is clear that the attacks on voting rights won't stop. Neither will the attacks on judges defending those rights.
The latest coming from the Speaker of the U.S. House, Mike Johnson, who suggested potentially defunding, restructuring or all together eliminating US federal courts [https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/mar/26/mike-johnson-congress-courts-trump] as a means of pushing back against the power judges have to challenge Trump’s policies.
In Pennsylvania, voters have the opportunity to help ensure that our state courts remain independent and fair. There are three retention elections for the state Supreme Court this year. The decisions made by Pennsylvanian voters in November will continue to impact residents for years to come.
Here is a list of all the judges up for retention elections in PA [https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9YvMcTtkvjijHimwK5ppMlLsFPzruk3UN-2BULCUzDFuCDDPdP-2FWfep6FpqLFoicAPkcUl36KannUmNPYINFIzVPqo0aN5ygqkgE25-2FXHMyDWzfOC-2Bt2xf10hBRCbRBA5RNaILn7BM2EhvV5RF9mJqhcDfGJ0wqJiEqGEKGBc3-2Bc19IGOH-2FHxcOErCRT0B-2B2TNElDsD8e1-2Fw470lCbPOEn0zyigqGjU0LFXl3oFq437uv608kglf9Oydg5gU0BigKl-2BU-2BJOR70fVlVbRyYhlAG0biRWr0HsA8SoPw4ZYH0VklcJMfhUEkkjH7WZuzwdd3A3AK5-2BI8NBIY9FFnT7oSGbWKv3LqDWoNbo0kknBziG8iu9SPe9c8e2q6Xhzh8m45-2BjKw-3D-3DjxqT_6oJKb8gNcMvupOYLMGIySEfaCw4E2m2NK5FGBmKsy0ss3K-2BZAU65F28WlehBjqtv284soS-2FGJoPFpwS9dXM25SfIq75XOWduFT9EhuYwPvZZ0en3-2B4kWXWOt-2BoRt4CA2oeG6kP3pob3K8oH4f-2F6gjDY-2FUZd0ajXRoTtt2-2F-2BHDlEFNIkvMG7qnUfaZ0LeK-2FDy-2BWzpCdXHEOONUGDkN01fFDXlx7wHjHP3jBwzeoWrzso-3D] this year.

News You Can Use
On Tuesday, March 25th Pennsylvanians in some parts of Allegheny and Lancaster made their voices heard.
As pundits expected, voters in the 35th Legislative District (Brentwood, Mount Oliver, and parts of Pittsburgh) chose Dan Goughnour [https://www.cbsnews.com/pittsburgh/news/voters-will-break-101-101-deadlock-with-special-election-for-pennsylvania-house-vacancy/] to fill the vacancy due to the passing of State House Representative Matthew Gergely. With this win, the Democrats keep their one seat majority in the House.
In a surprising turn of events, voters in the 36th State Senate District (covering much of northern Lancaster County, like Akron, Columbia, Ephrata, Elizabethtown, Lititz, Manheim, and 14 other townships) chose East Petersburg Mayor James Malone, [https://keystonenewsroom.com/2025/03/26/democrat-james-malone-pulls-off-stunning-upset-in-pa-senate-special-election] a democratic candidate, to fill the recently vacated seat of State Sen. Ryan Aument. This is the first time a democratic candidate wins this seat in over 45 years!

clean_body: [] Hi Friend, Welcome to the latest New PA Project Education Fund (NPPEF) newsletter! As a voting rights organization, we are vehemently opposed to any additional barriers that would make it more difficult to register to vote, and to make our voices heard at the ballot box. Trump regime’s March 25th executive order [] attempts to disproportionately harm working people, young voters, new Americans, anyone who has changed their name, such as married women, and Black and brown communities. The government already has the information it needs to determine who is eligible to vote. This order wants to strip that fundamental right from more than 21 million eligible Americans who can’t produce, don’t have, can’t afford, or struggle to access the required documents. Trump wants to rewrite the rules to block us from voting because they know that when we all participate, we elect leaders who work for us, not just the rich and powerful. This attack on our voting rights, voter registration and access to the ballot makes what we do more important and impactful than ever. In 2025, we have the opportunity to vote in local, municipal and judicial elections. Make sure you make your voice heard at the polls. #DefendDemocracy REGISTER TO VOTE OR CHECK YOUR REGISTRATION [] Social Media of the Week [] From @newpennsylvania [] "While being "apolitical" may sound like a high ground, it is the least useful stance in a democracy. Let's unpack why this statement is problematic: Oftentimes, those who say they are not political are likely comfortable with the current political climate. They are likely privileged enough to be comfortable. #CheckYourPriviledge Someone struggling in our current society wants to know if their government is going to make decisions that help them survive. Someone who is comfortable has the privilege to turn a blind eye to their government. Whichever is you, you benefit from the rights and freedoms advocated for by those before you. You hold a responsibility to partake in politics - which means staying informed about your society and using your rights (like voting!). Comic by @sanitarypanels [] " #Democracy #USA #Politics SHARE ON INSTAGRAM [] WHAT ARE EXECUTIVE ORDERS? There's a good amount of confusion about what an executive order is, what they can and can't accomplish, and why they matter. An executive order is a legally binding mandate, or instruction , on federal executive branch agencies only. It is a road map for those agencies on how to implement the federal law. It DOES NOT have power over independent entities like Congress or the courts. Executive orders are not law. They are simply an expression of how the President intends to exercise powers he already has. It is important to understand that the executive orders of the Trump administration include actions that are either beyond the President's power to take wholly by himself or potentially unlawful. " An executive order [] can be challenged in federal court and can be overturned by a federal judge (or by Congress) if that order is a misuse of a president’s authority in violation of Article II of the U.S. Constitution." It is not something that gives a president additional powers. Despite the attempts of the Trump regime, the president is not a king and must respect the structure of American democracy. Trump is misusing executive order [] authority when he orders the government to take actions that are not authorized by the Constitution or are in violation of federal law. Executive orders can cause chaos, damage the democratic process and harm our most vulnerable communities. Trump’s most recent executive orders, attacking our voting rights [] , rolling back [] DEI efforts, attacking birthright citizenship [] and targeting trans people [] are unlawful. So far, most of the current regime's orders have been challenged by our courts, and will continue to do so. If you want to do your part and voice your voice against those orders or proposed bills that you do not agree with, let your legislators know! FIND YOUR LEGISLATOR [legis.state.pa.us/cfdocs/legis/home/findyourlegislator] RECENT EVENTS [] Team training Earlier this week, our teams gathered statewide for a professional development workshop. Many overcame their fears of public speaking. We want to make sure our team members give their best, and always work with integrity. One of our staff members had this to say: "Getting to really know each and what pushes us, makes the connections even better!" [] WCM401 Watch it here [] Thursday night we continued the conversation around why courts matter and how they affect your quality of life. In a very engaging zoom session, New Pennsylvania Project's founding CEO, Kadida Kenner, answered attendees questions and explained topics like cross-filing. She also went over the dangers present when one branch of the federal government ignores another one, and what you can do to protect the courts' independence! [] #CourtsMatter Two years ago, PA set the record with the most expensive judicial elections ever. With control of the PA Supreme Court up for grabs this year will be no different. After Trump issued [] his executive order on Tuesday, Democratic election officials and voting rights advocates swiftly vowed [] to fight it. This attack on voting rights highlights the importance of courts and why we need to take very seriously the judicial election happening in Pennsylvania this year. Without proper checks and balances, all of our rights are at stake. Meanwhile, Michigan GOP lawmakers asked [] the U.S. Supreme Court to review their ability to challenge voter-approved amendments to the state constitution that protect ballot access, claiming these initiatives undermine their authority to regulate federal elections. It is clear that the attacks on voting rights won't stop. Neither will the attacks on judges defending those rights. The latest coming from the Speaker of the U.S. House, Mike Johnson, who suggested potentially defunding, restructuring or all together eliminating US federal courts [] as a means of pushing back against the power judges have to challenge Trump’s policies. In Pennsylvania, voters have the opportunity to help ensure that our state courts remain independent and fair. There are three retention elections for the state Supreme Court this year. The decisions made by Pennsylvanian voters in November will continue to impact residents for years to come. Here is a list of all the judges up for retention elections in PA [] this year. In a surprising turn of events, voters in the 36th State Senate District (covering much of northern Lancaster County, like Akron, Columbia, Ephrata, Elizabethtown, Lititz, Manheim, and 14 other townships) chose East Petersburg Mayor James Malone, [] a democratic candidate, to fill the recently vacated seat of State Sen. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=08fe4b8a6f594ff2825bb777f5353ea2&_e=GibqM642od1ioXh_HYWr-QryMv6ct3ibjUH1C0t1j3gdTGh2Wto3kVchlJgDt07nzfZ7dARVQ5Md4TEgGGDsYBkCms_tA_LcICNqbDEkZ60KiU-29Rg9VHrNItVdFbbY1HNrX2s4z58rgtzV2tcK4yrCXiyEN-n2gqurKDPnFT1VVK5Qcfaw_HXor84V5jCKox2-G0NMaaxXGsPKLlLgOdPTDQ1bTharln1MBKiQzODrlJGqBvFJUgz5qt2AdF1QFSiy6mNZ-SfqX2HbpEqoJ-3msZRJG2kfOyTPX84M7fxwswrRxo_axYNTt60d3-eBvyEgeUg5B2SMfZIlyLuD1tWLqnyhpc1ODIOqOb-1O9zYPnN_U96p9RS4W783oc-H9epQU9s6fqlMKZvE77iZ4qHVbthU4SaAaswqNEMohWypqyX5tGRRgGtgPF_uhKbzwlWBmIlXpGHE-HKdrv43WtqkftMkVFxJjl1Fcm-9HcM0AMfZOuaEvCIfhmdvfNST)

**[Your key support at this early stage](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=08fe4b8a6f594ff2825bb777f5353ea2&_e=GibqM642od1ioXh_HYWr-QryMv6ct3ibjUH1C0t1j3gdTGh2Wto3kVchlJgDt07nzfZ7dARVQ5Md4TEgGGDsYBkCms_tA_LcICNqbDEkZ60KiU-29Rg9VHrNItVdFbbY1HNrX2s4z58rgtzV2tcK4yrCXiyEN-n2gqurKDPnFT1VVK5Qcfaw_HXor84V5jCKox2-G0NMaaxXGsPKLlLgOdPTDQ1bTharln1MBKiQzODrlJGqBvFJUgz5qt2AdF1QFSiy6mNZ-SfqX2HbpEqoJ-3msZRJG2kfOyTPX84M7fxwswrRxo_axYNTt60d3-eBvyEgeUg5B2SMfZIlyLuD1gtoRpkJ2pmqkfT841pH9kzHdf4cridQDTjoMhbezksNPVLPFHYya8yWoNj-poAeZJx_j55ur5pM1UsMD_dlH01vE-a-VDhcvIlarT7-APFsN6-J8dQiLp2ZhtkiMwFRQHV51FKYvJpOJIUGW28Zeqhhr5iemwtCKOAWBA1AJ9Rf)** will go a long way toward ensuring we can lay the foundation for success and get our winning message of commonsense conservative principles and policies to the voters who will decide.

To meet this challenge, the Wisconsin Working Families Party executed one of its largest spring field programs ever, resulting in:

* 703 volunteers sending**36,868** personal postcards to voters.
