clean_body: Together, we just proved something very important: when working people come together across our differences to fight back, we can beat them. | | | Peter — Elon Musk spent a record $25 million to try and win a critical state Supreme Court seat in Wisconsin yesterday. We just handed him a huge and embarrassing loss. Last night, Wisconsin voters loudly rejected Elon Musk, Donald Trump, and Brad Schimel — giving a landslide victory to WIWFP-endorsed Judge Susan Crawford: We just proved that we CAN beat billionaires like Elon Musk when we have the resources to fight back. Elon thought that spending $25 million on ads, showing up for rallies, and even trying to buy people’s votes for $1 million each would help get his hand-picked MAGA candidate over the finish line. That strategy fell apart more quickly than a Cybertruck. This election was the first real test of “the people vs. Musk” — a story that the Wisconsin Working Families Party started talking with voters about in the early days of this race. And it was the first statewide test of the opposition movement against greedy politicians like Donald Trump and Brad Schimel and the billionaires like Musk who back them. To meet this challenge, the Wisconsin Working Families Party executed one of its largest spring field programs ever, resulting in: 25,606 1-on-1 conversations with voters via canvassing and phones. 703 volunteers sending36,868 personal postcards to voters. A $15,000 paid digital ad campaign to reach our targeted voter audience with messages around public safety (funded entirely by small-dollar contributions from WFP members like you!). And overall, we reached out to voters 661,330 times, had 44,841 successful conversations, and identified 15,408 voters for Judge Susan Crawford. To billionaires like Elon, spending $25 million to try and buy an election is pocket change. And this won’t be the last time they try to do so. But together, we just proved something very important: when working people come together across our differences to fight back, we can beat them. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Martin Heinrich
subject: “I am a teacher and am terrified of losing my job and my school not receiving the funds it needs”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105051257/537199005/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250402_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmY2MzBiYi1lOTBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VXBNcbLB7Ft3L_BXuvqjeZ8aqKXJuumQ5JloKCkzJJk=&emci=02f630bb-e90f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=06f630bb-e90f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=252045)

Friend, our last survey asked this team one question — _how have Trump's policies impacted you?_ Hundreds of people wrote in about their experiences. Here are just a few of the responses: _**I am a disabled Veteran and a 23+ year federal employee.** Will I have a job? Will I be able to provide for my family? Those are the pressing questions on my mind day to day._ _I know some people who are undocumented.**I'm frightened for them.**_ _**So far, I've been impacted by being dropped by Medicaid and losing my SSDI payments.** I have a chronic illness that has kept me from working since (my) diagnosis 5 years ago... I don't like the path that our country is heading down._ I am a teacher and am terrified of losing my job and my school not receiving the funds it needs... **He is not for the people, but for his rich buddies.** Please know that I hear you and your concerns. Every day, the Trump administration is causing incalculable harm to real people, but we don’t have to stand by and accept it. **My team and I are pushing back by supporting and electing Democrats at every level of government.** This is a fight for our public schools and education system, for veterans and federal workers, for working-class families just trying to get by, and for everyone affected by this administration’s slash-and-burn approach to our federal government. **[We are organizing for the fights ahead now. clean_body: Friend, our last survey asked this team one question — how have Trump's policies impacted you? Hundreds of people wrote in about their experiences. Here are just a few of the responses: I am a disabled Veteran and a 23+ year federal employee. Will I have a job? Will I be able to provide for my family? Those are the pressing questions on my mind day to day. I know some people who are undocumented.I'm frightened for them. So far, I've been impacted by being dropped by Medicaid and losing my SSDI payments. I have a chronic illness that has kept me from working since (my) diagnosis 5 years ago... I don't like the path that our country is heading down. I am a teacher and am terrified of losing my job and my school not receiving the funds it needs... He is not for the people, but for his rich buddies. Please know that I hear you and your concerns. Every day, the Trump administration is causing incalculable harm to real people, but we don’t have to stand by and accept it. My team and I are pushing back by supporting and electing Democrats at every level of government. This is a fight for our public schools and education system, for veterans and federal workers, for working-class families just trying to get by, and for everyone affected by this administration’s slash-and-burn approach to our federal government. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Whether you share your personal experiences or chip in when you can, every act of support brings us closer to defeating this administration’s hateful agenda. The rules for a filibuster are _brutal_ , folks.
There’s no sitting, eating, or using the bathroom. It’s just you on the Senate floor for as long as you can physically stand and speak.
And while what Senator Cory Booker accomplished yesterday technically wasn’t a filibuster, the 25 hours and 5 minutes he spent speaking showed more backbone, more courage, and more love for this country than anything that’s come out of the Trump regime.
Senator Booker took to the Senate floor because our rights, our democracy, and our future are all in jeopardy.
In just 72 days, Trump and his MAGA cronies have done nothing but hurt our economy, damage our global reputation, and upend the rule of law.
We’re more fired up than ever to take a stand against MAGA extremism, and we want you along with us in this fight for our future.
[One of the best things we can do right now is demand that Congress act in our best interest. No matter who your elected officials are, they pay attention when we raise our voice. Friend,

It's an honor to have **[President Trump's](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/vfeDj5qtv3wuhzD971OswqLpjRDmn-pXjvXMc8Q3ihRaOJYykxnODhLJOO5Sn5Yau0yz8jVNDDpawt_ErseUadONS8plvsNPjPCaF5qohy1utB6kTxAmY8uciNQqiZ0CAZMYiUz9Gtd6rOTvz-SHAFQVmfldFvhO4pnkIhAAw5X2JUiz8kB7Gn-LSAo0nXdHvJV4Zq3mjW3iPuTiZMGOpiC28vBtNwZuyuyKB43zs1K_boFEerIw7VKIdIccIBWSUxiGgdYK7by62t4EEkhdtlg9klvVZR2TvK2VP7jkJs5sSRogIb6Sm3r7eqwjXnzSqt47X5COTdYQZWuHoNe7Op7Ij_WVzbr1D6r6Uq8qqgoR2DbOkD9ypUU3jsUabonnsCiv5suYdSVoT4fVSAzX73We0gX74OftByyVL7Q-ACqmJfE3enArjH_72HK6hGAfwKOvdsS0DzxGaWcrZAFPHK3eKIep7sUdebQ1--WCrM_BdBrmcBNg5drH1dfV-W2OZ7t2F7nm0YngN4JrTOM_58IBr2wO0B4k0N7ibJLJAcTRrpE/6YKO2OV1EQvD84sd2E_0xBanHCopdZRo/7)** endorsement in this pivotal U.S. Senate re-election fight to expand our critical new America First GOP Majority in the U.S. Senate!

And since I can't say it any better than our Commander-in-Chief, I'll let him speak for himself -- right here in his tremendous endorsement:

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/8l4x9-AX7VWwXGIB_bTj3Na9FTW9YOvfk77SUXe6rRCOugPv9LDHdz3bJ2_HZbKqKYEGcKnkRny9wxLVZDvHEwPS1Yg7zFo93jfVgWAzPUQIN6LYmzvUmwIdbouOvofO6wBRDz5NbWYpNqGEcQdcgI3adfLrkJMXwD3339xGo_Qsv3iUsE585OCtIuANN_WVtn46m9r7Lm6h0JdjPKAkQx2c93bYwT_FwxtMwYG8hHrrV70EODvU52cQNx8SXrboLj6VfkP0JplTJtP0gxdFad1Xd5-A6nfFrNuaI_1uFNIajaTSk8q0NGAkfE2t4XEKIuMaUD2EoHpdE8CMVR_r_60grE4YSjo69jb1tCEamSEVAlRyZ_fQNeLOmaRdN2paOWiuxywzTQ70wnDhN_2jdh0XYCWXKiIKn9pM9TLmzN4zLUjAcknbWnYORIxI2iwbVIqPFe7jRRJIw-OAdQCdTM75FjmTIi-R0o3I5pSpRFiaQtpWO2kyMvJ-bsrrPiih6A1nfMJc_99P2eX1bWAtPnOr3LAOch9FVAuP4P5wMqs1vsY/l2yRMTfXmkL-n-uhmM_k446YW_Fcj_I7/7)

I know what President Trump knows -- that we can't take anything for granted in this Midterm Reelection race -- and that maintaining our indispensable GOP Senate Majority throughout President Trump's full term starts with maintaining the seats we already hold.

name: Brad Finstad
subject: Promises Made, Promises Kept
body:
| | | | [](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ-cMCGIy40AggytU8oqyxL5KiYQ7WTEOcZoCrtqZxLQlxug7N0ntjlDIGCSU)
---
| Dear Friend,
---
We’re not even at the 100-day mark of President Trump’s second term and already we’re seeing major action on the promises he campaigned on.
\- Improving government efficiency through the bold DOGE initiative with Elon Musk \- Signing the Laken Riley Act into law to protect Americans from violent illegal immigrants \- Ending DEI mandates and restoring merit and common sense in federal agencies \- Putting America First from our borders to our energy policy
But the work isn’t finished, and we want to hear from you.
**[Take our official First 100 Days poll and tell us how you think President Trump and the Republican majority are doing so far.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ-cMCGIy40AggytU8oqyxL5KiYQ7WTEOcZoCrtqZxLQlxug7N0ntjlDIGCSU)****[](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ-cMCGIy40Aggm9U8g0H0z8J0I3e89iSonpq2tS78ZaQmybgsMz4PkNDwPQU)**[********](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ-cMCGIy40Aggm9U8g0H0z8J0I3e89iSonpq2tS78ZaQmybgsMz4PkNDwPQU)

[](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ-cMCGIy40AggytU8oqyxL5KiYQ7WTEOcZoCrtqZxLQlxug7N0ntjlDIGCSU)
---
| [TAKE THE POLL ](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ-cMCGIy40AggytU8oqyxL5KiYQ7WTEOcZoCrtqZxLQlxug7N0ntjlDIGCSU)
---
Let’s be clear, the radical left is already trying to downplay these wins. They’re desperate to rewrite the narrative before the momentum becomes unstoppable. That’s why your voice now matters more than ever.
This isn’t just a poll, it’s a message to Washington that conservatives are watching, engaged, and ready to hold the line. **[Take our official First 100 Days poll and tell us how you think President Trump and the Republican majority are doing so far.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ-cMCGIy40AggytU8oqyxL5KiYQ7WTEOcZoCrtqZxLQlxug7N0ntjlDIGCSU)**
Thank you,

name: Jason Miyares
subject: 100 years in jail.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
WATCH: A message to those who seek to harm the brave men and women who wear the badge.| | | Friend, Last month, my office helped secure a conviction against cop killer Michael Donivan White.

**The sentence for his combined crimes?_[_100 years in jail._](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/WCJDdhz0coewJekfjJbdT4tchcwryBwoKwCKsMoHOCZOW2AaKKFP2opBnz509ZKsPG-Axvyy1rpikMEeY2XUoejbv8cKNo436FlWjdMxePhH9UoVHEU6ZQGg4s0C53ZUjKh2FzJEZC6jlvXmVAYUBHD_-LAC0Eh_1GKe1me7dJrg9C1B7-SJOF4dHRaDRaqNCO2Nf_wopz3Jj3KARm4E5-q2dsauuRqQP__wPn0-9Pzw5mAabNswP2kBUob-XnCq1SBPImKyjKaMKBePL072WgQAveJVgDFSuCuIUs_i10hEY7G9MOAcCL-RAwYoXuAXgLeHU0KCuHL5tkubIzOypJgJODiBfO9sSLdsLlmt87P3bYw7ufin0TTyhd4/-_tT0tcgcXsDjhZJf3KRNSX46ePtGA1O/7)_**

It’s a matter of justice. But it also sends a much-needed message.

_To those who seek to harm the brave men and women who wear the badge—know this: _

_We will find you. _
_We will arrest you. _
_We will prosecute you. _

_And if you take an officer’s life, you will never see the light of day again—that’s a promise._
__
---
[](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/jtPNAsM80ZQ8ewUR1dJaXTpLrl75A4Rn4EvNzRqohwC06XVWtFyjbfMrBvzDcJSxt9gUMvD6BgAgMh9mU6s8CI6fNFJwM3BftJNabxRga6Ww-8BlsV1RZsgTe6r6EkfyEsIaN773w_Cz_PLt7E1V98xDbqq_ITYWUgF56YmzUAqVbV1VLjPCF8n4H-RQ-SStDXqzcV4T9uIjGN4Fiy_nP5yG_VHxyTrNolT4FPUspfbIoBR6lY9dZ4VTs3Ttf2EazD8grw5VCzy_EeLgRYsMqwnJ43MQT_Fu_r4IVACKQyl_1KcfyuRug9HUUGMNyyt8zAGe94MZW7RrZQ_OCqeKfDHjexUedFwUnZThGyz7x8LgSqpks4TLqwnH7Tg/nxdmV_UJUHWDdPtmscCQ3yRXMLjiv4lI/7)
---
There are few careers in this country where the mere fact of going to work puts your own life at risk.

**Working with those in law enforcement on an almost daily basis, I can tell you that while the media may have forgotten the sting of calls to defund and devalue our police, they have not.** Too often they feel it is a thankless job with the public made entirely unaware of the sacrifices required.

_**Let’s show them that we have their backs, friend.**_
---
[BACK THE BLUE WITH ME](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/f9KXmVTuWPaITqGv32WQhhfXL16_FQLJDs7q-gYvKCTr1FE2n8UaB8qxmicWU1XoQnOeOa7baSOKhvln2tXPbsplnlpaNkSRXOoXnQIIisHjhFHfN4j6-sgdoWzPvIDEDg4wE43eeHdK3cQV6Oza1A-ZM7pHfzEiChjcsVpTBXFmJZ_JYQcTgRDHlpGgpdYN_Fcc2F09AFmQLE5EOWNOlsbPPh7Y-3T460aZuPAE4UkJgsg_8Xg_ew-NXrqhFg3hmpGipj1IHBg8V2IZNbQMJFjqcHK9JcYqLGQs8f85LMjxFDqD1b-im8LOPrHT75ymo2Za7rPlsoBiIW0BCI_CF2BU5UvSf8q1LzZafV-VIv5S1_OdmANYdc_-c4g/H4D7aaBIc7THEFD_HkXvkvRIoIikQTef/7)
---
Thank you,Attorney General Jason Miyares
---
| | |
---
| [](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/PwNUbaeaJA1qy_y8uQ_66z52gxNEUH5rS22zVT6w9vvm3j1XHtSEydjHRO35UPz5gTTrZ7Z06UHUdRhksLeDSkondGmHtWuSWOduM6q8LDoCQH2dBEFVf8WeD4VhTbKppsAUHKTW1gRiipi3dsHJxiDJoYvj2QDdFf7xIBTnfIYnk7U6PcUyOcwxxmLkyvnlEbxKiVVNFAHIu1POSugVs2xouLCn8LBar9azXw-5b2FTVzU2D0wnfSTRXbGViNd-MadlD1Y2nXWyKJHJRzz-rXuyQs-hgdGBKkHQ/f__tTh3o4XY1ACHbXjonm2E8hcFlxyXF/7)| [](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/3e7he0XmXFmUs8OJi_5gjPTXQbi6kozURrvY0RWNg2vbMyk2pwA33k4F9SmHMA2T_UMzrOy12nwbN8pI1ZAftCc3cIzO-gBrOz4bfYEYiANuSDrYxk2m7jlQPkEOz8FDcjT00AHZf5nhU88sHQRLt_gMRs07SfPWcVmjVvMAvYoeHxT3ddCEciyM4lgYrnYLez_Bz2Zv60OiZlmsU0CMG_TDRnPtATRHZinMJyRLtQR8smvcYf3c4j3jarHdr08HZPKE7cDys48vFI94EQ/fBcPTA_5wnnNqtjw4q93pf4FihZEVpft/7)| [](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/nPZTDiPASQ5E8pu2bK1eAf6r7ls3_JzF1yIz1w6VfNxUg-2-LDFoAuGyMiaxmxMc48fKzLh5bbUlxqrLRO2dcTImjlt52e0Ubzf_eN9rJdY8gf2WTJqkk19AUZCP5mR6A4lMnZHdj_Y-JLbNFRmON4sPLyAfKQJQaGmMHoLOAyG2pAKzDsiYZrLgU9lM1w7bzjCh7aGEJrvZ1-rKtVmIEs9XfNphBIxxmm5Wa1Rz0T3V6Nzge0o-zFPBkLV684xjxgqynibX7aKcUTlcSek/iJgcnw-NcEPt1fqTy6I_T7XZzaAJAPxO/7)

name: Cory Booker
subject: I’m tired and a little hoarse, but I cannot stay silent.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANELLE BYNUM FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105052368/537203230/619377119?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2025.04.02_b1_cb_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2YxNjRiNTktZWMwZi1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kkLq0gF78YhCFK2T76WZMkoWEboMRHi6deC3gshtxwg=) Family, it’s Cory.

Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.

I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up.

What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard.

I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment.

It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered.

It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together.

We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend.

[**If you’re willing and able, support our movement for justice, opportunity, and freedom by splitting a donation between me and Janelle Bynum today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105052374/537203236/451693671?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2025.04.02_b1_cb_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2YxNjRiNTktZWMwZi1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kkLq0gF78YhCFK2T76WZMkoWEboMRHi6deC3gshtxwg=)

With love and gratitude,

Cory
---
**Janelle Bynum represents Oregon's Fifth Congressional District. With a reputation as a tireless champion for real progress, Janelle has worked in the State Legislature to safeguard our rights, lower costs, and create pathways to success for the next generation.

Oregon's 5th District is one of the most competitive seats in the country. body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105052838/537204381/-1787004069?refcode=header&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWQzZDM5ODUtZWMwZi1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5AoRU7KVA2gcEEWU79Ilf23TQIpbV97XzrR8Uor1b-4=) | This is another step in a long line of disinformation. **Donald Trump and too many of his allies have spent years spreading distortions about our elections** —spreading conspiracy theories, attacking election officials, and trying to make it harder for Americans to vote. Now, with the stroke of a pen, Trump has signed an executive order that could upend our elections and block millions of eligible Americans from the ballot box. This order would: 🛑 **Require documentary proof of citizenship for voter registration** —a costly and confusing burden that could strip voting rights from married women, seniors, students, and veterans. 🛑 **Ban states from counting ballots that arrive after Election Day** —even if they were sent on time. 🛑 **Impose unnecessary restrictions on voter registration programs** —making it harder to reach eligible voters. _**This isn’t just about election security.**_ It’s about making voting unnecessarily hard for some of the people President Trump doesn’t want to hear from. As Minnesota’s Secretary of State, I’ve fought to expand voter access, protect election integrity, and push back against disinformation. I won’t let this executive order go unchallenged. I’m working with legal experts, election officials, and leaders from both parties to push back. But I need your help. [**This is our moment to show that we won’t be intimidated—that we will fight for the right of every eligible voter to have their voice heard. body:
Family, it’s Cory. Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.

| **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105053011/537204803/-2037195763?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2025.04.02_b1_cb_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDFhY2ZhYTItZWMwZi1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Y_EjUdBw1Biyv6ibPWsDQAPfvN0YMIwYhGfGO3YBd9I=)**

Family, it’s Cory.

Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.

I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up.

What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard.

I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment.

It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered.

It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together.

We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend.

[**If you’re willing and able, support our movement for justice, opportunity, and freedom by splitting a donation between me and Derek Tran today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105053012/537204804/-2037195763?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2025.04.02_b1_cb_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDFhY2ZhYTItZWMwZi1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Y_EjUdBw1Biyv6ibPWsDQAPfvN0YMIwYhGfGO3YBd9I=)

With love and gratitude,

Cory

Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. name: Kimberly Bretches
subject: Up against a George Soros backed prosecutor
body:
Please don’t let my three children grow up without their father| | | The same city that gave Chance this award is trying to put him in prison for life for doing his job.
---
| |
---
Dear Peter, That's me and my husband, Officer Chance Bretches in the picture I've sent you...
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=29e1c8ae64f944ad817e458b7172a3a9&_e=X6xcZE1fcO3lDvgABu62PdTD-6qph8Ets9mjD1CosGx45HOdlMUAtmWol2GMGqKUfrWzWNMhAT4X__ZcmZbJow0ahVQoqVsBvsoh--kId92tfrt0WRT88mjwsdVzBQQ7OOIV2cOXw_vZDnAg500p6CVsPetfy8Q2aOVo_oOv2WuDD1QxGesvSjGv7LPS2JB0qktjqKSYqqJ27umPcxGP_fG_lCTsINw9_ZEvx_HMm8uwWsV4WFXY5ysLMeNY6uLhP938fR5vWlm8eUvJxVB0oTtAlNLYk89OPl9y5Rfz4zwCvKdaPaog_wNL0xEpzpIwJAi0iEvx18-R_39Gu7AX80XEAARU3M1VBDNCcOHpPCC9syeBUiGNmOSXajDizxPyMAnhq6RT0O3_DAokgCEpNQ%3D%3D)
---
...a picture we took on the day Chance received the Lifesaving Medal With Valor for rescuing a driver from a crashed car that had caught on fire. This photo used to be one of my favorites. Now looking at it makes me cry. Because in July, the same city that gave Chance this award... ...will try to lock him up for life for doing his job. I should explain. For nearly 13 years, Chance has been a decorated police officer with the Austin, Texas Police Department. But in May of 2020, our lives were turned upside down. You probably remember what it was like in our country after George Floyd. Violent, fiery anti-police protests were sweeping through cities. Every step of the way, they were cheered on by radical politicians, Soros-funded prosecutors, and the Mainstream Media who lied to us and said, with a straight face, that these riots were "mostly peaceful." It was especially bad here in Austin, Texas. For three nights in a row, angry, anti-cop mobs rampaged through downtown, smashing windows, burning police cars, and looting stores. The crowd attacked officers like my husband who were trying to keep the peace, pelting them with rocks, bricks, and even lit fireworks. On the third night, things got even worse. Protestors shut down interstate, and a crazed mob surrounded Police Headquarters. Chance and his fellow officers knew that if they didn't restore order quickly, the headquarters, and maybe even the entire city, might burn to the ground. Following their training, they fired non-lethal weapons – the same "beanbag guns" that police have used for years to break up riots – to stop the violence before it got out of hand. The mob slunk off. And my husband made it home safe and sound. What I didn’t know then was that this nightmare wasn't over for us. Far from it. Unknown to Chance and the other officers on duty that night, an anti-police protestor was hit by one of my husband's non-lethal rounds. They claimed they were injured and lost part of their finger. And for that... ...the county prosecutor charged my husband with "aggravated assault by a public servant" -- a charge punishable by life in prison. This is the upside-down world we live in now. A world where lawless thugs who fling rocks at police and try to burn our city to the ground get off scot-free... ...while law-abiding officers get criminal charges and face life in prison for following their training and breaking up a mob of rioters. What are cops like my husband supposed to do when faced with this kind of out-of-control violence?! When Chance told me about the charges, my emotions went from disbelief to anger to despair...and back again. But it all started to make sense when we learned that the prosecutor in this case owes his election to a wad of campaign cash from none other than radical Leftist billionaire George Soros. That was when I realized that the anti-cop crowd is trying to get revenge on my husband. They don't care if my husband is innocent. They'll do everything in their power to make cops pay. It makes me wonder why anyone would ever sign up to join law enforcement these days. But nearly 13 years ago, my husband did. And he did it because helping innocent people is in his blood. His brother is a firefighter. His dad is a 34-year police veteran. My husband is a youth leader at our church and plays guitar in the worship band. He's served on mission trips -- planting churches, planning vacation Bible schools, and sharing the Gospel. And he's done his job as a police officer with honor and dignity, without a single mark against his record. Chance put his life on the line to protect our city from a violent, unhinged mob... ...and life behind bars and could be his "reward." Even if my husband's good name is cleared there is no way we could hope to pay the mountain of legal bills. Thankfully, by God's grace, there is one group who has stepped up to help us -- the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know that their record has made them a policemen's best friend. Jason Johnson and the LELDF board organize and fund the successful legal defense of good cops wrongly charged for crimes -- like my husband. LELDF hires the best attorneys and secures expert witnesses who will testify to the truth -- without being influenced by political paybacks. And now they've agreed to help Chance. My friend, you've read my letter this far so I'm going to ask as boldly as I can: Will you help Chance, too? _**[Would you help by sending a one-time gift to LELDF so this amazing group can defend my husband and the other good police officers who have wrongly accused?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=29e1c8ae64f944ad817e458b7172a3a9&_e=X6xcZE1fcO3lDvgABu62PdTD-6qph8Ets9mjD1CosGx45HOdlMUAtmWol2GMGqKUfrWzWNMhAT4X__ZcmZbJow0ahVQoqVsBvsoh--kId92tfrt0WRT88mjwsdVzBQQ7OOIV2cOXw_vZDnAg500p6CVsPetfy8Q2aOVo_oOv2WuDD1QxGesvSjGv7LPS2JB0qktjqKSYqqJ27umPcxGP_fG_lCTsINw9_ZEvx_HMm8uwWsV4WFXY5ysLMeNY6uLhAsft0ae2JZoqtxh6RlaTwzNhpW-4hUptAAYuUPVUmVZ4jzBcLgg61kZH6BfkKDVolvb8y1JVrvdOdtr8jayZSjj-akoPD3Si5RX-tNDJe88kVyPOU8X-xKFwJR72oMO794WFxAWxvqNoPckPmRTDRQ%3D%3D)**_** ** You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. They rely entirely on the generosity of kind-hearted folks like you to defend the men and women in blue who defend us. _**[So with that in mind, please know that any contribution -- be it $35, $100, $500 or even $1,000 -- is tax-deductible.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=29e1c8ae64f944ad817e458b7172a3a9&_e=X6xcZE1fcO3lDvgABu62PdTD-6qph8Ets9mjD1CosGx45HOdlMUAtmWol2GMGqKUfrWzWNMhAT4X__ZcmZbJow0ahVQoqVsBvsoh--kId92tfrt0WRT88mjwsdVzBQQ7OOIV2cOXw_vZDnAg500p6CVsPetfy8Q2aOVo_oOv2WuDD1QxGesvSjGv7LPS2JB0qktjqKSYqqJ27umPcxGP_fG_lCTsINw9_ZEvx_HMm8uwWsV4WFXY5ysLMeNY6uLhmSJqWukgQZ-dNOXskymQKHf5ZS5GZQWS8m0O1gXLY3Oo7RmHOwEnjh1nHSCEj_FFIp30K5z43TfseV5_bsuNno2-XCuF8OSjzlo5OkRHjtj3avIb9sE9DZ_bYAZKgOj4ebLYzD363xESASrLbGB-Pw%3D%3D)**_ But whatever you feel led to give, please end it back quickly. Chance's trial starts on July 7th. Our legal team needs to be working day and night getting ready for his defense. Because if Chance is found guilty... ...he'll spend every wedding anniversary, birthday, and Christmas for the rest of his life in prison. He won't be able to take our sons to football games or teach them how to drive... He won't be able to walk our daughter down the aisle somebody... I can't bear the thought of life without him. And I know what happens to former police officers when they get locked up with thousands of criminals. My only hope of saving him today is good-hearted patriots like you. _**[So please, my friend, rush back your gift right away if possible.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=29e1c8ae64f944ad817e458b7172a3a9&_e=X6xcZE1fcO3lDvgABu62PdTD-6qph8Ets9mjD1CosGx45HOdlMUAtmWol2GMGqKUfrWzWNMhAT4X__ZcmZbJow0ahVQoqVsBvsoh--kId92tfrt0WRT88mjwsdVzBQQ7OOIV2cOXw_vZDnAg500p6CVsPetfy8Q2aOVo_oOv2WuDD1QxGesvSjGv7LPS2JB0qktjqKSYqqJ27umPcxGP_fG_lCTsINw9_ZEvx_HMm8uwWsV4WFXY5ysLMeNY6uLhwlih_rMjV6U1fEOUk4UFHHrwO3X7giqa79rPCIsF0SGvut9oa_ciy096G8MqnFyvF0olJJXMSc3SGkw06-vCxDlmmj5HC0WQ8G63yT-ZHEIH_fgS3e-wSTrvMDIsB1gCMykiuzoJXQlXgfiUWGZ4tQ%3D%3D)**_ With this radical Soros-funded prosecutor on the warpath, _**[your gift of $35](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=29e1c8ae64f944ad817e458b7172a3a9&_e=X6xcZE1fcO3lDvgABu62PdTD-6qph8Ets9mjD1CosGx45HOdlMUAtmWol2GMGqKUfrWzWNMhAT4X__ZcmZbJow0ahVQoqVsBvsoh--kId92tfrt0WRT88mjwsdVzBQQ7OOIV2cOXw_vZDnAg500p6CVsPetfy8Q2aOVo_oOv2WuDD1QxGesvSjGv7LPS2JB0qktjqKSYqqJ27umPcxGP_fG_lCTsINw9_ZEvx_HMm8uwWsV4WFXY5ysLMeNY6uLhP2airJl4_pHffLMf4oTtf7RhXkZun8QsHNegqIcQMItRdha86Cr5l3GASJkopmiUhqWFDqgTeT_SXFN59mvdCVfGtJ3fnla5v7V38ZcAB7XShf1y4FOsxirmBtzRxAcNWCLQoRDqMgZMi-NlLqwBHQ%3D%3D)**_ \-- or any amount -- could be the difference between Chance clearing his good name... ...and spending the rest of his life behind bars. → If passed, this bill would force all Americans to **prove** their citizenship in person to be able to vote—making it harder for millions to vote.

**→ It would eliminate voter registration by mail, end voter registration drives, and end online registration overnight.

→ It would disenfranchise millions of Americans who live in rural areas, who do not possess a passport, and women who took their spouse’s name.**

The GOP’s goal is clear: They want to roll backvoting rights and undermine our democracy. But we won’t back down without a fight.

**[We need your help to push back against this dangerous agenda. Can you sign our petition to say NO to the “SAVE Act” now to protect the right to vote? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105053640/537207232/-1756948306?refcode=NDCAF_20250402_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzY1ODBjMy1lZDBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TzRYOclNcNKzTMy4IRKNxx172atX3B0TEaViI5mVHn4=&emci=b3fd694b-db0f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=876580c3-ed0f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=48524772)**

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I’m fired up to build on this momentum
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=4640%2E35263%2EFJ3hTY ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Folks, Donald Trump and Elon Musk want to gut programs like Social Security to pay for billionaire tax cuts.

Give me a break.

Millions of seniors worked hard and paid their fair share for decades — and they deserve the benefits they earned.

But Trump and Elon will do anything to please their ultra-wealthy allies. Including cutting thousands of jobs in the Social Security Administration, shuttering field offices across the country, and calling Social Security a “Ponzi scheme.”

I’m working with Senate Democrats to fight back against these cuts to Social Security. 1.3 million Wisconsinites receive Social Security benefits, and I’m not going to let right-wing leaders take these benefits away. But I can’t do it alone.

Will you pitch in a small donation to help me keep up the important work of defending Social Security from Trump’s attacks? https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4484?t=1004&akid=4640%2E35263%2EFJ3hTY

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately:

CHIP IN $10 NOW: https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4485?t=1005&akid=4640%2E35263%2EFJ3hTY
CHIP IN $25 NOW: https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4486?t=1006&akid=4640%2E35263%2EFJ3hTY
CHIP IN $50 NOW: https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4487?t=1007&akid=4640%2E35263%2EFJ3hTY
CHIP IN $100 NOW: https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4488?t=1008&akid=4640%2E35263%2EFJ3hTY
CHIP IN $250 NOW: https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4488?t=1009&akid=4640%2E35263%2EFJ3hTY
ANOTHER AMOUNT: https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4484?t=1010&akid=4640%2E35263%2EFJ3hTY

Team, I spoke out when Musk and his “DOGE” team illegally accessed millions of Americans’ private data. I promised to fight for Social Security on the campaign trail last year — and I’m delivering on that promise.

I’m not going to let Donald Trump or Musk, an unelected billionaire, rip away benefits from hardworking people.

Your support fuels my work to defend Social Security and other crucial benefits that millions of Americans earned and rely upon. Thank you for chipping in anything you can: https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4484?t=1011&akid=4640%2E35263%2EFJ3hTY

I appreciate your support — and I promise to keep up the fight.

— Tammy

P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701

clean_body: [ ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE Folks, Donald Trump and Elon Musk want to gut programs like Social Security to pay for billionaire tax cuts. Give me a break. Millions of seniors worked hard and paid their fair share for decades — and they deserve the benefits they earned. But Trump and Elon will do anything to please their ultra-wealthy allies. Including cutting thousands of jobs in the Social Security Administration, shuttering field offices across the country, and calling Social Security a “Ponzi scheme.” I’m working with Senate Democrats to fight back against these cuts to Social Security. 1.3 million Wisconsinites receive Social Security benefits, and I’m not going to let right-wing leaders take these benefits away. But I can’t do it alone. Will you pitch in a small donation to help me keep up the important work of defending Social Security from Trump’s attacks? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately: CHIP IN $10 NOW: CHIP IN $25 NOW: CHIP IN $50 NOW: CHIP IN $100 NOW: CHIP IN $250 NOW: ANOTHER AMOUNT: Team, I spoke out when Musk and his “DOGE” team illegally accessed millions of Americans’ private data. I promised to fight for Social Security on the campaign trail last year — and I’m delivering on that promise. I’m not going to let Donald Trump or Musk, an unelected billionaire, rip away benefits from hardworking people. Your support fuels my work to defend Social Security and other crucial benefits that millions of Americans earned and rely upon. Thank you for chipping in anything you can: I appreciate your support — and I promise to keep up the fight. — Tammy P.O. name: Team Dexter
subject: You can't spell felon without Elon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Peter,
Elon Musk is (unlawfully) sledgehammering the very systems that keep our country up and running. And he’s making himself rich in the process.
His interns are running our government, his rockets are orbiting our skies, and his Cybertrucks are parked on the White House’s front lawn.
Conflict of interest, who?
With Trump’s support, Musk has pushed out more than 100,000 federal workers. That’s 100,000 jobs—100,000 people who were helping keep our government running and are now without income in a time of rising economic uncertainty.
The scientists, engineers, and professionals who kept NASA the pride of the United States are gone or expecting their pink slip any day.
Meanwhile, SpaceX, one of his companies, is set to receive billions in government contracts under this new administration.
Musk’s power grab has only just begun. Maxine is working to protect our democracy and demand checks to these unelected oligarchs—but every bit of support helps. Are you with us? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q2?refcode=X_250402_EOQ3_actrs]

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23276?t=1011&refcode=email-20250402_v&akid=8010%2E5885482%2Eeq5DSl ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis, Elon Musk
just got handed a major defeat in Wisconsin — we showed the country he's
not invincible, and that when we mobilize together, we can stand up to
even the wealthiest billionaire bullies.

But let's be clear: Musk is far from defeated.

Right now, Musk and Trump’s plans to gut the Social Security
administration are starting to take effect, their attacks on NPR & PBS are
at a fever pitch, and their legislation to gut Medicaid is coming to
fruition.

Here’s the good news: Musk’s humiliation in Wisconsin has Republicans
panicking and looking to distance themselves from his destructive DOGE
agenda.

We have a narrow, critical window to exploit this growing division to
protect programs that millions of Americans count on every single day. The
Our Revolution team has just decided to double down on targeting
vulnerable Republicans to stop Musk & DOGE in its tracks.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23276?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250402nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8010%2E5885482%2Eeq5DSl ]Can you make a donation right now to help us maximize this moment to

Let’s not forget the havoc Musk's DOGE agenda has already unleashed:
Thousands of critical public jobs gutted from USAID and DHHS. Entire
departments slashed, undermining health, education, and humanitarian
efforts globally.

Musk’s defeat in Wisconsin was a resounding condemnation of his agenda. He
put himself on the ballot with his vote-buying antics and million-dollar
check event last weekend.

Our Mobilization Team called and texted over 60,000 supporters in
Wisconsin - and we proved that when we organize we do win! And as Bernie
put it, Musk’s Wisconsin setback proves something powerful: when we unite,
our grassroots movement of everyday people can defeat the wealthiest
person on earth.

jamming phone lines, organizing nationwide protests, and unleashing
powerful lobbying pushes to Congress.

agenda before it does any more damage. Will you rush a donation to help us
stop Musk?

When we organize, we win.

name: Cory Booker
subject: I spoke for over 25 hours straight on the Senate floor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up.
| | |
---
Family, it’s Cory.
Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.

I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: This is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up.
What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard.
I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment.

It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered.
It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend.
**_[If you’re willing and able, support our movement for justice, opportunity, and freedom by splitting a donation between me and Jacky Rosen today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105054564/537209961/-667153314?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5512-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDc2MGRkYy1lZjBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NCLDmEVd4t5uDihx_Bu8sqybr3Zu4QimvjCf0-OwucM=)_**

name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: Elon Musk Tried to Buy Wisconsin’s Supreme Court. Voters Had Other Ideas.
body:
Dems win big in Wisconsin Supreme Court.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wzu6d-w1qyfy-kyd76rh2/)
---
# **Wisconsin Dems Showed Up to Defeat MAGA and Musk**
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wzu6d-w1qyfz-kyd76rh3/)
---
| | | | Dear friend, Elon Musk spent more than $25 million trying to buy a Wisconsin Supreme Court seat for the far-right, and he lost. In the most expensive judicial election in American history, voters made one thing clear: even the richest man on Earth can’t drown out the will of the people. Liberal Judge Susan Crawford won this high-stakes race by a decisive 10-point margin, securing over 1.3 million votes and maintaining the court’s 4–3 liberal majority. Her victory was a resounding rejection of Musk’s money, Trump’s shadow, and the Republican Party’s attempts to hijack state courts. This wasn’t just a local race. It was a national power grab. Let’s be clear: judicial elections are usually low-profile and low-turnout — exactly the kind of contest a billionaire can quietly hijack with dark money and unchecked influence. And Elon Musk tried. He dumped millions into two PACs that flooded the airwaves and internet with ads for conservative candidate Brad Schimel. He personally gave $3 million to the Wisconsin Republican Party. He even headlined a last-minute rally in Green Bay, where attendees had to prove they’d voted early to get in. At one point, Musk offered a $1 million “reward” to anyone who could help attack “activist judges” in Wisconsin — an unhinged publicity stunt that verged on voter manipulation. His PACs also ran deceptive Facebook ads pretending to be progressive voices urging liberals not to vote. The strategy? Flood the zone with cash, confuse the public, and push a far-right candidate onto the bench while no one was watching. **It didn’t work.** Instead, Wisconsin voters turned out in record numbers for a spring election, over 2.3 million people voted, rivaling midterm turnout levels. That surge was powered by outrage. Musk, Trump, and their billionaire cronies gave Democrats a perfect villain: a Silicon Valley plutocrat trying to buy the court and lock in extremist policies. And the stakes couldn’t have been higher. The Wisconsin Supreme Court will likely decide the fate of: 1.) Abortion access in the state, with a challenge to Wisconsin’s 1849 ban headed its way. 2.) Gerrymandered legislative maps that have let Republicans control the legislature despite losing the popular vote. 3.) Voting rights and election integrity, especially critical as Trump lays the groundwork for another chaotic election cycle. With Brad Schimel on the court, **Musk and Trump would have had a loyal vote on every one of those issues.** Instead, they lost — and badly. This is a warning shot for the Republican Party. Their overreliance on billionaires like Musk is backfiring. Voters aren’t inspired by out-of-touch tech moguls in designer boots jetting in to “save” them from judges who believe in bodily autonomy and fair maps. They’re insulted by it. [**_The GOP’s problem isn’t just that their ideas are unpopular. It’s that they’ve come to believe money alone can win elections. And to be fair, it often can, especially in smaller races like this one, where a single megadonor can drown out grassroots voices. But Wisconsin just proved that when people are paying attention, even billions can’t beat basic decency._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wzu6d-w1qyg0-kyd76rh0/) In Solidarity, The No Dem Left Behind Team
---

Yesterday, there was a critical election for a seat on Wisconsin's Supreme Court—one of the first big tests in 2025 to show where the public stands on the issues that matter most: protecting our rights, supporting working families, and strengthening democracy. And Wisconsin voters made it clear—they're standing up for those values and won big. Wisconsin Supreme Court candidate Judge Susan Crawford won by a 10-point margin, protecting the court's liberal majority and showing that the people of Wisconsin will not sit by while Trump, Musk, and Republicans take our country backward and try to destroy all of our progress. In addition to supporting a host of hateful policies, the Republican in the race had his campaign bankrolled—by upwards of $19 million—by Elon Musk, his super PAC, and allied organizations. The results of yesterday's election show that people are already fed up with Trump and Musk's actions and fired up to make a difference. Let's keep this grassroots momentum going across the country. Together, we can beat back Trump and defend our country's values from the dangerous MAGA agenda. = = Onward, Jeff | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. | This email was sent by Jeff Merkley for Oregon PO Box 14172 Portland, OR 97293 United States Email is an important way for Jeff Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Cory Booker
subject: I’m tired and a little hoarse, but I cannot stay silent.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/7YHPQ7rdJwCjdUeAdAegUg~~/AAPPABA~/YTwvk5S7qqZAqrNndGUSKao8HaWC-9s_KlHCSE-h-8cpTu7AhS2tS3LqpyviyF9pKM0oDeu0d6SNpnkpOzFmqUopdzJF0T4rY0immqome2RLXWFyCVnkJzIz4gG-F3zdKZXua0B_YwH_Jp6v3v30qxZsb8YGGnDrGXDjTqXH17_XFhBotnn1SsftJvPwBTnXqXO2tugJ-qnuCQbxvIkssktjNFtJ-PsIz0Vx3YoNrNjE4XHs-E0ws9d3ardUfrvTMiy1f8_u8M-sat3gSw2Qcq7DjOMpXq1dJMOLl04FF6fvefavpo5r-gLQH5gNOkjCENAB9ngDemD9brTESNRTpi-d80yr5ApgTGevZ5UEqTM~)
---
| Peter, it’s Cory. Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend. Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. body:
Have you ever wondered what it was like to grow up in a Communist, revolutionary hellhole? I don’t have to wonder.| | | Patriot, this is Senator Ted Cruz. This is a longer email – _**[but I can’t emphasize enough how important it is to read every word.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=527b2b9c4f694092a6eda4dd557a7db9&_e=1DQ5WIVtW3QsEth5FtV2tiz1nLszmFa6MPijRQ2AbCUrhGUsSPRbEof2kq5W_KX5FrJpSK3GW7E7lXU58iq3Sx4cRa8fTJieg_AAFhO4OlP4BrG2VosBAQrsm-jocXy6ZB9_oqN4ItH4r2FR_POOTNiM3hOjVPkXlxPQcM7ENe6bbN2qSGo7JwAIxFKkHyLCmdjS_q997f9gf2cd-iPt-PfPdGGfEPH4wIsuORVJ3xh2JitwFBTZ3jnoK4Hk1DMhjt-yZ6bjEulWlGdY0fwWwTQLf_sK4uVzqPYGlMvRsE0s7Nlr8ymuRl2rgv_bcwb5Gdi2WVde-3dnRsGGOzgPRA%3D%3D)**_ Have you ever wondered what it was like to grow up in a Communist, revolutionary hellhole? Have you ever wondered what it’s like to be beaten and thrown in jail for disagreeing with your country’s leader? Have you ever wondered what it’s like to watch, helplessly as the country where your parents raised you is ripped apart at the seams by Communist insanity? **_I don’t have to wonder._** **_My dad, Rafael, lived it..._** And as I was growing up he explained every excruciating detail of what it was like when he was growing up in Cuba. Friend, we’re watching the same radical revolutionary playbook in America RIGHT now – **[and we’re running out of time to course-correct.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=527b2b9c4f694092a6eda4dd557a7db9&_e=1DQ5WIVtW3QsEth5FtV2tiz1nLszmFa6MPijRQ2AbCUrhGUsSPRbEof2kq5W_KX5FrJpSK3GW7E7lXU58iq3Sx4cRa8fTJieg_AAFhO4OlP4BrG2VosBAQrsm-jocXy6ZB9_oqN4ItH4r2FR_POOTNiM3hOjVPkXlxPQcM7ENe7Y-Yh1enD_eUq7-mDGxmb3Wyv52EJKhYcPJbsXSwuxPREeG6CO1w7m67T4skwQ7FMk9stEYq9tHZAlAK6Uy2Ji6gvdcucnGeroUkiT-v0B0Ony2FdGDRIBjx0Robr2m_CHw9kBdoHEqaVICU0cqB3nw8oGrHAf17vLsEsOJ8GS6A%3D%3D)** Rafael Cruz was beaten and thrown in prison. He was so desperate to escape he sowed $100 into his underwear and fled. **_THIS is how the Communist revolution happened in Cuba._** First, radical revolutionaries take TOTAL control over the classroom. They write the textbooks. They craft the lessons. They silence diversity of opinions. And they teach children that the country their parents inherited is EVIL, unjust, and must be destroyed. Then, they separate children from their parents. They attack parental rights. They tell children to REPORT their parents for beliefs that go against the regime. They demand that children abandon the beliefs and traditions of their parents. **_They know that the only way they can push their insane ideology is to isolate and target the most impressionable and vulnerable minds._** And finally, when they’ve run their propaganda campaign across an entire generation of students – they flip the switch and bring down the hammer. All hope is lost. Does that sound frighteningly familiar? It should. It’s happening right under our noses, in plain sight for the world to see. [No one has stood up to STOP IT. **_**_Until now._**_**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=527b2b9c4f694092a6eda4dd557a7db9&_e=1DQ5WIVtW3QsEth5FtV2tiz1nLszmFa6MPijRQ2AbCUrhGUsSPRbEof2kq5W_KX5FrJpSK3GW7E7lXU58iq3Sx4cRa8fTJieg_AAFhO4OlP4BrG2VosBAQrsm-jocXy6ZB9_oqN4ItH4r2FR_POOTNiM3hOjVPkXlxPQcM7ENe5LlwEjQ4fWhBRgTdXrBGCoUVnWWNKv9YX8ajL85E4uINWW0axzaZ0NeP9zil5sj3TnVxDEok2BNI8JRvxYUlvzbuJjb8xocAWkiAzhjPXctj3HqGDhKdMJxbLuKkfZWfs1VVqVVZONYxJappMfZ1y0X-SeWHAvmlw_vMAoF_riSg%3D%3D) **_THIS is how the radical leftist revolution is happening in America today._** Radical leftists have bankrolled the total infiltration and takeover of our schools. They’re separating children from their parents – schools are even required to lie to parents when it comes to things like Transgender operations and sexuality. Some schools have even instructed children to REPORT their parents if they aren’t supportive of their “gender identity.” They’re FORCING children to believe in extreme anti-America ideologies – teaching that America is unjust, evil, racist, and must be destroyed. And they’re on the verge of raising up the most RADICALLY left wing generation in American history. To prevent the TOTAL annihilation of our country – we MUST fight AND WIN in the battle for control over our schools. And, Friend, it all starts with our nation’s school boards. The radical left has spent decades and countless millions to infiltrate school boards and plant radical left wing curriculum in classrooms in blue, purple, and red states alike. **_[That’s why I am proud to introduce you to the 1776 Project PAC – America’s MOST EFFECTIVE school board campaign organization.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=527b2b9c4f694092a6eda4dd557a7db9&_e=1DQ5WIVtW3QsEth5FtV2tiz1nLszmFa6MPijRQ2AbCUrhGUsSPRbEof2kq5W_KX5FrJpSK3GW7E7lXU58iq3Sx4cRa8fTJieg_AAFhO4OlP4BrG2VosBAQrsm-jocXy6ZB9_oqN4ItH4r2FR_POOTNiM3hOjVPkXlxPQcM7ENe5Wnd9NkLt_z2JL6lZ-nZxP8_Xck_nmzoP0On6vtwaM1z8Kzp3AJqbWuvQZyVGmb_HhhJ7HyaYeYJspzcL6ZVe7Q349a0oW5AjXaNFcT4RjHydnz0t9ctz4DJk2pPMFR9-Agn1vr5beQ5KlUbC4qj9Fkle_Q6pU1qVxIIwmUx7-6A%3D%3D)_** They were designed from the ground up to counter the left’s megadonors and REPLACE leftist activists on school boards across the country! _**And they’re doing an incredible job! The numbers speak for themselves.**_ 1776’s work has resulted in _**4.5 MILLION students saved from radical leftist leadership in their schools.**_ _**They’ve FIRED 250 leftist school board members and replaced them with brave Conservatives.**_ _**And this year, they’re going bigger than EVER before by endorsing, supporting, and campaigning for hundreds of Conservative school board candidates nationwide!**_ But 2025 is an odd year – literally and figuratively – Planned Parenthood is crawling out of the woodwork to use taxpayer dollars to fund leftist school board candidates... ... And while the radical left is losing in major elections they’re desperate to score wins at the local level where fewer people are paying attention. That is why the 1776 Project PAC’s work is so critical – the GOP has desperately needed an organization focused on the forgotten and overlooked races that make a MASSIVE impact on the lives of parents and students everywhere. **[So my one request for you today is this: Will you please send in a donation of ANY amount to the 1776 Project PAC?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=527b2b9c4f694092a6eda4dd557a7db9&_e=1DQ5WIVtW3QsEth5FtV2tiz1nLszmFa6MPijRQ2AbCUrhGUsSPRbEof2kq5W_KX5FrJpSK3GW7E7lXU58iq3Sx4cRa8fTJieg_AAFhO4OlP4BrG2VosBAQrsm-jocXy6ZB9_oqN4ItH4r2FR_POOTNiM3hOjVPkXlxPQcM7ENe4ivFONtXeM6_oJ-qCip0-YrHe-VwfGvZHqyb4O06opaClzoUngutd_RyGbtcjtCOhjZ5k60SAENm1zDX0esNV4aufl72MAY8PazUKelLLg2uuWY5gMTTl1bFVEoSQMt91F8p4egv5YnItgSURzsOEYpNFgBQuoJhOsNUIQ8oSyQA%3D%3D)** Thank you in advance for your consideration and for sending in support to 1776 Project PAC – _**one of the most critical organizations in America right now.**_ God bless you, Sen. Ted Cruz

clean_body: Have you ever wondered what it was like to grow up in a Communist, revolutionary hellhole? I don’t have to wonder.| | | Patriot, this is Senator Ted Cruz. This is a longer email – Have you ever wondered what it was like to grow up in a Communist, revolutionary hellhole? Have you ever wondered what it’s like to be beaten and thrown in jail for disagreeing with your country’s leader? Have you ever wondered what it’s like to watch, helplessly as the country where your parents raised you is ripped apart at the seams by Communist insanity? I don’t have to wonder. My dad, Rafael, lived it... And as I was growing up he explained every excruciating detail of what it was like when he was growing up in Cuba. Friend, we’re watching the same radical revolutionary playbook in America RIGHT now – Rafael Cruz was beaten and thrown in prison. He was so desperate to escape he sowed $100 into his underwear and fled. THIS is how the Communist revolution happened in Cuba. First, radical revolutionaries take TOTAL control over the classroom. They write the textbooks. They craft the lessons. They silence diversity of opinions. And they teach children that the country their parents inherited is EVIL, unjust, and must be destroyed. Then, they separate children from their parents. They attack parental rights. They tell children to REPORT their parents for beliefs that go against the regime. They demand that children abandon the beliefs and traditions of their parents. They know that the only way they can push their insane ideology is to isolate and target the most impressionable and vulnerable minds. And finally, when they’ve run their propaganda campaign across an entire generation of students – they flip the switch and bring down the hammer. All hope is lost. Does that sound frighteningly familiar? It should. It’s happening right under our noses, in plain sight for the world to see. THIS is how the radical leftist revolution is happening in America today. Radical leftists have bankrolled the total infiltration and takeover of our schools. They’re separating children from their parents – schools are even required to lie to parents when it comes to things like Transgender operations and sexuality. Some schools have even instructed children to REPORT their parents if they aren’t supportive of their “gender identity.” They’re FORCING children to believe in extreme anti-America ideologies – teaching that America is unjust, evil, racist, and must be destroyed. And they’re on the verge of raising up the most RADICALLY left wing generation in American history. To prevent the TOTAL annihilation of our country – we MUST fight AND WIN in the battle for control over our schools. And, Friend, it all starts with our nation’s school boards. The radical left has spent decades and countless millions to infiltrate school boards and plant radical left wing curriculum in classrooms in blue, purple, and red states alike. They were designed from the ground up to counter the left’s megadonors and REPLACE leftist activists on school boards across the country! And they’re doing an incredible job! The numbers speak for themselves. 1776’s work has resulted in 4.5 MILLION students saved from radical leftist leadership in their schools. They’ve FIRED 250 leftist school board members and replaced them with brave Conservatives. And this year, they’re going bigger than EVER before by endorsing, supporting, and campaigning for hundreds of Conservative school board candidates nationwide! But 2025 is an odd year – literally and figuratively – Planned Parenthood is crawling out of the woodwork to use taxpayer dollars to fund leftist school board candidates... ... And while the radical left is losing in major elections they’re desperate to score wins at the local level where fewer people are paying attention. That is why the 1776 Project PAC’s work is so critical – the GOP has desperately needed an organization focused on the forgotten and overlooked races that make a MASSIVE impact on the lives of parents and students everywhere. Thank you in advance for your consideration and for sending in support to 1776 Project PAC – one of the most critical organizations in America right now. God bless you, Sen. Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by 1776 Project PACPO Box 2891 Springfield, VA 22152Not Authorized by any candidate or campaign committee |

name: Cory Booker
subject: I’m tired and a little hoarse, but I cannot stay silent.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up. | [](https://fight4progress.org/booker?t=4elblXgDjdxt&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-31_1&amount=25)
---
Peter, it’s Cory.

Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.

I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up.

What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard.

I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment.

It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered.

It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together.

We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend.

[_**If you’re willing and able, support our movement for justice, opportunity, and freedom by splitting a donation between me and Fight for Progress today.**_](https://fight4progress.org/booker?t=PabuOPt4yXfX&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-02_1&amount=25)
| | | [ CONTRIBUTE $5 ](https://fight4progress.org/booker?t=99HLxYPbinND&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-02_1&amount=5)
---

---

---
| [ CONTRIBUTE $50 ](https://fight4progress.org/booker?t=7Q0WysagKSwp&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-02_1&amount=50)
---
| [ OTHER AMOUNT ](https://fight4progress.org/booker?t=kpGf1n2k6aUg&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-02_1)
---
With love and gratitude,

Cory

name: State Representative Ryan Chamberlin
subject: Newsletter from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin
body:
Newsletter from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/repryanchamberlin/newsletter-from-rep-ryan-chamberlin-12927240?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| | **NEWSLETTER FROM REP. RYAN CHAMBERLIN**
---
| Friends and Neighbors,

The past two weeks of the legislative session have been fruitful and exciting! Together, my fellow legislators and I are working hard to advance policies that put Floridians first and keep our state leading the nation. I can’t wait to build on our efforts in the upcoming days and weeks ahead.

I look forward to keeping you updated on our progress. Stay tuned!
---
| As always, my office is here to serve you! Please do not hesitate to [contact my team](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=4c2efc8c29&e=d1c1b9864f) if you need assistance with anything. We would be happy to help in any way we can!
---
| | **Committee Meetings: Weeks 3 & 4**
---
| In addition to meeting with constituents and stakeholders, the last two weeks were filled with several committee meetings. Click below to read the meeting packets from each committee meeting to learn more about the bills we heard.

**Week 3 Committee Meetings:**
* [Human Services Subcommittee](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=c87f6692ba&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [Justice Budget Subcommittee](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=392f48228a&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [Intergovernmental Affairs Subcommittee](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=7cc55a047c&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [Economic Infrastructure Subcommittee](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=37fe8f4a84&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [Ways and Means Committee](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=7abaa21af0&e=d1c1b9864f)

**Week 4 Committee Meetings:**
* [Economic Infrastructure Subcommittee](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=893dd6363d&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [Justice Budget Subcommittee](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=b1945dd72a&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [Human Services Subcommittee](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=ddb6023234&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [Intergovernmental Affairs Subcommittee](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=eedbbefd17&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [Ways and Means Committee](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=d8aab943b6&e=d1c1b9864f)

---
| | **Week 4: Update on My Legislation**
---
|
---
| I had the opportunity to present my bill, [HB 541 - Minimum Wage Requirements](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=b899137ed1&e=d1c1b9864f), in the Career & Workforce Subcommittee. I’m proud to report that it passed favorably!

It was an honor to also present [HB 4067](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=7e037a3801&e=d1c1b9864f), a local bill for the World Equestrian Center, in the Intergovernmental Affairs Subcommittee. This piece of legislation also passed favorably!
---
| | **Meetings in Tallahassee**
---
|
---
| Thank you to the **Building Officials Association** for stopping by my office to discuss best practices for implementing virtual versus personal signage and the importance of apprenticeships.
---
|
---
| I also had the pleasure of meeting with the **National Underground Contractors Association**. We had a deep discussion regarding the ongoing legislation related to signage.
---
|
---
| What a great press conference put on by **Senator Stan McClain** and **Representative Danny Alvarez**!**** They officially announced the upcoming mini-series of the award-winning novel, “A Land Remembered.” Click here to learn more about this incredible written work: [A Land Remembered – Florida’s Favorite Book](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=1e286ab510&e=d1c1b9864f)
---
|
---
| Maintaining our infrastructure, advancing technology, and ensuring that we have a reliable energy supply are paramount to keeping Florida’s future bright. I enjoyed meeting with the **Florida Engineering Society** and the **American Council of Engineering Companies of Florida** to discuss how the state can support our engineers and their vital profession.
---
|
---
| The **Home Care Association of Florida** has been a strong voice for our state’s home care providers for many years. I had the privilege of meeting with one of their representatives to discuss the association’s legislative priorities, such as modernizing administrative flexibility in home health care and strengthening the home care workforce.
---
|
---
| Supporting our Ocala businesses is essential to ensuring our continued prosperity and economic growth. The **Ocala Chamber and Economic Partnership** plays an important role in these efforts and is a leading voice in our community. It was great to meet with **Heather Shubirg** , who is the Chief Growth Officer for the Ocala/Marion CEP. She came up to Tallahassee from the district to share more about some economic opportunities happening in Marion County.
---
|
---
| Our students are the future of Florida! I had the pleasure of meeting with some FSU students who were at the Capitol to celebrate**FSU Day**. We got to know each other, and they also shared their legislative priorities. I always love to see such bright young minds engaged in the legislative process!
---
|
---
| Each legislative session, I have the opportunity to sponsor a page (middle school) and a messenger (high school). This year, **Victoria Paradiso** from Belleview High School was my messenger for a second time. I’m very grateful to have such a wonderful representation from my home town! Also, a huge shout out to our page, **Sebastian Pectu** , who I unfortunately did not get a picture with.
---
|
---
| Thank you to **Orange City** ’s first-ever female mayor, **Kelli Marks** , for stopping by my office to talk. She is leading the city with incredible knowledge and skill, and I applaud her work.
---
|
---
| **SMA Healthcare** plays an incredible role in our community by coming alongside those who are struggling with addiction and mental illness. It was great to meet with **Salvatore Gintoli** and **Nancy Russo** to discuss appropriations projects and how they have been impacting our Marion County community.
---
|
---
| I’m always happy to meet with **District Five Secretary John Tyler** with the **Florida Department of Transportation**. We discussed transportation projects and the effects they may have on our district.
---
|
---
| We must work together to support those in Florida’s child welfare system! Thank you to **Florida Youth SHINE** for visiting my office to discuss the importance of supporting and caring for foster children even after they turn 18.
---
|
---
---
| **Governor Ron DeSantis** spoke at the unveiling of the **Holocaust Memorial Park** in Tallahassee. The memorial features individuals who were persecuted during the Holocaust and now live in Florida. Holocaust survivor **David Schaecter** was awarded the Lifetime Achievement Award by our Governor.
---
|
---
| It is always wonderful to meet with the next generation to discuss legislation that could potentially affect them and the universities they attend. I enjoyed meeting with the **Florida Student Association** , which represents the 430,000 students enrolled in our 12 Florida universities.
---
|
---
| I had the privilege of meeting with representatives from the **Life Care Center of Ocala** , which was named one of U.S. News & World Report’s 2025 Best Nursing Homes. I appreciated them stopping by my office to talk!
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| Students from**Souls Harbor** (my alma mater) came up to Tallahassee, and I had the special honor of spending time with them. We took a private tour of the House chamber and attended a press conference with Governor DeSantis!

A big thank you to school leadership, **Donald Currie** , for helping make this trip happen!
---
| | **In the District:****Marion County Days Annual Community Festival**
---
|
---
| This past weekend, I was back in the district to attend **Marion County Days Annual Community Festival**.**** It was great to celebrate our county’s history and showcase everything that makes it great. I also had the pleasure of running into **State Senator Randy Fine**!
---
| | **In Tallahassee: Receptions**
---
| My staff and I also attended various receptions and events over the last two weeks, including:
* **Florida Land Council Reception**
* **Florida Bankers Capitol Night Party**
* **Florida Electric Cooperatives Reception**
* **Independent Funeral Directors of Florida Reception**
* **Florida Engineering Society/American Council of Engineers Reception**
* **Florida Credit Union Association Legislative Reception**
* **FSU Seminole Evening on Adams**
* **Taste of FL, Agriculture Reception**
* **AI Reception**
* **Florida State Parks Live Wildly Reception**
* **Rural County Legislative Reception**
* **Red Dog Blue Dog**
* **Florida Poly Day Reception**
* **Florida Dental Association Legislative Briefing**
* **Florida Young Republicans Reception**
* **Israel Day Reception and Presentation**
* **FL Association of Community Health Centers**
* **Emergency Medicine Days 2025 Reception**
* **FL League of Cities**
* **Israel Day Cocktail Reception**
* **FL Home Builders Association**
* **JMI Red, White, and Bluegrass**
* **FL Tourism Expo**
* **FL Education Association**
* **FL Beer Wholesalers Association**
* **Keiser University Reception**
* **FL Ports Council 2025 Reception**
* **STEM Day at the Capitol Reception**

---
|
---
| | Thank you for reading, and I look forward to sharing with you again soon.

Have a great week!

Best regards,

**Ryan Chamberlin**
******State Representative**
**District 24**
---
| | _Copyright © 2024 Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative, All rights reserved._

Paid by Ryan Chamberlin, Republican, for State Representative

**Our mailing address is:**
Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative
526 E Park Ave
Tallahassee, FL 32301-2568

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=e4cdad713c) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&t=b&e=d1c1b9864f&c=e4cdad713c).

---

name: Eric Burlison
subject: DOGE OFFICIAL Subcommittee Poll

When the Biden Regime **THREW ME IN PRISON** for peacefully protesting**** on January 6th, I must’ve apologized to my wife and kids 1,000 times. I barely got to say goodbye before being **HANDCUFFED & SHIPPED OFF.** But this isn’t a sob story. **PRESIDENT TRUMP PARDONED ME.**

**And now that I’m running for Senate, I want to** **APOLOGIZE TO YOU:** I’m sorry all of these politicians message you asking for _fake 1000X donation matches_. I’m sorry they lie to your face about their “values” so they can _treat you like an ATM machine_. **I understand why you don’t want to give them a minute of your time or an inkling of your support.** You don’t need to be in Congress to see it: Politicians tell you they’ll do anything to _“champion Trump’s agenda”..._ _Then work with Democrats to BLOCK his cabinet nominations_. They’ll text and email about how much they want to put _“America First”._.. _Then turn around and give Ukraine another $500,000,000,000_. They’ll ask you to rush over an urgent contribution to _“Defend President Trump”..._ _Then vote to fund the same FBI and DOJ bureaucrats_ _waging war against him_. Look, I’m not perfect. **But I’ll NEVER betray my constituents like this.** I’m just a normal guy from West Virginia who has a family to support and bills to pay. I don’t have some giant political machine behind me. My plan isn’t to get rich and attend cocktail parties. **I just want to DO RIGHT by the American people, and that means carrying out President Trump’s America First agenda FAR AFTER he’s gone.** **Will you support my Senate campaign today?** **Thank you.**
---

name: Cory Booker
subject: I’m tired and a little hoarse, but I cannot stay silent.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87611?refcode=em20250402-8863&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8863%2E614464%2EcJNClH)
Peter, it’s Cory.
Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.
I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up.
What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard.
I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment.
It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered.
It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together.
**[If you’re willing and able, support our movement for justice, opportunity, and freedom by splitting a donation between me and Heartland Patriots today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87611?refcode=em20250402-8863&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8863%2E614464%2EcJNClH)**

A couple of weeks ago, we asked you a simple question: **Should Chuck Schumer step down as Senate Democratic Leader?** Over a thousand of you responded. The answer was clear — _it’s time for a change._ Democrats need leaders who fight. Leaders who stand up to Donald Trump and protect the American people. Cory Booker just spoke on the Senate floor for 25 hours, disrupting business as usual in an act of patriotism, honesty, and hopeful rage. But here’s the problem: Sen. Schumer still isn’t listening. After handing Trump and Elon Musk a blank check to gut critical programs, he expected the outrage to die down. Instead, it’s only grown. Protests forced him to postpone his national book tour. Democratic lawmakers in Congress are demanding accountability. And grassroots activists, including people like you, are saying enough is enough. So, let’s make our message clear. **[We are calling on Senator Chuck Schumer to either lead the fight against Trump’s extreme agenda or step down as Senate Democratic Leader. If he won’t stand up for us, he needs to step aside for someone who will. ## They're dismantling our country. They're looting our government. And they think we'll just watch.

# **On Saturday, April 5th, we rise up with one demand: Hands Off!**
---
We've been organizing locally against the unprecedented Trump-Musk power grab. **Now it 's time to turn up the pressure with [nationwide events](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMa2J2F9-GOeJSFpuNdJr44G2J7SR4lXIP6m1OUznJMX5hgQ0RSvVUZ9ha6HMg1wYxDPv4k_79w-seq8a-9nkaUNOSmM8sMPhGIKEqBKUi_lBCYWXUPZVqIFZbzn55ESPbb_O6QZWj6v9wsuyYIkrlKCyUqEJH_t9eYUXqzDIF_sM2XXGQNcoV9hGArlAPLRt1i2AtjJa9Y5MWl1fmKwRv1R8F3IAPuUXF3Nt8YXONnTSpMTU_-6wX17RssAfY6kX88X9NKzndoeYJFQuf3s7RCyQYxDqXX0jHjULu9e5ESL4a2AudIMITYKVIzUeOXw1i8jTsIUcxin462o78lve2j8/4fb/PAlN_mkRS7y6ZfzoYzoYmw/h1/h001.IiQNa_tZAAmwbu2ROMq5ztf6lRiYjOvKSMDuSN6gP4o) to say Hands Off! ** This is a national mobilization to stop the most brazen power grab in modern history. Our incredible KPEF board member Alisa Grishman will be speaking in Pittsburgh and we're also thrilled that our colleague Monica Still will be speaking in Beaver County!
