### If we don't fight now, there won't be anything left to save:
---
* They're dismantling Social Security and Medicare--forcing seniors and disabled Americans to jump through hoops to access the benefits they've already paid into.
* They're handing trillions to billionaires--while forcing the rest of us to pay higher prices for food, rent, and healthcare.
* They're gutting protections for working people--so payday lenders, banks, and credit card companies can scam Americans with zero consequences.
* They're assaulting our communities and our rights--targeting veterans, kids, seniors, farmers, immigrants, transgender people, and political opponents.
* They won't stop there.

This is not just corruption. This is not just mismanagement. This is a hostile takeover. Between [Sen. Cory Booker's](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoc5lroAYgnBM-pxs59wzI1R1BYMlktlbhtF0mVt86rbJoh6ePNwiRFYO7LTPdx8zpEOaJXWCTYIv70FvIe-KfmA3hgrYMDiQ3OOEaPSq6MEcsj4GhSNU33St_I2My13DViSw5jY4v41H0efgoaD24g9fY4g-BOEjfOw9mrGj-DHZIJyHyM4z8Ur7TxBSgkNgutWUxwHgfg2a0AMGizIqD0MF0w0rl6xiC24YDM72Wt6VkMGuy7g_OxoqtrEm0nXp87Ly32HdnB-62Ks6ZtSkGAhfqukXAwL87lSZ3ibyfIeSphbOxBlRj8mIAqPHaHCMRt6KA8Z4xR3Y1oVIQVDiLHPFY4GKHX5cncpWvo4j8OltvTqaSsIzx-UvgSAU1Vocrqt7rpRSI4-te-3eDkk_6is/4fb/PAlN_mkRS7y6ZfzoYzoYmw/h4/h001.VEoRYk0EfK8nJ6c6290wcW18SCDdCq_4cfFoErHWiYI) 25+ hour speech and Susan Crawford defeating Musks' candidate in the [Wisconsin Supreme Court seat special election](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoc5lroAYgnBM-pxs59wzI1SPXr7AlscxPf6ULo5x281O4roo0rfuvcBgJjAwbGr3ygmjBgjWaXG6OWKs_rf4WVSQWx0odzwRGLc3fajRRGvs4u_sCUpfgjePshtZylff_Hc16qIlu9VpzX1jJFhJ-gKzFV1LpkbKnIZ7L7wnq1xaEn7rAsaB9JStjUw70SJQ1ZJTZJZ6oG0Bv_xQjQUCe45BDnWGcc9qPbOCnc3m9fbDSrteBk0XBCS4Xf4Cm6ab6Klq2tT9gGHUEW2DkVX3w_MMtQwmV9uIzH-Ky8jcAiTI2cE395sX-3NPaRB9p-0QAB-_kA3wxILlb88z_sekJv_4Les6iIkTfxg8ept0hFm2E8EZlCdIrJAx82kQSV3pmg/4fb/PAlN_mkRS7y6ZfzoYzoYmw/h5/h001.H7Haho9oyWs4AmHbK72jQiFsqgfhpkc2TFpaLhVLIL4), momentum is growing. # Can't make it on Saturday? Tell Congress that the SAVE Act threatens our voting rights
---
The so-called [SAVE Act](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_96qd0UKTtEc2l2-0UxslFyGTGTm2EZq4Ve3unTSXFJbPFlhBPM-GfQesSVH_6sqy8ocyMpSFx0snEFshJuaXDCqt4Zd7hqdIXlooj9nzUJ2R_s1MFX_kSG2_IVyGLHvTyRdl3Ft0EuMkW5bBfe9dWcmwmwx7tCdW3ZJkYbqZwCoUgsp-u2YXR1LO50CoUHk-Bw4HufKWcrV3L81_nh8DbWc-ssWOfBwZCT4oXOSy6sE3uQYxqW7kThFWtr0nwLOBBCV6Z1VjW_AIIB48JzERDBb-_7iXNEmmzaj_-BiJsIANVhozQD8rcVLNeg8mszrcqt-mOwipTzGDDYtQE6aTj/4fb/PAlN_mkRS7y6ZfzoYzoYmw/h6/h001.tjHkFPuKKilFFi5b7Ab4r6sSkZuzXBY9ilr5JIacFIs) is a dangerous piece of legislation in the U.S. Congress that would [make it harder for eligible voters](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMS1a9iwo-hNQFChws2CVysDuPymlIu4F2dPvCb5Y4xHi39urRFNILi7ja3iylzwuZUPGnTzU41QSnWVYjtluhnB-DXDXyLrhVDboSJieVpSG7DTy8v_oUUnN2Z6_mLzvmOU4CBJzE2TL49e11FEXKCE04DtKb4YSUjbOOI_XlOM2tnZaTNOjPFUoGlfZ2LdJ1UFU-Nu4HuYZbvAvAOGG8uruEbyooCYq0QDIRZpnZ8klEEW-r8qqVn7hsPMyTHxfhsoT43XI5B-0TLRFaEF49wCf0EHrzL5G2uEacjx0BmHLO603H_6G_Wp_aFhw0A0Bhh_1BnfyPBxBR90QcBvhN73g9dzqU3i9b4F6EJZfi02q/4fb/PAlN_mkRS7y6ZfzoYzoYmw/h7/h001.EW7vIpsojqBI24TBNTgzO-Xt_17fvzfWXA0CqZ6zTg4) to cast their ballots. It's most likely going to be voted on next week and will:
* **Create unnecessary documentation barriers** : When registering to vote, Americans already must verify their proof of citizenship. The new requirements would demand documentation that many don't have.
* **Disproportionately affect marginalized communities** and forces thousands of eligible voters to travel hours and register in person to participate in elections.
* **Undermines our democracy** by restricting access to the ballot box instead of expanding it.

---
#### **You are their constituent and your voice matters! It 's quick, simple, and not too late -- **[**Contact your Rep today**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_96qd0UKTtEc2l2-0UxslFyGTGTm2EZq4Ve3unTSXFJbPFlhBPM-GfQesSVH_6sqzmqi2NDJzwk2zYKiuhQVekytfo7lQJ1ieyudq74mJcef9VPjUNlUUH9sJkOzxcJMyr9lSNlpMF31EVqLTJsFr34ic4ACNDqKEQ_P1xAAzNRUbq1C0kPggBB0N20MwiuM_iSbLzqD0MpsKFG9LzidcrCEei16GZG_PM3s2iiFyqjl_rFoGcouhIn65ea60T2iw5gQxIeKVnToBxuFPO_qTiEbqqPeuQbC3Loi4fQKR6A02XsE3fA5ZvROmdh5RQBst-jKf-AagVpQNPki81R7go/4fb/PAlN_mkRS7y6ZfzoYzoYmw/h8/h001.btRCpfCzK1k_1jV54QeueKatiDNWBFCJEBMAsvEukeM)**!**

clean_body: National Day of Action: They’re dismantling our country. They’re looting our government. And they think we’ll just watch. | | They're dismantling our country. They're looting our government. And they think we'll just watch. On Saturday, April 5th, we rise up with one demand: Hands Off! We've been organizing locally against the unprecedented Trump-Musk power grab. Now it 's time to turn up the pressure with to say Hands Off! This is a national mobilization to stop the most brazen power grab in modern history. Trump, Musk, and their billionaire cronies are orchestrating an all-out assault on our government, our economy, and our basic rights--enabled by Congress every step of the way. | There are nearly a thousand events across the US with dozens in Pennsylvania. Use find the one closest to you. In Western PA alone there are events in Pittsburgh, Erie, Grove City, Butler, Washington, Indiana, Altoona, Beaver County, and more! Our incredible KPEF board member Alisa Grishman will be speaking in Pittsburgh and we're also thrilled that our colleague Monica Still will be speaking in Beaver County! If we don't fight now, there won't be anything left to save: They're dismantling Social Security and Medicare--forcing seniors and disabled Americans to jump through hoops to access the benefits they've already paid into. They're handing trillions to billionaires--while forcing the rest of us to pay higher prices for food, rent, and healthcare. They're gutting protections for working people--so payday lenders, banks, and credit card companies can scam Americans with zero consequences. They're assaulting our communities and our rights--targeting veterans, kids, seniors, farmers, immigrants, transgender people, and political opponents. They won't stop there. This is not just corruption. This is not just mismanagement. This is a hostile takeover. Between 25+ hour speech and Susan Crawford defeating Musks' candidate in the , momentum is growing. We hope that you'll join us at an event on Saturday! Can't make it on Saturday? Tell Congress that the SAVE Act threatens our voting rights The so-called is a dangerous piece of legislation in the U.S. Congress that would to cast their ballots. It's most likely going to be voted on next week and will: Create unnecessary documentation barriers : When registering to vote, Americans already must verify their proof of citizenship. The new requirements would demand documentation that many don't have. Disproportionately affect marginalized communities and forces thousands of eligible voters to travel hours and register in person to participate in elections. Undermines our democracy by restricting access to the ballot box instead of expanding it. You are their constituent and your voice matters! It 's quick, simple, and not too late -- ! Check us out! name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: It’s Vivek – I’m running for Governor!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
I am running to be a key partner of President Trump at the state level to Make America Great Again.

[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)_This is Vivek Ramaswamy: I'm for Governor in my home state of Ohio._ America is on the verge of the greatest comeback our country has ever seen, and I am running to be a key partner to President Trump at the state level to Make America Great Again.
[**If that 's all you need to hear, I humbly ask you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign using this secure link.**](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._1BQV9m_D4FF-2nqLz6vmg)[PLEASE JOIN MY CAMPAIGN
](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._uA)My platform is simple:
1. **Tell folks the truth** - no lies, no gimmicks, no political speak
2. **Support Trump 100%** - he will have no better partner at the state level
3. **Overhaul failing schools** - I'll expand school choice and reward excellent teachers
4. **Restore national identity** - we'll promote merit and patriotism, and reject victimhood
5. **Deport every illegal alien** - Tom Homan is a hero, he'll have a direct line to my office
6. **Roll back transgenderism** - ban men in women's sports, no sex changes for minors
7. **Slash taxes and lower prices** - you earned your nest egg, you should keep more of it
8. **Gut all DEI programs in the state** - we'll be a model for rooting out woke propaganda
9. **Secure elections and prosecute fraud** - our elections will be the safest in the country
10. **Obliterate the managerial bureaucracy** - I'll take a hacksaw to government bloat

I get that's not everyone's cup of tea. Some folks would rather have a Liberal Democrat or a go-along-to-get-along Republican instead. That's just not who I am nor the campaign I'm running.
I threw my hat in the ring because we need a fighter - with the grit and fearlessness to take on the Democrat machine - at the helm in battleground Ohio.
[**If you agree, I 'd be honored to have you aboard.**](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._zm4akS2w)
So here's my final pitch to you:
The Democrat machine recruited a big-name Liberal to run for this open seat, and AP called her a "household name in the state."
That's why I'm taking this leap of faith and putting my name on the ballot.
**But now that I officially launched my campaign, I really need your help to win.** [**So with all that being said, could you please become a Founding Donor today?**](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._Z1sJ7lw)
Whether it's $4, $40, or $400 - whatever you can afford will go a long way to fueling our campaign to victory. I mean that. It all adds up when everyone pitches in.
_So what do you say? Can I count on your support today?_ | | [**CONTRIBUTE $4 HERE** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._3ahpy5W77R82HPlXJqg)
---
| [**CONTRIBUTE $40 HERE** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---
| [**CONTRIBUTE $400 HERE** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-COpbi2lSg)
---
| [**CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._Fa8Fr1vx5n5OREzmqXA)
---
Regardless, thanks for everything you've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans in Congress. I hope you'll consider joining my campaign today so we can win Ohio and help save America.

Together, we'll make history!

God bless you and God bless America,
**Vivek Ramaswamy**
[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._rCju5HKHTcSVbyKaxS4w)
| |

---

April 2, 2025
American was recently entertained by the two CEOs of federally-funded media conglomerates - PBS (Public Broadcasting Service) and NPR (National Public Radio) - profusely apologizing for previous liberal bias and vowing to change their ways if the taxpayers will just write the check. Republicans should not take the bait.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bf69ac3f-2888-4b88-8656-d3d150151277?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
PBS CEO Ms. Kerger ($1,000,000 salary) NPR CEO Ms. Maher ($749,000 salary)
First some background. [PBS ](https://substack.com/redirect/540d499f-cbed-4854-b847-64824b0ef1b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)is a television station watched by millions. News is a small part of its appeal as it serves as a platform for great documentaries such as Nova, Nature and entertaining historical mini-series such as Wolf Hall and Marie Antoniette. But its most famous product is the childhood hit, Sesame Steet.
But PBS also has news programming. Years ago, this was highlighted by the MacNeil/Lehrer Report that ended in 1983. While slightly left of center, even conservatives enjoyed the mostly objective reporting of these two gentlemen.
But in the subsequent decades, PBS News devolved into [liberal propaganda machine](https://substack.com/redirect/e25e64d1-9bf0-434e-a65d-269b0e045c0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) serving as cheerleaders for Obama and Biden while attacking Donald Trump. Italy's Prime Minster Giorgia Meloni is characterized as "far right" while those who question the wisdom of gender-changing surgeries are portrayed as troglodytes.
And NPR is even worse. When the Russian hoax was being perpetrated against President Trump, his antagonist Representative Adam Schiff was interviewed dozens of times. When Robert Mueller finally admitted there was no evidence of Trump Russian collusion, NPR did a Gilda Radner and said, "Never mind."
NPR refused to cover the Hunter Biden laptop scandal and portrayed those who opined that the COVID virus may have come from a Chinese lab as conspiracy theorists. Now most analysts concede that the COVID virus cam from a Wuhan laboratory.
This bias was exposed in a [mea culpa](https://substack.com/redirect/f3a817b7-96cf-4921-9c3e-79538eec3eea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by liberal NPR journalist of twenty-five years, Uri Berliner, who described himself as "Sarah Lawrence-educated, [who] was raised by a lesbian peace activist mother." He pointed out that of the employees working for NPR in the Washington D.C. area, 87 were Democrats and zero were Republicans. For his perceived perfidy, Berliner was laid off.
Republicans have been gunning for PBS and NPR for years as they receive half a billion dollars in taxpayer subsidies annually. This recently culminated in the CEOs of both testifying to Congress.
This made for great entertainment.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/82fbc3fa-61df-44eb-86af-f438489c04b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[](https://substack.com/redirect/8290f480-58e2-4b5b-a888-be8bdd0ceedc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Perhaps the best snippet was when NPR CEO Katherine Maher tried to walk back her statement in which she called President Trump "a deranged racist sociopath."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/380febbf-c8e2-450a-b058-ca2ccead05ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
But anyone watching the testimony of these CEOs would be impressed how they were willing to grovel in front of the conservative Republicans who grilled them. This made little sense. Liberals are masters of radiating social superiority.
Curious. I looked up their salaries. Ms. Maher makes $749,000 a year while the CEO of PBS, Ms. Paula Kerger pulls in over $1,000,000. I'd watch Tom Brady's home movies for this kind of money!
Now everything makes sense. All the Democrats screaming at Elon Musk while promoting left-wing biased news outlets have one concern - being overpaid courtesy of the American taxpayer. These two women would have donned MAGA hats if they thought it would help them keep these salaries.
If the government wants to subsidized PBS and NPR, fine. But then they should also subsidize Fox New and Newsmax TV. Otherwise, let these liberal outlets find other sources for their revenue if they wish to fund huge salaries for their CEOs.
But even if Congress defunds PBS and NPR, Ms. Kerger and Ms. Maher may have the last laugh. Some liberal judge could order that they must be funded. Liberals are very good at gaming the system.
Contact Dr. Bentivegna: jfbentivegna@gmail.com
Follow Dr. Bentivegna on Twitter (X) @joebentivegnamd

name: Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: I’m standing with Cory Booker to protect Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
This is a crucial moment in our fight to protect the American people and our democracy. Please add your name before midnight tonight. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Breaking: “Dozens of Social Security Administration offices across the country are slated to close this year” — AP News

I sent a letter to the Trump administration’s acting Social Security commissioner and joined my colleague Cory Booker on the Senate floor yesterday to demand the GOP protect access to this vital benefit for the millions who depend on it.

If you’re with me and Cory, and you believe that we need to protect Social Security benefits from GOP attacks, will you add your name? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/RFi-Q-zWRkSZV0zunk8VIw2]

CLICK HERE TO SIGN >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/RFi-Q-zWRkSZV0zunk8VIw2]

Here’s the deal:

Unelected billionaire Elon Musk vowed to cut trillions from vital government programs like Social Security, which 72 million Americans rely on.

His “Department of Government Efficiency” has already listed 47 Social Security offices for closure. Many have begun closing already, including here in New York.

And it doesn’t stop there: At a time when President Trump is trying to gut the federal workforce, these closures could exponentially increase wait times for Social Security recipients, delay or disrupt benefits and negatively impact the staff who work tirelessly to provide Americans with the benefits they need.

That’s why I’m standing with Cory Booker and calling on the Social Security Administration to stop the closures of these critical offices to protect Social Security benefits.

Please, voice your support for protecting this vital program by signing our petition now >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/RFi-Q-zWRkSZV0zunk8VIw2]

CLICK HERE TO SIGN >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/RFi-Q-zWRkSZV0zunk8VIw2]

Keep up the fight,

Kirsten Gillibrand
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer_email-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer_email-2025] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
A note from Kirsten:
Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term.
While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over.
Please, donate today to make sure my team and I can continue securing crucial progress on the issues that matter the most and help flip the Senate blue in 2026. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer_email-2025]
Thank you,
Kirsten Gillibrand
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

subject: Are you up for this responsibility, Friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Drag queen pride parades on Blue’s Clues are unacceptable
body:
Break Hollywood’s monopoly on children’s entertainment | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e740fa72408540e18b0877e525140062&_e=6bTPN9UfP0xsW7RmQ-Ov2iNHZeRTo9IHBOyK-KKLNPTqLhATyKIdtuHk7BjyTL8FTgH0oX9n-enAe_7q9K2oagEQUiDoJUwX0msPWl7TCBW-6fU7Bh4bmod21GV12LDV7Vv61X0N34uc4JgE9xd5NDifJOcuDBiij8qQts9DD_xu6aFlKrvLuqKW1KjP-Um3OyxoUN4bp3BV581HzdmBHA3eo4i1G11kYCQbL1315AISAWM5JsjXQJNzC6pZDdJi-g29y31iD5ks7bnaRmN2SZuGwCVezHxKtCMRmo0dyRCZQ0XfvlLD0ae_5veYMMZYRmQDmQ9cX7WwxEwhDZC6bw0BrpzSc0GguuKHooBKe6Nnr8y1fvKxRlxPWEvY3Wzj23-q_jeMKdqIZN1Cxod6Bw%3D%3D)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e740fa72408540e18b0877e525140062&_e=6bTPN9UfP0xsW7RmQ-Ov2iNHZeRTo9IHBOyK-KKLNPTqLhATyKIdtuHk7BjyTL8FTgH0oX9n-enAe_7q9K2oagEQUiDoJUwX0msPWl7TCBW-6fU7Bh4bmod21GV12LDV7Vv61X0N34uc4JgE9xd5NDifJOcuDBiij8qQts9DD_xu6aFlKrvLuqKW1KjP-Um3OyxoUN4bp3BV581HzdmBHA3eo4i1G11kYCQbL1315AISAWM5JsjXQJNzC6pZDdJi_X31u6VNNF5K6-qRiy6fZbG7xuQoGqn09874qeuHqgWVJFjjREFokOUKVWkxMpjwUqIhaB1kcluExo0XgLjhNzQi2sfBukkpjK6CTp5ktgcFIGVntABCp7i2_9Iqml4kEPXSsf5DZCKPPq3lQCSGhw%3D%3D)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e740fa72408540e18b0877e525140062&_e=6bTPN9UfP0xsW7RmQ-Ov2iNHZeRTo9IHBOyK-KKLNPTqLhATyKIdtuHk7BjyTL8FTgH0oX9n-enAe_7q9K2oagEQUiDoJUwX0msPWl7TCBW-6fU7Bh4bmod21GV12LDV7Vv61X0N34uc4JgE9xd5NDifJOcuDBiij8qQts9DD_xu6aFlKrvLuqKW1KjP-Um3OyxoUN4bp3BV581HzdmBHA3eo4i1G11kYCQbL1315AISAWM5JsjXQJNzC6pZDdJirk5mprF6xmZp_ZSs3UH76uOkrqXPwljBJ9eHeL_UEfiXVu8XdWYR-DXH2XL8mjkktNp1DnZPvMsMArYTYSV4tNKWi-bLDJJUTxKTSixc3J78lww3CFDvYHyKFK4ec2WRljmzj6SGMkjEGKOTM8K4uQ%3D%3D) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e740fa72408540e18b0877e525140062&_e=6bTPN9UfP0xsW7RmQ-Ov2iNHZeRTo9IHBOyK-KKLNPTqLhATyKIdtuHk7BjyTL8FTgH0oX9n-enAe_7q9K2oagEQUiDoJUwX0msPWl7TCBW-6fU7Bh4bmod21GV12LDV7Vv61X0N34uc4JgE9xd5NDifJOcuDBiij8qQts9DD_xu6aFlKrvLuqKW1KjP-Um3OyxoUN4bp3BV581HzdmBHA3eo4i1G11kYCQbL1315AISAWM5JsjXQJNzC6pZDdJijt95gU6KI8gkmCGE8lrS_Ap_2O8QrbijCAhtQektBtJnVqJ8JYcpdiBTzVl-DpDhyY8nnRWiwU2B73OqOLITiRU8eyzX8k59MTi9lrua0zk6aLgX-X4O4lZRHgR-dmz1DO5XxBsyivd-zvGW-V97MQ%3D%3D)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e740fa72408540e18b0877e525140062&_e=6bTPN9UfP0xsW7RmQ-Ov2iNHZeRTo9IHBOyK-KKLNPTqLhATyKIdtuHk7BjyTL8FTgH0oX9n-enAe_7q9K2oagEQUiDoJUwX0msPWl7TCBW-6fU7Bh4bmod21GV12LDV7Vv61X0N34uc4JgE9xd5NDifJOcuDBiij8qQts9DD_xu6aFlKrvLuqKW1KjP-Um3OyxoUN4bp3BV581HzdmBHA3eo4i1G11kYCQbL1315AISAWM5JsjXQJNzC6pZDdJiB7rn0Zy5MTCGF0rQELgkBb05u5OnXMQhCQExQMXt__TeUdI2i8wFwxx-4IubQZWQ6DdElEnVeCG8r5pLPGZmy6eNS0COWva6XzzkR1B4-jVpwEp1pE-z5su2Kyx-kBbZwzqwCNcIjftiGN8ZtzeJkQ%3D%3D)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father

clean_body: Break Hollywood’s monopoly on children’s entertainment | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue’s Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. Introducing: Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you’ve seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television. > Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of Iggy and Mr. Kirk! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special “Thank You” for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Iggy and Mr. Kirk. body:
The momentum is real. | | Friends,

**If last night’s elections taught us anything, it’s this: people are fed up and ready for change.** Across the country, voters are flipping the script, defying expectations, and proving that no seat is too red to turn blue.

And Nassau County? We’re next.

**[Seth Koslow is running for Nassau County Executive because business as usual just doesn’t cut it anymore. But let’s be clear: this race is going to be a nail-biter and we need you to show your support right now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105057349/537218047/-1414184198?contactdata=JA3gC8idtAy5NoLBDT20QhUAPEdmO3RAdpyQ1YRh90eAQHr6ouiU7it4jMfBM105RwRjJIJ5X2JN5apSuQ69T4VbPLLoHOSNE6YN+Y10Oqg=&am=25.00&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTYyMTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmU3ZmY0ZGUtZjcwZi1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M9QmfTm6cWKNCloK7xdQ6baNhty5BJqdBbYmpp9yVsQ=&emci=986d5bdd-f00f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=be7ff4de-f70f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=17551891)**

How do we know? Just look at history. Laura Curran lost to Bruce Blakeman by a measly 2,146 votes. That’s less than two votes per election district. Let that sink in. A handful of votes determined the future of Nassau County.

**The momentum is real. The path to victory is clear. Now we just need the firepower to get there.**

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Meet my new colleague
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Randy, I’m not going anywhere.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1574%2E791427%2Ej-ozRP)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-april25.zbfFse&refcode=em250402-1-150&t=2&akid=1574%2E791427%2Ej-ozRP)
Friend, meet my new colleague.
Last night, Randy Fine — the ‘MAGA Lawmaker’ in the headline above — won a special election in Florida to represent his district in Congress.
A few months ago he tweeted about potentially coming to Congress:
_“@RashidaTlaib and @IlhanMN might consider leaving before I get there. #BombsAway”_
**Well, Randy, I’m not going anywhere.**
Ever since I first decided to run for office I have dealt with the hate and harassment that comes with being a Muslim woman in public life.
From attacks by the right-wing news media, to random threats of violence, to Donald Trump himself, who once told me to “go back” to where I came from.
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-april25.zbfFse&refcode=em250402-1-150&t=3&akid=1574%2E791427%2Ej-ozRP)
So this latest attack is nothing new — but that doesn’t make it okay. This thinly-veiled threat from a soon-to-be MAGA congressman is meant to intimidate me, my colleagues, and Muslim-Americans who look like me. **But we’re not backing down.**
I won’t give an inch in the fight for justice for all because we have a big, wonderful movement of folks of all backgrounds on our side. I hope I can count on your support as we offer our alternative to the emboldened hate of the far-right.
**[Help me push back against Randy Fine and other MAGA-extremists in Congress by contributing to our movement today. I’m not going to just lay down let Trump and his party implement their far-right agenda — I’m going to stand up and fight in every way I can.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-april25.zbfFse&refcode=em250402-1-150&t=4&akid=1574%2E791427%2Ej-ozRP)

name: Zee
subject: There is blue sky yet behind the clouds
body:
| |
---
We are proud to have played such a crucial role in all of these important elections: this team registered thousands of voters, sent hand-written postcard notes directly to voters, made thousands of phone calls, and countered Elon Musk's millions with our own hard-hitting ads. | [View in browser](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUwNTk4NjcxMDgyMTk0MzE0LFwiclwiOjE1MDU5ODczMDgzMDA1NDY0MX0iLCJzIjoiNTZmNjA0NzE5M2ViNjBlYiJ9)
| |

| [ ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUwNTk4NjcxMDkwNTgyOTMwLFwiclwiOjE1MDU5ODczMDgzMDA1NDY0MX0iLCJzIjoiNjg3ZTA3MDY0YjU2NTAzZiJ9)
---
| Team,

It is ok to feel hope, even in times of darkness and worry.

It is **good** to feel hope, even when things may seem hopeless.

For 72 long days, we have had nothing to back up our hope for a brighter future — we put our heads down and got to work armed only with a sense of solidarity, knowing we were all in this together and could lean on and stand with one another in the fight.

After Tuesday's results across three special elections—two congressional races in Florida and a crucial State Supreme Court race in purple Wisconsin—we now have much more than that.

**We have proof that our message is resonating. **We have evidence that our momentum against Trump's creeping fascism is real and being felt everywhere in the nation, not just "blue" or liberal areas.

---
|
---
| [ ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUwNTk4NjcxMDk3OTIyOTY5LFwiclwiOjE1MDU5ODczMDgzMDA1NDY0MX0iLCJzIjoiNjNjMTI3NjM0YzM2Mjg0NiJ9)
---
| In Florida, Democrats made huge progress closing a wide gap in two red seats that Trump carried comfortably by over 30 points—and in each race, the Democratic candidates that we have supported and promoted since December shifted the race 15 points or more to the left.

---
|
---
| [ ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUwNTk4NjcxMTA0MjE0NDMzLFwiclwiOjE1MDU5ODczMDgzMDA1NDY0MX0iLCJzIjoiNGIxMTU0MDNlN2E4MWFhZCJ9)
---
| And in Wisconsin, in a race that the National Ground Game team along with other national grassroots advocates fought to win for months, the liberal candidate for the Wisconsin Supreme Court sailed to a 10-point victory. **

We are proud to have played such a crucial role in all of these important elections:** this team registered thousands of voters, sent hand-written postcard notes directly to voters, made thousands of phone calls, and countered Elon Musk's millions with our own hard-hitting ads.

**We even housed 20+ organizers in FL-06, a race that national Democrats weren’t willing to invest in or take a chance on - but we were.**

This is exactly what you can expect when we come together and use our power, our voice, and our collective strength to fight back as hard as we can—the road ahead is so much brighter.

And now every single MAGA rubber stamp in Congress is on notice: **_if you try to destroy Social Security and Medicare, defund Medicaid and harm single mothers and working people, and strip away our basic rights, you are not safe - we are coming for you.._**

---
|
---
[**Will you join us to celebrate the work we have done over the last four months and the incredible progress we have made? Now is the time to double down on the work that got us here and look ahead to _even greater victories in 2026_. We have MAGA worried, and now we need to press our advantage to keep the momentum on our side:**](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUwNTk4NjcxMTA4NDA4NzQyLFwiclwiOjE1MDU5ODczMDgzMDA1NDY0MX0iLCJzIjoiOTYyOGQzOGVhYWViNjkzNSJ9)

clean_body: | | We are proud to have played such a crucial role in all of these important elections: this team registered thousands of voters, sent hand-written postcard notes directly to voters, made thousands of phone calls, and countered Elon Musk's millions with our own hard-hitting ads. | | | | | Team, It is ok to feel hope, even in times of darkness and worry. It is good to feel hope, even when things may seem hopeless. For 72 long days, we have had nothing to back up our hope for a brighter future — we put our heads down and got to work armed only with a sense of solidarity, knowing we were all in this together and could lean on and stand with one another in the fight. After Tuesday's results across three special elections—two congressional races in Florida and a crucial State Supreme Court race in purple Wisconsin—we now have much more than that. We have proof that our message is resonating. We have evidence that our momentum against Trump's creeping fascism is real and being felt everywhere in the nation, not just "blue" or liberal areas. | | | In Florida, Democrats made huge progress closing a wide gap in two red seats that Trump carried comfortably by over 30 points—and in each race, the Democratic candidates that we have supported and promoted since December shifted the race 15 points or more to the left. | | | And in Wisconsin, in a race that the National Ground Game team along with other national grassroots advocates fought to win for months, the liberal candidate for the Wisconsin Supreme Court sailed to a 10-point victory. We are proud to have played such a crucial role in all of these important elections: this team registered thousands of voters, sent hand-written postcard notes directly to voters, made thousands of phone calls, and countered Elon Musk's millions with our own hard-hitting ads. We even housed 20+ organizers in FL-06, a race that national Democrats weren’t willing to invest in or take a chance on - but we were. This is exactly what you can expect when we come together and use our power, our voice, and our collective strength to fight back as hard as we can—the road ahead is so much brighter. And now every single MAGA rubber stamp in Congress is on notice: if you try to destroy Social Security and Medicare, defund Medicaid and harm single mothers and working people, and strip away our basic rights, you are not safe - we are coming for you.. | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | This work will not be done without you. Thank you for all that you do! Thank you, Peter.

**With your help, we met our first FEC fundraising goal of the year and are headed into 2025 with great momentum.**

I’m deeply humbled by the continued support we’ve seen after our hard-fought win in November, but this is only the beginning.

There's a lot happening in Washington, but I’m staying focused on the issues that matter – protecting Social Security and Medicare, expanding federal wildfire mitigation programs, defending reproductive rights and more.

Despite the challenges posed by this administration, I won’t stop demanding accountability. Oversight, transparency, and protecting the public interest remain non-negotiables for me – no matter how steep the uphill climb.

**One thing is clear: we must keep this seat in Democratic control to have any chance at reclaiming the House majority and keeping this administration in check.**

It might seem early to start thinking about the next election, but the attacks are already coming. And if we want to stay ahead, we have to stay prepared.

If you already gave toward our first public filing deadline – thank you. **[If you haven’t had a chance yet, chipping in $3 or any amount now helps us keep up the pace and defend this frontline seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105057597/537218866/1606932672?refcode=em-4.2.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDM1NjlkYS1mODBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FdARikEb3N-tq4WOmt57613GnLwIS7HWQMLDkKYOi30=)**

Thank you,

George

Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: Andy Beshear
subject: Susan's victory proves the power is with the American people.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
Let's keep up this momentum, Peter.

Peter —

I want to congratulate Susan Crawford on an incredible victory in Wisconsin.

**Yesterday, she defeated conservative extremist Brad Schimel to become the next State Supreme Court Justice in Wisconsin.**

This is a huge victory for our democracy and for common sense leadership. As Supreme Court Justice, Susan will have a direct impact on critical issues like abortion access, worker protections, and even redistricting for new congressional lines. I know she will tackle each of these issues with the people of Wisconsin in mind.

**This was not an easy win.** President Trump waded into this race in support of Brad Schimel. And Elon Musk poured in $20 million in a cynical attempt to buy this seat. In fact, this was the most expensive judicial race in American history.

When we saw reports of Musk’s spending, my team at In This Together PAC invested in a six-figure direct mail campaign to reach targeted voters in the spillover markets of Duluth, Marquette, Minneapolis, and Wausau-Rhinelander—who were otherwise seeing far more communications from conservative groups than groups aligned with Crawford.

Susan's victory is a great example of what can happen when we come together to support candidates who will represent the interests of their people and do the right thing, regardless of politics. In neck-and-neck races like Susan's, every little bit helps, and your support of our work helped shape the outcome of this race.

When we reject the anger politics that have come to dominate our country, we can win races up and down the ballot. And we're just getting started, Peter! It's time to keep up our momentum, and I hope I can continue to count on your help.

clean_body: Let's keep up this momentum, Peter. Peter — I want to congratulate Susan Crawford on an incredible victory in Wisconsin. Yesterday, she defeated conservative extremist Brad Schimel to become the next State Supreme Court Justice in Wisconsin. This is a huge victory for our democracy and for common sense leadership. As Supreme Court Justice, Susan will have a direct impact on critical issues like abortion access, worker protections, and even redistricting for new congressional lines. I know she will tackle each of these issues with the people of Wisconsin in mind. This was not an easy win. President Trump waded into this race in support of Brad Schimel. And Elon Musk poured in $20 million in a cynical attempt to buy this seat. In fact, this was the most expensive judicial race in American history. When we saw reports of Musk’s spending, my team at In This Together PAC invested in a six-figure direct mail campaign to reach targeted voters in the spillover markets of Duluth, Marquette, Minneapolis, and Wausau-Rhinelander—who were otherwise seeing far more communications from conservative groups than groups aligned with Crawford. Susan's victory is a great example of what can happen when we come together to support candidates who will represent the interests of their people and do the right thing, regardless of politics. In neck-and-neck races like Susan's, every little bit helps, and your support of our work helped shape the outcome of this race. When we reject the anger politics that have come to dominate our country, we can win races up and down the ballot. And we're just getting started, Peter! It's time to keep up our momentum, and I hope I can continue to count on your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for your time, Andy Beshear In This Together PAC | Andy and In This Together PAC are working to support leaders who will lead with compassion and decency, reject anger politics, and always do what's right. Will you donate today to support In This Together's mission? = Paid for by In This Together PAC. InThisTogetherPAC.com. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Jane Fonda  (via Democrats.com)
subject: Join me, Dolores Huerta, Whoopi Goldberg, Tony Goldwyn and more!
body:
Join Me April 9 for Boomer vs. Zoomer: Celebrity Trivia Night! | | |
---
Hi Friend, **Jane Fonda here**. In dark times like these, **building community** is more important than ever. We need a united front to resist the billionaires and extremists threatening our future. But that doesn’t mean we can’t have some fun along the way. **** [**That’s why I am so excited to invite you to join JanePAC and MoveOn’s special Boomer vs. Zoomer Celebrity Trivia Night event on April 9.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt8Su8Wm7hjJSQ5tbhr1lNTRrFS_zO-paZPAqHvw-3RqSpTdv0reI0FAKXVfP1lWnwKZgvKctFMEwgbZc3C99nr4nxDDRswCA6hvkxPwXdqIIb0qyi65-nQqBmICzt13R49XNsXrQ1MvXu_C5j8fCnroTQ-pv9S93cJ8_p1Ay0NpBRllviNo8CBll0RToSOu1v5vUMC0sF-gMEpjQkoBumypuRePTb-BpF7v2iY3mqQCVV3pB_jxAj1wUQQ6KKtvyELWaXOpcS9aQedjEg-FJUABWy-ra9xTDT-J4N8OL9qDNv6X-t_1AW95excOrJx0F-PObE0MdAHqS6NdfZh8d9QImpZJP00V6lZQclndlNNBkVQmME3yx0tDgwZCf5vGPs1Y0mO1djI5OrOjVHAStYc03ea7bq8Qx5TeLCUVdNS0PNPjbtZR39yk3osbnAdKFQ/4fb/rccEkVkETHSgs4G7qryUeQ/h0/h001.7exJSLwrHoYoWJpW6UfvRSG3ACAdL3qJ_s-lUQWNNCQ) [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt8Su8Wm7hjJSQ5tbhr1lNTRrFS_zO-paZPAqHvw-3RqSpTdv0reI0FAKXVfP1lWnwKZgvKctFMEwgbZc3C99nrdjFhd-65ScfGyCgJumKarvVw7o9j3jplzdmxc697EJg60zvmWebjAdLm-QirWwPZDLFYWphSOeSRK_yHvHSbk0DM26ETps_C6tgzVQa4ThgWm09Kj64w2U7Udk9qRQGmmlHh2WkGMr_XorsuVupImVCyD6kLOeI_DmN9vEI0TyispLcGaz0qNlEg94lcBK7zs0MGo1pvQYN27YU4Kghja3NpATA-s7hhkrSAOn3A58FYgQ5fL3SqXx9FWJXUprPIFaMyqdNRWkjyHIYinwFVv9JeHASdkHlff9AlVvC8zU58Q7N4SdQVgvwlqmICyY5bf7_I7MzBZ4TgNTQHpRBc9sLsd6iEvsoSuBcjkCByWqs/4fb/rccEkVkETHSgs4G7qryUeQ/h1/h001.5myC9LHvGUWaYhhjoKBQliJLQzwP-DFAFIgW1RD6y5U)
**When I took the stage at the SAG Awards earlier this year, I spoke from the heart** about issues that matter deeply to me—the legacy of activism and protest in Hollywood, the importance of empathy, and the dire need for all of us to give a damn in this moment. If we’re serious about building a firewall of resistance against this administration—and I’m dead serious—**we need to come together like never before**. That means putting pressure on our elected officials to do the right thing, and if they won’t, **replacing them with leaders who will**. That takes a big tent. We need to bridge the divides that may separate us—including generational ones. **[I’m 87 years old, and I’m committed to doing everything I can. But for this movement to last, we must empower the next generation of leaders and activists to carry the torch forward.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt8Su8Wm7hjJSQ5tbhr1lNTRrFS_zO-paZPAqHvw-3RqSpTdv0reI0FAKXVfP1lWnwKZgvKctFMEwgbZc3C99nr_vHtTYhM3CtRnDXEKxoNfnHq1aveIQnQPmFmDkjWj4gP63gGqXhxjprUwz_vBx2WtDs1mWLoPYwmLeeiiPPUNsnZV8jW2Tp2fdLzMf8ywezpbcUnSrdTdvUFXrovydFRp3Nx_ZxZGIjwZjq-RDSIXFt7t_YPyTHfVOvJ_iphE1bOOL3yckfVFmYi7r7m7uhkw1mUC_BSQn9K_yOvi6wi78273Ad_8a42a_C9bEunHHteoaCBiYvWf8QS8H0_QuE13cli8e1jMMnLzmYK9JkTLKseupMfJvCQLwEeHSR6qtGspcN10kX05bghwfOVjEywaHOkyqBGQln8LY4_jUQN0faT85hQ17emxOemXb59NrI/4fb/rccEkVkETHSgs4G7qryUeQ/h2/h001.ZrwOczCqmR-Yc1pyLEZYjosMnCLYb5_y8KyYXDjeJ6o)** That’s why I hope you’ll join us on April 9 for MoveOn & JanePAC’s Boomer vs. Zoomer: Celebrity Trivia Night! I’ll be teaming up with some seasoned show business and advocacy veterans, including **Dolores Huerta, Whoopi Goldberg, and Tony Goldwyn** in a friendly competition against rising stars like **Beanie Feldstein and Quannah ChasingHorse** in a battle of the brains. In between rounds of trivia, we’ll discuss the importance of multigenerational organizing and **our fight to elect a new wave of leaders who will stand up for a livable future**. **[RSVP here to join us on April 9 at 8:30 p.m. ET/5:30 PT.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt8Su8Wm7hjJSQ5tbhr1lNTRrFS_zO-paZPAqHvw-3RqSpTdv0reI0FAKXVfP1lWnwKZgvKctFMEwgbZc3C99nrFtBWZsFZTVet3HgHqYrk7KoQMOlO3iQFmBh9U6RjEdD66Zfhm6ZaoYe9r2i9gWkZod7JXdTa1fmBgJr02GGfh7nBJonheqXRXzA6FmMMYiUUZ2JEXtudCZa25pGIbrCXRvL8-W8bp0zj3eDF4nUWejRjGWmX4_NW9z-2suBcUmfl06QHdho_2g_4GAisKOPS3pd6CjnfOVZxBjqV5_DJtARMjndYVBTsu68l2jsI-Ygi4bdigiqDhHTunfVRfO2yY1W08t-kmeC1tt_24HRquLGusxKUd9KdUuHg3BaJKfrVw0hd_Fmb5PSGuzOLwnhWJ0l6qcMQz-jdc_KAaPXmnXv9iHPVx1DOpa7P4hdxwNg/4fb/rccEkVkETHSgs4G7qryUeQ/h3/h001.YwFDsrmEzGpK21GGB-IYEKfa3kwOXS1vdcLaJ52VV1A)** **All ticket proceeds directly support Jane Fonda Climate PAC and MoveOn’s work to elect leaders at every level of government who will stand up to MAGA extremism and fight for a livable future for all of us..** [**I hope to see you there!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt8Su8Wm7hjJSQ5tbhr1lNTRrFS_zO-paZPAqHvw-3RqSpTdv0reI0FAKXVfP1lWnwKZgvKctFMEwgbZc3C99nrLvf_9_vBxY3sAgxy8ZEXtJgwch6991wfhPAJmmW65uYaPg08pJqY-ODTq27jCRRRMTkeE2BPe4snF7bJDeG7A_5pwtY_u4fylZ1fg8sCItF6JZEb3AA1gRiSL7tNnTQQq-ntcNrKVq8fTWQKf5mtIEQCT5iziJ_H0QAoMKqSZ2evn5I0sSSCfJbl1RbVAP0EmmZf5xN0MwVGe8-9aJJAo5nRUt577nQ0pV9TrH0xORw02sF6G_e7Yjl5zQ0Rmuq2-lELmQLVUqACixRn706MZg1cL0HYwBmXTlSeUnBsmMo_BdcseHApnkAfFRRzEjeP3yb_q1IlG1mtI69TyIMzILBg-uxZsFW3gJoPUZD8uaw/4fb/rccEkVkETHSgs4G7qryUeQ/h4/h001.uSTEIwNUkfF-V_3iWfRxDdyI5yeJAFeQi3jWER0mbBs) –Jane Fonda

| | Sent via [ActionNetwork.org](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.vJH41MPG4bgUd6h6NGKFpj-Lrvy5aFcFyt94Rovp4kU/4fb/rccEkVkETHSgs4G7qryUeQ/h5/h001.aaiPJDdGeDqCw2yTkKmefXsiBlt20RA1E-SUson6OWE). The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!| | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7aa1c8de7a884b93ae2ee923c93e03d2&_e=ZyY-nR0mA2HKdO-3sHQHU3I8l1Hj1Iite6MP3iD6FHR29ZmASMsNxPlkmT4pp7kcmf9yRx3AhJ_eeZLYpsTd7-4juBYko2FEpACuabgUqExf8KZajw4S2o0mxRTu-iJyifFW5SWi7rCaP0mSUuheph5mEEmovcTNhMtMc-fScDzJ7sXIGCvZtTJOSoJ63iEGRevRsrGjEqfoOZVOjbNLNPUKsnPYebIcioSLr_2BIP3-ig1fgSFvl-KuKAByZyAxG5g4hiM-dI22_DNuFDaTj3bu9ZUbeLFGqn-vGE-_Gnk5T-GKV5L4f_27FGLhbYgavoIbVNrg-6mLLNbClSaD4EOffHj5WAGIMw7jULmeWYi_PBVqKqdjj-vc65nhF3EGPWO7RTjFsPCwq7EWBGdRu-IWQxCkJ24RLqhAj8elj9DPm0M1IrQVXakWRnKmV-v_)

My situation is in your hands, Peter. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I was working hard in our capital. **Seriously** _**, a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!**_
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Peter. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage._If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short. _ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**

I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so please read this message to the end. My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising BIG TIME while I was working hard in our capital. Seriously , a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response! Now Spanberger has an ENORMOUS fundraising advantage, Peter. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage.If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! | | Without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up.

---
_[_Click here to unsubscribe._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105058226/537220598/-1759185368?source=header_rfe&refcode=20250402_em_fr_rr1_hmp_main&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGU0ODY0Yy1mYjBmLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pqrZk5Nr9Adf6FbsKNXhUrnsSsrGDYEbJiHi_RJ5F3o=&emci=af088bac-eb0f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=48e4864c-fb0f-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=16481489)_ | | Family, it’s Cory. Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend. clean_body: This is a moment where we must all speak up. | | Family, it’s Cory. Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend. = | | = = = = = With love and gratitude, Cory Cory Booker is only asking for donations to House Majority PAC’s contribution account, in amounts up to $5,000 from individuals, political committees, and other permissible sources under the Federal Election Campaign Act. name: AOC
subject: I want to live in an America that...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Every single House Republican voted to cut Medicaid in this country.
These budgets are not just fights about numbers.
**They are fights over our values as a country**.
Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security were promises that we _as a people_ have made to each other about the kind of society we want to live in.
I don’t know about you, but I want to live in an America that guarantees healthcare to every person.
I want to live in an America that has a living wage for every person.
I want to live in an America where you have free speech to express yourself without getting put on a list or deported.
These promises that we made, they are not promises from politicians to the people, or charity from billionaires to everyday Americans — **they are promises we have made to each other**.
Neighbor to neighbor. Friend to friend. Teacher to student.
That we want to live in a society that is not depraved, not every person for themselves, but **all of us standing together**.
To me, the strength of our country is not only measured by the height of our best days.
The strength of our nation is in who is there for you, and what happens, on your worst day.
Our movement for real progress will have to push harder than ever these next four years if we are to prevent the country from becoming a slush fund for Donald Trump and Elon Musk.
[Help us continue the fight by making a grassroots donation today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250402.B1wgpX&refcode=em20250402-8516-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8516%2E2526796%2EX10z8Q)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250402.B1wgpX&refcode=em20250402-8516-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8516%2E2526796%2EX10z8Q)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250402?refcode=em20250402-8516-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=8516_2526796_X10z8Q&akid=8516%2E2526796%2EX10z8Q)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250402-8516-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=8516%2E2526796%2EX10z8Q)**

name: John Fetterman
subject: they're talking about gutting Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
[ https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50678?t=1001&akid=10027%2E434096%2E3hfmdx ]John Fetterman

Derek, it's John. I’m reaching out because I need to hear from you.

The GOP is out here talking about gutting Social Security to fund tax cuts for the wealthiest dudes in America – so there's a lot at stake.

It’ll only take a minute to share your thoughts, so will you please take my Social Security survey now? 🙏

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50958?t=1002&akid=10027%2E434096%2E3hfmdx

Hardworking people in Pennsylvania and across this country have paid into Social Security their entire lives.

They've earned this benefit, so it's only right they see those checks come through after they retire – it's their money!

The current administration is already throwing things into chaos by closing Social Security Administration offices, cutting staff, and making it harder for seniors to get help over the phone.

So while I will ALWAYS fight to protect Social Security, I need to know yinz are with me – click here to take the survey now.

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50958?t=1003&akid=10027%2E434096%2E3hfmdx

Thanks for your response,

John ❤️

--------

name: Progressive Virginians for Alex Bastani
subject: 15,004 Reasons to Fight, Now Let’s Win This Thing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Progressive Virginians for Alex BastaniP
body:
That means we’re on the ballot. But more importantly, it means the people’s movement just kicked the door open in Richmond.

| | | | | [](https://progressivevirginiansforalexbastani.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5f516fc098ca6ecf04d23d982&id=19ee6c2ca1&e=8587d34f43)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | **Friend,**
Yesterday, we marched into the State Board of Elections and dropped off **15,004 petition signatures** , _5,000 more than required_. That means we’re on the ballot. But more importantly, it means **the people’s movement just kicked the door open in Richmond.**
This didn’t come from corporate boardrooms or lobbyist lunches. This came from **union halls, college campuses, front porches, and barbershops.** From folks who believe that healthcare is a human right. That a job should lift you out of poverty. That workers deserve power, not just promises.
Let me be clear: this campaign isn’t about titles. It’s about turning the office of Lieutenant Governor into a **damn bullhorn for working people.**
I’ll use this office to demand:
✔️ **Universal healthcare**
✔️ **A $20 minimum wage**
✔️ **Student debt relief**
✔️ **The end of Right to Work once and for all**
**We are the ONLY progressive campaign in this race.**
We don’t take corporate PAC money. We don’t pull punches. And we never back down.
But this isn’t going to be easy, and easy ain’t ever changed a thing.
If you believe Virginia deserves a fighter who doesn’t flinch, who speaks truth to power, and who uses every ounce of that office to lift up the forgotten and the working class, **now is the time.**
[ 🔥 **Donate now and help fuel the grassroots uprising Virginia’s been waiting for.** 🔥
Contribute Today](https://progressivevirginiansforalexbastani.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5f516fc098ca6ecf04d23d982&id=9948864a85&e=8587d34f43)
Solidarity forever,
**Alex Bastani**
Candidate for Lieutenant Governor

name: Cory Booker
subject: My remarks on the Senate floor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| This is a moment where we must all speak up.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-booker25.gMTtR1&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_NO_20250402_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=3&akid=8436%2E5257348%2E3WNBn4)
Derek, it’s Cory.
Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.
I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up.
What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard.
I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment.
It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered.
It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together.
[**If you’re willing and able, support our movement for justice, opportunity, and freedom by splitting a donation between me and Adam Schiff today.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-booker25.gMTtR1&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_NO_20250402_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8436%2E5257348%2E3WNBn4)

clean_body: This is a moment where we must all speak up. | Family, it’s Cory. Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Cory Booker and Fight Like Hell PAC will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = With love and gratitude, Cory Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: CPM Send Seg: Open2In60 or Click1In90 or Clicker split 1
body:
Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...
[Unsubscribe](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1lmu64g99lmj9y8psi0rrn19botude9ds33tbkckpg2swkdup8zxaop77j33yajvoplmrroh9tuhi7cfy5z&__stmp=su3xle&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
&n;
| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children. You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su3xle&__onlt=h)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses. And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su3xle&__onlt=h)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**. If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own. And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries. It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. >> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces. And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages. It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging. But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su3xle&__onlt=h) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD. This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su3xle&__onlt=h)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su3xle&__onlt=h)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth. Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su3xle&__onlt=h)
---
| | [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su3xle&__onlt=h)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su3xle&__onlt=h)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su3xle&__onlt=h) [**DONATE**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su3xle&__onlt=h) [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=su3xle&__onlt=h)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302 Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.

subject: Read my latest on Substack: The Gift of Being Misunderstood
body:
| | | [](http://email.letusworship.co/c/eJyEkktzqkoURn9NO9Nq9u4HDBiYcNEUeqMxD70Tql8C2ggKkcRffysndTI4kzNea032_mysHEeDIxcHkqEAGXI2KmNtXUi5DI1WjnKtlBJM873UlopAaDuqYqDAKaMANAgDmGCIQqA0RqlISysJo971793QXLqyaiemGfm47PuW4JRASiD11enYTf6QCKTvBFLjK3MkmOY9wcRaGwVaKKuFYUiNklahsNpJI_ZUCQIirwkmwvJQIqJWzDJAGUboGAcTaMkddfsvzxFMprsyotXzuCwzfXcrudo9ZrOruAWHfw-QLYbt7CjX5dY-zHaffkPVZjs9qo99iRYe-WBhsxzUKu8AX-2N5ll-uNKaF_KpSx6W20rySIt7lzYUm_Ylm5prmD3d3lbdzAfTj0Po1lXe5MvT9VnCanXeFnhbrz5355cV_pMah_uP8u0cbbKXYrwQd8f78-6i0rZyJz_XsyMdMxiQb3kdLPE1EovTsJjPkywy_1U-8d2bvEwPVgynJMmW85x9jueXveO-a3br3hXXWxaaUe16ZVWvYiLvCEDtuk4V7sESgF_fgb9fEgjcE4De1a1X_U8byAAEY_hN20tzcKb_DUHIiH0To-pWVcXpp0MaipABkcnoEtt2qLyvOvG1oqJWlZ-Yph5dY_g_AAD__5Qz0LA)
---
|
---
| | Dear Peter,
---
A wise man once told me, “If you live by the praises of men, you’ll die by their criticism.” Here are a few of many thousands of criticisms that have come my way over the last several years. Yes, these are all real and seemingly ALL of them DEMANDED my immediate response to validate my actions, calling and ministry. “You’re a Christian Nationalist. You serve the empire of America and not the Kingdom.” “If you truly loved God’s heart for America, you would stop spending so much time, resources and energy in other countries instead of your own.” clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Peter, A wise man once told me, “If you live by the praises of men, you’ll die by their criticism.” Here are a few of many thousands of criticisms that have come my way over the last several years. Yes, these are all real and seemingly ALL of them DEMANDED my immediate response to validate my actions, calling and ministry. “You’re a Christian Nationalist.
