name: Attorney General Kris Mayes
subject: Why I serve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kris Mayes for Arizona
body:
Learn more about who I am

[|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/drnzy70nlh7w3W4aluYD3g~~/AAUS1hA~/ytZCUjKBOcPYjYI2-PJWtEIneQOyksmzOK16jm7Ua-yZIGZTO6DxfD8yFK9_npr9dkFiZCSmEhEijn_Cy-pL_4fgmhd8rHjLHPAPs3_ak2M~)
| | Peter,
It’s Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes. I’m willing to bet you may not know who I am, so I’d like to introduce myself.

First off, I’m a mom. In fact, I’m the first ever mom in the Arizona Attorney General’s office. I really cherish that fact.

[](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/U71vYmNXkRTGemq6EoYKaQ~~/AAUS1hA~/n_w8tmtsDZpWVtkoBkaNxrY5chkUQPpD72PgJRDr-jXhPHDyAMoRrL9s0zLLcFlHY2-mk90MebZysBpFFFZecplT8Um2Ga5xqgh_TFl649WRcHDaLsZKg902QKR6E_U1iZpV8ZlX3L3N5DqDbWhaCruLwxY5iNfAeADUgVEZaHBKFug7Tx2PP6olUzPf4TOEhMdL-PJEVknBRnE4Xth1L-nasb6u9E9HA_NtdWoRQccLZ3J9bKKnesBmy0vdY3XYjZnH2L_rvauUZaN_3k2JP4z0pjMybLb8IusFYkUsJ4E~)
Second, I really enjoy public service. I’ve always thought the people needed elected officials who **worked for them** , not corporations or special interests. I lived by that motto when I served on the Arizona Corporation Commission, and I live by it now as Arizona’s Attorney General.

Lastly, because I’m sure you don’t have time to hear my whole life story, I want to tell you why I’m emailing you. Being an advocate for the people as Arizona Attorney General means I often stand in the breach when folks take advantage of Arizonans.

When a cable company illegally charged customers, I fought back and got refunds. When long term care homes were found to be mistreating elderly, I sued and achieved changes. When I found out landlords were colluding to increase rent, I sued to bring rents down.

And I don’t stop at corporations. I’ve sued Trump and Elon Musk as they try to break our government and help only their wealthy friends. I sue them and I win.

Because I fight for you, I’ve been attacked relentlessly. Extremists have filed lawsuits to overturn my election, and GOP leaders in the AZ Legislature even tried to impeach me. And I’m certain Elon is going to spend in my re-election to defeat me.

[**So that’s who I am and what I do. If you want more people like me in public service, I hope you’ll consider supporting my re-election.**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/3nDKi4-ePu-1ym2u6o1Ssg~~/AAUS1hA~/n_w8tmtsDZpWVtkoBkaNxrY5chkUQPpD72PgJRDr-jXhPHDyAMoRrL9s0zLLcFlHY2-mk90MebZysBpFFFZecplT8Um2Ga5xqgh_TFl649WRcHDaLsZKg902QKR6E_U1iZpV8ZlX3L3N5DqDbWhaCruLwxY5iNfAeADUgVEZaHBKFug7Tx2PP6olUzPf4TOEhMdL-PJEVknBRnE4Xth1LxIk0eIEI4vR0VNkUjktVclh2KDxdb0SU0AA9dQ0Rbol8DfHhgCXLwd2_fekxZFRS52HWclIjdOrv5Ysl8wwnyA~) | | [Donate 10 now >>](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/EFpEbcBjHTXdi0JJ9e457w~~/AAUS1hA~/tp8FtVemULD6CKaBKOVE-fQVW0lXh3e5w03d-L4gFDY2bzhxpXxfXw-_1pcnIICzagfARfxF2AaJYnPGzc80pwFwyvCJVJeZgw37BtGpMu0gYzkV4ZYNBEgtN8ApEfgzltOfUSEfF2hQSxUIll4OcjYee_iUN_hQxkLswE1QvALmBTN8_cpjvGPwfe_1pSX1d59Jkf9XOlSSBSu_zuAySYzqbpIgs7uwHSSMeKv4RRzYQTYlumV4jw8Ez4yQYC4cwKoas-bJfu24yWsUTUWH4Gh9fz66JenOqGm5yEQzQ87oXyEeWeEU1n1tTmBQ5r-2)

name: Gregory Wrightstone, CO2 Coalition
subject: Your Kids Deserve Real Science, Not Propaganda
body:
Please read the following message.
* * *

| | | | | [](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuegueIteknop5IaITm90md84d&s=PDHIPKHLGAIJEMNL)
---
Fellow American, Politicians and the media demand that we "trust the science"... _...yet they 've replaced science with their own propaganda, while 48 states have stopped teaching the actual scientific method you and I learned!_
---
[](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuegueIteknop5IbITm90md84d&s=PDHIPKHLGAIJEMNL)
---
**[**Make your gift of ANY amount and receive children's science story books for your children or grandchildren as my thanks!**](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuegueIteknop5IcITm90md84d&s=PDHIPKHLGAIJEMNL)**
---
**Fellow American, the CO 2 Coalition is leading the charge to restore real science education in K-12 schools, and I hope you'll join us in this important fight.** You see, the _actual_ scientific experts at the CO2 Coalition, who include more than 180 scientists and researchers, have started to produce high-quality children's science story books. These books teach real science, not climate fiction, AND prepare kids to stand strong against anti-science "climate" indoctrination in their schools and through pop culture. **[And when you make a gift of any amount to support the CO 2 Coalition's work today, I'll rush you this set of three educational science story books -- the perfect resource for your children or grandchildren!](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuegueIteknop5IdITm90md84d&s=PDHIPKHLGAIJEMNL)**
---
**[Make your gift and receive your books](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuegueIteknop5IeITm90md84d&s=PDHIPKHLGAIJEMNL)**
---
Fellow American, with more than 180 distinguished scientists in our membership and renowned leaders like 2022 Nobel Laureate in Physics Dr. John Clauser on our Board of Directors, the CO2 Coalition is leading the charge to restore scientific truth in K-12 classrooms and our country. The education establishment, the mainstream media, and the Green Lobby hate what the CO2 Coalition is doing -- because they are TERRIFIED when kids learn real science, rather than propaganda. **Our opposition understands that the CO 2 Coalition stands alone as America's premier scientific organization fighting back against climate alarmism -- which is why they've tried to attack, block, or undermine our educational efforts.** But the CO2 Coalition has continued to win this battle by working directly with parents, grandparents, and concerned Americans like YOU to get our exciting, interesting educational materials into the hands of K-12 students across the country. **[Will you make your gift of any amount to support our work today, so I can send you the CO 2 Coalition's powerful children's science story books to share with your children or grandchildren?](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuegueIteknop5IfITm90md84d&s=PDHIPKHLGAIJEMNL)**
---
**[Make your gift and receive your books](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuegueIteknop5IgITm90md84d&s=PDHIPKHLGAIJEMNL)**
---
I would bet you've never seen children's books like these before, Fellow American, and that's why I'm confident your family will enjoy them. The hard-working, fact-focused team at the CO2 Coalition has carefully developed, written and illustrated each story to illuminate fundamental scientific concepts in an engaging, age-appropriate way. From "Once Upon a Time" -- which reveals the astonishing truth about CO2 as a miracle molecule -- to "The Mystery of the Night Raiders" where kids learn to apply the scientific method, these engaging and beautifully-illustrated books teach true science, not alarmism and fearmongering. Plus, each book can be paired with lesson plans developed by Dr. Sharon Camp, Ph.D., complete with hands-on experiments kids can do at home. **[**Make a gift of any amount today, and I'll send you these one-of-a-kind books from our collection of children's educational science materials as my personal thank you for standing with us against climate alarmism.**](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuegueIteknop5IhITm90md84d&s=PDHIPKHLGAIJEMNL)**
---
Thank you, Fellow American, for standing with me in this crucial fight for our children's minds and our nation's future. Gregory Wrightstone
Executive Director
CO2 Coalition
---
**[Make your gift and receive your books**](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuegueIteknop5IiITm90md84d&s=PDHIPKHLGAIJEMNL)
---

---

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

name: Oklahoman Superintendent Ryan Walters
subject: Three commitments to Oklahoman education:
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Ryan Walters for State Superintendent 2022
body:
Parents, Values and Accountability | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=08ec690d795a4b14a83eb6a14377ceb7&_e=hjI-UUzxYKbDhY8Lhxm0wA7AYq8sYg12aFY5hZVsuPBZ9yX8tzJvET9QfoyuyANNkiMtgw0ih5UQlCURHlI8jQVJTld1YO3-iuEHSR1b_rXMNUcLLl6dH-vDSUBaLkmt1NZROMTpS_oWurTstd9SboC75MbO3fbVVqgOg7OlXpYVqABjg5JMG1Gg8Mh74Wpr3NKGWOHDTkJo1gCoHaF4Z1blRbQvimT1JR9FRDVsEWU_A5o3V8BjakZDv6--Rok-RaiAP65MEgekABCub3vwKnSk6tyB0eEkCZKrWFSiiRoXd84ouSiMZoHSIN-s2Rw5JQbpuEwWgie7Z-u4SxKfya-CECXQixl-9rQAyGRBPSA7zecxTaCe88QI6nwbc9Zm7UOwDnwSnB_zqTCjHKUZ37VSbIFkjvKfnQrg3sNehTA%3D)
Peter,

_Three things_ I have and will continue to fight for in order to ensure that children remain on the path to a successful future:

**1\. Parent Empowerment**
Oklahoman families should have a say in their children’s education – not the bureaucrats who want to eliminate school choice, while forcing their deranged agenda on American children.

**2\. Restoring Oklahoma and American Values in Schools**
Classrooms should foster patriotism and go back to the basics – with respect for our nation, moving away from the Radical ideas and Anti-American curriculum.

**3\. Reining in Teacher Unions**
Teachers should be compensated for their hard work and be rewarded for exemplary performance, with bonuses to reflect this. This will curb unions that put everything first except for students.

I will continue to do everything in my power to ensure the success of Oklahoma's schools, while fostering better education for those living in our great state - [**_but I can't continue to do it without your support, Peter._**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=08ec690d795a4b14a83eb6a14377ceb7&_e=hjI-UUzxYKbDhY8Lhxm0wA7AYq8sYg12aFY5hZVsuPBZ9yX8tzJvET9QfoyuyANNkiMtgw0ih5UQlCURHlI8jQVJTld1YO3-iuEHSR1b_rXMNUcLLl6dH-vDSUBaLkmt1NZROMTpS_oWurTstd9SboC75MbO3fbVVqgOg7OlXpYVqABjg5JMG1Gg8Mh74Wpr3NKGWOHDTkJo1gCoHaF4Z1blRbQvimT1JR9FRDVsEWU_A5o3V8BjakZDv6--Rok-RaiAP65MEgekABCub3vwKkBNDBX2lk8-Vdzl_swFtYXNOQN7pdfL2hsiFVk-SAT6fCZRkASZ71pP-aQniSr79rnz3T5SOlJANa19NdQsc7nMt-nKanBQOLr2ETyHo2ojZKTj_f7EEhMfkM95_pDQuFgrVryaBeisIu_1pvP1LWw%3D)

Peter,

I just got off the phone with my campaign team, and I couldn’t be prouder— _we reached our critical fundraising goal for March!_

This is a huge milestone, and it’s because of the dedication, passion, and hard work of this grassroots team.

The attacks are ramping up, and the threats to our democracy are only getting worse. Elon Musk is floating the idea that Social Security should be on the chopping block. Donald Trump is pushing for judges to be impeached if they don’t rule in his favor. And Speaker Mike Johnson? He’s letting the most extreme voices in his party walk all over him instead of standing up for what’s right. He’s even dismissing a huge, reckless security breach by the top military and intelligence leaders in our country as just a mistake. Our fighter pilots could have been shot down because of that “mistake.”

Democrats are the only ones working to hold these leaders accountable, and we cannot let up—not now, not ever. clean_body: Let’s be real—this first quarter with a GOP trifecta has been brutal. Peter, I just got off the phone with my campaign team, and I couldn’t be prouder— we reached our critical fundraising goal for March! This is a huge milestone, and it’s because of the dedication, passion, and hard work of this grassroots team. Let me tell you, the GOP is going to take notice. This report we’re about to file will send a clear message:WA-08 is a top priority, and we’re not backing down. But let’s be real—this first quarter with a GOP trifecta has been brutal. The attacks are ramping up, and the threats to our democracy are only getting worse. Elon Musk is floating the idea that Social Security should be on the chopping block. Donald Trump is pushing for judges to be impeached if they don’t rule in his favor. And Speaker Mike Johnson? He’s letting the most extreme voices in his party walk all over him instead of standing up for what’s right. He’s even dismissing a huge, reckless security breach by the top military and intelligence leaders in our country as just a mistake. name: Eric Sorensen
subject: A powerful reminder of our strength
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105061653/537231734/-1812448514?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGMzNDVmYy0wMzEwLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jvlvFENWFsW0sSAoXCXLYFpxDnzidVqWYXo2cqw-748=)
Peter, I don’t know about you, but I am FIRED UP from what just happened in Wisconsin. What a great week for the power of people over the people in power. I never remembered voting for the richest person in the world to run our government, and I certainly didn’t remember our state’s northern neighbors asking him to put his thumb on the scale of their judicial elections, pulling out novelty checks and trying to bribe everyday people for his long-term personal gain. But last night, voters went to the polls and they resoundingly voted against Trump and Musk and for their rights and a better future for their state. Turns out, screwing over our small businesses, scientists, farmers and veterans is not a good way to make America great. This is proof that we’re tired of extremists flooding our state and local governments with dangerous legislation, while ignoring the basic needs of our communities. We need fewer extremists with a megaphone and more common-sense leaders who want to look after their neighbors, protect their community, and respect the rights of everyone. And this overwhelming enthusiasm we’re feeling is a powerful reminder of the collective strength and dedication of this people-powered movement – and where we can go from here. I know I am going to fight even harder to defeat MAGA extremism and build the blue wave that takes back the House. And I hope you’ll join me. clean_body: | = Peter, I don’t know about you, but I am FIRED UP from what just happened in Wisconsin. What a great week for the power of people over the people in power. I never remembered voting for the richest person in the world to run our government, and I certainly didn’t remember our state’s northern neighbors asking him to put his thumb on the scale of their judicial elections, pulling out novelty checks and trying to bribe everyday people for his long-term personal gain. But last night, voters went to the polls and they resoundingly voted against Trump and Musk and for their rights and a better future for their state. Turns out, screwing over our small businesses, scientists, farmers and veterans is not a good way to make America great. This is proof that we’re tired of extremists flooding our state and local governments with dangerous legislation, while ignoring the basic needs of our communities. We need fewer extremists with a megaphone and more common-sense leaders who want to look after their neighbors, protect their community, and respect the rights of everyone. And this overwhelming enthusiasm we’re feeling is a powerful reminder of the collective strength and dedication of this people-powered movement – and where we can go from here. I know I am going to fight even harder to defeat MAGA extremism and build the blue wave that takes back the House. And I hope you’ll join me. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Together, -Eric | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up.

---
| | Family, it’s Cory. Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. clean_body: This is a moment where we must all speak up. | | Family, it’s Cory. Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend. = | | = = = = = With love and gratitude, Cory Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District. She's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of House Republicans. We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important. Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can she count on your support? = Nancy Pelosi is counting on you. If you want to stay updated but , let us know If you would like to completely from future emails, you can do so _ | Nancy Pelosi for Congress 700 13TH STREET NW Suite 800 Washington, DC 20005 United States | | Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105062675/537235008/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250402tariff_N_SB_90DO_4_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTFjMWI4NC0wNTEwLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KezxdXpCys_AmB_rxxhCHdxGCkXl1s7uSmouvzG2LUA=) Peter,

Today is what Trump is calling “Liberation Day.” But what does that really mean? It means **he’s once again playing politics with our economy** – this time by rolling out widespread tariffs that will drive up costs for everyday Americans.

Here’s what’s happening: Trump announced his plans to roll out a 25% tariff on auto imports, increasing car prices across the board (whether made in the U.S. or not). He also announced a _minimum_ baseline tariff of 10% on all countries across the world, with additional "reciprocal" tariffs on nations such as China, Europe, Vietnam, and around 60 other countries.

**Let’s be clear:** These policies will only work to raise costs for our families and communities – from cars and homes to groceries and beyond. Instead of helping American families, Trump is adding to their financial burden and pushing us closer to a Trump Recession and a global trade war.

[**We cannot allow this chaos and destruction to continue. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: attacks on choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
My Republican opponent has made her stance clear: she has stated she would support a near-total abortion ban.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105063266/537236756/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-04-02_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTA2NmE0ODAtMDYxMC1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Zqhrg_ZZpWS5nsu8RCC6vJYQvtZ9AUhMhXMpY03Qo4g=)
---
| Peter,

Today, my opponent spoke at the Virginia March for Life rally in Richmond. She stands with the current Governor of Virginia, who has said that he would “happily and gleefully” sign any anti-choice bill that comes across his desk.

Since the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , lawmakers across the country have introduced and passed dangerous legislation that restricts reproductive rights. It’s just cruel — women have died waiting for treatment while doctors have waited for them to become sick enough to intervene. The problem with waiting for the “life of the mother” provisions to provide care is that sometimes it’s too late, and that mother dies. It’s horrific, and Virginia is the only Southern state that hasn’t further restricted women’s reproductive rights or risked women’s lives since the _Dobbs_ decision, thanks to our Democratic-held General Assembly. We need to make sure those protections stand.

**My Republican opponent has made her stance clear: she has stated she would support a near-total abortion ban. In her current role as Lt. Governor, she even cast the tie-breaking vote against protecting the right to access contraception. Can you believe it? She voted against protecting women’s access to birth control!**

These attacks on choice have no place in Virginia. Virginians deserve a Governor who will stand up for reproductive rights and protect a woman’s right to keep her healthcare decisions between her and her provider – not with the government.

[_**I promise to protect women’s reproductive rights as Governor. clean_body: My Republican opponent has made her stance clear: she has stated she would support a near-total abortion ban. | = | Peter, Today, my opponent spoke at the Virginia March for Life rally in Richmond. She stands with the current Governor of Virginia, who has said that he would “happily and gleefully” sign any anti-choice bill that comes across his desk. Since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade , lawmakers across the country have introduced and passed dangerous legislation that restricts reproductive rights. It’s just cruel — women have died waiting for treatment while doctors have waited for them to become sick enough to intervene. The problem with waiting for the “life of the mother” provisions to provide care is that sometimes it’s too late, and that mother dies. It’s horrific, and Virginia is the only Southern state that hasn’t further restricted women’s reproductive rights or risked women’s lives since the Dobbs decision, thanks to our Democratic-held General Assembly. We need to make sure those protections stand. My Republican opponent has made her stance clear: she has stated she would support a near-total abortion ban. In her current role as Lt. Governor, she even cast the tie-breaking vote against protecting the right to access contraception. Can you believe it? She voted against protecting women’s access to birth control! These attacks on choice have no place in Virginia. Virginians deserve a Governor who will stand up for reproductive rights and protect a woman’s right to keep her healthcare decisions between her and her provider – not with the government. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Abigail Spanberger * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

body:

name: Cory Booker
subject: I’m tired and a little hoarse, but I cannot stay silent.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up.
| | |
---
Peter, it’s Cory.
Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.
I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up.
What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard.
I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment.
It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered.
It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together.
We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend.
**[If you’re willing and able, support our movement for justice, opportunity, and freedom by splitting a donation between me and Patty Murray today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105063410/537237241/1124001455?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk494-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDJmZjBlNi0wNjEwLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A5O_3B2M0ESh0smfk3c0g_vuP2J0Mj9i6EhI2GXYt60=)**

subject: We made it… barely

body:
The numbers from our first fundraising quarter are in, and they’re not good. We barely hit our FEC Quarterly target. |
---
[](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=6868311742dc4ff69cf50f3cfe00660b&_e=UgwmTrKCshlQGMSBOvoKVbFLuJQuXXEYjdLpftv3B6yhk0VEQGzdBCG1YVaG0Fse55HP5w33JUuoN8W6D2zCd5ojhYl43n-oJDI8gBnaeBDjkAt_ijL7DVHTu-6pm8I0bHT8vkQFTnqICAai5rYWpHzlewYJRcnFOfF8XadhNtPgOJnaq9t--3bBjZSh2XBR3Bl68a1VqEEKVkwEnobl4N2MaCj2-_OTwrKE1Wf5uvgFApnrJeBLblOENG6Rcd54TB1rgyvJmkaqxu9tg0OE4Z7znrgktzdVKIRuoekuNtu_8TO_qeJ7FE7bIxqJauHOzpErgxI7My03VU7MzPc4oszutlJa8H6142wSdxcVkaFHz6IuIGlSOmWvzeB9jRwvJEDnihCoe_2CLETApntLJw%3D%3D) Fellow American,

The numbers from our first fundraising quarter are in, and they’re not good. We barely hit our FEC Quarterly target.

At the same time, Democrats are seeing a surge of enthusiasm from their radical base.

If the recent elections in Florida and Wisconsin have shown us anything, it’s that Democrats are ALREADY ORGANIZED FOR 2026. If we’re going to keep Montana in Republican hands, it’s not enough to barely hit our fundraising target.

_**We need to come out of the gates for this second quarter on**_ 🔥.

[**I need your help to make a massive beginning-of-quarter fundraising push that’ll give my team the resources and funding to send Democrats a message—OUR BASE IS FIRED UP. clean_body: The numbers from our first fundraising quarter are in, and they’re not good. We barely hit our FEC Quarterly target. | Fellow American, The numbers from our first fundraising quarter are in, and they’re not good. We barely hit our FEC Quarterly target. At the same time, Democrats are seeing a surge of enthusiasm from their radical base. If the recent elections in Florida and Wisconsin have shown us anything, it’s that Democrats are ALREADY ORGANIZED FOR 2026. If we’re going to keep Montana in Republican hands, it’s not enough to barely hit our fundraising target. We need to come out of the gates for this second quarter on 🔥. Democrats think they have all the momentum at the moment. If our fundraising hits the gas in these first 24 hours of the quarter, we’ll erase any momentum Democrats think they have. I’m going all in to win this race, now I need to know if you’re with me. Will you step up and donate in the next 24 hours? For America, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: Cory Booker
subject: I’m tired and a little hoarse, but I cannot stay silent.
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up. | Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=22968%2E4449941%2Ee_ERNd) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=22968%2E4449941%2Ee_ERNd) It’s Cory.

**Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.**

I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up.

What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard.

I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment.

It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered.

It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together.

We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend.

[**_If you’re willing and able, support our movement for justice, opportunity, and freedom by splitting a donation between me and Fight for Reform today._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60437?amount=5&amounts=25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=3&akid=22968%2E4449941%2Ee_ERNd) | | [DONATE $5 NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60437?amount=5&amounts=25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=4&akid=22968%2E4449941%2Ee_ERNd)

name: Cory Booker
subject: I’m tired and a little hoarse, but I cannot stay silent.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up.
| | |
---
Derek, it’s Cory.
Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.
I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up.
What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard.
I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment.
It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered.
It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together.
We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend.
[**If you’re willing and able, support our movement for justice, opportunity, and freedom by splitting a donation between me and Chrissy Houlahan today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105064297/537240388/-1097959319?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1116-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmNhZDNiMS0wOTEwLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ohZKfzJoLjj2ydPYf2IoQJeurNnHIGk6r729jug37qg=)

name: Ritchie Torres
subject: Promises made, promises broken
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
I would know.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105064354/537240448/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2NhZDNiMS0wOTEwLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gu-bUYyr_htay1GkcpBDVToHgz55BASiGwjSk2KwbVk=)
---
Peter, it’s Ritchie. My personal connection to Donald Trump began long before he ran for office in 2016. [(You can click here to see what I mean.)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105064355/537240454/-101372175?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250402_EMDF_E2_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2NhZDNiMS0wOTEwLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gu-bUYyr_htay1GkcpBDVToHgz55BASiGwjSk2KwbVk=)

I grew up in the _Throggs Neck Houses,_ a crumbling public housing project among vermin, lead, and mold, across from Trump’s golf course in the Bronx. While the city shoveled over $100 million to develop this course, families like mine lived across the street in hunger and poverty.

So when he ran on the promise that he’d help working class families like mine, I knew better than to believe him.

**Peter, Donald Trump promised to lower taxes and lower costs.**

**→ He lied:** He is throwing around tariffs left and right that will mean _higher_ taxes on you and _higher_ prices for the goods and groceries you consume.

**Donald Trump promised to fight for working class families.

→ He lied:** He is delivering tax cuts for folks like Elon Musk by _slashing_ critical social safety nets like Medicare and Social Security for hardworking Americans.

**Donald Trump promised to strengthen our standing on the world stage.

→ He lied:** He is delivering _blow after blow_ to some of our longest standing allies, he gutted USAID, and he’s making a mockery of American politics.

**Donald Trump has done nothing but _hurt_ working class Americans, _dismantle_ critical agencies like the Department of Education, and _ignore_ the very principles of our Democracy. So much for _promises made, promises kept._**

[Peter, the greatest way that Democrats can fight back is give the fight to flip the House _everything_ we’ve got. That’s why I’m urgently rounding up support to flip the MAGA majority. Will you rush $3 to help us flip the House and limit the damage Trump can do? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105064356/537240455/-101372175?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250402_EMDF_E2_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2NhZDNiMS0wOTEwLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gu-bUYyr_htay1GkcpBDVToHgz55BASiGwjSk2KwbVk=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **[CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105064363/537240462/-101372175?amount=3&express_lane=true&refcode=RTFC_20250402_EMDF_E2_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2NhZDNiMS0wOTEwLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gu-bUYyr_htay1GkcpBDVToHgz55BASiGwjSk2KwbVk=)**

Thank you,

_Ritchie_
| | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

clean_body: I would know. | = Peter, it’s Ritchie. My personal connection to Donald Trump began long before he ran for office in 2016. = I grew up in the Throggs Neck Houses, a crumbling public housing project among vermin, lead, and mold, across from Trump’s golf course in the Bronx. While the city shoveled over $100 million to develop this course, families like mine lived across the street in hunger and poverty. So when he ran on the promise that he’d help working class families like mine, I knew better than to believe him. Peter, Donald Trump promised to lower taxes and lower costs. → He lied: He is throwing around tariffs left and right that will mean higher taxes on you and higher prices for the goods and groceries you consume. Donald Trump promised to fight for working class families. → He lied: He is delivering tax cuts for folks like Elon Musk by slashing critical social safety nets like Medicare and Social Security for hardworking Americans. Donald Trump promised to strengthen our standing on the world stage. → He lied: He is delivering blow after blow to some of our longest standing allies, he gutted USAID, and he’s making a mockery of American politics. Donald Trump has done nothing but hurt working class Americans, dismantle critical agencies like the Department of Education, and ignore the very principles of our Democracy. So much for promises made, promises kept. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you, Ritchie | | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458 www.torres.nyc Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in. Peter, please, consider making a =. body:
None of the incredible progress we’ve been able to make would have been possible without you by our side.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105064789/537241870/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-04-02_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY4Y2M1YmNkLTBiMTAtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Vu9GO0ObePPPfT3eLqGbT7h2g8LhtBc09Sgmbq7avD0=)

| Hey Peter,

I just wanted to take a moment to reach out to our top supporters and personally thank you for your support as we continue working to identify and train strong women leaders across the country to win elections and fight for their communities.

After over 20 years, we know what works. We’ve trained over **6,000 alums** , and with an average 70% win rate for our alums, we have helped elect more women at every level of government. _But they need resources, training, and a strong network of support behind them!_

**On Tuesday, 9 out of 10 Emerge alums on the ballot in Wisconsin won their race! That’s the power of the Emerge network.**

The Trump Administration is going after women’s rights, our democratic institutions that keep our elections free and fair, and funding for critical programs that uplift working families across the country.

**Our work has never been more important!** With Donald Trump back in the White House, more and more women across the country are stepping up to lead the charge and fight back.

[_**With your continued support, we will be able to train the next generation of Emerge women and ensure they have the tools and skills they need to defeat the MAGA agenda at the ballot box and protect our communities!**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105064790/537241871/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-04-02_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY4Y2M1YmNkLTBiMTAtZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Vu9GO0ObePPPfT3eLqGbT7h2g8LhtBc09Sgmbq7avD0=)
---

None of the incredible progress we’ve been able to make would have been possible without you by our side. Together, we will train even _more_ Emerge women to run, win, and lead.

Thank you,

A’shanti F. Gholar
President and CEO, Emerge

Judge Jeanine Pirro **[fired back at Jessica Tarlov on"The Five"](https://substack.com/redirect/ad946514-ca64-4d6d-a2c6-e80e60a4bb37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for claiming DOGE's efforts to cut waste, fraud and abuse in the federal government are unpopular with the American people.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/ad946514-ca64-4d6d-a2c6-e80e60a4bb37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ad946514-ca64-4d6d-a2c6-e80e60a4bb37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"The American public really doesn't like what DOGE is doing," Tarlov said, referencing a **[Quinnipiac poll from March 13](https://substack.com/redirect/07d49856-1b78-4813-897e-1a5cfb3bfc57?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** showing that 60% of voters disapprove of Elon Musk and DOGE's treatment of government workers.
Greg Gutfeld interjected, saying that the negative polling comes from the media's harsh messaging about DOGE rather than their actions.
| | POLL
---
Do you approve of Elon Musk and DOGE's work so far?
| [Yes](https://substack..34O8GCWHzrGU_2Eg-Er8K3p1mENcmg6GQmzkPlCjr5Q?)
---
[No](https://substack..7c0m2BY5xnuwrBD_zm8UETnIgIHC0mq28m1ososPmM8?)
[Somewhat](https://substack..MKWe62gQ9mzmHwTGAGG7yRSl6MbFgwceZJT-2PZ0N6s?)
[I don't know...](https://substack..z5xsoIyTrdO2A0uyvjN4t5KttfJQSVJni8666e6MmUw?)
"You don't think that people know that he's making millions of dollars a day off of government contracts and he wants to cut their Medicaid or Social Security?!" Tarlov pushed back.
Judge Jeanine couldn't sit quietly any longer, "Nobody burnt any cars when Bill Clinton did the same thing!"
"He didn't do the same thing, he worked with congress!" Tarlov fired back.
"Oh, he worked with congress, that's big of him,... congress has allowed all of this for the last 15 years!" Jeanine exploded. "That's the problem! While we pay for it,... None of this is honest, none of it is credible, none of it is real,... If you wanna close a Social Security office because there's no one going to it, it doesn't mean you're losing your Social Security check!!"
Jeanine continued, "We have spent so much money that doesn't go to the people it's intended to and **[nobody seems to give a damn!!"](https://substack.com/redirect/ad946514-ca64-4d6d-a2c6-e80e60a4bb37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

* * *
# **Senator Kennedy goes HOG WILD on twisted Democrat: "Let's look at your tweets!"**
Sen. John Kennedy **[sounded off on an ultra-woke legal professor Mary Anne Franks](https://substack.com/redirect/2b67f77e-8b10-44e4-a64f-7ee612dc7a9d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for her wild criticism of the Trump administration.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/2b67f77e-8b10-44e4-a64f-7ee612dc7a9d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2b67f77e-8b10-44e4-a64f-7ee612dc7a9d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Kennedy exposed how radically left-wing Franks was by reading her past tweets in front of congress.
"Here is one of your tweets, quote 'The majority of Americans hate women more than they love anything including democracy,' did I read that correctly?" Kennedy asked the witness.
"I probably said something along those lines..." Franks answered.
"But your political beliefs don't impact your feelings about President Biden or Prtesident Trump?" Kennedy pushed back.
"I don't have 'feelings' about either..." Franks snapped.
Kennedy returned fire with the perfect response, "It seems like your favorite 'feeling' is anger!"
Watch the tense questioning below:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/2b67f77e-8b10-44e4-a64f-7ee612dc7a9d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The same radical professor went toe-to-toe with former Navy SEAL Rep. Eli Crane in yet another explosive hearing.
"I'm still talking to you!" Crane snapped at Franks during questioning. "You seem to have a problem answering the questions that are being asked of you!"
[](https://substack.com/redirect/40370dbd-a98d-4e86-9380-109c7347a1a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Cory Booker
subject: I’m tired and a little hoarse, but I cannot stay silent.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up.
| [ ](https://takano4ca.us/l/mwiaumV0x9yA?t=G9czG2Zwq6Rv)
---
Peter, it’s Cory.

Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.

I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up.

What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard.

I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment.

It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered.

It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together.

We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend.

[**If you’re willing and able, support our movement for justice, opportunity, and freedom by splitting a donation between me and Mark Takano today. »**](https://takano4ca.us/l/pY85TD55Ctn8) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Cory Booker and Mark Takano and go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://takano4ca.us/l/iWoOevkekB9Q)

With love and gratitude,

Cory

Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, Republicans have captured a slim House Majority. The leadership of Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time.

name: Crow HQ
subject: We have momentum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Democrats had their first real test since the 2024 election yesterday, team.

In Wisconsin, voters showed up to elect Susan Crawford to the Wisconsin Supreme Court — despite Elon Musk having poured $25 million into the race to back her Trump-endorsed opponent.

And in two Florida’s special elections for Congress, Democrats significantly overperformed by double-digits in two ruby-red districts.

Voters are sending a strong message in these first elections of the year that they are unhappy with the Trump administration’s extreme agenda.

Here’s why this matters: Voters across the country are turning out to reject Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and their corrupt and deeply unpopular agenda which seeks to cut Medicaid and take away health care from Americans in order to fund more tax breaks for the wealthiest Americans and biggest corporations.

Democrats have the momentum right now — and Jason Crow is working to keep it up.

As the Recruitment Co-Chair, Jason is tasked with finding the right Democratic candidates to take back the House.

The road ahead to 2026 won’t be an easy one — but together, we can flip the House blue and show Trump and Musk that we will not accept their extreme agenda. Will you join Jason in this fight by pitching in $10 or more today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-apr25]

I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend. Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight – because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105064900/537242215/86887870?recurring=true&refcode=WUEFE408_20250402_WISCSubstack_PL_v1s4&sourceid=1055906&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTI3MWM3Zi0wYzEwLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f_SKZhb3awS6VAcIpW6Vw_FT16a4FHAc3_mqjVjUQVA=) Hi Peter,

This victory is a major win for abortion rights, voting rights, and election integrity — we couldn't be prouder of Judge Crawford or more grateful to supporters like you who made this win possible.

To keep the momentum going, we're offering you an exclusive opportunity to dive deeper into the significance of this victory and what's next for Democrats. By committing to a **recurring donation of $15/month or more** to EMILYs List, you can become a **Friend of the List** , granting you access to our **exclusive Substack publication** , _A Seat at the Table_ , where we're discussing:

* What this means for Democrats moving forward
* And much more...

clean_body: Susan Crawford's big win, what it means, and what's next for Democrats: | = Hi Peter, We have some exciting news to share: Judge Susan Crawford won her race for the Wisconsin Supreme Court! 🎉 This victory is a major win for abortion rights, voting rights, and election integrity — we couldn't be prouder of Judge Crawford or more grateful to supporters like you who made this win possible. To keep the momentum going, we're offering you an exclusive opportunity to dive deeper into the significance of this victory and what's next for Democrats. By committing to a recurring donation of $15/month or more to EMILYs List, you can become a Friend of the List , granting you access to our exclusive Substack publication , A Seat at the Table , where we're discussing: The impact of Susan Crawford's victory Elon Musk's humiliating defeat What this means for Democrats moving forward And much more... Here's a sneak peek at the post you'll get when you become a Friend of the List: = | = By becoming a Friend of the List, you'll not only stay informed about key political moments like this one, but you'll also help fund the movement to support women like Judge Susan Crawford across the country all cycle long. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for standing with EMILYs List through tough losses and incredible wins. Together, we can take back power and build a future where democracy is powered by the many, not the few. In solidarity, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

Happy Liberation Day! The White House released an epic video in honor of Liberation Day. President Trump has secured $5 Trillion in investments in the United States as company after company has decided to move manufacturing back into America. Along with the made in America movement, the president will unveil the global tariffs he intends to impose to bring fairness back to the global trading system, after all 170 countries have tariffs on U.S. products. President Trump is the only one bringing balance back to this long held deficit. While the special elections in Florida went well for the GOP, Wisconsin taught us a different lesson. We must get out to the ballot box. We know the Democrats playbook, it will be impeachments and wokeness all over again. Wisconsin should serve as a wake-up call for midterms and special elections in order to save and keep our republic. Josh Hammer unpacks all the legal matters that have unfolded recently. Do district judges have the jurisdiction to affect national change or are they restricted to the district they reside in? As the media spins tales about the deported MS-13 gang member from Maryland, Hammer answers the question as to whether non citizens have legal protections under the U.S. Constitution?
Featuring:
Josh Hammer
Senior Council | The Article III Project

body:
Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Referendum on the Administrative State.
| | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/xOp2DtdW9XkpviHHBN24rEex5GJyJDMPTyF5XqocgGkDJuseMK32fU6Ac2Na-u8VPffN7YZBqMsE2uYpVJggqjNDCVnotfAZ-aYYWHGKNJIOc1sYJWBMERHB7kU2YusxuDnLMQq9nFiPoX8Y3FwfzfFEm8-lyjHLeQnl1vckSyQ7Rbj44FMmne-j/JKL3_jsClnKUYcsT2yjORj7hat2K0cGC/7)_

---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/cs9VG-Zfq5n7_mVKFRkh0oghLpzXdGNqMoGIc2TuMFh2QpCEPiKlDgnh5B1fgK5k5-SQkdpIqhdqjSkNBr3n-Ws4SfpCMJJYBwf2Kar1f51tJr4q2QXI_QyhZPpgv8Ygn3pbyNGAP1cB4-1M0pqzcqnaHgE6yNayD2rm-AKof6LOxJQrhDa0tT7OOGGSh2rHiik7_DF2UVWaZx-5yrze4-9n2HBCY2wMFVOJ39aA21Hw-Gvl4iPIJm3PJzjaiAfABSY2r3wXezmy2AfbwN351TQEZ_USj2L5vQGFy9zeHXPzMCDo07feG8J8tWNj854AnKEjsTtIuv5GP2l1gfem4iACKivrTUWRFZcJ5q63iSvbcn4igdy4WYti6ApXqf2zSh0cTs4e8m-_Mh7EtpoGUcXbs6NgGuh8mBy_v9Aj4UvhgefUmSvzMf228HG3F0ewIx4BlO2gKncFpeUuAQ/zhsXC4imoc_cBaHDLbf7JcJDKzHlG6BM/7).

Responding will take only a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is very important to us...because, thanks to the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), we are able now to see in detail the horrendous waste of taxpayer money that has been going on at the hands of unelected and unaccountable federal bureaucrats.

Under the administrative state that has largely come to replace our Constitution over the past century, Americans citizens have been ruled without their consent. Nothing could run more counter to the principles on which our great country was founded almost 250 years ago.

The more we hear about taxpayer funded boondoggles such as sponsoring a transgender opera in Colombia and supporting research at China's Wuhan lab (yes, the same lab where COVID-19 originated!), the more we should be committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To make it happen, we need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will revive and preserve liberty? **Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/ElCWhqn-helJdtO2GA6jfh8grixgsCBXjR-zy1vb5qgXN2AFWH4qJsAeWd5667ugHWKnPFIFTlJxedoQbSjPNaxJdwaqVHESMKZLGX_3PeJqG-qm6Kr6iG5QQmyDce52zeQ-k6GMu9Lgf4HwUwHuavvsTIrK5I2wBeDv_mI3MqoS6CxDT6FkcVRDBI0LHA4npGEtNpqWzcNbBeTx-0q7FL6rKblz3J7yroNEdi-JGLD6Yg97jrNdh9wgzTnn7d_bvyNans41nBkhsAUPLTgCFV9-6uTJC4ysnbqw5Qbenh_VBF8_pgOUv-1RmoQeWNSPPLsLWV21DHlcvE79dsGby5rakYC8JCReFTvKdcG-VarNeaAQ8PtDKTkXhutbtymq4wr1P9AEmgN__2EtnW97xLeo6bPc-PZ11bpFIkFHmBibhQ5qB2QXMUVjIgzuao7DN0EGIIWeYFdZ5-WvJw/EiUP0fmS5E4NVeAk918rSqfW_LxrAHqm/7)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The administrative state is a grave threat to our country--and will continue to be until constitutional rule is fully restored.

Hillsdale College promotes this restoration of the Constitution in all of its many educational outreach efforts, including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs held on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty and limited government.

Your support of these efforts is essential...because unlike other American colleges and universities, Hillsdale refuses to accept any government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans.

Please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for your partnership in defense of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/NcNRdhkynBHXc50Rn3qPSnuKJNrTc6beRpiNorFJOMhra-gQEqCQxfGPnRU3A2A1mfozMfLMH1o9kWIE5R6arBQ1pdNwd_yjgkWH4V-KEbWzOpNWoXm9mJNE0A7R0GJRGM73Y7KAMQVz50FA2bWU5zBYwK8_cX4UPoid6FxmvzpMhbEzHmvAVDiCTgvBE3TzrI4injNJV8v1YCIRJMASSn_9dhfXNJTdXS6w4K6egDioEtBxd9BWm97lO3FDP9mjiZnyQxL6eXK5mZcTCsjVEwKTrb-exbyGSd4Zpy8-idhCpJMM7-jmjccFu-UWF8V3zSTJrmkIcPbbFqdVXNJEW5IgLag9gMgxnlTMkkM5VGUYtJW-IvGuEooOu9puzv1gPP8bfY4-rF7PTT7KZSpw1OlIZidzZMsLX14h3XyxVgkw9gszwymBy1mnty-Ymv_WFpzjW1ina8SauQQLCg/ZUNYnYu8UQGnnD_nzOCk-w3mItro0fVU/7)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

[Unsubscribe from all communications.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/xOp2DtdW9XkpviHHBN24rEex5GJyJDMPTyF5XqocgGkDJuseMK32fU6Ac2Na-u8VPffN7YZBqMsE2uYpVJggqjNDCVnotfAZ-aYYWHGKNJIOc1sYJWBMERHB7kU2YusxuDnLMQq9nFiPoX8Y3FwfzfFEm8-lyjHLeQnl1vckSyQ7Rbj44FMmne-j/JKL3_jsClnKUYcsT2yjORj7hat2K0cGC/7)

name: Mark Guethle
subject: Last night’s amazing news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association
body:
_[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105065599/537244905/-701826670?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_020425_FR_Wins&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWM5MjU0OTMtMGUxMC1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WONt_-OL0va0aVFjhDH2guEH1cCGa6ZlAo-lpvufAJA=)_
Team,

Last night was our municipal elections around the state, and I am so proud and excited to tell you that we had an incredible, record-breaking, history-making night.

Here is a quick rundown of some of our wins:

*** 1st African American Mayor in Urbana
* Clean sweep of all Normal Township offices
* Reelected Normal Mayor
* Flipped Galesburg Mayor & Galesburg Township Supervisor
* Won Rock Island Mayor and flipped all South Moline Township offices
* Picked up 1 contested seat on Springfield School Board - Dems now have a majority on that board
* Picked up seats on the St. Charles School Board
* For the first time in close to 60 years we have control of the Capitol Township Board (Springfield) winning 3 of the 4 seats and unseating 3 GOP incumbents
* Picked up a Township Supervisor in Makanda Township (Jackson County) that had been in GOP control for 40 years
* Won the Mayor of Metamora**

Combine these impressive wins with overwhelming victories in DuPage County and unseating Aurora GOP Mayor Richard Irvin.

This was a major night for us, full of victory and hope – and there’s one reason for it: county parties around our state have been building and preparing for years to get results like what we achieved last night.

**Last night proves that when we work hard, when we recruit good candidates, when we talk to voters about our plans for the future, and when we talk about the issues that matter, we win. Now we’ve got 2026 lined up and planning is already underway.**

[**If you want to help us double down on what we know is a good strategy and plan to move forward, you can donate right now to help keep our work going. We can’t do any of this without you.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105065601/537244907/-701826670?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_020425_FR_Wins&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWM5MjU0OTMtMGUxMC1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WONt_-OL0va0aVFjhDH2guEH1cCGa6ZlAo-lpvufAJA=)
[DONATE TO DEMOCRATIC VICTORY →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105065603/537244909/-701826670?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_020425_FR_Wins&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWM5MjU0OTMtMGUxMC1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WONt_-OL0va0aVFjhDH2guEH1cCGa6ZlAo-lpvufAJA=)Thank you for everything,

Mark Guethle
IDCCA President

clean_body: = Team, Last night was our municipal elections around the state, and I am so proud and excited to tell you that we had an incredible, record-breaking, history-making night. Here is a quick rundown of some of our wins: * 1st African American Mayor in Urbana Clean sweep of all Normal Township offices Reelected Normal Mayor Flipped Galesburg Mayor & Galesburg Township Supervisor Won Rock Island Mayor and flipped all South Moline Township offices Picked up 1 contested seat on Springfield School Board - Dems now have a majority on that board Picked up seats on the St. Charles School Board For the first time in close to 60 years we have control of the Capitol Township Board (Springfield) winning 3 of the 4 seats and unseating 3 GOP incumbents Picked up a Township Supervisor in Makanda Township (Jackson County) that had been in GOP control for 40 years Won the Mayor of Metamora Combine these impressive wins with overwhelming victories in DuPage County and unseating Aurora GOP Mayor Richard Irvin. This was a major night for us, full of victory and hope – and there’s one reason for it: county parties around our state have been building and preparing for years to get results like what we achieved last night. Last night proves that when we work hard, when we recruit good candidates, when we talk to voters about our plans for the future, and when we talk about the issues that matter, we win. Now we’ve got 2026 lined up and planning is already underway. = you for everything, Mark Guethle IDCCA President | | | | GET TEXT UPDATES FROM THE IDCCA! | | | | | | = = | | | | Contributions or gifts to the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association are not tax deductible. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: What I told Rachel Maddow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I joined Rachel Maddow to talk about how Donald Trump is putting our democracy at risk and what our campaign is doing to stop him.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250402-4914-footer&t=1&akid=4914%2E420207%2ENRvzlS)
Peter, I joined Rachel Maddow to talk about how Donald Trump is putting our democracy at risk and what our campaign is doing to stop him.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250402?refcode=em20250402-4914&amount=3&refcode2=4914_420207_NRvzlS&akid=4914%2E420207%2ENRvzlS)
[**I’ll explain more in just a moment, but if you already know you’re with us in the fight to protect our rights and our democracy, can you pitch in $3 to support our movement today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250402?refcode=em20250402-4914&amount=3&refcode2=4914_420207_NRvzlS&akid=4914%2E420207%2ENRvzlS)
**Right now Trump is putting our democracy at risk** , and it’s critical that we help people understand what’s happened during periods of democratic backsliding in other countries, especially regarding the resistance movements that emerge to fight back.
**That’s exactly why we launched the Resistance Labs.**
We’ve developed a curriculum to help folks understand how to go after the pillars of support that allow dictators to remain in power, and how to shift allies from being passive opponents to being active supporters of the resistance movement.
Threaded throughout are Dr. King’s principles of nonviolent resistance, and we work to plug people into actions that are happening right now in their communities, and also to prepare folks for potential moments of coordinated resistance and mass action in the future.
It was amazing to see more than _**1,500 people from 31 states**_ join last weekend’s training, and we have even more planned in the near future. No matter how bad things get, I’m inspired by this movement’s resilience and willingness to fight back.
**But Peter, these Resistance Labs are only made possible with your support. I don’t take money from corporations or their PACs — it’s grassroots donors who fund everything we do.**
[**So if you want to help us keep up this critically important work, will you pitch in $3 today? Every dollar adds up to help us continue the fight to preserve and strengthen our democracy.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250402?refcode=em20250402-4914&amount=3&refcode2=4914_420207_NRvzlS&akid=4914%2E420207%2ENRvzlS)

clean_body: I joined Rachel Maddow to talk about how Donald Trump is putting our democracy at risk and what our campaign is doing to stop him. Peter, I joined Rachel Maddow to talk about how Donald Trump is putting our democracy at risk and what our campaign is doing to stop him. Right now Trump is putting our democracy at risk , and it’s critical that we help people understand what’s happened during periods of democratic backsliding in other countries, especially regarding the resistance movements that emerge to fight back. That’s exactly why we launched the Resistance Labs. We’ve developed a curriculum to help folks understand how to go after the pillars of support that allow dictators to remain in power, and how to shift allies from being passive opponents to being active supporters of the resistance movement. Threaded throughout are Dr. King’s principles of nonviolent resistance, and we work to plug people into actions that are happening right now in their communities, and also to prepare folks for potential moments of coordinated resistance and mass action in the future. It was amazing to see more than 1,500 people from 31 states join last weekend’s training, and we have even more planned in the near future. No matter how bad things get, I’m inspired by this movement’s resilience and willingness to fight back. But Peter, these Resistance Labs are only made possible with your support. I don’t take money from corporations or their PACs — it’s grassroots donors who fund everything we do. Thank you, thank you, thank you for your support, Pramila Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

* They are not powerful enough to light fires in an instant.
* They are not brutal enough to drop an attacker.

| Peter, it’s Cory. Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend. Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. name: Johnny O
subject: There's a spring in my step
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Johnny O for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3]

S pring is on its way and, today, there’s a spring in my step.
D emocrats just notched a decisive victory in a major Wisconsin judicial race, with voters rejecting a MAGA extremist candidate whose campaign was fueled by $25 million in Elon Musk donations. Two other House races in Florida were significantly closer than expected.
S peaking of the House, Speaker Mike Johnson yesterday cancelled votes for the rest of the week and sent members home after nine Republicans joined Democrats to block a rule that would prevent new parents from being allowed to vote in absentia. This was a win not just for Democrats, but working families everywhere.
Before the House vote, I headed down the hall to cheer on Senator Cory Booker as he delivered his historic filibuster in protest of the Trump Administration’s assault on democracy. As a former history and government teacher, I especially appreciate that the new Senate filibuster record now belongs to Senator Booker rather than Senator Strom Thurmond – who had taken to the floor in an extended speech against the Civil Rights Act of 1957, intending to delay access to voting for black Americans.
The momentum is on our side. Will you contribute to help me keep up the fight? If we keep winning small battles, we can win the war.

body:

President Trump needs real reinforcements in Washington—fighters who will secure our border, cut the waste, and put hardworking Americans first – all things my opponent Susie Lee is against. |

Hey friend,

I wanted to follow up and make sure you saw my announcement.

I’m stepping up to run for Congress again because we can’t afford to let the radical left take control. **President Trump needs real reinforcements in Washington** —fighters who will secure our border, cut the waste, and put hardworking Americans first – _all things my opponent Susie Lee is against._

**This seat in NV-03 has already been named one of our top target House seats for 2026.**

So, if you’re with me in this fight, now is the time to step up. Take a look at my message below, and [**if you’re ready to help, I’d be grateful for your support.**](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=c3b18a94d4f94a07a80a1e7c677cbb94&_e=4pYRW56V01nqLRQoywPEXl_-9dIyL-7Xcknr2e0RA6yhj6pTFBz-8aOAboO2QvQA0c_0mjLzpCzzmxyO0YuxScFsJ1NNVsk9ODZFD7_wZf4cH50sXqYI90KTbgtpWCPRQsG7yDl9J4yF7kpisM4sIys2jxIgswB8lBtzn89-A0BVEyY2dgNwT9xIC6jwqcgelaYUbrroS07qggo9y765CvWzsWVx4Cm1cJp-tIAV52bvKrp5dY9YE6f5nqdn2akWCl04fLG14W0-OXPH-OVuXXioVxBaBLAR9cs20hnoiEiQFJ4SCrn3J_bvJ0L3fzvirOOLnbXcvIKa6Uk2NDwEcX61hrU6RghTNt2IwX5ug7x2eIH7HpvT7wNqqIWyLKxCPYl0mFMs37t2A2UktPPz-nB1PDsSjNFp_rc78AYbcFI%3D)

— Marty

Friend,

I have some exciting news to share with you...

But before I do, I need to reiterate what I’ve said before: **I’m a musician and a composer,_NOT a politician._**

But, like many of you, I’m sick and tired of watching swamp politicians (who claim to not be politicians...) in Washington lay waste to our country, misuse our tax dollars, abuse their power, and compromise our safety and security.

That’s why I ran for Congress in 2024. Unfortunately, we were not successful the first time. But, also unfortunately, we’re still facing many of the same problems, and we still have politicians in Washington–like Susie Lee–trying to resurrect the same failed agenda that voters just rejected in November.

**So, I’m excited to announce my intention to run for Congress in Nevada’s Third District,[and I’m asking you to join me as we launch this movement.](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=c3b18a94d4f94a07a80a1e7c677cbb94&_e=4pYRW56V01nqLRQoywPEXl_-9dIyL-7Xcknr2e0RA6yhj6pTFBz-8aOAboO2QvQA0c_0mjLzpCzzmxyO0YuxScFsJ1NNVsk9ODZFD7_wZf4cH50sXqYI90KTbgtpWCPRQsG7yDl9J4yF7kpisM4sIys2jxIgswB8lBtzn89-A0BVEyY2dgNwT9xIC6jwqcgelaYUbrroS07qggo9y765CvWzsWVx4Cm1cJp-tIAV52bvKrp5dY9YE6f5nqdn2akWCl04fLG14W0-OXPH-OVuXV65ofVJGb48JJUV5VW2GUZBTI2Y9yuQF8dZkg7V9_WxLkgzMx9QM3DIgyxJXW233p5-Ts2X8BOFqh71IRGxu7KfBPtM-BKrAgcqu6MPjMv-hLnN9VhWZ3ILxw7WxBP0Cv-bY3vFkc5itK03cKO2IYQ%3D)**

I will **fight for border security** , law and order, and the American worker.

I will **fight for the future of this country** —because we have to.

**Let’s stand strong together.[Join me in this mission, and let’s finish what we started.](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=c3b18a94d4f94a07a80a1e7c677cbb94&_e=4pYRW56V01nqLRQoywPEXl_-9dIyL-7Xcknr2e0RA6yhj6pTFBz-8aOAboO2QvQA0c_0mjLzpCzzmxyO0YuxScFsJ1NNVsk9ODZFD7_wZf4cH50sXqYI90KTbgtpWCPRQsG7yDl9J4yF7kpisM4sIys2jxIgswB8lBtzn89-A0BVEyY2dgNwT9xIC6jwqcgelaYUbrroS07qggo9y765CvWzsWVx4Cm1cJp-tIAV52bvKrp5dY9YE6f5nqdn2akWCl04fLG14W0-OXPH-OVuXT6iz5P6YSZ3aTH-MkeLbp7LLaHjr4FZ4dK4QCQm4B3jEKkI68kRZ8mNsmW20wY1MZ0-1Hs0lzMmSoijuA_nb8KD32I4IMAebEJ1cCxz1o-KHUMbP3T1qBjndPb1qad6wtzEEEIHtzBWwi1B63iFFks%3D)**

**Marty O’Donnell isn’t a politician** and he’s not taking any corporate PAC money. Marty will give us a voice – not special interests or Wall Street. It’s time to turn our nation around to make life better for Nevadans.

I will fight for border security , law and order, and the American worker. I will fight for the future of this country —because we have to. Let’s stand strong together. Thank you! Marty O’Donnell Republican for Congress, Nevada’s Third District | ABOUT MARTY Marty O’Donnell isn’t a politician and he’s not taking any corporate PAC money. Marty will give us a voice – not special interests or Wall Street. It’s time to turn our nation around to make life better for Nevadans. Marty O’Donnell has an ear for solving problems. He’s an award-winning composer who wrote the iconic soundtracks for the video games Halo and Destiny. Marty will cut through the noise in DC. Marty O’Donnell will be a champion for Nevada families. As a husband, father, and grandfather, Marty can’t sit on the sidelines as local families struggle because of the problems created by Big Government. | PAID FOR BY MARTY FOR CONGRESS** Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

subject: I’m tired and a little hoarse, but I cannot stay silent.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105066669/537248380/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250402_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODk2OTg0ODEtMTIxMC1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sJ2s5MnNzM5rWJpvqt6Oj7CU7gZ4uAQIjmVpzUANd3Q=)

Family, it’s Cory. Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people. I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard. I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment. It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered. It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together.
