name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: Thank you.
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105066796/537248915/846650059?refcode=em-4.2.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTdmOTM3Yi0xMzEwLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TB6ZxrByc5xDrZIJ61TOOjR4Yu_KxwBQQIgg0wmb3iI=) Folks, I can't thank you enough for your continued support. Because of dedicated folks like you, we hit our first FEC fundraising goal. When our report goes public, we’ll be sending a clear message: our grassroots coalition is strong, growing, and ready to fight for our agenda that actually helps uplift people. I know there are times when this political moment can feel exhausting -- and sometimes downright disheartening. That’s why your continued engagement means so much. Whether it’s replying to emails, volunteering, or just staying informed. You’re showing up, and that makes all the difference. And last night in Wisconsin, we saw how our action can make a meaningful difference at the ballot box. Democrats are turning out in historic numbers, rejecting extremism and defending our democracy. **That energy? It’s real, and it’s on us to keep building it.** We’re in this together, and I couldn’t ask for a better team to stand with. More soon, Kristen

### **Elon Musk's Oval Office Sob Fest: When Billionaire Tears Flood the White House**
In a scene to rival the most melodramatic soap opera, Elon Musk transformed the Oval Office into his personal therapy chamber, complete with sobs, sniffles and a desperate plea for validation from President Trump. It's almost as pathetic as it is poetic: the self-proclaimed genius entrepreneur, who's treated his Tesla customers as Pete Hegseth does an empty bottle of Jack Daniel's; a weeping, wailing, whimpering meat-sack of waterworks bawling to the very embodiment of weaponized assholery.
**CLICK ON THE AUDIO BELOW, TRUST ME, IT 'S WORTH IT!!**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/69c306cd-855f-45cd-a377-66a4577850f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This emotional unburdening comes on the heels of Tesla's stock taking a nosedive, much like Musk's reputation for honesty, vision, leadership and adulthood. Perhaps the pressures of juggling 14 CEO jobs he had not business taking on simultaneously, while fathering kids at a Genghis-Khan-like pace, finally punctured the bubble of invincibility he so carefully curated.
Or maybe, just maybe, the realization that his Twitter tantrums and impulsive business decisions have real-world consequences has hit him harder than an unglued Cybtruck panel on a highway. Either way, the man who once aimed for Mars is now struggling to navigate the basic gravity of what we here on Earth call, "not being a total prick."
It's kinda hard to ignore the irony of a billionaire seeking solace from a president whose empathy is as elusive as a profitable Musk enterprise, or a multi-syllabic word pronounced correctly in a Marjorie Taylor Greene sentence.
_**Blue Amp 's reader supported: **_**WE NEED YOU** _**. If you want indie media to keep up the fight vs fascism,**_**Please become a Paid Subscriber so we can continue this work.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.99VeIrLqAoky9pLUgA73OSIVLtZbCJ_dYCwNwoa6hzo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=160427132)
But, I see why you'd feel sorry for a hubristic, hangnail of a human. A guy who said someone trying to save children trapped in a cave was a "pedophile," that military vet/astronaut, Sen. Mark Kelly's a traitor, has attacked private persons on Twitter, libeling them til they get death threats and must flee, sexually harassed a SpaceX employee, did a Seig Heil at the GOP Convention + roughly 189.5 other things that make him as repulsive personally as he's stupid politically. And we haven't gotten to government workers he fired without warning via email. Yeah, lotsa sympathy for him.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b4bc38d8-e99b-4c9d-b086-1bcda0123344?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**BUT WAIT, THERE 'S MORE!...**

Derek, another Democrat just entered the race to be California’s next governor.
With more than ten candidates in the race, this is a crowded primary field. But polling shows that among candidates currently in the race Katie Porter is the clear favorite.
**But here’s the deal—primaries like this are unpredictable, and running in a huge state like California takes serious resources.** We can’t for a second take our foot off the gas, and that’s where you come in.
In a competitive primary like this one, early support for a candidate can make all the difference.
**[The stakes for California, our country, and our party couldn’t be higher. Katie Porter is the governor California needs, so to help elect her we’re asking you to chip in $5 right now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250402_2_ak?refcode=em20250402-39606&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39606_3422442_97sRbd&akid=39606%2E3422442%2E97sRbd)**

But here’s the deal—primaries like this are unpredictable, and running in a huge state like California takes serious resources. We can’t for a second take our foot off the gas, and that’s where you come in. In a competitive primary like this one, early support for a candidate can make all the difference. Thanks for anything you can give. Team KP 2026 Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change.

name: Team TFVC
subject: New Film Exposes COVID Lies!
body:
| |
---
Award-Winning Documentary Tells the Truth About Vaccines! | | [View in browser](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTUwNjEyMDE2MDU0MTQyNTU1LFwiclwiOjE1MDYxMjA2MDc0MDI1NzM0N30iLCJzIjoiYmNmMWFlMmVmYjEzNWUzOCJ9)
| |
---
| [ ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTUwNjEyMDE2MDYxNDgyNTg4LFwiclwiOjE1MDYxMjA2MDc0MDI1NzM0N30iLCJzIjoiNDFiZDQyMjVhMDc4YTI5YSJ9)
---
|
---
Peter, Breaking news from the New York Times, everyone! Apparently, “ _We were badly misled_ ” about the events of 2020. **You don’t say...** It truly is unbelievable that the NYT would take this passive tone after all the media’s efforts to silence, disparage, and criminalize those of us who tried to sound the alarm about the lies surrounding COVID, especially the vaccines. Fortunately, many brave individuals are willing to speak out. In the award-winning documentary _Follow the Silenced,_ the filmmakers expose the lies surrounding COVID and bring awareness to the victims of the “Plandemic.” **TFVC is a proud collaborator on this project, which won Best of Festival and Best Director at the Santa Monica Film Festival on March 15.** Over 500 people came out to view the film, and I have to believe every single one was affected by its revelations and the raw emotion on screen.

|
---
| [ ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTUwNjEyMDE2MDY2NzI1NDY5LFwiclwiOjE1MDYxMjA2MDc0MDI1NzM0N30iLCJzIjoiMzA0MGIyNDFiMWUwNjM1YSJ9)
---
|
---
We are so honored and grateful to be part of the production of this groundbreaking film, which gives a voice to vaccine-injured by telling their heart-breaking and inspirational stories. Thanks to our wonderful supporters, we were able to present Brianne Dressen, the film’s heroine and founder of React19, with a large donation to help pay for the travel and hotels for many of the vaccine-injured individuals in the film. Brianne and countless others live with pain every day because of their vaccine injuries, and the day of the premiere was no different. Seeing their brave and determined spirit despite their physical pain was truly inspirational. Make no mistake, we were not simply “misled.” We were outright lied to by our government and Big Pharma, and TFVC will continue to expose these lies. Thank you for supporting us in this journey! Your contributions are truly making an impact on the lives of people across Texas and beyond.

|
---
| | | **Gratefully,**
**Rebecca Hardy** **President, TFVC****
**
---|---|---
|
---
P.S. Be on the lookout for announcements from TFVC on the Texas World Premiere of _Follow the Silenced_!
|
---
| |
---
|
---
|
##### Texans for Vaccine Choice

name: Cory Booker
subject: I'm tired and a little hoarse, but I cannot stay silent. -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up.
| | | Family, it's Cory.

Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.

I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up.

What's clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard at the ballot box.

I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment.

It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered.

It will show that when our president and his allies chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together to defeat them.

Democratic Senators are fighting Trump's agenda tooth and nail, but GOP groups are already preparing to spend millions to keep control of the Senate.

[**If you're willing and able, support our movement for justice, opportunity, and freedom by splitting a donation between me and the DSCC today to help Democrats win across the country.**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21386?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20250402-CoryBooker-BookerTandemPostSpeech-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20250402-CoryBooker-BookerTandemPostSpeech-Pros-sl1&akid=19972%2E9716520%2EmHjIat)

subject: Re: Cory Booker’s historic speech
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105067660/537252142/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDQ1ZGZmNy0xNjEwLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m_NatC0LZiXgItFt-S8QMYMkyzIozSaS-1BSr2PYilA=&emci=fec4c687-1310-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7445dff7-1610-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=9818364)
---

| | Yesterday, I had the great honor of joining my friend Cory Booker on the Senate floor for part of his marathon speech. Cory spoke for over 25 hours straight – _breaking the all-time Senate record_ – because he knows what millions of Americans also know: **that we cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk take a sledgehammer to the Constitution, the rule of law, and the needs of the American people.** This is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What's clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across the country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard – that much was clear as my office got waves of calls cheering on Cory and urging more Democrats to take a stand like he is. So let's make sure that history shows we rose to meet this moment. Let history show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. [**I'm so proud of Cory for giving our shared movement and values a much-needed boost of adrenaline. clean_body: | | | | Yesterday, I had the great honor of joining my friend Cory Booker on the Senate floor for part of his marathon speech. Cory spoke for over 25 hours straight – breaking the all-time Senate record – because he knows what millions of Americans also know: that we cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk take a sledgehammer to the Constitution, the rule of law, and the needs of the American people. This is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up. What's clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across the country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard – that much was clear as my office got waves of calls cheering on Cory and urging more Democrats to take a stand like he is. So let's make sure that history shows we rose to meet this moment. Let history show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. = Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll split your contribution between Cory Booker and Ron Wyden instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = Onward Ron | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. name: Cory Booker
subject: I spoke for over 25 hours straight on the Senate floor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez
body:
This is a moment where we must all speak up.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105067757/537252529/1551397425?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-04-02_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmYxYmVkNi0xNzEwLWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BzwO-8jhQq3M4yMqSlNZvEVYXrOe66Vgxj0iAaM79ZY=)
---
Peter, it’s Cory.

Yesterday, I stepped off the Senate floor after speaking for over 25 hours straight — because I cannot stand idly by while Donald Trump and Elon Musk completely disregard the rule of law, the Constitution, and the needs of the American people.

I may be tired and a little hoarse, but as I said again and again in the Senate: this is a moment where we cannot afford to be silent. We must speak up.

What’s clear to me is that this is just the beginning. Americans across this country, no matter their title or party, are ready to be heard.

I believe that history will show we rose to meet this moment.

It will show that we did not let the chaos and division go unanswered.

It will show that when our president chose to spread lies and sow fear, we chose to come together, to work together, and to rise together. We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot to counter the Trump-Musk agenda and the millions GOP groups are preparing to spend. Your support has led us to overcome the odds again and again. While it’s clear we have so much work ahead of us, I’ve appreciated your encouragement and insight.

I look forward to the year ahead as we build the groundwork to defend this seat in 2026 and deliver a majority that fights for all of us, not just the wealthy few.

Hillary

name: Lucas Kunce via Substack
subject: America Just Blew its Brains Out
body:
Yesterday morning, a line of hundreds of people wrapped around the U.S.

# [America Just Blew its Brains Out](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=160458318&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwNDU4MzE4LCJpYXQiOjE3NDM2MzU3ODMsImV4cCI6MTc0NjIyNzc4MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.kWN3bBufLYYCCZJCImUF9qG2Oo5uGpFoNqXd776TuCM)

| Apr 2
---
| [](https://substack.com/@lucastyree)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=160458318&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwNDU4MzE4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0MzYzNTc4MywiZXhwIjoxNzQ2MjI3NzgzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTg2Nzc0MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Q_pZLLrZLiTxXK0uThqBfuF28AczmtDVKk0A4lajMsA&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=160458318&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwNDU4MzE4LCJpYXQiOjE3NDM2MzU3ODMsImV4cCI6MTc0NjIyNzc4MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.kWN3bBufLYYCCZJCImUF9qG2Oo5uGpFoNqXd776TuCM&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=160458318&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwNDU4MzE4LCJpYXQiOjE3NDM2MzU3ODMsImV4cCI6MTc0NjIyNzc4MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.kWN3bBufLYYCCZJCImUF9qG2Oo5uGpFoNqXd776TuCM)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/lucaskunce/p/america-just-blew-its-brains-out?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Yesterday morning, [a line of hundreds of people wrapped around](https://substack.com/redirect/a4bdfced-76f3-4a84-8eac-acb2b5b0b44d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the U.S. Health and Human Services Department headquarters-- the agency that oversees the FDA, CDC, NIH, and CMS. It wasn't everyday Americans waiting for appointments, or applying for services, or the hottest pop-up food truck, or anything like that.
No, yesterday hundreds of researchers, scientists, doctors, support staff, and others were lined up outside their workplace waiting to hear that their service to their country had just been terminated.
Some mused aloud if it was a cruel April fool's day joke. But it wasn't a joke.
It was the moment America pulled the trigger and blew its brains out.
Here's what I mean.
Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9sdWNhc2t1bmNlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.6afYSj8vC9uFqo_mb6fJxMRcAYxmU8AWvq83DDCCSao?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=160458318)
Free market idealogues continuously complain about government regulation and government agencies. They claim that faceless bureaucrats stifle production and destroy the free market. It's a belief that a lot of billionaire-funded politicians agree on, from classic Koch-funded global free traders to protectionist domestic free traders like JD Vance, who recently [proclaimed to a packed house of tech bros](https://substack.com/redirect/7e49d2e0-7173-4b10-8dac-095d479114c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that we ruined America when "we over-regulated our industries."
These billionaires and their political lackeys describe a free market utopia where no government ever interacts with them and market-based decisions rule all interactions. They claim that getting rid of government and all regulations and oversight is the key to unlocking infinite prosperity and happiness for all.
Besides the obvious faults with this logic, a real irony of it is that eliminating bureaucrats in the name of the free market actually destroys the ability of the free market to function at its most basic level.
One of the foundational principles of _their_ free-market economy is that accurate market-based decisions require all market participants, like buyers and sellers, to have accurate or equal information to base their decisions on. If they don't, and information is asymmetrical, then "correct" economic decisions won't be made, the free market loses its "magic hand" efficiency, and ultimately fails.
Taking it back to our HHS employees, let's say a company starts selling a drug, we'll call it Snoo-Z, for nausea, anxiety, and trouble sleeping. It's cheap and effective, so word of mouth spreads like wildfire and soon people everywhere are talking about and taking Snoo-Z. The company and its shareholders, who have the best and cheapest product on the market, are rewarded for their innovation and investment by profiting marvelously and outrunning all of their competitors.
Its precisely the free-market utopia the billionaires are talking about and, according to them, why we shouldn't have organizations like the FDA getting in the way of or slowing down the free market, consumer decision-making, and everyone's happiness.
Incidentally, as Snoo-Z is flying off the shelves, doctors start noticing tens of thousands of serious birth defects and miscarriages more per year than ever before. They suspect something is wrong, but can't connect the dots. When the drug company is occasionally asked, they reply that their studies show all of their drugs, including Snoo-Z, are completely safe, so the public keeps looking for the cause and sucking down Snoo-Z pills.
Of course, in this scenario, Snoo-Z is the cause of the defects. But, since consumers don't have that information and have no way of figuring out on their own, they keep buying and rewarding a company that is killing their children.
This is an example of how the free market fails due to lack of information on the consumer side. And a lesson in how regulators and the government, rather than suppressing the free market as our billionaire idealogues claim, they actually serve a critical role in making it work by serving as consumers' information equalizers and breaking the information asymmetry between consumers and corporate megaliths.
This isn't even a hypothetical, the above scenario actually played out exactly like that in the late 1950s and early 1960s, with a drug called thalidomide, that caused tens of thousands of birth defects around the globe.
Except, it didn't cause them in the United States of America.
Because an FDA pharmacologist, Frances Oldham Kelsey, refused to let big pharma bully her into approving their sale of thalidomide in America. Her reason, something that none of us normal consumers would have come to without her expertise, was that the drug company testimonials lacked proper scientific methodology. Which she based on recognizing that the drug company study authors had published suspicious articles in the past.
In fact, as we all discovered later, the company had discovered in its internal studies that birth defects were discovered in testing on rats, but didn't disclose those findings and instead pressured the FDA, who stood firm, to approve the drug on the basis that it had already been approved in most of the world, including Europe, and that it would be bad for America and Americans to not approve it here.
As consumers, who can never have information parity with massive companies, Frances Oldham Kelsey and her colleagues served as our information equalizers and led Americans to the proper free market decision on whether or not to buy Thalidomide in the 1950s and 1960s. Without these regulators, the market would have failed spectacularly in its supposed purpose: using market incentives to create correct decision making that rewards the deserving.
There are thousands of examples of this throughout recent American history. Asbestos, round-up, listeria outbreaks in contaminated food.
Without the people like Frances Oldham Kelsey, like the men and women lined up around the HHS building yesterday morning, and the thousands more across our country who are being fired this week in the name of the free market, we would not know how to make the right decisions as consumers.
The former, or soon-to-be former, employees waiting to be fired outside HHS HQ yesterday did not inhibit the free market, they made it function by giving us information parity. They were literally our brains in the free market.
The saddest part for me is that we all instinctively know we don't personally have enough information make good consumer decisions. It's why we obsess over reading reviews of trinkets restaurants. But while our fellow consumers are incredible sources of information and experience multipliers for many things, we need real expertise to fill in the gaps when dealing with massively complex, opaque, or deeply scientific products and industries and the armies of scientists and PR folks employed in the service of corporate America.
Without our own scientists and experts, knowing that we don't have enough information to make educated decisions on our own, we will turn more and more to the only place left to us: the internet.
A place where, much like the top levels of HHS, conspiracy theories on everything from vaccines to fluoride abound.
April Fool's Day has never seemed more aptly named.
Lucas

body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=1VXSEKEWherDrZDhXrOMCc%2BEYhOr4OU7AiEazMOFOkIy6jiyQVbkxd4L2KyT5L0kQCZef1V1YcUeAS%2B7EiLcKbtP5yNM%2FIlVDtPxoydBBpl%2BfF%2FFJE%2FlZwDcqoIZXyufdvihix6FhZhMeswyyHW%2Bql8Ch%2BXG19vwKYFkItsqQDCNNUpQIbkg%2F5Sz1yO0ysbY02yvXNzT5Lz%2FFaeQjjQpDDWFmnFHMlR72dE6wg%2FCWd8P7ztoYHOm9w9Tm%2FAjKBAcxPJkYCY2b1wrAsMVj%2F8F0DnMrzNjIcO3%2Bx5GitRaFDs4hBY4J4I3Dyl3XGykTZI%2Fi9yxUoIvqlUo%2FedlibrJRYgCJQPDdbpaZf387BNJm6njjj7Jns%2FfKx5sSeT2ocC2iwJ8uyXVyC1oizcVU814g6c0B5keYE5dwoqEaJJ48IU%3D]

# [#]
We are so grateful to have you on our side, Peter.

Our grassroots supporters make it so we’re able to keep fighting for a stronger, more progressive Texas each and every day.

Thanks to donors like you, we’re building relationships on-the-ground, engaging with Texans on the issues that matter most to them, and linking those issues to voting when elections come around. We couldn’t do it without your help, so thank you.

When you chip in, you bring us that much closer to the future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of everyday Texans – regardless of our age, race, gender, or ZIP Code.

Every little bit makes a difference, so thank you, Peter!

– Texas Organizing Project PAC

PS – You can still chip in now after our end-of-quarter deadline and help us get a head start on our April fundraising goal! We still need support to keep our year round operations running. Our grassroots supporters make it so we’re able to keep fighting for a stronger, more progressive Texas each and every day. Thanks to donors like you, we’re building relationships on-the-ground, engaging with Texans on the issues that matter most to them, and linking those issues to voting when elections come around. We couldn’t do it without your help, so thank you. When you chip in, you bring us that much closer to the future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of everyday Texans – regardless of our age, race, gender, or ZIP Code. Every little bit makes a difference, so thank you, Peter! – Texas Organizing Project PAC PS – You can still chip in now after our end-of-quarter deadline and help us get a head start on our April fundraising goal! name: Justice Democrats
subject: Rashida and Pramila’s resolutions to block arms sales to Israel
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

This week, Justice Democrats Rep. Rashida Tlaib and Rep. Pramila Jayapal
are joining Senator Bernie Sanders in reintroducing resolutions to stop
all arms sales to Israel ASAP.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/jd-em-20250402-arms-sales/?source=em20250402-36555&akid=36555%2E1203867%2EUi3wgj ]Tweet from Congresswoman Rashida Tlaib which reads "Joining Rep.
Jayapal to introduce House versions of Sen. Sanders' JRDs to block the
sale of new bombs and weapons to the Israeli government. With Netanyahu
violating the ceasefire in Gaza and resuming the genocidal bombing
campaign, we need to save lives and stop the killing.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/jd-em-20250402-arms-sales/?source=em20250402-36555&akid=36555%2E1203867%2EUi3wgj ]Will you sign our petition to support them before Congress votes on
their resolutions as soon as today?

Since Israel’s government ended the ceasefire and renewed its
indiscriminate attacks on Gaza, they’ve killed another 700 people and
pushed the total Palestinian death toll over 50,000 – nearly a third being
under 18 years old.

On top of that, the Israeli military is still targeting health care and
humanitarian aid workers. They are still burying victims in shallow mass
graves. And they are still blocking all food, medicine, and other aid from
entering Gaza, causing mass starvation and suffering.

What is happening in Gaza is nothing short of genocide and ethnic
cleansing. The United States should be doing everything in its power to
stop this, not continue supplying the bombs and weapons to carry it out.

By forcing a vote on the resolutions to block arms sales to Israel, we
have a chance to stop our country from being complicit in these crimes
against humanity.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/jd-em-20250402-arms-sales/?source=em20250402-36555&akid=36555%2E1203867%2EUi3wgj ]So Peter, will you sign our
petition demanding Congress block any new weapons sales to Israel until a
permanent ceasefire is reached and aid to Gaza is restored?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/jd-em-20250402-arms-sales/?source=em20250402-36555&akid=36555%2E1203867%2EUi3wgj ]Sign the Petition

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250402-36555-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36555_1203867_Ui3wgj&akid=36555%2E1203867%2EUi3wgj

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36555%2E1203867%2EUi3wgj

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:

program to curb violence with an ex-con charged with two felonies
since D.C. officials hired him to be a violence interrupter, a
disgraced councilman—Trayon White.

The scandals keep piling up in the District of Columbia’s
ill-fated program to curb violence with an ex-con charged with two
felonies since D.C. officials hired him to be a violence interrupter,
a disgraced councilman—Trayon White—busted for taking tens of
thousands of dollars in cash bribes to help extend violence prevention
and youth services contracts and another high-ranking official
pleading guilty to bribery for using her official government
position to help a friend get contracts and grants. As millions of
taxpayer dollars pour into D.C.’s questionable anti-violence
initiative fraud and corruption continue to rock the program, and
crime remains high in the neighborhoods it is supposed to help.

Read More
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73140&L=34895&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGMtYW50aS1jcmltZS1wcm9ncmFtLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=d8dff1da9c76c8eaa0e02e7fa7af84412343fc7ea8222f17516fdb7b366a33b1]

[alttext] [*****] April 02, 2025 [image] [] RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch"_ - SEAN HANNITY Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. Order Tom Fitton's Must-Read Today! [] [article-image] [] The scandals keep piling up in the District of Columbia’s ill-fated program to curb violence with an ex-con charged with two felonies since D.C. officials hired him to be a violence interrupter, a disgraced councilman—Trayon White—busted for taking tens of thousands of dollars in cash bribes to help extend violence prevention and youth services contracts and another high-ranking official pleading guilty to bribery for using her official government position to help a friend get contracts and grants. As millions of taxpayer dollars pour into D.C.’s questionable anti-violence initiative fraud and corruption continue to rock the program, and crime remains high in the neighborhoods it is supposed to help. name: Democrats.org
subject: Momentum
body:
Take a look at last night’s election results:
---
Momentum is on Democrats’ side, Derek — take a look at last night’s election results: In Wisconsin, Judge Susan Crawford decisively defeated MAGA candidate Brad Schimel, even after Elon Musk poured tens of millions of dollars into the race. In Florida, Democrats dramatically overperformed in two special congressional elections. Democrat Gay Valimont claimed the best performance from a Democrat in Florida’s 1st Congressional District _this century_ and became the first Democrat in almost two decades to flip Escambia County. In Florida’s 6th, Democrat Josh Weil secured a massive overperformance in a Trump +30 district. **People across the country are furious with what they’re seeing from Trump and Elon Musk — and they’re voting accordingly.** [As DNC Chair Ken Martin says, the thing about momentum is that it’s contagious, and now it’s up to us to keep it going. The DNC invested in both Wisconsin and Florida’s state parties to help reach as many voters as possible in the last few weeks, and we’re committed to doing the same to help support Democrats in upcoming special elections nationwide. Can you chip in to help fund this work? ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?refcode=em_20250402_3127_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3127_22930333_n3_tRT&akid=3127%2E22930333%2En3_tRT) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250402_3127_fr&refcode2=3127_22930333_n3_tRT&akid=3127%2E22930333%2En3_tRT)**
